subject: Sanaa na Ubunifu: Miaka 2 – 3
title_sw: Shughuli 1: Kutambua Rangi
title_en: Activity 1: Recognising Colours
about_sw: Utambuzi wa rangi mbalimbali, kujenga mahusiano, kushirikiana na kukuza lugha, uhusiano wa macho na kuonesha hisia.
about_en: Recognition of various colours, building relationships, cooperation and language development, eye coordination, and expressing feelings.
materials_sw: Kadi na picha mbalimbali za rangi, mikebe yenye rangi tofauti tofauti (Zingatia rangi za msingi: Nyekundu, manjano, bluu).
materials_en: Various colour cards and pictures, containers of different colours (Focus on primary colours: Red, yellow, blue).
steps_sw:
1. Andaa mazingira rafiki ya ujifunzaji ukiweka vifaa vyote mezani au kwenye sakafu kulingana na mazingira.
2. Kaa mkao ambao watoto wote wataweza kukuona.
3. Waoneshe watoto kadi za rangi mbalimbali ulizoandaa.
4. Waongoze watoto kubainisha kwa kuoanisha rangi walizoziona.
5. Waongoze watoto kukaa katika vikundi kwa kuzingatia rangi walizozibainisha.
6. Wapongeze watoto kwa kuweza kubainisha rangi mbalimbali.
7. Wape fursa watoto kuchagua rangi wanazopendelea.
8. Chunguza Watoto wanavyobaini rangi mbalimbali wanaposhiriki shughuli hiyo na kutoa msaada kwa mwenye uhitaji.

Tanbihi:
1. Endapo kuna mtoto mwenye changamoto ya kuona, tumia mbinu nyingine shirikishi mfano, kumgusisha kitu mkononi, na kumwezesha kutumia milango mitano ya fahamu, kukuza kadi kwa mtoto mwenye uoni hafifu, kwa mtoto kiziwi kutoa maelekezo kwa kumwonyesha vitendo.
2. Shughuli hii itakamilika ndani ya vipindi vitatu kwa siku tofauti.

Ushiriki wa wazazi nyumbani: Mwelekeze mzazi amwongoze mtoto kutaja aina mbalimbali za rangi na kuoanisha na vitu vyenye rangi mbalimbali katika mazingira ya nyumbani.
steps_en:
1. Prepare a friendly learning environment by placing all materials on a table or on the floor according to the setting.
2. Sit in a position where all children can see you.
3. Show the children the various colour cards you have prepared.
4. Guide the children to identify by matching the colours they have seen.
5. Guide the children to sit in groups according to the colours they have identified.
6. Praise the children for being able to identify various colours.
7. Give children the opportunity to choose their favourite colours.
8. Observe how children distinguish various colours while participating in the activity and provide support to those who need it.

Note:
1. If there is a child with a visual impairment, use other inclusive methods such as letting them touch objects, enabling them to use the five senses, enlarging cards for a child with low vision, and for a deaf child give instructions by demonstrating actions.
2. This activity will be completed within three sessions on different days.

Parent participation at home: Guide the parent to help the child name various colours and match them to coloured objects in the home environment.

subject: Sanaa na Ubunifu – Kujenga Stadi Zinazohusisha Utendaji wa Mikono
title_sw: Kutambua rangi
title_en: Identifying Colours
about_sw: Utambuzi wa rangi mbalimbali, kujenga mahusiano, kushirikiana na kukuza lugha, uhusiano wa macho na kuonesha hisia.
about_en: Recognition of various colours, building relationships, cooperation and language development, eye coordination and expression of feelings.
materials_sw: Kadi na picha mbalimbali za rangi, mikebe yenye rangi tofauti tofauti (Zingatia rangi za msingi: Nyekundu, manjano, bluu).

2. Kaa mkao ambao watoto wote wataweza kukuona.
3. Waoneshe watoto kadi za rangi mbalimbali ulizoandaa.
4. Waongoze watoto kubainisha kwa kuoanisha rangi walizoziona.
5. Waongoze watoto kukaa katika vikundi kwa kuzingatia rangi walizozibainisha.
6. Wapongeze watoto kwa kuweza kubainisha rangi mbalimbali.
7. Wape fursa watoto kuchagua rangi wanazopendelea.
8. Chunguza watoto wanavyobaini rangi mbalimbali wanaposhiriki shughuli hiyo na kutoa msaada kwa mwenye uhitaji.

1. Endapo kuna mtoto mwenye changamoto ya kuona, tumia mbinu nyingine shirikishi mfano, kumgusisha kitu mkononi, na kumwezesha kutumia milango mitano ya fahamu, kukuza kadi kwa mtoto mwenye uoni hafifu, kwa mtoto kiziwi kutoa maelekezo kwa kumwonyesha vitendo.

4. Guide the children to identify by matching the colours they have seen.
5. Guide the children to sit in groups according to the colours they have identified.
6. Praise the children for being able to identify various colours.
7. Give the children an opportunity to choose their favourite colours.
8. Observe how children identify various colours as they participate in the activity and provide support to those who need it.

Note:
1. If there is a child with a visual impairment, use other inclusive strategies such as letting them touch an object, enabling them to use all five senses, enlarging cards for a child with low vision, and for a deaf child give instructions by showing actions.
2. This activity will be completed within three sessions on different days.

subject: Sanaa na Ubunifu: Miaka 2–3 | Kujenga Stadi Zinazohusisha Utendaji wa Mikono
title_sw: Shughuli 8: Kutengeneza picha kwa kubandika
title_en: Activity 8: Making a picture by collage/sticking
about_sw: Kukuza misuli midogo ya vidole, umakini, ubunifu, kukuza kipaji, kukuza uwezo wa kujieleza
about_en: Developing fine finger muscles, attention, creativity, talent development, and the ability to express oneself
materials_sw: Chati ya karatasi nyeupe, vipande vidogo vya karatasi (magazeti ya zamani, karatasi zilizotumika, kalenda), mchanga na vipande vya nguo, gundi
materials_en: White paper chart, small pieces of paper (old magazines, used paper, calendars), sand and fabric scraps, glue
steps_sw:
1. Andaa vifaa na eneo lililo safi na mazingira rafiki
2. Kaa na watoto katika umbo la duara.
3. Waambie watoto watatengeneza picha kwa kubandika vipande vya karatasi kwenye mchoro.
4. Onesha kwa vitendo jinsi ya kuchana vipande vidogo vidogo vya karatasi na kuvigundisha kwa gundi kwenye karatasi ngumu iliyochorwa umbo fulani
5. Onesha jinsi ya kupaka gundi katika karatasi ngumu
6. Waelekeze watoto namna ya kubandika vikaatasi katika karatasi ngumu
7. Waelekeze kuiweka mahali ili iweze kukauka
8. Watake watoto kuchukua kazi zao na kuelezea kilichotokea
9. Kisha waulize maswali ya ufahamu juu ya kazi walizozifanya
10. Waelekeze watoto kusafisha mazingira waliyofanyia kazi na watake watoto kusafisha mikono
11. Chunguza Watoto wanapofanya kazi hiyo na kutoa msaada kwa mwenye uhitaji huo.

Tanbihi:
1. Endapo kuna mtoto mwenye changamoto ya kuona, tumia mbinu nyingine shirikishi mfano, kumgusisha na kumwongozo, kwa mtoto kiziwi kutoa maelekezo kwa vitendo (lugha ya alama)
2. Shughuli hii itakamilika ndani ya vipindi vitatu kwa kurudia kwa wakati tofauti na kwa kubadilisha matumizi ya vifaa
steps_en:
1. Prepare materials and a clean, child-friendly environment.
2. Sit with the children in a circle.
3. Tell the children they will make a picture by sticking pieces of paper onto a drawing.
4. Demonstrate how to tear small pieces of paper and paste them with glue onto a hard paper that has a shape drawn on it.
5. Show how to apply glue onto the hard paper.
6. Guide children on how to stick the paper pieces onto the hard paper.
7. Direct them to place it somewhere to dry.
8. Ask children to pick up their work and explain what happened.
9. Then ask comprehension questions about the work they did.
10. Direct children to clean the work area and ask children to wash their hands.
11. Monitor children as they do the activity and provide assistance to those who need it.

Note:
1. If there is a child with a visual impairment, use other inclusive methods such as guiding by touch; for a deaf child, give instructions through actions (sign language).
2. This activity will be completed over three sessions by repeating at different times and changing the materials used.

subject: Sanaa na Ubunifu: Miaka 2–3 | Kujenga Stadi Zinazohusisha Utendaji wa Mwili
title_sw: Shughuli 1: Kutembea kwa msawazo, kuruka, kukimbia, kupanda na kushuka, kuchapa kwa kutumia mguu, kujiviringisha
title_en: Activity 1: Walking in balance, jumping, running, climbing and descending, stamping with feet, rolling
about_sw: Kudhibiti mijongeo, kuimarisha misuli mikubwa na midogo, utambuzi wa sauti, ubunifu na umakini.
about_en: Controlling movements, strengthening large and small muscles, sound recognition, creativity and attention.
materials_sw: Kamba nyembamba ya katani au manila, ubao, kadi/picha zinazoonesha mchezo wa msawazo, chaki, rangi, kijiti cha kuchorea, filimbi.
materials_en: Thin sisal or manila rope, a board, cards/pictures showing balance games, chalk, paint, a drawing stick, a whistle.
steps_sw:
1. Andaa vifaa vitakavyotumika kuchezea mchezo wa kutembea kwa msawazo pamoja na mazingira ambayo watoto watacheza mchezo huo. Hakikisha mazingira yawe salama na rafiki kwa watoto.
2. Waongoze watoto katika eneo la wazi la kucheza mchezo wa kutembea kwa msawazo.
3. Waoneshe picha/chati mbalimbali zinazoonesha mchezo wa kutembea kwa msawazo
4. Chora mstari ulionyooka/ubao/ au kamba nyembamba ya katani.
5. Onesha jinsi ya kutembea kwenye mstari kwa msawazo
6. Waeleze watoto kanuni rahisi za kucheza mchezo huo mf. Kutembea ukiwa umenyooka kufuata mstari
7. Chunguza kama kila mtoto ameweza kutembea kwa msawazo na wasaidie wanapohitaji msaada.

Tanbihi:
Shughuli hii inaweza kuwezeshwa kwa vipindi sita. Pia zingatia kwamba matendo ya msawazo yatahusisha kuruka na kukimbia kwa msawazo, kuchapa miguu, kujiviringisha
steps_en:
1. Prepare the materials to be used for the balance walking game along with the environment where the children will play. Make sure the environment is safe and child-friendly.
2. Guide the children to an open area to play the balance walking game.
3. Show them various pictures/charts depicting the balance walking game.
4. Draw a straight line / use a board / or a thin sisal rope.
5. Demonstrate how to walk along the line in balance.
6. Explain simple rules for playing the game, e.g., walk upright following the line.
7. Observe whether each child is able to walk in balance and assist those who need help.

Note:
This activity can be facilitated over six sessions. Also note that balance activities will include jumping and running in balance, stamping feet, and rolling.

subject: Sanaa na Ubunifu: Miaka 2–3 | Kujenga Stadi Zinazohusisha Utendaji wa Mwili
title_sw: Shughuli 2: Kulenga shabaha
title_en: Activity 2: Aiming at a target
about_sw: Kuimarisha misuli mikubwa na midogo, umakini, umoja, ushirikiano, kukuza lugha na ubunifu
about_en: Strengthening large and small muscles, attention, unity, cooperation, developing language and creativity
materials_sw: Mpira, chaki, rangi, mawe madogo, madogo, ndoo, bakuli
materials_en: Ball, chalk, paint, small stones, small items, bucket, basin
steps_sw:
1. Andaa vifaa na mazingira ambayo watoto watacheza mchezo huo. Hakikisha mazingira yawe salama na rafiki kwa watoto.
2. Waongoze watoto katika eneo la wazi la kucheza mchezo wa kulenga shabaha, liliochorwa duara ubaoni au kuwekwa chombo kilichoandaliwa kwa ajili ya kulenga.
3. Waoneshe picha/chati mbalimbali zinazoonesha mchezo wa kulenga shabaha
4. Waoneshe watoto jinsi watakavyo cheza mchezo huo,
5. Muite mtoto mmoja mmoja na kucheza mchezo huo
6. Chunguza kama kila mtoto anashiriki mchezo huo na kuwasaidia inapohitajika

Tanbihi:
1. Kumbuka kuainisha watoto wenye mahitaji maalumu ili uweze kuwashirikisha kulingana na mahitaji yao
2. Shughuli hii inaweza kuwezeshwa mara nne/vipindi vinne.
steps_en:
1. Prepare the materials and the environment where the children will play the game. Make sure the environment is safe and child-friendly.
2. Guide the children to an open area to play the target aiming game, with a circle drawn on the board or a container set up for aiming.
3. Show them various pictures/charts depicting the target aiming game.
4. Show the children how they will play the game.
5. Call one child at a time to play the game.
6. Observe whether each child is participating in the game and assist when needed.

Note:
1. Remember to identify children with special needs so you can include them according to their needs.
2. This activity can be facilitated four times/four sessions.

subject: Sanaa na Ubunifu: Miaka 2–3 | Kujenga Stadi Zinazohusisha Utendaji wa Mwili
title_sw: Shughuli 3: Kuigiza mijongeo ya Wanyama mbalimbali
title_en: Activity 3: Imitating the movements of various animals
about_sw: Kuimarisha misuli mikubwa na midogo, umakini, umoja ushirikiano, kukuza lugha na ubunifu
about_en: Strengthening large and small muscles, attention, unity and cooperation, language development and creativity
materials_sw: Picha mbalimbali za wanyama, runinga, simu
materials_en: Various pictures of animals, television, mobile phone
steps_sw:
1. Andaa vifaa na mazingira ambayo watoto watacheza mchezo huo. Hakikisha mazingira yawe salama na rafiki kwa watoto.
2. Waweke watoto kwenye umbo la u
3. Waoneshe picha/chati mbalimbali za wanyama
4. Waongoze watoto wataje wanyama wanao wajua
5. Waonyeshe watoto mijongeo ya wanyama kwa kutumia video katika runinga au simu
6. Mlezi awaonyeshe watoto mijongeo ambayo wanyama mbalimbali wanavyotembea
7. Wape nafasi watoto watembee kwa kuigiza mijongeo ya wanyama waliowaona
8. Chunguza kama watoto wameweza kutembea kwa mijongeo

Tanbihi:
Shughuli hii inaweza kuwezeshwa kwa vipindi vitano ukibadilisha aina za wanyama
steps_en:
1. Prepare materials and an environment where children will play the game. Ensure the environment is safe and child-friendly.
2. Place the children in a U-shape
3. Show them various pictures/charts of animals
4. Guide the children to name the animals they know
5. Show the children the movements of animals using videos on television or a phone
6. The caregiver shows the children the movements that various animals use to walk
7. Give the children the opportunity to walk by imitating the movements of animals they observed
8. Check whether the children were able to walk using the movements

Note:
This activity can be done in five sessions while changing the types of animals

subject: Sanaa na Ubunifu: Miaka 2–3 | Kujenga Stadi Zinazohusisha Utendaji wa Mwili
title_sw: Shughuli 4: Kucheza Muziki
title_en: Activity 4: Playing Music
about_sw: Kudhibiti mijongeo, kuimarisha misuli mikubwa na midogo, utambuzi wa sauti, ubunifu na umakini
about_en: Controlling movements, strengthening large and small muscles, sound recognition, creativity and attention
materials_sw: Ngoma, vijiti, filimbi, mavazi ya jadi, nzuga, gitaa, simu, manyanga, redio
materials_en: Drums, sticks, flute, traditional attire, shakers, guitar, mobile phone, maracas/rattles, radio
steps_sw:
1. Andaa vifaa na mazingira ambayo watoto watachezi muziki huo. Hakikisha mazingira yawe salama na rafiki kwa watoto.
2. Kaa na watoto katika umbo la nusu duara au mkao wowote unaofaa.
3. Waongoze watoto kutaja mavazi ya jadi, vifaa vya muziki na kuvipiga/kuvitumia.
4. Waongoze watoto kucheza kwa kufuata mdundo wa muziki.
5. Hakikisha kila mtoto anashiriki kikamilifu katika kucheza.
6. Chunguza kama kila mtoto ameweza kucheza kufuata mdundo

Tanbihi:
Shughuli hii ifanyike kwa vpindi 4 ukiwa unabadilisha aina ya muziki na mijongeo.
steps_en:
1. Prepare materials and an environment where children will play music. Ensure the environment is safe and child-friendly.
2. Sit with the children in a semicircle or any appropriate seating arrangement.
3. Guide the children to name traditional attire, musical instruments and how to play/use them.
4. Guide the children to play following the rhythm of the music.
5. Ensure each child participates fully in playing.
6. Check whether each child was able to play following the rhythm.

Note:
This activity should be done in 4 sessions while changing the type of music and movements.

subject: Sanaa na Ubunifu: Miaka 2–3 | Kujenga Stadi za Ubunifu wa Sauti
title_sw: Shughuli 1: Kutengeneza sauti kwa kutumia sehemu za mwili
title_en: Activity 1: Making sounds using body parts
about_sw: Kujenga stadi/maarifa kukuza uwezo wa wa kubaini milio mbalimbali, kuimarisha misuli na kukuza misamiati
about_en: Building skills/knowledge to develop the ability to identify various sounds, strengthen muscles and expand vocabulary
materials_sw: Mwili wa mtoto na mlezi, (mfano kupiga makofi, vidole, miguu chini na kupuliza vitu vinavyotoa sauti) mkeka
materials_en: The body of the child and caregiver (for example clapping hands, fingers, stomping feet on the ground and blowing objects that produce sound), mat
steps_sw:
1. Andaa vifaa na mazingira wezeshi kila mtoto asimame
2. Waweke watoto katika umbo la "U"
3. Waongoze watoto kuimba nyimbo rahisi kama kichwa, Bega, magoti na vidole wakati mtoto wakipiga sauti kwa sehemu unazotaja
4. Fanya sauti moja moja na useme jina lake kwa sauti ya kufurahisha
5. Onesha mfano: Piga makofi – Pa!Pa! Piga kifua – Dom!Dom! Piga mapaja – "Pwa!Pwa" Kanyaga sakafu-" Tap!Tap", Piga midomo -"Popo!Popo" Piga ulimi –"Toktoktok"
6. Chunguza kama mtoto ameweza kutengeneza sauti za mwili

Tanbihi:
1. Shughuli hii itawezeshwa kwa vipindi 10 kutengeneza sauti kwa kupiga makofi kupiga kifua, Mapaja, kukanyaga sakafu kwa miguu, kupiga midomo, kupiga ulimi
2. Watoto wenye ulemavu wa kusikia tumia ishara za mikono, watoto wasioona wasaidie kwa kuwashikisha viungo vyao vya mwili na uwaongoze wapige viungo vyao vya mwili ili kutoa sauti
3. Watoto wenye ulemavu wa akili tumia maelezo mafupi ya moja kwa moja mfano "Piga"
steps_en:
1. Prepare materials and an enabling environment so each child can stand
2. Place the children in a "U" shape
3. Guide the children to sing simple songs like head, shoulders, knees and toes while children make sounds with the body parts named
4. Make one sound at a time and say its name in an entertaining voice
5. Show an example: Clap hands – Pa!Pa! Hit chest – Dom!Dom! Slap thighs – "Pwa!Pwa" Stamp floor – "Tap!Tap", Pop lips – "Popo!Popo" Click tongue – "Toktoktok"
6. Check whether the child was able to make sounds with their body

Note:
1. This activity will be done in 10 sessions to produce sounds by clapping hands, hitting the chest, thighs, stamping the floor with feet, popping lips, clicking the tongue
2. For children with hearing impairment use hand signs; for children who are visually impaired assist them by holding their body parts and guide them to strike their body parts to produce sound
3. For children with intellectual disabilities use short direct instructions, for example "Hit"

subject: Utamaduni, Imani na Tunu za Taifa: Miaka 2–3 | Kutambua Utamaduni wa Jamii Yake
title_sw: Shughuli 3: Kutaja aina za vyakula vya jamii inayomzunguka
title_en: Activity 3: Naming types of foods from the surrounding community
about_sw: Muda: Dakika 30. Stadi zitakazojengwa: Stadi za kukuza lugha na misamiati, Stadi za Kujenga Usikivu, umakini.
about_en: Duration: 30 minutes. Skills to be developed: Language and vocabulary development skills, Listening and attentiveness skills.
materials_sw: Vibao, Vitabu, Chati, Tabuleti au Runinga zenye picha mnato/mjongeo za vyakula mbalimbali
materials_en: Flashcards, Books, Charts, Tablets or TVs with pictures/videos of various foods
steps_sw:
1. Andaa Vifaa vya kujifunzia pamoja na eneo
2. Waambie watoto wasimame/wakae kwenye mduara/umbo la "U" au nusu duara. Simama eneo ambalo watoto wote watakuona vizuri
3. Wakaribishe watoto na tambulisha shughuli ya siku kwa kuwaonesha watoto vyakula halisi au picha zake
4. Imba wimbo wenye kutaja majina ya Vyakula na kisha waongoze watoto waimbe pamoja nawe
5. Gawa picha zenye aina mbalimbali za Vyakula na igiza kuwaomba moja moja huku ukitaja jina la chakula (mfano: Naomba ugali…) huku ukichukua picha ya ugali kutoka kwa mtoto
6. Waongoze watoto kupeana au kuonyesha picha huku wakitaja jina la chakula
7. Wawekee watoto michezo mbalimbali ya picha mfano: vibao fumbo… vyenye picha na majina ya vyakula
8. Chunguza ushiriki wa watoto na kuwahimiza wale wasioshiriki hata kama hawawezi kutaja majina ya vyakula kwa usahihi.
TANBIHI: Shughuli hii itafanyika mara 4 kwa kuwapa mazoezi Zaidi ya kutaja majina ya vyakula mbalimbali
steps_en:
1. Prepare learning materials and the environment
2. Ask children to stand/sit in a circle or "U" shape or semi-circle. Stand in a position where all children can see you well
3. Welcome the children and introduce the day's activity by showing them real foods or pictures of them
4. Sing a song that mentions names of foods and then guide the children to sing along with you
5. Distribute pictures of various types of foods and pretend to ask for them one by one while naming the food (e.g., I want ugali…) while taking the picture of ugali from the child
6. Guide children to pass or show pictures while naming the food
7. Give children various picture games, e.g., puzzle cards with pictures and names of foods
8. Monitor children's participation and encourage those who are not participating even if they cannot name the foods correctly.
NOTE: This activity will be done 4 times to give more practice in naming various foods

subject: Utamaduni, Imani na Tunu za Taifa: Miaka 2–3 | Kutambua Utamaduni wa Jamii Yake
title_sw: Shughuli 4: Kutaja vitendo vya heshima na adabu (Kuomba, Kutoa, Kupokea na Kushukuru)
title_en: Activity 4: Naming acts of respect and good manners (Asking, Giving, Receiving and Thanking)
about_sw: Muda: Dakika 30. Stadi zitakazojengwa: Stadi za kukuza lugha na misamiati, kujenga stadi za mahusiano, Heshima, Adabu, Nidhamu, Utii, Upendo, Urafiki.
about_en: Duration: 30 minutes. Skills to be developed: Language and vocabulary development skills, building relationship skills, Respect, Good Manners, Discipline, Obedience, Love, Friendliness.
materials_sw: Vibao, Vitabu, Picha zinazoonesha watoto wakisalimiana, Radio, Runinga, Tabuleti, Ngoma, vitu mbalimbali mfn Mpira/midoli
materials_en: Flashcards, Books, Pictures showing children greeting each other, Radio, TV, Tablet, Drum, various items e.g. Ball/dolls
steps_sw:
1. Andaa eneo la Ujifunzaji na vifaa kisha waweke watoto wasimame/wakae kwenye mduara/umbo la "U" au nusu duara. Simama eneo ambalo watoto wote watakuona vizuri.
2. Wakaribishe watoto na tambulisha shughuli ya siku kwa kuimba wimbo wa kushukuru baada ya kupewa kitu
3. Igiza kuomba na kupokea na kutoa kitu kwa watoto tofauti tofauti.
4. Waongoze watoto kuigiza kuomba, kutoa na kupokea kitu kwa mwenzie kwa kusema 'naomba', 'chukua' 'asante'.
5. Chunguza jinsi watoto wanavyo omba, kutoa, kupokea na kushukuru, msaidie mtoto ambaye hajaweza kushiriki.
6. Waongoze watoto kusikiliza nyimbo zilizorekodiwa zenye maudhui ya kushukuru.
TANBIHI: Shughuli hii itafanyika mara 3 kwa kuwapa nafasi watoto kuigiza kutumia maneno ya kuomba, kutoa, kupokea na kushukuru.
steps_en:
1. Prepare the learning environment and materials then have children stand/sit in a circle or "U" shape or semi-circle. Stand in a position where all children can see you well.
2. Welcome the children and introduce the day's activity by singing a song of thanks after receiving something
3. Role-play asking, receiving and giving items to different children.
4. Guide children to role-play asking, giving and receiving items from a friend by saying 'naomba' (please/I ask), 'chukua' (take) and 'asante' (thank you).
5. Observe how children ask, give, receive and give thanks; help the child who has not been able to participate.
6. Guide children to listen to recorded songs with themes of gratitude.
NOTE: This activity will be done 3 times to give children the opportunity to role-play using words of asking, giving, receiving and thanking.

subject: Utamaduni, Imani na Tunu za Taifa: Miaka 2–3 | Kutambua Utamaduni wa Jamii Yake
title_sw: Shughuli 5: Kutaja vitendo vya heshima na adabu – Kuomba Msamaha
title_en: Activity 5: Naming acts of respect and good manners – Asking for Forgiveness
about_sw: Muda: Dakika 30. Stadi zitakazojengwa: Stadi za kukuza lugha na misamiati, kujenga stadi za mahusiano, Heshima, Adabu, Nidhamu, Utii, Upendo, Urafiki.
about_en: Duration: 30 minutes. Skills to be developed: Language and vocabulary development skills, building relationship skills, Respect, Good Manners, Discipline, Obedience, Love, Friendliness.
materials_sw: Vibao, Vitabu vya hadithi fupi, Radio, Runinga, Tabuleti, Ngoma, vitu mbalimbali mfano Mpira/midoli.
materials_en: Flashcards, Short story books, Radio, TV, Tablet, Drum, various items e.g. Ball/dolls.
steps_sw:
1. Andaa eneo na vifaa mbalimbali vinavyofaa kutumia katika shughuli hii
2. Waambie watoto wasimame/wakae kwenye mduara/umbo la "U" au nusu duara. Simama eneo ambalo watoto wote watakuona vizuri
3. Wakaribishe watoto na tambulisha shughuli ya siku kwa kusimulia hadithi fupi yenye maudhui ya kuomba msamaha
4. Waongoze watoto kuigiza vitendo vya kuomba msamaha vinavyojitokeza kwenye hadithi mfano baada ya kumkanyaga mwenzie, kumpiga na mpira
5. Waongoze watoto kuimba wimbo wenye maudhui ya kuomba msamaha
6. Onesha picha mjongeo inayoonyesha igizo la kuomba msamaha
7. Waongoze watoto kuigiza mchezo wa kuomba msamaha. Hakikisha wote wanashiriki kikamilifu
8. Chunguza jinsi watoto wanavyoshiriki na kutumia maneno ya kuomba msamaha wanapokosea
TANBIHI: Shughuli hii itafanyika mara 3 katika vipindi tofauti kwa kuwapa mazoezi kupitia kuigiza matukio mbalimbali yanayosababisha kuomba msamaha.
steps_en:
1. Prepare the environment and various materials suitable for use in this activity
2. Ask children to stand/sit in a circle or "U" shape or semi-circle. Stand in a position where all children can see you well
3. Welcome the children and introduce the day's activity by telling a short story with a theme of asking for forgiveness
4. Guide children to role-play acts of asking for forgiveness that appear in the story, for example after stepping on a friend, or hitting them with a ball
5. Guide children to sing a song with a theme of asking for forgiveness
6. Show a video/animation showing a role-play of asking for forgiveness
7. Guide children to role-play a game of asking for forgiveness. Ensure all participate fully
8. Observe how children participate and use words of asking for forgiveness when they make mistakes
NOTE: This activity will be done 3 times in different sessions to give practice through role-playing various situations that lead to asking for forgiveness.

subject: Lugha na Mawasiliano: Miaka 2–3 / Kusikiliza katika Mazingira Tofauti
title_sw: Shughuli 1(a): Kutambua vitu vinavyotoa milio
title_en: Activity 1(a): Identifying objects that produce sounds/noises
about_sw: Kukuza Uwezo wa kutambua sauti mbalimbali na kuimarisha umakini
about_en: To develop the ability to identify various sounds and strengthen attentiveness
materials_sw: Picha za vitu tofauti vinavyotoa mlio, sauti mbalimbali za vitu, wanyama, ndege na mazingira zilizorekodwa, Chupa za plastiki, mawe madogo, mbegu, mchanga na maji, picha za wanyama binadamu na ndege, redio, simu, runinga
materials_en: Pictures of different objects that produce sounds, various recorded sounds of objects, animals, birds and environments, plastic bottles, small stones, seeds, sand and water, pictures of animals, humans and birds, radio, telephone, television
steps_sw:
1. Tayarisha Vitu vinavyotoa milio (mfano: funguo, kengele ndogo, kifaa cha kuchezea kinacholia, mawe madogo ya kugonganisha, maji katika chupa).
2. Chora Picha au Kadi za Picha zinazoonyesha vyanzo vya sauti (mfano: ndege, gari, mbwa).
3. Wapange watoto kwenye duara kubwa.
4. Watake watoto wasikilize sauti mbalimbali zilizorekodwa mfano, sauti za ndege, wanyama.
5. Mwambie kila mtoto aje mbele kuigiza sauti aliyoisikia.
6. Igiza sauti za ndege, wanyama na binadamu kisha watake watoto wafuatishe. Unaweza kutumia wimbo ili kujenga uelewa.
7. Wasikilizishe watoto sauti hizo kisha wataje ni sauti ya kitu gani.
8. Chunguza kama kila mtoto anatambua sauti mbalimbali.

Tanbihi:
1. Picha ziwe za mguso kama utakuwa na watoto wasioona.
2. Shughuli hii itafanyika katika vipindi 3 katika muda tofauti kwa kutumia zana mbalimbali.
steps_en:
1. Prepare objects that produce sounds (e.g.: keys, a small bell, a rattling toy, small stones to knock together, water in a bottle).
2. Draw pictures or picture cards showing sources of sound (e.g.: bird, car, dog).
3. Arrange children in a large circle.
4. Ask children to listen to various recorded sounds, e.g. sounds of birds and animals.
5. Ask each child to come forward and imitate the sound they heard.
6. Imitate sounds of birds, animals and humans then ask children to follow. You may use a song to build understanding.
7. Play the sounds to the children then ask them to name what object each sound belongs to.
8. Check whether each child can identify different sounds.

Note:
1. Make pictures tactile if you will have children who cannot see.
2. This activity will be carried out in 3 sessions at different times using various tools.

subject: Lugha na Mawasiliano: Miaka 2–3 / Kusikiliza katika Mazingira Tofauti
title_sw: Shughuli 1(b): Kutambua vitu vinavyotoa sauti
title_en: Activity 1(b): Identifying objects that produce sounds
about_sw: Kusikiliza, Umakini, Utambuzi wa Sauti, Kutofautisha sauti
about_en: Listening, Attentiveness, Sound Recognition, Differentiating sounds
materials_sw: Kiti, meza, chuma, kalamu, kopo, kikombe, ndoo, debe, ngoma, kengele, makasha ya plastiki yenye vitu, kipenga, chupa yenye mawe.
materials_en: Chair, table, metal object, pen/pencil, tin/can, cup, bucket, large tin, drum, bell, plastic boxes with objects inside, whistle, bottle with stones.
steps_sw:
1. Tayarisha vitu vyenye sauti tofauti.
2. Andaa eneo tulivu la watoto kucheza.
3. Wakaribishe wakae / wasimame kwenye umbo la U, Duara au nusu duara au mkao mwingine unaofaa.
4. Waulize watoto kama wanajua vitu vinavyotoa sauti.
5. Anza kwa kuwaonesha vitu vinavyotoa sauti.
6. Wape nafasi watoto kushika na kujaribu kupiga baadhi ya sauti wenyewe.
7. Rudia tena kuwaonesha watoto wote vitu vinavyotoa sauti na kuwaongoza kuvitaja.
8. Chunguza kama watoto wametambua vitu vinavyotoa sauti.

Tanbihi:
1. Kaa karibu na mtoto mwenye usikivu hafifu ili uweze kumsaidia kwa ukaribu.
2. Shughuli hii itafanyika katika vipindi 5 katika muda tofauti kwa kutumia zana mbalimbali na mbinu tofauti.
steps_en:
1. Prepare objects with different sounds.
2. Prepare a quiet area for children to play.
3. Welcome them to sit/stand in a U-shape, circle, semicircle or another suitable arrangement.
4. Ask children whether they know objects that produce sounds.
5. Begin by showing them objects that produce sounds.
6. Give children the opportunity to hold and try to make some of the sounds themselves.
7. Show all the children the sound-producing objects again and guide them to name them.
8. Check whether children have identified the objects that produce sounds.

Note:
1. Sit close to a child with hearing difficulties so you can assist them more closely.
2. This activity will be carried out in 5 sessions at different times using various tools and different methods.

subject: Lugha na Mawasiliano: Miaka 2–3 / Kusikiliza katika Mazingira Tofauti
title_sw: Shughuli 1(c): Kusikiliza sauti za mazingira
title_en: Activity 1(c): Listening to environmental sounds
about_sw: Stadi zitakazojengwa: Kusikiliza, kutambua, kutofautisha, kutunza kumbukumbu
about_en: Skills to be developed: Listening, recognising, differentiating, retaining memory
materials_sw: Picha za vitu tofauti vinavyotoa mlio, sauti mbalimbali wanyama, binadamu, ndege na mazingira zilizorekodi wa, (Simba, Tembo, Paka, mbwa radi, mvua, gari, treni, pikipiki) redio, simu, runinga, Chupa za plastiki, mawe madogo, mbegu, mchanga na maji.
materials_en: Pictures of various sound-making objects, various recorded sounds of animals, humans, birds and environments (Lion, Elephant, Cat, dog, thunder, rain, car, train, motorcycle), radio, phone, television, plastic bottles, small stones, seeds, sand and water.
steps_sw:
1. Tayarisha Vitu vinavyotoa sauti (mfano: funguo, kengele ndogo, kifaa cha kuchezea kinacholia, mawe madogo ya kugonganisha, maji katika chupa).
2. Chora Picha au Kadi za Picha zinazoonyesha vyanzo vya sauti (mfano: ndege, gari, mbwa, mvua, milango).
3. Waongoze watoto kusikiliza rekodi za sauti za mazingira (mfano: mlio wa treni, ndege anayeimba, tarumbeta, upepo) ili kusikiliza ndani ya darasa.
4. Waongoze watoto kwenda nje kisha wapange watoto kwenye duara kubwa.
5. Watake watoto wasikilize sauti (runinga, redio, simu)
6. Mwambie kila mtoto aje mbele kuigiza sauti aliyoisikia.
7. Waambie wasikilize kwa makini sauti na waigize sauti hizo.
8. Igiza sauti za ndege, wanyama na binadamu kisha watake watoto wafuatishe. Unaweza kutumia wimbo ili kujenga uelewa
9. Chunguza kama kila mtoto ametambua sauti za vitu vilivyopo kwenye mazingira yao

Tanbihi: Shughuli hii itafanyika katika vipindi 5 katika muda tofauti kwa kutumia zana mbalimbali

Ushiriki wa wazazi nyumbani: Mwelekeze mzazi amsaidie mtoto kutambua vitu vinavyotoa sauti akiwa nyumbani
steps_en:
1. Prepare objects that make sounds (e.g. keys, small bell, a noisy toy, small stones to knock together, water in a bottle).
2. Draw pictures or picture cards showing sources of sounds (e.g. bird, car, dog, rain, doors).
3. Guide children to listen to recordings of environmental sounds (e.g. sound of a train, a singing bird, trumpet, wind) while listening inside the classroom.
4. Guide children to go outside then arrange them in a large circle.
5. Ask the children to listen to sounds (television, radio, phone).
6. Ask each child to come forward and imitate the sound they heard.
7. Tell them to listen carefully to sounds and imitate those sounds.
8. Imitate sounds of birds, animals and humans then ask children to follow. You can use a song to build understanding.
9. Check whether each child has identified sounds of things found in their environment.

Note: This activity will be conducted in 5 sessions at different times using various tools.

Parent participation at home: Guide the parent to help the child identify objects that make sounds while at home.

subject: Lugha na Mawasiliano: Miaka 2–3 / Kusikiliza katika Mazingira Tofauti
title_sw: Shughuli 1(d): Kuigiza sauti za wanyama kwa kutumia vinyago au picha
title_en: Activity 1(d): Imitating animal sounds using toys or pictures
about_sw: Stadi zitakazojengwa: Kumudu stadi za awali za lugha na mawasiliano
about_en: Skills to be developed: Mastering early language and communication skills
materials_sw: Picha za wanyama mbalimbali, Vifani vya Wanyama, sauti za wanyama zilizorekodi wa
materials_en: Pictures of various animals, animal models/toys, recorded sounds of animals
steps_sw:
1. Tayarisha vifaa vya kutosha kulingana na idadi na mahitaji ya watoto mf, picha za wanyama.
2. Wapange Watoto wakae kwenye duara kubwa ili waweze kuona picha za wanyama na kila mtoto aweze kumwangalia mwalimu anapotoa sauti.
3. Waongoze watoto wasikilize sauti mbalimbali zilizorekodi wa za wanyama huku ukiwaonesha picha ya mnyama husika.
4. Wagawie watoto picha za Wanyama au wavae vifani (vinyago).
5. Mwambie kila mtoto aje mbele kuigiza sauti aliyoisikia na wengine wasikilize kwa makini sauti na waigize sauti hizo.
6. Chunguza kama mtoto ameweza kuigiza sauti mbalimbali

Tanbihi: Shughuli hii itafanyika katika vipindi 3 katika muda tofauti kwa kutumia zana mbalimbali

Ushiriki wa wazazi nyumbani: Mwelekeze mzazi amwongoze mtoto kusikiliza na kuigiza sauti mbalimbali akiwa nyumbani.
steps_en:
1. Prepare enough materials according to the number and needs of the children, e.g. animal pictures.
2. Arrange children to sit in a large circle so they can see the animal pictures and each child can watch the teacher when producing a sound.
3. Guide children to listen to various recorded sounds of animals while showing them a picture of the relevant animal.
4. Give children pictures of animals or let them wear animal models (toys).
5. Ask each child to come forward and imitate the sound they heard, while others listen carefully and also imitate those sounds.
6. Check whether the child has been able to imitate various sounds.

Note: This activity will be conducted in 3 sessions at different times using various tools.

Parent participation at home: Guide the parent to help the child listen to and imitate various sounds while at home.

subject: Lugha na Mawasiliano: Miaka 2–3 / Kusikiliza katika Mazingira Tofauti
title_sw: Shughuli 1(e): Kusikiliza milio ya vitu vinapoanguka
title_en: Activity 1(e): Listening to sounds of objects when they fall
about_sw: Stadi zitakazojengwa: Kukuza Uwezo wa kutambua milio mbalimbali na kuimarisha umakini
about_en: Skills to be developed: Developing the ability to recognise various sounds and strengthening attentiveness
materials_sw: Vifaa mbalimbali vinavyotoa sauti vinapoanguka mfano Jiwe, sarafu, funguo, chupa ya plastiki, kipande cha boksi
materials_en: Various objects that make sounds when they fall, e.g. a stone, coin, keys, plastic bottle, piece of cardboard box
steps_sw:
1. Tayarisha vitu mbalimbali vinavyotoa mlio vinapoanguka
2. Tenga sehemu ndogo darasani ambapo utaangushia vitu. Eneo hili linapaswa kuwa mbali na watoto ila kila mtoto anaweza kuona
3. Shirikisha watoto wote, angusha vitu mbele yao wakiwa wanaona baada ya hapo waelekeze wafumbe macho alafu angusha tena vitu hivyo na uwaulize wametambua ni kitu gani kilichoanguka
4. Alika mtoto aje na pia anaweza angusha kitu na wenzake waseme ni ni.
5. Unaweza pia washirikisha Watoto ataje sauti ya kitu halafu mwenzake aje akiangushe kile kitu ambacho mtoto ametaja.
6. Chunguza kama watoto wametambua mlio wa vitu vinapoanguka

Tanbihi: Shughuli hii itafanyika katika vipindi 3 katika muda tofauti kwa kutumia zana mbalimbali

Ushiriki wa wazazi nyumbani: Mwelekeze mzazi amsaidie mtoto kutambua vitu vinavyotoa mlio akiwa nyumbani
steps_en:
1. Prepare various objects that make sounds when they fall.
2. Set aside a small area in the classroom where you will drop objects. This area should be away from the children but every child can see it.
3. Involve all the children — drop objects in front of them while they are watching, then guide them to close their eyes, then drop the objects again and ask them to identify what object fell.
4. Invite a child to come and also drop an object while peers say what it is.
5. You can also involve children by having one child name the sound of an object and then a peer comes and drops that object the child named.
6. Check whether children have identified the sound of objects when they fall.

Note: This activity will be conducted in 3 sessions at different times using various tools.

Parent participation at home: Guide the parent to help the child identify objects that make sounds while at home.

subject: Lugha na Mawasiliano: Miaka 2–3 / Kuzungumza Katika Mazingira Tofauti
title_sw: Shughuli 3: Kueleza Shughuli za Kila Siku
title_en: Activity 3: Describing Daily Activities
about_sw: Kujieleza, kukuza kumbukumbu, na kukuza mtiririko wa mawazo.
about_en: Self-expression, building memory, and developing flow of thought.
materials_sw: Kadi za picha za shughuli za nyumbani (mfano: mtoto anakula, mtoto anaoga, baba anasoma).
materials_en: Picture cards of home activities (e.g., a child eating, a child bathing, a father reading).
steps_sw:
1. Chagua picha chache za shughuli za kawaida nyumbani. Andaa maswali ya kuanzisha mazungumzo (mfano: "Ulifanya nini ulipoamka?").
2. Wapange watoto katika mduara.
3. Waoneshe watoto picha moja na kusimulia ulichokifanya (mfano: "Mimi nilikunywa uji asubuhi uji ulikuwa mtamu.").
4. Panga kadi mbalimbali chini ambapo Watoto wote wanaweza kkuziona.
5. Mwambie mtoto mmoja mmoja aje achukue kadi aseme yeye anapenda kufanya nini kulingana na kadi aliyoichukua.
6. Rudia mara nyingi na wape nafasi Watoto wote kushiriki kuja kuchukua kadi na kusema shughuli kulingana na picha inayoonekana kwenye kadi.
7. Chunguza kama mtoto anaweza kuchukua picha na kusema shughuli inayoonekana kwenye picha.
8. Wapongeze watoto na waruhusu warudie mara nyingi kadri muda unavyoruhusu.

Tanbihi:
1. Shughuli hii ifanyike ndani ya vipindi vitatu kwa wakati tofauti ukibadilisha picha za shughuli na mbinu ya michezo.
2. Kama una mtoto mwenye uoni hafifu picha ziwe za mguso ili aweze kushiriki kikamilifu.
steps_en:
1. Select a few picture cards of common home activities. Prepare questions to start conversation (e.g., "What did you do when you woke up?").
2. Arrange children in a circle.
3. Show children one picture and narrate what you did (e.g., "I drank porridge this morning; the porridge was sweet.").
4. Lay various cards on the floor where all children can see them.
5. Ask each child one by one to come pick a card and say what they like to do according to the card they picked.
6. Repeat many times and give all children the chance to come pick a card and say the activity shown on the card.
7. Check whether a child can pick up a picture and name the activity shown in the picture.
8. Praise the children and allow them to repeat as many times as time allows.

Note:
1. This activity should be done in three sessions at different times, changing the activity pictures and play techniques.
2. If you have a child with low vision, make the pictures tactile so they can participate fully.

subject: Lugha na Mawasiliano: Miaka 2–3 / Kuzungumza Katika Mazingira Tofauti
title_sw: Shughuli 4: Kueleza Mahitaji Mbalimbali
title_en: Activity 4: Describing Various Needs
about_sw: Kujitambua kimwili, kukuza msamiati wa mahitaji, na uwezo wa kujieleza na kutatua matatizo.
about_en: Physical self-awareness, building vocabulary of needs, and the ability to express and solve problems.
materials_sw: Kadi za picha za mahitaji (mfano: mtoto anakunywa, mtoto analala).
materials_en: Picture cards of needs (e.g., a child drinking, a child sleeping).
steps_sw:
1. Andaa maneno rahisi ya mahitaji: "Njaa," "Kiu," "Kulala," "Haja" na ishara zake.
2. Wakaribishe Watoto wasimame kwenye duara.
3. Igiza kama una kiu na kusema: "Nina kiu!" kisha kunywa maji. Fanya vivyo hivyo kwa njaa.
4. Rudia kueleza 'njaa' na 'kiu' kwa kutumia ishara za kushika tumbo na koo.
5. Waonyeshe Watoto picha ya mtoto mwenye njaa na uibandike ukutani upande mmoja na mtoto mwenye kiu na uibandike ukutani upande wa pili.
6. Waambie Watoto wakasimame upande wa mtoto ambao anahisi kuhitaji msaada huo.
7. Halafu mtoto mmoja amuulize mwenzake anahitaji nini? Mtoto mwingine aseme nina kiu.
8. Wanaweza rudia zoezi hilo mara kadhaa.
9. Chunguza kama mtoto ameweza kueleza hitaji lake kwa kujishika na kutamka neno.

Tanbihi:
1. Shughuli hii ifanyike karibu na kipindi cha uji au chakula cha mchana ili Watoto waweze kutimiza mahitaji yao watakayokua wameyaonyesha.
2. Shughuli hii ifanyike kwa vipindi 4 tofauti ukibadilisha picha za mahitaji na kuweka mahitaji zaidi pia unaweza tumia nyimbo na hadithi.
steps_en:
1. Prepare simple need words: "Hungry," "Thirsty," "Sleep," "Toilet" and their gestures.
2. Welcome the children to stand in a circle.
3. Pretend you are thirsty and say: "I am thirsty!" then drink water. Do the same for hunger.
4. Repeat explaining 'hungry' and 'thirsty' using gestures of holding the stomach and throat.
5. Show children a picture of a hungry child and stick it on the wall on one side, and a thirsty child on the wall on the other side.
6. Tell the children to stand on the side of the child whose need they feel.
7. Then one child asks a peer what they need; the other child says "I am thirsty."
8. They can repeat the exercise several times.
9. Check whether the child was able to express their need by touching themselves and saying the word.

Note:
1. This activity should be done near the porridge or lunch break so children can fulfil the needs they have demonstrated.
2. This activity should be done in 4 different sessions, changing the need pictures and adding more needs; you can also use songs and stories.

subject: Lugha na Mawasiliano: Miaka 2–3 / Kuzungumza Katika Mazingira Tofauti
title_sw: Shughuli 5: Kuigiza Sauti
title_en: Activity 5: Imitating Sounds
about_sw: Kukuza ujuzi wa kusikiliza, utambuzi wa sauti, na kukuza misuli ya kinywa (kwa ajili ya lugha).
about_en: Developing listening skills, sound recognition, and strengthening mouth muscles (for language).
materials_sw: Kadi za picha za wanyama (kama ng'ombe, mbwa, paka) au vitu vinavyotoa sauti (gari, ndege).
materials_en: Picture cards of animals (e.g., cow, dog, cat) or objects that make sounds (car, bird).
steps_sw:
1. Chagua sauti chache rahisi za kuigiza (mfano: Moo, bwa bwa).
2. Wakaribishe Watoto wakae kwenye nusu duara.
3. Onyesha picha ya mnyama (mfano: mbwa) na toa sauti (Bwa Bwa).
4. Waongoze watoto warudie sauti. Kisha waonyeshe picha na kuomba mtoto atoe sauti za vitu au Wanyama katika picha hizo.
5. Wakaribishe Watoto wawili mbele mmoja achukue kadi aonyeshe na mwenzake atoe sauti ya picha inayoonekana kisha wawaonyeshe wenzao.
6. Angalia kama mtoto anaweza kushiriki na wenzake na kutoa sauti inayoendana na picha.

Tanbihi:
1. Shughuli hii ifanyike ndani ya vipindi vitatu kwa kutumia zana tofauti na mbinu tofauti. Wakati mwingine unaweza funika picha zote Watoto wakacheza mchezo wa kufunua picha na kutoa sauti au mlio. Kipindi kingine wanaweza kuimba wimbo wa sauti mbalimbali.
steps_en:
1. Choose a few simple sounds to imitate (e.g., Moo, Woof woof).
2. Welcome the children to sit in a semi-circle.
3. Show a picture of an animal (e.g., a dog) and make the sound (Woof Woof).
4. Guide the children to repeat the sound. Then show pictures and ask a child to make the sounds of the objects or animals in those pictures.
5. Invite two children to the front; one picks a card and shows it, and the other makes the sound of the picture shown, then they show the others.
6. Check whether the child can participate with peers and produce a sound that matches the picture.

Note:
1. This activity should be done in three sessions using different tools and different techniques. Sometimes you can cover all the pictures and children play a game of uncovering pictures and making the sound or noise. In another session they can sing a song of various sounds.

subject: Lugha na Mawasiliano: Miaka 2–3 | Kusoma Katika Hatua za Awali
title_sw: Shughuli 1: Kutambua majina ya vitu mbalimbali
title_en: Activity 1: Identifying names of various objects
about_sw: Kutambua vitu mbalimbali, Kuongeza msamiati wa maneno ya kila siku, kuelewa mazingira yanayomzunguka, umakini na usikivu
about_en: Identifying various objects, expanding everyday vocabulary, understanding the surrounding environment, attentiveness and listening
materials_sw: Picha au kadi za vitu (mfano: kikombe, mpira, kiti, gari, kitabu), Vitu halisi vya darasani, Kadi za maneno
materials_en: Pictures or object cards (e.g. cup, ball, chair, car, book), real classroom objects, word cards
steps_sw:
1. Andaa picha/vitu 5 rahisi na vya kawaida kwa mtoto
2. Weka vitu sehemu ambayo watoto wanaweza kuona kwa urahisi
3. Andaa mazingira wezeshi (ndani ya darasa au nje ya darasa) tulivu ambapo watoto watajifunza.
4. Ongoza watoto wakae kwenye umbo la U, nusu duara, duara au wowote unaofaa
5. Waoneshe watoto picha au kitu kimoja.
6. Na kutaja jina la kitu au picha.
7. Wape watoto nafasi kugusa au kuoanisha picha na kitu halisi
8. Rudia kwa maneno 2–3 tofauti.
9. Endelea na shughuli hii hadi watoto wachukue vitu na kuvitaja majina yao.
10. Chunguza mtoto kama anaweza kutaja jina la kitu anachooneshwa.

Tanbihi:
1. Shughuli hii itafanyika katika vipindi 5 katika muda tofauti kwa kutumia zana/vifaa tofauti. Unaweza tumia hadithi na nyimbo pia kama mbinu tofauti.
2. Zingatia uwepo wa Watoto wenye mahitaji maalum wakati wa kutumia mbinu na zana tofauti ili washiriki kikamilifu.

Ushiriki wa wazazi nyumbani: Mwelekeze mzazi amuongoze mtoto kuonesha na kutaja vitu vya nyumbani (mfano: kikombe, kijiko, kiatu).
steps_en:
1. Prepare 5 simple and familiar pictures/objects for the child
2. Place objects where children can see them easily
3. Prepare an enabling environment (inside or outside the classroom) that is calm where children will learn.
4. Guide children to sit in a U-shape, semicircle, circle or any suitable arrangement
5. Show children one picture or object.
6. Say the name of the object or picture.
7. Give children the opportunity to touch or match the picture with the real object
8. Repeat with 2–3 different words.
9. Continue this activity until children can pick up objects and say their names.
10. Check whether the child can name the object being shown.

Note:
1. This activity will be done in 5 sessions at different times using different tools/materials. You can also use stories and songs as alternative methods.
2. Consider the presence of children with special needs when using different methods and tools so they participate fully.

Parent participation at home: Guide the parent to direct the child to point to and name household objects (e.g. cup, spoon, shoe).

subject: Lugha na Mawasiliano: Miaka 2–3 | Kusoma Katika Hatua za Awali
title_sw: Shughuli 2 (a): Kufungua na kufunga kitabu
title_en: Activity 2 (a): Opening and closing a book
about_sw: Uwezo wa kushika na kutumia kitabu vizuri, Ufuatiliaji na umakini, Uratibu wa macho na mikono, Uelewa wa mwelekeo sahihi wa kitabu
about_en: Ability to hold and use a book properly, concentration and attentiveness, eye-hand coordination, understanding the correct orientation of a book
materials_sw: Vitabu mbalimbali vya picha vyenye kurasa ngumu, Meza au zulia la kukalia, Kifaa cha kuhifadhi vitabu (kabati)
materials_en: Various picture books with hard pages, table or mat to sit on, book storage unit (cabinet)
steps_sw:
1. Andaa vitabu rahisi kwa Watoto (ukubwana uzito unaoendana na uwezo wa mtoto kubeba)
2. Hakikisha vitabu viko katika hali nzuri na salama kushikwa
3. Ongoza watoto wakae kwenye umbo la U, nusu duara, duara au mkao wowote unaofaa kwa shughuli husika
4. Waoneshe watoto jinsi ya kushika kitabu kwa sahihi.
5. Waoneshe kufungua na kufunga kwa utaratibu
6. Wape watoto kila mmoja kitabu na warudie hatua hizo
7. Badilisha vitabu kulingana na uhitaji wa Watoto.
8. Chunguza mtoto kama anaweza kufungua na kufunga kitabu kwa utaratibu.

Tanbihi:
1. Ikiwa una watoto wenye mahitaji maalum unaweza tumia mbinu na zana tofauti ili kuwashirikisha kadiri ya uhitaji wao.
2. Shughuli hii itafanyika katika vipindi 3 katika muda tofauti kwa kutumia vitabu tofauti tofauti.

Ushiriki wa wazazi nyumbani: Mwelekeze mzazi kumruhusu mtoto kushika na kufungua vitabu vya picha nyumbani.
steps_en:
1. Prepare books suitable for children (size and weight appropriate for the child to carry)
2. Make sure the books are in good condition and safe to hold
3. Guide children to sit in a U-shape, semicircle, circle or any suitable arrangement for the activity
4. Show children how to hold a book correctly.
5. Demonstrate opening and closing in an orderly manner
6. Give each child a book and have them repeat those steps
7. Change books according to children's needs.
8. Check whether the child can open and close a book in an orderly manner.

Note:
1. If you have children with special needs you can use different methods and tools to include them according to their needs.
2. This activity will be done in 3 sessions at different times using different books.

Parent participation at home: Guide the parent to allow the child to hold and open picture books at home.

subject: Lugha na Mawasiliano: Miaka 2–3 | Kusoma Katika Hatua za Awali
title_sw: Shughuli 2 (b): Kupanga vitabu
title_en: Activity 2 (b): Arranging books
about_sw: Uwezo wa kupanga na kuratibu vitu, Umakini na ufuatiliaji wa maagizo, Uwezo wa utunzaji na uwajibikaji kwa vifaa, Ustadi wa kutumia mikono.
about_en: Ability to organise and arrange objects, attentiveness and following instructions, ability to care for and be responsible with materials, fine motor skills.
materials_sw: Vitabu vya Watoto, Rafu au meza ya vitabu, Kikapu kidogo kwa ajili ya kubeba vitabu
materials_en: Children's books, bookshelf or book table, small basket for carrying books
steps_sw:
1. Pangilia vitabu kwenye eneo moja maalumu
2. Hakikisha rafu iko katika urefu unaofikiwa na mtoto
3. Ongoza watoto wakae kwenye umbo la U, nusu duara, duara au mkao wowote unaofaa kwa shughuli husika
4. Mpe mtoto mmoja mmoja kitabu akipeleke na kukiweka mwenyewe sehemu iliyonyooka.
5. Rudia mara 2–3 akiwa anapanga vitabu vyote.
6. Mpe nafasi ya kujaribu bila msaada wakati wa jaribio la mwisho.
7. Mhimize kuangalia kama vitabu vimesimama au vimejipinda na kuvirekebisha
8. Endelea na shughuli hii hadi watoto waweze kupanga vitabu. Chunguza mtoto kama anaweza kuweka vitabu sehemu sahihi bila msaada.

Tanbihi:
Shughuli hii ifanyike ndani ya vipindi 2 kwa mbinu hii hii.

Ushiriki wa wazazi nyumbani: Mwelekeze mzazi kumwongoza kupanga vitabu katika sehemu sahihi bila msaada akiwa nyumbani.
steps_en:
1. Arrange books in one specific area
2. Make sure the shelf is at a height reachable by the child
3. Guide children to sit in a U-shape, semicircle, circle or any suitable arrangement for the activity
4. Give each child a book one by one to carry and place on the straight/upright section themselves.
5. Repeat 2–3 times as they arrange all the books.
6. Give them a chance to try without help during the final attempt.
7. Encourage them to check whether the books are standing upright or leaning and to straighten them
8. Continue this activity until children can arrange books. Check whether the child can place books in the correct place without help.

Note:
This activity should be done within 2 sessions using this same method.

Parent participation at home: Guide the parent to direct the child to arrange books in the correct place without help at home.

subject: Lugha na Mawasiliano: Miaka 2–3 / Kuwasiliana katika Mazingira Tofauti
title_sw: Shughuli 2: Kufanya Mazungumzo Mafupi na Rika
title_en: Activity 2: Having Short Conversations with Peers
about_sw: Kubadilishana mawazo, kusikiliza wenzao, na kukuza stadi za kijamii na kupeana zamu ya kuongea.
about_en: Exchanging ideas, listening to peers, and developing social skills and turn-taking in conversation.
materials_sw: Vitu vya kuchezea ambavyo vinaweza vinaweza kutumiwa kwa ushirika (mfano vibao/vitofali).
materials_en: Cooperative play items that can be used together (e.g. blocks/tiles).
steps_sw:
1. Panga watoto katika jozi au vikundi vidogo (wawili au watatu) na kuweka vifaa vya kuchezea katikati yao.
2. Waambie washirikiane kupanga vibao / vitofali kwenye maumbo mbalimbali.
3. Wakati wanapanga chunguza mazungumzo yao katika vikundi.
4. Wasaidie Watoto wanaopata changamoto ya kuwasiliana kwa kuwapa maneno mafupi kama naomb, tafadhali, asante.
5. Watoto wapange maumbo na vitu mbalimbali mara nyingi wawezavyo.

Tanbihi: Shughuli hii ifanyke ndani ya vipindi 4 kwa wakati tofauti ukibadilisha mbinu na vifaa. Unaweza kuongoza shughuli hii kwa kuwakaribisha watoto kuchora katika vikundi.
steps_en:
1. Arrange children in pairs or small groups (two or three) and place cooperative play items in the middle.
2. Ask them to work together to arrange blocks/tiles into different shapes.
3. While they are building, observe their conversations within the groups.
4. Help children who have difficulty communicating by giving them short words such as 'please', 'thank you'.
5. Children should arrange shapes and different objects as many times as possible.

Note: This activity should be done in 4 sessions at different times, varying the methods and materials. You can extend this activity by inviting children to draw in groups.

subject: Kuhusiana: Miaka 2–3 / Kujenga Uhusiano wa Msingi na Watu Wengine
title_sw: Shughuli 1a: Kujitambulisha jina lake.
title_en: Activity 1a: Introducing Oneself by Name.
about_sw: Stadi za kijamii, kujieleza, kujiamini, stadi za awali za lugha.
about_en: Social skills, self-expression, self-confidence, early language skills.
materials_sw: Kadi za jina
materials_en: Name cards
steps_sw:
1. Andaa mazingira Rafiki kwa ajili ya mchezo wa kujitambulisha majina.
2. Wakaribishe Watoto katika mduara au mkao mwingine kulingana na mazingira.
3. Waongoze watoto kwa maelekezo, kuwa tutacheza mchezo wa kujitambulisha kupitia wimbo na kila mtoto atapita katikati ya duara na kujitambulisha jina lake.
4. Waongoze kujitambulisha kwa mfano na watoto wafanye hivyo.
5. Endelea na mchezo huo kwa kumpa kila mtoto fursa ya kutaja jina lake mbele ya wenzake.
6. Chunguza kama kila mtoto ameweza kujitambulisha jina lake.

TANBIHI:
1. Kama kuna mtoto mwenye changamoto ya kuona, tumia mbinu rafiki itakayo mpa fursa hiyo.
2. Shughuli hii itafanyika kwa vipindi viwili au zaidi kwa wakati tofauti na katika vipindi vya kujitambulisha.
steps_en:
1. Prepare a friendly environment for the name introduction game.
2. Welcome children in a circle or another seating arrangement suitable for the environment.
3. Guide children with instructions: we will play a name introduction game through a song, and each child will pass through the middle of the circle and introduce their name.
4. Model the introduction yourself and have children do the same.
5. Continue the game by giving each child the opportunity to say their name in front of their peers.
6. Check whether every child was able to introduce their name.

Note:
1. If there is a child with a visual impairment, use a friendly method that will give them that opportunity.
2. This activity will be done in two or more sessions at different times and during introduction periods.

subject: Kujenga Uhusiano wa Msingi na Watu Wengine
title_sw: Shughuli 1b: Kujitambulisha jina lake
title_en: Activity 1b: Introducing oneself by name
about_sw: kujieleza, stadi za wali za lugha, stadi za kijamii, stadi za kijamii
about_en: Self-expression, language skills, social skills
materials_sw: Kioo, picha
materials_en: Mirror, photos
steps_sw:
1. Andaa kioo ambacho hakijapasuka na kiwe kwenye fremu.
2. Wakaribishe Watoto wapange mstari.
3. Waambie Watoto leo tutaenda kutumia kioo kidogo.
4. Jiangalie kwenye kioo na utaje jina lako kwanza.
5. Nyanyua kioo kulingana na upeo wa macho ya mtoto.
6. Mkaribishe mtoto ajiangalie kwenye kioo.
7. Muongoze kwa maswali Mfano: Ni nani huyo unayemuona kwenye kioo? Mtoto atajibu mimi… Anaitwa nani? Na mtoto atataja jina lake.
8. Wape Watoto nafasi wa kuwa sehemu ya mchezo huo na kuulizana wenyewe.
9. Chunguza kama mtoto anaweza kujitambua kwenye kioo na kutaja jina lake.

TANBIHI: Shughuli hii itafanyika kwa vipindi viwili kwa wakati tofauti na kwa kutumia mbinu tofauti tofauti kulingana na uhitaji na mazingira.
steps_en:
1. Prepare a mirror that is not cracked and is in a frame.
2. Welcome the children and have them form a line.
3. Tell the children that today we will use a small mirror.
4. Look at yourself in the mirror and say your name first.
5. Raise the mirror to the child's eye level.
6. Invite the child to look at themselves in the mirror.
7. Guide with questions, e.g.: Who is that you see in the mirror? The child will answer 'me'… What is their name? And the child will say their name.
8. Give children the opportunity to be part of the game and ask each other.
9. Check whether the child can recognise themselves in the mirror and say their name.

NOTE: This activity will be done in two sessions at different times and using different methods according to needs and circumstances.

subject: Kujenga Uhusiano wa Msingi na Watu Wengine
title_sw: Shughuli 2: Kutaja jinsi yake
title_en: Activity 2: Identifying one's gender
about_sw: Utambuzi wa jinsi, kujieleza, kujiamini, stadi za wali za lugha
about_en: Gender recognition, self-expression, self-confidence, language skills
materials_sw: Kadi za jinsi ya kike na kiume, wanasesere wenye jinsi ya kike na kiume, picha za Watoto wenye jinsi ya kike na kiume
materials_en: Cards showing female and male gender, dolls of female and male gender, photos of female and male children
steps_sw:
1. Andaa kadi mbili kubwa zenye picha za mtoto wa kike na mtoto wa kiume.
2. Bandika picha ukutani usawa wa uso wa mtoto. Kila picha ibandike kwa kuacha nafasi Katikati.
3. Wakaribishe Watoto wakae kwenye umbo la U/ nusu duara au mkao mwingine kulingana na mazingira.
4. Waoneshe kwa kitendo, kila mtu ataangalia picha na kwenda kusimama mbele ya picha inayoendana na jinsi yako, anza kwa kuonyesha mfano.
5. Mkaribishe mtoto mwingine kusimama katika picha inayofanana na jinsi yake.
6. Waruhusu kila mtoto kusimama mbele ya picha inayofanana na jinsi yake.
7. Baada ya mchezo huo, wakaribishe Watoto kwenye mduara.
8. Muite mtoto mmoja aje Katikati ya duara ataje jinsi yake.
9. Waruhusu kupeana nafasi kuja katikati ya mduara na kila mtoto kutaja jinsi yake.
10. Chunguza kama kila mtoto amepata fursa na ameweza kutaja jinsi yake.

TANBIHI:
1. Kama kuna mtoto mwenye changamoto ya kuona, andaa kadi mguso na mpatie muda wa kutosha kumshika mwanasesere.
2. Shughuli hii itafanyika kwa vipindi viwili kwa wakati tofauti.
steps_en:
1. Prepare two large cards with pictures of a girl and a boy.
2. Stick the pictures on the wall at the child's face level, leaving space in the middle between each picture.
3. Welcome the children to sit in a U-shape / semicircle or another arrangement according to the environment.
4. Demonstrate by action — each person will look at the pictures and go stand in front of the picture that matches their gender; start by demonstrating yourself.
5. Invite another child to stand at the picture that matches their gender.
6. Allow each child to stand in front of the picture that matches their gender.
7. After the game, gather the children back in a circle.
8. Call one child to come to the centre of the circle and say their gender.
9. Allow turns for each child to come to the centre of the circle and say their gender.
10. Check whether each child has had an opportunity and was able to say their gender.

NOTE:
1. If there is a child with a visual impairment, prepare tactile cards and give them enough time to hold a doll.
2. This activity will be done in two sessions at different times.

subject: Kujenga Uhusiano wa Msingi na Watu Wengine
title_sw: Shughuli 3a: Kusalimiana
title_en: Activity 3a: Greeting each other
about_sw: stadi za mawasiliano, wa nidhamu, kujiamini, heshima
about_en: Communication skills, discipline, self-confidence, respect
materials_sw: Kadi za picha zikinoesha Watoto wakisalimiana
materials_en: Picture cards showing children greeting each other
steps_sw:
1. Andaa kadi mbalimbali zinazoonesha watoto wakisalimiana ikiwemo kushikana mikono.
2. Wakaribishe watoto kukaa kwenye umbo la U/nusu duara/ duara au mkao mwingine kulingana na mazingira.
3. Waoneshe mfano kwa kumuita mtoto mmoja na kumshika mkono na kumuambia mambo aitikie poa.
4. Wakaribishe Watoto kwenye jozi kisha watende tendo la kusalimiana kama ulivyowaonyesha.
5. Watoto wabadilishane jozi na kusalimiana na mtoto mwingine.
6. Chunguza kama kila mtoto anaweza kusalimiana na wenzake.
7. Shughuli imalizike unapoona inafaa.

TANBIHI: Shughuli hii itafanyika kwa vipindi viwili kwa muda tofauti, kipindi cha pili badilisha salamu na mbinu ya utekelezaji.
steps_en:
1. Prepare various cards showing children greeting each other, including shaking hands.
2. Welcome the children to sit in a U-shape / semicircle / circle or another arrangement according to the environment.
3. Demonstrate by calling one child, shaking their hand, and saying a greeting for them to respond to positively.
4. Invite the children into pairs and then perform the greeting action as you demonstrated.
5. Children swap pairs and greet another child.
6. Check whether each child is able to greet their peers.
7. End the activity when you see it is appropriate.

NOTE: This activity will be done in two sessions at different times; in the second session, change the greeting and the method of implementation.

subject: Kujenga Uhusiano wa Msingi na Watu Wengine
title_sw: Shughuli 3b: Kusalimiana
title_en: Activity 3b: Greeting Each Other
about_sw: Muda: Dakika 30. Stadi zitakazojengwa: stadi za mawasiliano, nidhamu, kujiamini, subira, nidhamu, stadi za kijamii.
about_en: Duration: 30 minutes. Skills to be developed: communication skills, discipline, self-confidence, patience, discipline, social skills.
materials_sw: Kadi za picha zikionesha Watoto wakisalimiana
materials_en: Picture cards showing children greeting each other
steps_sw:
1. Wakaribishe Watoto kukaa kwenye umbo la U/nusu duara/duara au mkao mwingine kulingana na mazingira.
2. Waambie watoto leo wataimba wimbo wa kusalimiana. Anza kuimba wimbo na watoto wakusikilize. Tuamkapo asubuhi tuwasalimu wazazi, Shikamoo mama shikamoo baba hiyo ndio tabia njema. (Ongeza salamu nyingine inayoweza kutumika kwa watoto.)
3. Wakaribishe watoto waendeleze wimbo huo pamoja na wewe.
4. Chunguza kama kila mtoto ameweza kuimba.
TANBIHI: Shughuli hii itafanyika kwa vipindi viwili tofauti. Tumia nyimbo nyingine za salamu.
Ushiriki wa wazazi nyumbani: Mshirikishe mzazi kumjengea mtoto tabia ya kusalimia watu kila akutanapo nao, akianza na watu waliopo nyumbani.
steps_en:
1. Invite the children to sit in a U-shape/semicircle/circle or another arrangement depending on the environment.
2. Tell the children that today they will sing a greeting song. Begin singing the song while the children listen. 'When we wake up in the morning we greet our parents, Shikamoo mama, shikamoo baba, that is good behaviour.' (Add other greetings that can be used by children.)
3. Invite the children to continue the song together with you.
4. Check whether each child was able to sing.
NOTE: This activity will be done in two separate sessions. Use other greeting songs.
Parent participation at home: Involve the parent in building the child's habit of greeting people whenever they meet them, starting with people at home.

subject: Kujenga Uhusiano wa Msingi na Watu Wengine
title_sw: Shughuli 4a: Kushirikiana
title_en: Activity 4a: Cooperating
about_sw: Muda: Dakika 30. Stadi zitakazojengwa: Stadi za kusaidiana, kujiamini, kukuza lugha na stadi za kijamii.
about_en: Duration: 30 minutes. Skills to be developed: helping skills, self-confidence, language development and social skills.
materials_sw: Vibao vya kujengea ambavyo vina ukubwa tofauti.
materials_en: Building blocks of different sizes.
steps_sw:
1. Andaa vibao vyenye ukubwa tofauti vyenye umbo la mche mraba.
2. Viweke katikati ya mkeka.
3. Wakaribishe Watoto wakae kwenye mduara kuzunguka vibao katikati au mkao mwingine kulingana na mazingira.
4. Waambie leo tutajenga mnara wa kutumia vibao kwa Pamoja.
5. Waonyeshe namna ya kubeba kimoja kwa kutumia mkono wako mmoja kwa utaratibu.
6. Jenga sehemu ya mnara watoto wakikuangalia.
7. Wakaribishe Watoto kujenga mnara kwa kupeana zamu.
8. Wajenge mnara mpaka kibao cha mwisho.
9. Wakaribishe watoto wabomoe mnara kwa kupeana zamu.
10. Wape nafasi ya kuendeleza mchezo wa kujenga na kubomoa mnara kwa kupeana zamu.
11. Chunguza kama kila mtoto anaweza kushirikiana na wenzake kujenga mnara.
TANBIHI: Shughuli hii ifanyike kwa vipindi viwili katika wakati tofauti. Mfano: kipindi cha pili wanaweza kutumia vibao tofauti au mijiti kujenga maumbo mbalimbali.
Ushiriki wa wazazi nyumbani: Muelekeze kukusanya vibao mbalimbali na kumsaidia mtoto kujenga mnara na wenzake wanaoishi eneo moja au ndugu zake.
steps_en:
1. Prepare blocks of different sizes in the shape of a small square.
2. Place them in the centre of the mat.
3. Invite the children to sit in a circle around the blocks in the centre, or another arrangement depending on the environment.
4. Tell them that today we will build a tower together using blocks.
5. Show them how to carry one block at a time using one hand in an orderly manner.
6. Build part of the tower while the children watch.
7. Invite the children to build the tower by taking turns.
8. Build the tower until the last block.
9. Invite the children to knock down the tower by taking turns.
10. Give them the opportunity to continue the game of building and knocking down the tower by taking turns.
11. Check whether each child can cooperate with others to build the tower.
NOTE: This activity should be done in two sessions at different times. Example: in the second session they can use different blocks or sticks to build various shapes.
Parent participation at home: Guide them to collect various blocks and help the child build a tower with peers who live in the same area or with siblings.

subject: Kujenga Uhusiano wa Msingi na Watu Wengine
title_sw: Shughuli 4b: Kushirikiana
title_en: Activity 4b: Cooperating
about_sw: Muda: Dakika 30. Stadi zitakazojengwa: Stadi za kusaidiana, kujiamini, kukuza misamiati, Kuimarisha misuli midogo na mikubwa, ukazo wa fikra, utaratibu wa macho na mikono na stadi za kijamii.
about_en: Duration: 30 minutes. Skills to be developed: helping skills, self-confidence, vocabulary development, strengthening small and large muscles, concentration, eye-hand coordination and social skills.
materials_sw: Picha Ukuti na mnazi. (vinaweza kuwa vifani kwa ajili ya ujumuishi)
materials_en: Pictures of a wall/fence and a coconut tree. (these can be representations/symbols for the purpose of inclusion)
steps_sw:
1. Andaa nafasi nje au ndani ya chumba ambayo ni salama na kubwa kutosha watoto kucheza mchezo wa ukuti kwenye mduara.
2. Wakaribishe watoto wasimame katika mduara ambao wote mtaweza kuonana.
3. Waoneshe watoto picha kisha waulize ni picha ya nini?
4. Kama hawafahamu watajie hizo ni picha za nini.
5. Waelekeze watoto kwa kuwaeleza kuwa leo tutaimba wimbo na kucheza.
6. Waongoze Watoto kuimba wimbo wa ukuti ukuti... Ukuti Ukuti, wa mnazi wa mnazi x2 Mwenzetu mwenzetu, Kagongwa kagongwa Na nini na nini? Na gari na gari Tumpeleke hospitali akapate matibabu, Yesa yesa yesa yeeeh.
7. Chunguza kama mtoto anaweza kucheza kwa kushikana mikono na wenzake.
TANBIHI: Shughuli hii ifanywe kwa vipindi viwili. Kipindi cha pili watoto wacheze mchezo mwingine wa kushikana mikono.
Ushiriki wa wazazi nyumbani: Msisitize mzazi kumhimiza mtoto katika kushirikiana na wenzie.
steps_en:
1. Prepare a space outside or inside the room that is safe and large enough for the children to play the 'ukuti' game in a circle.
2. Invite the children to stand in a circle where everyone can see each other.
3. Show the children the pictures and ask them what they show.
4. If they don't know, tell them what the pictures are of.
5. Guide the children by explaining that today we will sing a song and play.
6. Lead the children in singing the 'ukuti' song... 'Ukuti Ukuti, wa mnazi wa mnazi x2, Mwenzetu mwenzetu, Kagongwa kagongwa, Na nini na nini? Na gari na gari, Tumpeleke hospitali akapate matibabu, Yesa yesa yesa yeeeh.'
7. Check whether the child can play by holding hands with others.
NOTE: This activity should be done in two sessions. In the second session the children should play another game of holding hands.
Parent participation at home: Encourage the parent to motivate the child to cooperate with their peers.

subject: Kueleza Hisia kwa Maneno na Ishara
title_sw: Shughuli 1a: Kutaja hisia tofauti
title_en: Activity 1a: Naming different emotions
about_sw: Utambuzi wa hisia, kuwasiliana, umakini, usikivu, kufuata maelekezo
about_en: Recognition of emotions, communication, attentiveness, listening, following instructions
materials_sw: Kadi zenye picha zinazoonesha hisia tofauti: Furaha, huzuni, hofu, hasira
materials_en: Cards with pictures showing different emotions: Happiness, sadness, fear, anger
steps_sw:
1. Andaa kadi za hisia tofauti (furaha, huzuni, hofu, hasira).
2. Chora picha rahisi zinazoonesha hisia tofauti (furaha, huzuni, hofu, hasira)
3. Wakaribishe wasimame/wakae katika umbo la U/nusu duara/mduara au mkao mwingine kulingana na mazingira.
4. Wasimulie watoto hadithi fupi inayotaja hisia, huku ukionesha hisia hizo.
5. Endelea kwa kuonesha kadi moja ya hisia mfano, hii ni kadi ya furaha. Onesha unafurahi
6. Wambie kuwa una kadi na utakuwa unanyanyua na kuwaonesha kadi moja baada ya nyingine
7. Endelea kuwambia kuwa, utakaponyanyua kadi moja, watataja hisia wanayoiona katika kadi
8. Endelea na zoezi la kuonesha kadi tofauti hadi kadi zote zimeonekana
9. Rudia tena kwa kuonesha kadi na watoto wataje
10. Kama kuna hisia ambayo watoto wanashindwa kuitaja, wasaidie kuitaja, kisha nao waitaje
11. Shughuli itaisha unapoona inafaa ndani ya muda uliopangwa
12. Chunguza kama kila mtoto anataja hisia

TANBIHI:
1. Shughuli hii ifanywe kwa vipindi viwili tofauti na kwa kutumia mbinu mbalimbali zinazoweza kutaja hisisa tofauti.
2. Endapo kuna mtoto mwenye changamoto ya kuona, tumia mbinu nyingine shirikishi mfano, kuongea sauti ya polepole inayoashiria "huzuni", sauti ya juu inayoashiria "furaha"
steps_en:
1. Prepare cards of different emotions (happiness, sadness, fear, anger).
2. Draw simple pictures showing different emotions (happiness, sadness, fear, anger).
3. Have children stand/sit in a U-shape/semicircle/circle or another arrangement suitable to the environment.
4. Tell the children a short story about emotions, while showing those emotions.
5. Continue by showing one emotion card as an example, this is a happiness card. Show happiness.
6. Tell them that you have cards and you will be lifting and showing them one card after another.
7. Continue telling them that when you lift one card, they will name the emotion they see on the card.
8. Continue the exercise of showing different cards until all cards have been seen.
9. Repeat again by showing cards and have children name them.
10. If there is an emotion that children cannot name, help them name it, then have them name it too.
11. The activity will end when you see it is appropriate within the planned time.
12. Check whether every child is naming emotions.

NOTE:
1. This activity should be done in two different sessions and using various methods that can help name different emotions.
2. If there is a child with a visual impairment, use other inclusive methods such as speaking in a slow voice to indicate "sadness", a high voice to indicate "happiness".

subject: Kueleza Hisia kwa Maneno na Ishara
title_sw: Shughuli 1b: Kutaja hisia tofauti
title_en: Activity 1b: Naming different emotions
about_sw: Utambuzi wa hisia, kuwasiliana, umakini, usikivu, kufuata maelekezo
about_en: Recognition of emotions, communication, attentiveness, listening, following instructions
materials_sw: Kadi zenye picha zinazoonesha hisia tofauti: furaha, huzuni, hofu, hasira
materials_en: Cards with pictures showing different emotions: happiness, sadness, fear, anger
steps_sw:
1. Andaa kadi ambazo ziko katika jozi, 1.kila jozi iwe na kadi inayoonesha hisia moja.
2. Wakaribishe watoto wasimame/wakae katika mduara
3. Waambie kuwa una kadi nyingi katika kikapu/mfuko
4. Anza kwa kutoa mfano wa jinsi ya kucheza. Nyanyua kadi na waambie kuwa hii ni kadi, inaonesha picha ya furaha-tabasamu
5. Chukua kadi nyingine inayoendana na furaha. Waambie kuwa umepata picha nyingine ya furaha-zinafanana. Ziweke hizo kadi pamoja
6. Unda vikundi vya watoto wachache kila kikundi, kisha kila kikundi kipatie kadi za picha zinazoonesha hisia tofauti. Hakikisha ziko katika jozi
7. Wambie kila kikundi wachukue picha zinazofanana na kuziweka pamoja
8. Chunguza kama watoto wanalinganisha kadi zinazofanana

TANBIHI:
1. Endapo kuna mtoto mwenye changamoto ya kuona, tumia mbinu nyingine shirikishi mfano, kuongea sauti ya polepole inayoashiria "huzuni", sauti ya juu inayoashiria "furaha"
2. Shughuli hii itakamilika baada ya vipindi viwili
steps_en:
1. Prepare cards that are in pairs; each pair should have a card showing one emotion.
2. Have children stand/sit in a circle.
3. Tell them that you have many cards in a basket/bag.
4. Start by giving an example of how to play. Lift a card and tell them this is a card, it shows a picture of happiness-a smile.
5. Take another card that matches happiness. Tell them you have found another picture of happiness-they are similar. Put those cards together.
6. Form small groups of children, then give each group cards with pictures showing different emotions. Make sure they are in pairs.
7. Tell each group to pick out pictures that are similar and put them together.
8. Check whether children are matching similar cards.

NOTE:
1. If there is a child with a visual impairment, use other inclusive methods such as speaking in a slow voice to indicate "sadness", a high voice to indicate "happiness".
2. This activity will be completed after two sessions.

subject: Kueleza Hisia kwa Maneno na Ishara
title_sw: Shughuli 2: Kutaja hisia aliyonayo
title_en: Activity 2: Naming the emotion one has
about_sw: Utambuzi wa hisia, kuwasiliana, umakini, usikivu, kusikiliza, kujieleza, kijamii
about_en: Recognition of emotions, communication, attentiveness, listening, listening carefully, self-expression, social skills
materials_sw: Kadi/picha za watoto zikionesha hisia tofauti (furaha, huzuni, hasira, woga). Michoro inayoonesha hisia tofauti. Michoro na kadi ziwe jumuishi
materials_en: Cards/pictures of children showing different emotions (happiness, sadness, anger, fear). Drawings showing different emotions. Drawings and cards should be inclusive.
steps_sw:
1. Andaa kadi zenye picha za watoto wanaoonesha hisia tofauti
2. Chora michoro inayoonesha hisia tofauti
3. Andaa kona darasani na kuipa jina la "Najisikia..."
4. Wakaribishe watoto wasimame/wakae katika mduara
5. Waambie kuwa leo tutacheza mchezo unaoitwa "Najisikia"
6. Anza kwa kutoa mfano wa jinsi ya kucheza. Waambie kuwa leo najisikia furaha, kisha waoneshe kadi/mchoro unaoonesha furaha
7. Wambie waende katika kona ya "Najisikia", waambie kuwa kila mtoto atapata nafasi ya kutaja hisia aliyonayo, ataigiza hisia hiyo na atachagua kadi yenye kufanana na hiyo hisia aioneshe kwa wengine
8. Mchezo utaisha baada ya kuwa kila mtoto amepata nafasi ya kucheza na kutaja hisia aliyonayo
9. Chunguza kama watoto wanataja na kuigiza hisia walizonazo

TANBIHI:
1. Endapo kuna mtoto mwenye changamoto ya kuona, chukua kadi yenye unamu tofauti aweze kupapasa kuambua hisia aliyonayo.
2. Shughuli hii itakamilika katika vipindi viwili tofauti.
steps_en:
1. Prepare cards with pictures of children showing different emotions.
2. Draw pictures showing different emotions.
3. Prepare a corner in the classroom and name it "I feel..."
4. Have children stand/sit in a circle.
5. Tell them that today we will play a game called "I feel".
6. Start by giving an example of how to play. Tell them that today I feel happy, then show them the card/drawing showing happiness.
7. Tell them to go to the "I feel" corner; tell them that each child will have a chance to name the emotion they have, act out that emotion and choose a card that matches that emotion and show it to others.
8. The game will end after every child has had a chance to play and name the emotion they have.
9. Check whether children are naming and acting out the emotions they have.

NOTE:
1. If there is a child with a visual impairment, take a card with different textures so they can feel and identify the emotion they have.
2. This activity will be completed in two different sessions.

subject: Kuhusiana: Miaka 2 – 3 | Kueleza Hisia kwa Maneno na Ishara
title_sw: Shughuli 3: Kutatua migogoro kupitia hadithi
title_en: Activity 3: Resolving conflicts through stories
about_sw: Kushirikiana, kuheshimu wengine, kusikiliza wengine, kujieleza, kuwasiliana, kusikiliza, uvumilivu
about_en: Cooperation, respecting others, listening to others, self-expression, communication, listening, patience
materials_sw: Kitabu cha hadithi/karatasi yenye hadithi, kadi za hisia, vikaragosi
materials_en: Storybook/paper with a story, emotion cards, puppets
steps_sw:
1. Andaa hadithi fupi inayoonesha mgogoro kati ya watoto wawili na kuipa jina au tumia hadithi inayopendekezwa katika ukurasa unaofuata.
2. Wakaribishe watoto wakae katika mduara. Waambie kuwa utawasomea hadithi ya Juma na Siti. Onesha vikaragosi viwili na uvipe majina ya Juma na Siti.
