3. Soma hadithi kwa sauti inayosikika vizuri, huku ukionesha hisia husika kwa kutumia kadi.
4. Endelea kusoma hadithi taratibu, kisha waongoze watoto kwa kijibu maswali. Mfano: Juma na Siti walifanya nini? Juma anajisikiaje? Siti anajisikiaje?
5. Chagua jozi ya watoto wachache waigize mgogoro wa Juma na Siti.
6. Jadiliana na watoto kuhusu suluhisho na kisha watoto wawili waigize suluhisho hilo chunguza kama kila mtoto anashiriki

TANBIHI: Shughuli hii ya kutumia hadithi itafanyika katika vipindi vitatu tofauti. Unaweza kutumia hadithi tofauti. Bainisha mahitaji waliyonayo watoto na uwashirikishe kulingana na uhitaji wao.
steps_en:
1. Prepare a short story showing a conflict between two children and give it a name, or use the recommended story on the following page.
2. Welcome the children to sit in a circle. Tell them you will read them the story of Juma and Siti. Show two puppets and name them Juma and Siti.
3. Read the story aloud clearly, while showing the relevant emotions using cards.
4. Continue reading the story slowly, then guide the children to answer questions. Example: What did Juma and Siti do? How does Juma feel? How does Siti feel?
5. Select a few pairs of children to act out the conflict between Juma and Siti.
6. Discuss solutions with the children and then have two children act out that solution; check that every child is participating.

NOTE: This storytelling activity will be done in three different sessions. You may use different stories. Identify the children's needs and involve them according to their needs.

subject: Kuhusiana: Miaka 2 – 3 | Kueleza Hisia kwa Maneno na Ishara
title_sw: Shughuli 4a: Kudhibiti hisia
title_en: Activity 4a: Controlling emotions
about_sw: Utambuzi wa hisia, kuelezea hisia zao, kujenga uhusiano mzuri.
about_en: Recognising emotions, expressing their emotions, building positive relationships.
materials_sw: Kitabu cha hadithi au karatasi yenye hadithi
materials_en: Storybook or paper with a story
steps_sw:
1. Andaa hadithi fupi inayoonesha kudhibiti hisia au tumia hadithi pendekezwa hapo chini.
2. Wakaribishe watoto wakae katika nusu mduara katika kona ya hadithi.
3. Waambie kuwa utawasomea hadithi ya 'Panya mdogo na Panya Mkubwa'.
4. Soma hadithi kwa hisia tofauti huku ukionesha kadi ya hisia hizo, mfano hasira, huzuni, utulivu.
5. Waambie watoto waigize hisia hizo–hasira, huzuni, utulivu, furaha.
6. Waambie watoto wavute pumzi kwa ndani, na kutulia kidogo kama alivyofanya mama panya. Maliza shughuli kwa kuwambia kuwa tunapokuwa na hasira tunaweza kuzimaliza kwa kuvuta pumzi.
7.1. Chunguza kama wanaigiza mbinu za kuthibiti hisia kama vile hasira.

Tanbihi: Shughuli hii ifanywe kwa vipindi viwili kwa kutumia mbinu mbalimbali.
steps_en:
1. Prepare a short story showing emotion control or use the recommended story below.
2. Welcome the children to sit in a semicircle in the story corner.
3. Tell them you will read them the story of 'Little Mouse and Big Mouse'.
4. Read the story with different emotions while showing emotion cards, for example anger, sadness, calmness.
5. Ask the children to act out those emotions – anger, sadness, calmness, happiness.
6. Ask the children to breathe in deeply and calm down a little, as mama mouse did. End the activity by telling them that when we are angry we can calm down by breathing.
7.1. Check whether they are practising techniques for controlling emotions such as anger.

Note: This activity should be done in two sessions using various techniques.

subject: Kujenga Stadi za Kujitegemea
title_sw: Shughuli 1a: Kupanga vitu mahali husika
title_en: Activity 1a: Arranging things in their proper place
about_sw: Kuchagua na kuweka vitu, kukuza misuli midogo ya vidole, umakini, usikivu, kufuata maelekezo
about_en: Selecting and placing items, developing fine finger muscles, attentiveness, listening, following instructions
materials_sw: Vitu vidogo kama vibao, chupa za plastiki, vijiti, vifuniko vya chupa
materials_en: Small items such as blocks, plastic bottles, sticks, bottle caps
steps_sw:
1. Andaa vitu vidogo kama vile vibao, chupa za plastiki, magunzi, vijiti, vifuniko vya chupa na vingine utakavyoweza kupata
2. Andaa vikapu au vyombo vya kuweka hivyo vitu kulingana na idadi ya vitu.
3. Andaa eneo la kuchezea na hakikisha ni safi
4. Weka vitu vyote ulivyoandaa sehemu moja na vikapu kila kimoja sehemu yake.
5. Onesha mfano wa namna ya kuweka kitu mahali sahihi
6. Unda timu mbili hadi tatu za watoto 10 kila moja. Wapange kila timu katika mstari kuanzia mtoto wa kwanza hadi wa mwisho.
7. Waambie kuwa ukipiga ngoma/makofi mara tatu, mtoto wa kwanza kutoka kila timu atakimbia, atachukua kitu kimoja na kukiweka katika kikapu husika, kisha atarudi na kwenda nyuma ya mstari. Mtoto anayefuata atakimbia na kufanya sawa na yule wa mwanzo.
8. Mchezo unakamilika baada ya kila mtoto kuwa amecheza na vitu vyote vimewekwa kwenye vikapu.
9. Maliza kwa kutembelea vikapu vyote na watoto kuona kama wameweka sehemu sahihi.
TANBIHI: Shughuli hii ifanywe kwa vipindi viwili kwa kutumia mbinu mbalimbali.
steps_en:
1. Prepare small items such as blocks, plastic bottles, tubes, sticks, bottle caps, and others you can find.
2. Prepare baskets or containers to hold those items according to the number of items.
3. Prepare the play area and ensure it is clean.
4. Place all the items you have prepared in one spot and each basket in its own place.
5. Demonstrate how to place an item in the correct place.
6. Form two to three teams of up to 10 children each. Line each team up from the first child to the last.
7. Tell them that when you beat the drum/clap three times, the first child from each team will run, pick up one item, place it in the correct basket, then return and go to the back of the line. The next child will run and do the same as the first.
8. The game ends after every child has had a turn and all items have been placed in the baskets.
9. Finish by visiting all the baskets with the children to see if items have been placed in the right places.
NOTE: This activity should be done over two sessions using different methods.

subject: Kujenga Stadi za Kujitegemea
title_sw: Shughuli 1b: Kupanga vitu mahali husika
title_en: Activity 1b: Arranging things in their proper place
about_sw: Kuchagua na kuweka vitu, kukuza misuli midogo ya vidole, umakini, usikivu, kufuata maelekezo
about_en: Selecting and placing items, developing fine finger muscles, attentiveness, listening, following instructions
materials_sw: Vitu vidogo vya kuchezea mfano, vizibo, magunzi, vijiti
materials_en: Small play items such as stoppers, tubes, sticks
steps_sw:
1. Andaa vitu vidogo vingi kadiri vinavyopatikana.
2. Andaa vikapu au vyombo vya kuweka hivyo vitu kulingana na idadi ya vitu, kila kikapu kipe alama.
3. Andaa eneo la kuchezea na hakikisha ni safi.
4. Sambaza vitu ulivyoandaa na kuviweka sehemu isiyoonekana kirahisi katika eneo la kuchezea.
5. Weka vikapu/vyombo katika eneo la kuchezea. Kila kikapu kiwekee alama/picha ndogo ili mtoto ajue pa kuweka
6. Waambie watoto kuwa watacheza mchezo wa safari ya kutafuta hazina.
7. Waambie kuwa katika eneo la kuchezea kuna vikapu na kila kikapu kina alama/picha ya vitu husika.
8. Watoto watatembea eneo la kuchezea, watatafuta vitu na kuviweka katika kikapu husika.
9. Mchezo unakamilika baada ya vitu vyote kuwa vimewekwa katika vikapu.
10. Chunguza kama mtoto anaweka kitu sehemu sahihi.
TANBIHI: Shughuli hii ifanywe kwa vipindi viwili kwa kutumia mbinu mbalimbali.
steps_en:
1. Prepare as many small items as available.
2. Prepare baskets or containers to hold those items according to the number of items; label each basket.
3. Prepare the play area and ensure it is clean.
4. Scatter the prepared items and hide them in places not easily visible in the play area.
5. Place baskets/containers in the play area. Attach a small label/picture to each basket so the child knows where to put things.
6. Tell the children they will play a treasure hunt game.
7. Tell them that in the play area there are baskets and each basket has a label/picture of the items that belong there.
8. Children will walk around the play area, search for items, and place them in the correct basket.
9. The game ends after all items have been placed in the baskets.
10. Check whether each child places an item in the correct place.
NOTE: This activity should be done over two sessions using different methods.

subject: Kujenga Stadi za Kujitegemea
title_sw: Shughuli 2: Kutambua vitu vyake
title_en: Activity 2: Identifying one's own belongings
about_sw: Utambuzi wa vitu, kuweka vitu mahali sahihi, kujiamini, kutofautisha vitu
about_en: Recognition of items, placing items in the correct place, self-confidence, distinguishing between items
materials_sw: Viatu, mabegi, chupa za maji/juisi, masweta
materials_en: Shoes, bags, water/juice bottles, sweaters
steps_sw:
1. Andaa sehemu ya kila mtoto kuweka vitu vyake.
2. Kusanya baadhi ya vitu vya watoto na kuviweka sehemu moja.
3. Waambie watoto kuwa mbele yao kuna kundi la viatu vyao, mabegi yao, chupa zao za maji/juisi, masweta.
4. Waambie kuwa tutacheza mchezo unaitwa "Matembezi ya kupokezana".
5. Waelekeze kuwa wakati wa kucheza mtoto mmoja mmoja atatembea na kutafuta kiatu chake na kurudi nacho.
6. Anza kwa kuonesha kwa vitendo namna ya kucheza huku ukisisitiza watoto wakuangalie.
7. Baada ya kuonesha, anza mchezo kwa kutumia kundi moja la vitu hadi likamilike mfano, viatu.
8. Wapange watoto katika mstari mmoja, utakapopiga ngoma mtoto aliyeko mbele ya mstari atatembea na kwenda kuchukua kitu chake, atarudi na kuruhusu mtoto anayefuata kucheza
9. Endelea na mchezo hadi kila mtoto amepata nafasi ya kutambua vitu vyake.
10. Chunguza kama kila mtoto anatambua na kuchukua kitu chake.
TANBIHI: Shughuli hii itakamilika baada ya vipindi vitatu kwa kutumia vitu mbalimbali. Katika kila kipindi tumia kundi moja au mawili ya vitu.
steps_en:
1. Prepare a spot for each child to keep their belongings.
2. Collect some of the children's items and place them together in one spot.
3. Tell the children that in front of them is a group of their shoes, their bags, their water/juice bottles, and their sweaters.
4. Tell them that you will play a game called "Taking Turns Walk".
5. Guide them that during play, one child at a time will walk and find their shoe and return with it.
6. Begin by demonstrating how to play while emphasizing that children should watch you.
7. After demonstrating, start the game using one category of items until it is complete, e.g., shoes.
8. Line the children up in one line; when you beat the drum the child at the front of the line will walk and go pick up their item, return, and allow the next child to play.
9. Continue the game until every child has had a chance to identify their belongings.
10. Check whether each child recognizes and picks up their own item.
NOTE: This activity will be completed over three sessions using different items. In each session use one or two categories of items.

subject: Kujenga Stadi za Kujitegemea
title_sw: Shughuli 3a: Kunawa mikono
title_en: Activity 3a: Washing hands
about_sw: Stadi ya kunawa mikono, kujenga misuli midogo ya vidole, umakini, uratibu wa macho na mikono
about_en: Skill of washing hands, developing fine finger muscles, carefulness, eye-hand coordination
materials_sw: Kadi zinazoonesha picha ya ndoo, sabuni, beseni, kikombe, maji, vifaa halisi vya kunawia mikono, picha za watoto wananawa mikono
materials_en: Cards showing pictures of a bucket, soap, basin, cup, water, actual handwashing equipment, pictures of children washing hands
steps_sw:
1. Andaa kadi zenye picha za vitu vinavyotumika kunawa mikono
2. Andaa eneo la kufanyia shughuli
3. Anza kwa kuwambia Watoto kuwa leo wataigiza kunawa mikono
4. Waambie wataje vitu wanavyotumia kunawa mikono, kisha tumia kadi kwa kuwambia wataje jina la kitu hicho
5. Anza kwa kutoa mfano kwa kuigiza kunawa mikono
6. Baada ya hapo waelekeze mtoto mmoja mmoja aje mbele na kuigiza kunawa mikono kwa kufuata hatua
7. Chunguza kama kila mtoto anaweza kunawa mikono

TANBIHI: Shughuli hii ifanywe kwa vipindi viwili kwa wakati tofauti kwa kutumia mbinu mbalimbali.
steps_en:
1. Prepare cards with pictures of items used for washing hands
2. Prepare the activity area
3. Begin by telling the children that today they will role-play washing hands
4. Ask them to name the items used for washing hands, then use the cards to have them name each item
5. Begin by demonstrating how to wash hands through role-play
6. After that, guide each child one by one to come forward and role-play washing hands following the steps
7. Check whether each child can wash their hands

NOTE: This activity should be done in two sessions at different times using various methods.

subject: Kujenga Stadi za Kujitegemea
title_sw: Shughuli 3b: Kunawa mikono
title_en: Activity 3b: Washing hands
about_sw: Stadi ya kunawa mikono, kujenga misuli midogo ya vidole, umakini, uratibu wa macho na mikono
about_en: Skill of washing hands, developing fine finger muscles, carefulness, eye-hand coordination
materials_sw: Kadi zinazoonesha picha ya ndoo, sabuni, beseni, kikombe, maji, vifaa halisi vya kunawia mikono, picha za watoto wananawa mikono
materials_en: Cards showing pictures of a bucket, soap, basin, cup, water, actual handwashing equipment, pictures of children washing hands
steps_sw:
1. Andaa kadi zenye picha za vitu vinavyotumika kunawa mikono
2. Andaa eneo la kufanyia shughuli, kisha weka vituo vya kuchezea ambapo kila kituo kitakuwa na kifaa cha kufanya usafi wa mikono
3. Wapange watoto katika mkao ambao watoto wote wana uwezo wa kuona
4. Waambie wataje vitu wanavyotumia kunawa mikono
5. Waambie kuwa watacheza mchezo wa kuigiza wananawa mikono
6. Anza kwa kutoa mfano unaigiza kunawa mikono
7. Wagawe katika timu za watoto 5-6
8. Waoneshe vituo ulipoeka vifaa vya kufanya usafi wa mikono. Wambie kuwa ukipiga ngoma kila kikundi watakwenda katika kituo chenye kifaa, waangalie hicho kifaa na kuigiza kinavyotumika. Ukipiga ngoma tena watahamia kituo kingine
9. Endelea hivyo hadi kila mtoto amepata nafasi ya kucheza katika kila kituo
10. Chunguza kama kila mtoto anaweza kunawa mikono kwa kufuata hatua

TANBIHI: Shughuli hii ifanywe kwa vipindi viwili kwa kutumia mbinu mbalimbali.
steps_en:
1. Prepare cards with pictures of items used for washing hands
2. Prepare the activity area, then set up play stations where each station will have a handwashing hygiene tool
3. Arrange the children in a formation where all children are able to see
4. Ask them to name items used for washing hands
5. Tell them they will play a role-play game of washing hands
6. Begin by demonstrating role-playing washing hands
7. Divide them into teams of 5-6 children
8. Show them the stations where you placed handwashing tools. Tell them that when you beat the drum, each group will go to the station with a tool, look at that tool and role-play how it is used. When you beat the drum again they move to the next station
9. Continue until each child has had a chance to play at every station
10. Check whether each child can wash their hands following the steps

NOTE: This activity should be done in two sessions using various methods.

subject: Kujenga Stadi za Kujitegemea
title_sw: Shughuli 3c: Kunawa mikono
title_en: Activity 3c: Washing hands
about_sw: Stadi ya kunawa mikono, kujenga misuli midogo ya vidole, umakini, uratibu wa macho na mikono
about_en: Skill of washing hands, developing fine finger muscles, carefulness, eye-hand coordination
materials_sw: Picha zinazoonesha hatua za kunawa mikono, ndoo ya maji tiririka, bomba la maji, beseni/sinki, sabuni, taulo safi, kaaratasi za kufutia mikono, kitambaa safi kinachofyonza maji
materials_en: Pictures showing steps for washing hands, a bucket with running water, water tap, basin/sink, soap, clean towel, paper for drying hands, clean absorbent cloth
steps_sw:
1. Andaa picha zinazoonesha hatua za kunawa mikono
2. Andaa eneo la kufanyia shughuli, kisha weka vituo vya kuchezea ambapo kila kituo kitakuwa na kifaa cha kufanya usafi wa mikono
3. Tenga vituo viwili vya kunawia mikono na weka vifaa vyote vinavyohitajika
4. Kaa na watoto sehemu tulivu inayoruhusu kuwasiliana kikamilifu
5. Waambie kwa sauti ya utulivu kuwa "leo tutajifunza jinsi ya kunawa mikono vizuri"
6. Waoneshe kwa vitendo jinsi ya kunawa mikono hatua kwa hatua. Sisitiza kila mtoto akuangalie kwa makini. Mfano, kulowanisha mikono, kupaka sabauni, kusugua mikono kwa sekunde chache
7. Wagawe watoto katika timu mbili, kila timu waoneshe kituo chao cha kunawia mikono
8. Waambie kuwa utapiga makofi mara moja, na mtoto aliyeko mbele katika kila timu atajongea katika kituo cha kunawia mikono na kunawa mikono kwa kufuata hatua
9. Endelea hivyo hadi kila mtoto apate nafasi ya kunawa mikono
10. Chunguza kama kila mtoto ananawa kwa kufuata hatua

TANBIHI: Shughuli hii ifanywe kwa vipindi viwili katika wakati tofauti na kutumia mbinu tofauti.
steps_en:
1. Prepare pictures showing the steps for washing hands
2. Prepare the activity area, then set up play stations where each station will have a handwashing hygiene tool
3. Set up two handwashing stations and place all necessary equipment
4. Sit with the children in a quiet area that allows full communication
5. Tell them in a calm voice that "today we will learn how to wash hands properly"
6. Demonstrate through actions how to wash hands step by step. Emphasize that each child watches carefully. For example, wetting hands, applying soap, scrubbing hands for a few seconds
7. Divide the children into two teams, each team is shown their handwashing station
8. Tell them that you will clap once, and the child at the front of each team will move to the handwashing station and wash hands following the steps
9. Continue until each child has had a chance to wash their hands
10. Check whether each child washes following the steps

NOTE: This activity should be done in two sessions at different times using different methods.

subject: Kujenga Stadi za Kujitegemea / Kuhusiana: Miaka 2–3
title_sw: Shughuli 7b: Kula chakula kwa kujitegemea
title_en: Activity 7b: Eating food independently
about_sw: Kujilisha mwenyewe, kuomba msaada inapohitajika, ujenzi wa misuli midogo ya vidole, uratibu wa macho na mikono, tabia njema, umakini, kusikiliza, kufuata utaratibu, kufuata maelekezo
about_en: Feeding oneself, asking for help when needed, developing fine motor muscles of the fingers, eye-hand coordination, good manners, carefulness, listening, following routines, following instructions
materials_sw: Vitu halisi kama viti, meza/mikeka, vijiko, sahani, kikombe cha maji, ndoo ya maji tiririka, sabuni na chakula.
materials_en: Real items such as chairs, tables/mats, spoons, plates, a cup of water, a running-water bucket, soap, and food.
steps_sw:
1. Andaa kadi za vitu halisi vilivyoainishwa hapo juu kwenye vifaa pendekezwa.
2. Andaa eneo tulivu, safi na salama kwa ajili ya watoto kula chakula.
3. Anza kwa kuwambia watoto wataje vifaa vinavyotumika kula chakula.
4. Waoneshe sehemu ya kukaa wakati wa kula chakula kisha waongoze kila mmoja kujilisha chakula kwenye sahani yake.
5. Simamia kila mtoto afuate hatua za kula chakula kuanzia kunawa mikono hadi mwisho.
6. Chunguza kama kila mtoto ananawa kwa maji safi na sabuni.

TANBIHI: Shughuli hii ifanywe kwa vipindi viwili katika nyakati tofauti kwa kutumia mbinu mbalimbali.
steps_en:
1. Prepare cards of real items identified above among the suggested materials.
2. Prepare a calm, clean, and safe area for children to eat food.
3. Begin by asking children to name the utensils used for eating.
4. Show them the seating area for mealtime, then guide each child to serve food onto their own plate.
5. Supervise each child to follow the steps of eating food from washing hands to the end.
6. Check whether each child washes their hands with clean water and soap.

NOTE: This activity should be conducted in two sessions at different times using various methods.

subject: Kujenga Stadi za Kushirikiana / Kuhusiana: Miaka 2–3
title_sw: Shughuli 1a: Kufuata maelekezo rahisi
title_en: Activity 1a: Following simple instructions
about_sw: Ushirikiano, kusikiliza, kufuata maelekezo, umakini
about_en: Cooperation, listening, following instructions, carefulness
materials_sw: Kadi yenye picha ya simba, mama, watoto
materials_en: Cards with pictures of a lion, a mother, and children
steps_sw:
1. Andaa kadi zenye picha ya simba, mama na Watoto.
2. Andaa eneo la nje au ndani la kuchezea mchezo.
3. Waongoze watoto kwenda eneo la kuchezea.
4. Waambie watoto kwamba watacheza mchezo wa mama na simba.
5. Waombe watoto wanne wajitolee kuja mbele.
6. Waoneshe watoto namna ya kucheza mchezo huo kwa kugawa.
7. Unda vikundi vya watoto 8–10.
8. Waambie Watoto katika kila kikundi kucheza mchezo wa mama na simba.

Mama: watoto wangu ee.
Watoto: Eeeeee.
Mama: Mimi mama yenu.
Watoto: Eeeeee.
Mama: Sina nguvu tena.
Watoto: Eeeeee.
Mama: Za kuua simba.
Watoto: Eeeeee.
Mama: Simba ni mkali, ameua baba, ameua kaka, ameua dada. Sasa njooni.

9. Chunguza kama kila mtoto anafuata maelekezo.
10. Mchezo utamalizika unapoona inafaa.

TANBIHI: Shughuli hii ifanywe kwa vipindi viwili kwa wakati tofauti.
steps_en:
1. Prepare cards with pictures of a lion, a mother, and children.
2. Prepare an outdoor or indoor area for playing the game.
3. Guide children to the play area.
4. Tell children they will play the 'mother and lion' game.
5. Ask four children to volunteer to come forward.
6. Show children how to play the game by distributing roles.
7. Form groups of 8–10 children.
8. Tell children in each group to play the mother and lion game.

Mother: My children, hey.
Children: Eeeeee.
Mother: I am your mother.
Children: Eeeeee.
Mother: I have no strength left.
Children: Eeeeee.
Mother: To kill the lion.
Children: Eeeeee.
Mother: The lion is fierce, it has killed father, killed brother, killed sister. Now come!

9. Check whether each child is following instructions.
10. End the game when you feel it is appropriate.

NOTE: This activity should be conducted in two sessions at different times.

subject: Kujenga Stadi za Kushirikiana / Kuhusiana: Miaka 2–3
title_sw: Shughuli 1b: Kufuata maelekezo rahisi
title_en: Activity 1b: Following simple instructions
about_sw: Ushirikiano, kusikiliza, kufuata maelekezo, umakini, kutatua changamoto, uvumilivu
about_en: Cooperation, listening, following instructions, carefulness, problem solving, patience
materials_sw: Kadi yenye picha ya gari, mfuniko wa ndoo, kamba
materials_en: A card with a picture of a car, a bucket lid, a rope
steps_sw:
1. Andaa eneo kuchezea, kadi yenye picha ya gari, mfuniko wa ndoo, kamba.
2. Waambie watoto kuwa watacheza mchezo kuendesha gari.
3. Waulize maswali yanayoendana na mchezo kwa mfano huwa unaona magari wapi? Mtu anayeendesha gari anaitwa nani?
4. Wagawe watoto katika makundi ya watoto nane mpaka tisa.
5. Funga kamba kuwazunguka watoto kiasi kwamba kundi la watoto wote wawe ndani.
6. Waelekeze watoto namna ya kucheza mchezo.
7. Watakapoelewa mchezo, waache wacheze wenyewe.
8. Chunguza kama mtoto anaweza kusikiliza na kufuata maelekezo.
9. Mchezo utamalizika unapoona inafaa.

TANBIHI: Shughuli hii ifanywe kwa vipindi viwili kwa wakati tofauti.
steps_en:
1. Prepare the play area, a card with a picture of a car, a bucket lid, and a rope.
2. Tell children they will play a car-driving game.
3. Ask questions related to the game, for example: where do you see cars? What is a person who drives a car called?
4. Divide children into groups of eight to nine.
5. Tie a rope around the children so that the whole group is inside.
6. Guide children on how to play the game.
7. Once they understand the game, let them play on their own.
8. Check whether the child can listen and follow instructions.
9. End the game when you feel it is appropriate.

NOTE: This activity should be conducted in two sessions at different times.

subject: Kuhusiana: Miaka 2–3 | Kujenga Stadi za Kushirikiana
title_sw: Shughuli 2a: Kufanya shughuli mbalimbali katika vikundi
title_en: Activity 2a: Doing various activities in groups
about_sw: Kujenga uhusiano, kujieleza, kudhibiti hisia, kupeana zamu, umakini
about_en: Building relationships, self-expression, emotional regulation, turn-taking, attentiveness
materials_sw: Vikapu 3 vidogo na mipira midogo 3
materials_en: 3 small baskets and 3 small balls
steps_sw:
1. Andaa vikapu 3 na mipira 3, andaa eneo la kuchezea.
2. Waongoze watoto kwenda eneo la kuchezea.
3. Waambie watoto wasimame kwenye mduara.
4. Waambie watoto kuwa watacheza mchezo wa mpira.
5. Waoneshe watoto namna ya kucheza mchezo.
6. Waruhusu watoto kucheza mchezo.
7. Chunguza kama mtoto anaweza kusikiliza na kufuata maelekezo.
8. Mchezo utamalizika unapoona inafaa.

TANBIHI: Shughuli hii ifanywe kwa vipindi viwili kwa wakati tofauti.
steps_en:
1. Prepare 3 baskets and 3 balls, prepare the play area.
2. Guide the children to the play area.
3. Tell the children to stand in a circle.
4. Tell the children that they will play a ball game.
5. Show the children how to play the game.
6. Allow the children to play the game.
7. Observe whether the child can listen and follow instructions.
8. The game will end when you see it is appropriate.

NOTE: This activity should be done in two sessions at different times.

subject: Kuhusiana: Miaka 2–3 | Kujenga Stadi za Kushirikiana
title_sw: Shughuli 2b: Kufanya shughuli mbali mbali katika vikundi
title_en: Activity 2b: Doing various activities in groups
about_sw: Kujenga uhusiano, kujieleza, kudhibiti hisia, kupeana zamu, umakini
about_en: Building relationships, self-expression, emotional regulation, turn-taking, attentiveness
materials_sw: Mchanga, vijiti vidogo
materials_en: Sand, small sticks
steps_sw:
1. Andaa eneo la kuchezea, mchanga na vijiti.
2. Waongoze watoto kwenda eneo la kuchezea.
3. Waambie watoto wasimame kwenye mduara.
4. Waambie watoto kuwa watacheza mchezo wa kula mbakishie baba.
5. Waoneshe watoto namna ya kucheza mchezo.
6. Waruhusu watoto kucheza mchezo.
7. Chunguza kama kila mtoto anajenga uhusiano na wenzake.
8. Mchezo utaisha utakapoona inafaa.

TANBIHI: Shughuli hii ifanye kwa vipindi viwili kwa wakati tofauti.
steps_en:
1. Prepare the play area, sand, and sticks.
2. Guide the children to the play area.
3. Tell the children to stand in a circle.
4. Tell the children that they will play a game of cooking food for father.
5. Show the children how to play the game.
6. Allow the children to play the game.
7. Observe whether each child is building a relationship with their peers.
8. The game will end when you see it is appropriate.

NOTE: This activity should be done in two sessions at different times.

subject: Kuhusiana: Miaka 2–3 | Kujenga Stadi za Kushirikiana
title_sw: Shughuli 3a: Kuainisha vitu mbalimbali
title_en: Activity 3a: Sorting/classifying various objects
about_sw: Utambuzi wa vitu, kusikiliza, umakini, kuchambua vitu
about_en: Object recognition, listening, attentiveness, analysing objects
materials_sw: Vikombe, sahani, vyenye rangi tofauti
materials_en: Cups, plates, of different colours
steps_sw:
1. Andaa eneo la kuchezea, andaa vifaa vya kuchezea.
2. Wapange kwenye vikundi vya watoto 6–8.
3. Weka vitu viwili viwili mbele ya watoto vyenye ukubwa na rangi zinazofanana mfano sahani, vikombe na mawe.
4. Waongoze watoto namna ya kubainisha vitu tofauti tofauti kulingana na rangi na ukubwa.
5. Waruhusu watoto wa waendelee na zoezi la kubainisha vitu mbali mbali kulingana na rangi ukubwa.
6. Chunguza kama kila mtoto ana anaweza kutambua vitu mbali mbali.
7. Zoezi litamalizika utakapoona inafaa.

TANBIHI: Shughuli hii ifanywe kwa vipindi viwili kwa nyakati tofauti.
steps_en:
1. Prepare the play area, prepare the play materials.
2. Arrange the children into groups of 6–8.
3. Place pairs of objects in front of the children that have similar sizes and colours, for example plates, cups, and stones.
4. Guide the children on how to identify/sort different objects according to colour and size.
5. Allow the children to continue with the exercise of sorting various objects according to colour and size.
6. Observe whether each child is able to identify different objects.
7. The exercise will end when you see it is appropriate.

NOTE: This activity should be done in two sessions at different times.

subject: Kuhusiana: Miaka 2–3 / Kujenga Stadi za Kushirikiana
title_sw: Shughuli 3b: Kuainisha Vitu Mbalimbali
title_en: Activity 3b: Sorting Various Objects
about_sw: Muda: Dakika 30. Stadi zitakazojengwa: Utambuzi wa vitu, kusikiliza, umakini, kuchambua vitu.
about_en: Duration: 30 minutes. Skills to be developed: Object recognition, listening, attentiveness, analysing objects.
materials_sw: Vifuniko vya chupa, vijiti na mawe madogo
materials_en: Bottle caps, sticks, and small stones
steps_sw:
1. Andaa eneo la kuchezea, andaa vifaa vya kuchezea.
2. Wapange kwenye vikundi vya watoto 6–8.
3. Waambie watoto kuwa watacheza mchezo wa kuokota vitu.
4. Waelekeze watoto namna ya kucheza mchezo wa kuokota vitu.
5. Waongoze watoto namna ya kubainisha vitu tofauti tofauti kulingana na rangi na ukubwa.
6. Waruhusu watoto waendelee na mchezo.
7. Chunguza kama kila mtoto anaweza kusikiliza kwa makini.
TANBIHI: Shughuli hii ifanywe kwa vipindi viwili kwa wakati tofauti na kwa kutumia mbinu mbalimbali.
steps_en:
1. Prepare the play area and play materials.
2. Arrange children into groups of 6–8.
3. Tell the children they will play a game of picking up objects.
4. Guide the children on how to play the object-picking game.
5. Guide the children on how to sort different objects according to colour and size.
6. Allow children to continue with the game.
7. Check whether each child can listen carefully.
NOTE: This activity should be done in two sessions at different times and using different methods.

subject: Afya na Mazingira: Miaka 2–3 / Kutunza Afya ya Mwili
title_sw: Shughuli 1: Kuonesha Sehemu za Mwili
title_en: Activity 1: Showing Body Parts
about_sw: Muda: Dakika 30. Stadi zitakazojengwa: Utambuzi wa sehemu za mwili, umakini, kuimarisha misuli mikubwa na midogo, uratibu wa macho na mikono.
about_en: Duration: 30 minutes. Skills to be developed: Recognition of body parts, attentiveness, strengthening large and small muscles, eye-hand coordination.
materials_sw: Chati, kadi, picha mnato na picha mjongeo zenye picha za sehemu za mwili, mwanasesere
materials_en: Chart, cards, printed pictures and moving pictures showing body parts, a doll
steps_sw:
1. Andaa vifaa vinavyoonesha sehemu za mwili.
2. Waongoze watoto kuimba wimbo unaotaja sehemu za mwili (mfano: Kichwa mabega, kifua mgongo, magoti vidole, magoti vidole).
3. Waulize watoto kutaja sehemu za mwili, 'Unaweza kuzitaja sehemu zako za mwili?' Sikiliza majibu yao.
4. Waoneshe watoto chati/kadi yenye picha ya sehemu za mwili na waulize wanachokiona kwenye chati hiyo kisha wahusianishe na sehemu zao za mwili.
5. Mshirikishe mtoto mmoja baada ya mwingine kwa kuzingatia usawa wa kijinsia na ujumuishi aongoze mchezo wa kugusa na kutaja sehemu mbalimbali za mwili.
6. Chunguza ikiwa kila mtoto anaweza kuonesha sehemu za mwili.
Tanbihi:
1. Kumbuka kuainisha watoto wenye mahitaji maalum ili uweze kuwashirikisha kulingana na mahitaji yao.
2. Shughuli hii itawezeshwa mara 5 kwa vipindi tofauti.
steps_en:
1. Prepare materials that show body parts.
2. Guide children to sing a song that names body parts (example: Head, shoulders, chest, back, knees and toes, knees and toes).
3. Ask children to name body parts, 'Can you name your body parts?' Listen to their answers.
4. Show children a chart/card with pictures of body parts and ask what they see on the chart, then have them associate it with their own body parts.
5. Involve one child after another, taking into account gender balance and inclusion, to lead a game of touching and naming various body parts.
6. Check whether each child can show body parts.
Note:
1. Remember to identify children with special needs so you can involve them according to their needs.
2. This activity will be facilitated 5 times in different sessions.

subject: Afya na Mazingira: Miaka 2–3 / Kutunza Afya ya Mwili
title_sw: Shughuli 2: Kutaja vifaa vya usafi wa mwili
title_en: Activity 2: Naming body hygiene items
about_sw: Kudumisha usafi na afya, utambuzi, kujenga tabia na nidhamu ya usafi.
about_en: Maintaining cleanliness and health, identification, building habits and discipline of hygiene.
materials_sw: Maji safi na salama, sabuni ya kuogea, dodoki/brashi la kuogea, beseni/ndoo, bomba la kumwaga maji kwa juu, taulo/kitambaa safi, bebeo la sabuni ya kuogea, mafuta ya kujipaka (ngozi), picha mnato, picha mjongeo na kadi/chati za picha zinazoonesha tendo la kusafisha mwili, mwanasesere
materials_en: Clean and safe water, bathing soap, bath sponge/brush, basin/bucket, overhead water pump, clean towel/cloth, soap dish, body lotion (skin), printed pictures, animated pictures and cards/charts showing body-washing activities, doll
steps_sw:
1. Andaa vifaa tajwa hapo juu, wapange watoto kwenye mpangilio mzuri na kuweka mazingira rafiki ya ujifunzaji.
2. Waelekeze watoto kukaa kwenye kwenye mkao wowote unaofaa.
3. Waongoze watoto kuimba wimbo au mchezo unataja vifaa vya usafi wa mwili.
4. Waoneshe watoto vifaa halisi vinavyotumika katika usafi wa mwili, chati, kadi, picha mnato/picha mjongeo zinazoonesha vifaa na tendo usafi wa mwili.
5. Wape Watoto fursa ya kuvishika vifaa mbalimbali vya usafi wa mwili.
6. Waulize watoto wataje vifaa mbalimbali vya usafi wa mwili walivyovishika na kuwarekebisha wanapokosea.
7. Chunguza kama kila mtoto ametaja vifaa vya usafi wa mwili.

Tanbihi:
1. Kumbuka kubainisha watoto wenye mahitaji maalum ili uweze kuwashirikisha ipasavyo kulingana na mahitaji yao
2. Shughuli hii itawezeshwa mara 3 kwa vipindi tofauti
steps_en:
1. Prepare the materials listed above, arrange children in a good order and create a child-friendly learning environment.
2. Guide children to sit in any comfortable posture.
3. Lead children to sing a song or play a game that names body hygiene items.
4. Show children real items used for body hygiene, charts, cards, printed/animated pictures showing hygiene items and body-washing activities.
5. Give children the opportunity to hold various body hygiene items.
6. Ask children to name the various body hygiene items they held and correct them when they make mistakes.
7. Check whether each child has named the body hygiene items.

Note:
1. Remember to identify children with special needs so you can include them appropriately according to their needs.
2. This activity will be conducted 3 times in different sessions.

subject: Afya na Mazingira: Miaka 2–3 / Kutunza Afya ya Mwili
title_sw: Shughuli 3: Kunawa Mikono
title_en: Activity 3: Washing Hands
about_sw: Kudumisha usafi na afya, kujenga tabia na nidhamu ya usafi, kufuata utaratibu, kuimarisha misuli mikubwa na midogo.
about_en: Maintaining cleanliness and health, building habits and discipline of hygiene, following routines, strengthening large and small muscles.
materials_sw: Picha mnato, picha mjongeo na kadi/chati za picha zinazoonesha tendo la kunawa mikono, kibuyu chirizi, maji, sabuni na taulo/kitambaa/tishu
materials_en: Printed pictures, animated pictures and cards/charts showing the hand-washing activity, a tipping/tippy tap container, water, soap, and towel/cloth/tissue
steps_sw:
1. Andaa mazingira wezeshi na zana husika zitakazowasaidia watoto kunawa mikono.
2. Waongoze watoto wakae kwenye mkao wowote unaofaa.
3. Wagawie watoto picha mnato, kadi/chati za picha zinazoonesha tendo la kunawa mikono na waulize wanachokiona. Sikiliza majibu yao.
4. Waoneshe watoto jinsi ya kunawa mikono hatua kwa hatua.
5. Mpe kila mtoto fursa ya kunawa mikono.
6. Chunguza ili kubaini kama kila mtoto anafuata zote za kunawa mikono.

Tanbihi:
1. Kumbuka kubainisha watoto wenye mahitaji maalum ili uweze kuwashirikisha kulingana na mahitaji yao
2. Shughuli hii itawezeshwa mara 5 kwa vipindi tofauti.
steps_en:
1. Prepare an enabling environment and relevant tools that will help children wash their hands.
2. Guide children to sit in any comfortable posture.
3. Give children printed pictures, cards/charts showing the hand-washing activity and ask what they see. Listen to their answers.
4. Show children how to wash hands step by step.
5. Give each child the opportunity to wash their hands.
6. Check to confirm whether each child follows all the steps of hand washing.

Note:
1. Remember to identify children with special needs so you can include them according to their needs.
2. This activity will be conducted 5 times in different sessions.

subject: Afya na Mazingira: Miaka 2–3 / Kutunza Afya ya Mwili
title_sw: Shughuli 4: Kusafisha kinywa
title_en: Activity 4: Cleaning the mouth
about_sw: Kudumisha usafi na afya, utambuzi, kujenga tabia na nidhamu ya usafi.
about_en: Maintaining cleanliness and health, identification, building habits and discipline of hygiene.
materials_sw: Mswaki, dawa ya meno, maji safi na salama, picha mnato, picha mjongeo na kadi/chati za picha zinazoonesha tendo la kusafisha kinywa
materials_en: Toothbrush, toothpaste, clean and safe water, printed pictures, animated pictures and cards/charts showing the mouth-cleaning activity
steps_sw:
1. Wasaidie watoto wakae kwenye mkao wowote unaofaa.
2. Waoneshe watoto vifaa halisi vya kusafisha kinywa, chati, kadi, picha mnato/picha mjongeo zinazoonesha vifaa na tendo la kusafisha kinywa.
3. Waulize watoto wataje wanachokiona ili kujua uelewa na uzoefu wao katika vifaa na tendo la kusafisha kinywa.
4. Alika mtoto mmoja baada ya mwingine kueleza tendo la usafi wa kinywa. (Je, huwa unasafisha kinywa? Muda gani? Nani huwa anakusaidia?).
5. Waelekeze watoto hatua na namna ya kusafisha kinywa; Chukua mswaki usafishe kwa maji safi na salama, weka dawa ya meno, onesha tendo la kusafisha kinywa kwa kuanza na hatua ya kusugua meno nje, ndani, juu na chini, sugua ulimi na fizi katika maeneo yote. Sukutua kinywa kwa kutumia maji safi na salama, safisha mswaki kwa maji safi na salama kisha hifadhi mswaki sehemu safi na salama.
6. Waongoze watoto kila mmoja kuigiza kusafisha kinywa kisha waimbe wimbo.

Wimbo wa kusafisha kinywa:
Hivi ndivyo tunavyosafisha meno, safisha meno, safisha meno
Hivi ndivyo tunavyosafisha meno, asubuhi na mapemaa

Hivi ndivyo tunavyosafisha ulimi, safisha ulimi, safisha ulimi
Hivi ndivyo tunavyosafisha ulimi, asubuhi na mapemaa

Hivi ndivyo tunavyosafisha fizi, safisha fizi, safisha fizi
Hivi ndivyo tunavyosafisha fizi, asubuhi na mapemaa

Hivi ndivyo tunavyosafisha mdomo, safisha mdomo, safisha mdomo
Hivi ndivyo tunavyosafisha mdomo, asubuhi na mapemaa

Tanbihi:
1. Kumbuka kubainisha watoto wenye mahitaji maalum ili uweze kuwashirikisha kulingana na mahitaji yao
2. Shughuli hii itawezeshwa mara 2 kwa vipindi tofauti
steps_en:
1. Help children sit in any comfortable posture.
2. Show children the real items for cleaning the mouth, charts, cards, printed/animated pictures showing the items and the mouth-cleaning activity.
3. Ask children to name what they see in order to gauge their understanding and experience of mouth-cleaning items and activities.
4. Invite children one by one to describe the mouth-cleaning activity. (Do you brush your teeth? When? Who helps you?).
5. Guide children through the steps and method of cleaning the mouth: Take the toothbrush, rinse it with clean safe water, apply toothpaste, demonstrate the mouth-cleaning activity starting with brushing the outside, inside, top and bottom of teeth, brush the tongue and gums in all areas. Rinse the mouth with clean safe water, clean the toothbrush with clean safe water then store the toothbrush in a clean safe place.
6. Guide each child to practise cleaning the mouth and then sing a song.

Mouth-cleaning song:
This is how we clean our teeth, clean our teeth, clean our teeth
This is how we clean our teeth, in the morning early

This is how we clean our tongue, clean our tongue, clean our tongue
This is how we clean our tongue, in the morning early

This is how we clean our gums, clean our gums, clean our gums
This is how we clean our gums, in the morning early

This is how we clean our mouth, clean our mouth, clean our mouth
This is how we clean our mouth, in the morning early

Note:
1. Remember to identify children with special needs so you can include them according to their needs.
2. This activity will be conducted 2 times in different sessions.

subject: Afya na Mazingira: Kutunza Afya ya Mwili
title_sw: Shughuli 5: Kusafisha Uso
title_en: Activity 5: Washing the Face
about_sw: Kudumisha usafi na afya, utambuzi, kujenga tabia na nidhamu ya usafi.
about_en: Maintaining cleanliness and health, awareness, building habits and a culture of hygiene.
materials_sw: Maji safi na salama, sabuni ya kuogea, beseni/ndoo, kopo la kuogea, taulo/kitambaa safi, bebeo la sabuni ya kuogea, mafuta ya kujipaka (ngozi), picha mnato, picha mjongeo na kadi/chati za picha zinazoonesha tendo la kunawa uso.
materials_en: Clean and safe water, bathing soap, basin/bucket, bathing cup, clean towel/cloth, soap dish, skin lotion/moisturizer, printed pictures, animated pictures and picture cards/charts showing the act of washing the face.
steps_sw:
1. Waelekeze watoto wakae kwenye mkao wowote unaofaa.
2. Waongoze watoto waimbe wimbo wa kunawa uso.
3. Wagawie watoto vifaa vya kusafisha uso. Waongoze kutaja majina ya vifaa hivyo.
4. Alika mtoto mmoja baada ya mwingine kuonesha vifaa anavyovitumia kunawa uso kwa kutumia maswali yafuatayo: (Je, ukiwa nyumbani huwa unanawa uso? Nani huwa anakusaidia? Unanawa uso kwa kutumia nini?).
5. Waelekeze kwa vitendo hatua na namna ya kunawa uso.
6. Wape watoto fursa ya kuigiza kunawa uso.
7. Uliza mtoto mmoja baada ya mwingine kutaja vifaa vinavyotumika katika tendo la kunawa uso.
Tanbihi:
1. Kumbuka kubainisha watoto wenye mahitaji maalum ili uweze kuwashirikisha ipasavyo kulingana na mahitaji yao.
2. Shughuli hii itawezeshwa mara 2 kwa vipindi tofauti.
steps_en:
1. Guide children to sit in any suitable position.
2. Lead children to sing a face-washing song.
3. Distribute face-washing materials to children. Guide them to name those materials.
4. Invite one child after another to show the materials they use to wash their face using the following questions: (Do you wash your face at home? Who helps you? What do you use to wash your face?).
5. Guide them through the steps and manner of washing the face using actions.
6. Give children the opportunity to role-play washing the face.
7. Ask one child after another to name the materials used in the act of washing the face.
Note:
1. Remember to identify children with special needs so you can involve them appropriately according to their needs.
2. This activity will be facilitated 2 times at different sessions.
Parent involvement at home: Guide the parent to supervise the child to wash their face every day to maintain hygiene.

subject: Afya na Mazingira: Kutunza Afya ya Mwili
title_sw: Shughuli 6: Kusafisha Pua
title_en: Activity 6: Cleaning the Nose
about_sw: Kudumisha usafi, utambuzi, kujenga tabia na nidhamu ya usafi, uwezo wa kujihudumia.
about_en: Maintaining cleanliness, awareness, building habits and a culture of hygiene, ability to self-care.
materials_sw: Maji safi na salama, kitambaa (lesso), picha mnato, picha mjongeo na kadi/chati za picha zinazoonesha tendo la kusafisha pua.
materials_en: Clean and safe water, cloth (lesso/fabric), printed pictures, animated pictures and picture cards/charts showing the act of cleaning the nose.
steps_sw:
1. Andaa vifaa tajwa hapo juu, wapange watoto kwenye mpangilio mzuri na kuweka mazingira rafiki ya ujifunzaji.
2. Waoneshe watoto vifaa halisi vinavyotumika katika tendo la kusafisha pua katika vikundi ili wavichunguze.
3. Wazungukie watoto katika vikundi kuwapa msaada unaohitajika kubainisha vifaa vinavyotumika katika kusafisha pua.
4. Wawezeshe watoto kutaja majina ya vifaa kwa usahihi.
5. Waelekeze watoto kusafisha pua kwa kuonesha mfano na kuwaongoza kila mtoto kutumia kitambaa chake.
6. Chunguza kama kila mtoto anaweza kutaja vifaa na kusafisha pua.
Tanbihi:
1. Kumbuka kubainisha watoto wenye mahitaji maalum ili uweze kuwashirikisha ipasavyo kulingana na mahitaji yao.
2. Shughuli hii itawezeshwa kwa vipindi 3 kwa wakati tofauti.
steps_en:
1. Prepare the materials listed above, arrange children in a good order and create a friendly learning environment.
2. Show children the real materials used in the act of cleaning the nose in groups so they can examine them.
3. Go around to the children in groups to provide the necessary assistance in identifying the materials used in cleaning the nose.
4. Enable children to correctly name the materials.
5. Guide children to clean their nose by demonstrating and guiding each child to use their own cloth.
6. Check whether each child can name the materials and clean their nose.
Note:
1. Remember to identify children with special needs so you can involve them appropriately according to their needs.
2. This activity will be facilitated 3 times at different sessions.
Parent involvement at home: Guide the parent to help the child clean their nose and continue to guide them so they can clean it themselves.

subject: Afya na Mazingira: Kutunza Afya ya Mwili
title_sw: Shughuli 7: Kusafisha Nywele
title_en: Activity 7: Washing Hair
about_sw: Kujenga stadi/maarifa ya kudumisha usafi na afya, utambuzi, kujenga tabia na nidhamu ya usafi, kujitegemea.
about_en: Building skills/knowledge for maintaining cleanliness and health, awareness, building habits and a culture of hygiene, independence.
materials_sw: Chanuo, kitana, maji safi na salama, sabuni, beseni/ndoo, taulo/kitambaa safi, mafuta ya nywele, picha mnato, picha mjongeo na kadi/chati za picha zinazoonesha tendo la kusafisha nywele.
materials_en: Comb, fine-tooth comb, clean and safe water, soap, basin/bucket, clean towel/cloth, hair oil/grease, printed pictures, animated pictures and picture cards/charts showing the act of washing hair.
steps_sw:
1. Andaa vifaa tajwa hapo juu, wapange watoto kwenye mpangilio mzuri.
2. Wagawie watoto vifaa halisi, chati, kadi, picha mnato/picha mjongeo zinazoonesha vifaa na tendo la kusafisha nywele.
3. Wazungukie watoto katika vikundi na kutoa msaada unaohitajika wakati wa kuchunguza vifaa hivyo.
4. Onesha kwa vitendo namna ya kusafisha nywele au tumia picha mjongeo.
5. Waongoze watoto kuimba wimbo wa kusafisha nywele mfano:
Wimbo wa kusafisha nywele:
Hivi ndivyo tunavyosafisha nywele, safisha nywele, safisha nywele,
Hivi ndivyo tunavyosafisha nywele, asubuhi na mapemaa
Hivi ndivyo tunavyokausha nywele, kausha nywele, kausha nywele,
Hivi ndivyo tunavyokausha nywele, asubuhi na mapemaa
Hivi ndivyo tunavyopaka mafuta, paka mafuta, paka mafuta,
Hivi ndivyo tunavyopaka mafuta, asubuhi na mapemaa
Hivi ndivyo tunavyochana nywele, chana nywele, chana nywele,
Hivi ndivyo tunavyochana nywele, asubuhi na mapemaa.
6. Chunguza wakati wanaimba, kama watoto wanataja na kuonesha kwa kuigiza hatua za kusafisha nywele.
Tanbihi:
1. Kumbuka kubainisha watoto wenye mahitaji maalum ili uweze kuwashirikisha kulingana na mahitaji yao.
2. Shughuli hii itawezeshwa kwa vipindi 3 kwa wakati tofauti.
steps_en:
1. Prepare the materials listed above and arrange children in a good order.
2. Give children real materials, charts, cards, printed pictures/animated pictures showing the materials and the act of washing hair.
3. Go around to children in groups and provide the necessary assistance while examining those materials.
4. Demonstrate how to wash hair using actions or use an animated picture.
5. Lead children to sing a hair-washing song, for example:
Hair-washing song:
This is how we wash our hair, wash the hair, wash the hair,
This is how we wash our hair, in the morning and early hours
This is how we dry our hair, dry the hair, dry the hair,
This is how we dry our hair, in the morning and early hours
This is how we apply oil, apply oil, apply oil,
This is how we apply oil, in the morning and early hours
This is how we comb our hair, comb the hair, comb the hair,
This is how we comb our hair, in the morning and early hours.
6. Observe while they sing, whether children are naming and showing by acting out the steps of washing hair.
Note:
1. Remember to identify children with special needs so you can involve them according to their needs.
2. This activity will be facilitated 3 times at different sessions.
Parent involvement at home: Guide the parent to enable the child to wash their hair every day to maintain their cleanliness and neatness.

subject: Afya na Mazingira: Kutunza Afya ya Mwili
title_sw: Shughuli 8: Kutaja aina za nguo
title_en: Activity 8: Naming types of clothing
about_sw: Kutaja aina za nguo kwa jinsi, utambuzi, kujenga tabia kupenda kuvaa nguo kulingana na mila na desturi katika jamii kwa kuzingatia jinsi.
about_en: Naming types of clothing by gender, identification, building the habit of enjoying wearing clothes according to community customs and traditions with regard to gender.
materials_sw: Blauzi, sketi, suruali, shati, gauni, chupi, bukta, sweta, koti
materials_en: Blouse, skirt, trousers, shirt, dress, underwear, shorts, sweater, coat
steps_sw:
1. Andaa vifaa tajwa hapo juu, wapange watoto kwenye mpangilio mzuri na kuweka mazingira rafiki ya ujifunzaji.
2. Waulize watoto wataje nguo wanazozifahamu ili kujua uelewa wao.
3. Wagawie watoto nguo halisi au picha za nguo mbalimbali wazichunguze.
4. Waulize wataje majina ya nguo hizo.
5. Alika mtoto mmoja baada ya mwingine aoneshe kwa kugusa nguo/picha ya nguo moja baada ya nyingine na kutaja majina yake na umsaidie anapopata changamoto.
6. Wapongeze watoto kwa kushiriki kikamilifu.
7. Chunguza kama kila mtoto ameweza kutaja majina ya nguo.

Tanbihi
1. Kumbuka kubainisha watoto wenye mahitaji maalum ili waweweze kushiriki ipasavyo.
2. Shughuli hii itawezeshwa kwa vipindi 3 kwa wakati tofauti.
steps_en:
1. Prepare the materials listed above, arrange the children in a good order and create a friendly learning environment.
2. Ask the children to name clothes they know in order to assess their understanding.
3. Give the children real clothes or pictures of various clothes to examine.
4. Ask them to name those clothes.
5. Invite one child after another to show by touching one piece of clothing/picture after another and naming it, and assist them when they face difficulty.
6. Congratulate the children for participating fully.
7. Check whether each child has been able to name the types of clothing.

Note
1. Remember to identify children with special needs so that they can participate appropriately.
2. This activity can be done in 3 sessions at different times.

subject: Afya na Mazingira: Kutunza Afya ya Mwili
title_sw: Shughuli 9: Kutaja vifaa vya usafi wa nguo
title_en: Activity 9: Naming clothing hygiene tools
about_sw: Kudumisha usafi na afya, utambuzi, kujenga tabia na nidhamu ya usafi, unadhifu na utanashati, kukuza msamiati.
about_en: Maintaining cleanliness and health, identification, building habits and discipline of cleanliness, neatness and hygiene, expanding vocabulary.
materials_sw: Maji safi na salama, sabuni ya kufulia, beseni/ndoo, nguo, vibanio vya nguo, brashi ya kufulia, kamba ya kuanikia nguo, picha mnato, picha mjongeo na kadi/chati za picha zinazoonesha tendo la kufua nguo
materials_en: Clean and safe water, washing soap, basin/bucket, clothes, clothes pegs, washing brush, clothesline, printed pictures, sequential pictures and cards/charts showing the act of washing clothes
steps_sw:
1. Andaa vifaa tajwa hapo juu, wapange watoto kwenye mpangilio mzuri na kuweka mazingira rafiki ya ujifunzaji.
2. Waulize watoto kama wamewahi kufua nguo? Wamemwona nani anafua nguo nyumbani?
3. Wapatie watoto vifaa halisi, chati, kadi, picha mnato/picha mjongeo zinazoonesha vifaa na tendo la kufua nguo.
4. Waulize watoto wataje vifaa vya kufua nguo.
5. Waongoze watoto kuigiza kufua kwa kutumia vifaa hivyo.
6. Chunguza kama kila mtoto anaweza kutaja vifaa vya usafi wa nguo.

Tanbihi
Bainisha watoto wenye mahitaji maalum ili uweze kuwashirikisha ipasavyo kulingana na mahitaji yao
steps_en:
1. Prepare the materials listed above, arrange the children in a good order and create a friendly learning environment.
2. Ask the children if they have ever washed clothes. Who have they seen washing clothes at home?
3. Give the children real materials, charts, cards, printed/sequential pictures showing tools and the act of washing clothes.
4. Ask the children to name the tools for washing clothes.
5. Guide the children to role-play washing using those tools.
6. Check whether each child can name clothing hygiene tools.

Note
Identify children with special needs so that you can include them appropriately according to their needs.

subject: Afya na Mazingira: Kutaja Vyakula vya Aina Mbalimbali
title_sw: Shughuli 1: Kutaja vyakula mbalimbali
title_en: Activity 1: Naming various foods
about_sw: Kutaja aina mbalimbali za vyakula, utambuzi wa aina za vyakula.
about_en: Naming various types of foods, identification of food types.
materials_sw: Chati, kadi, picha mnato na picha mjongeo, nafaka, vifani
materials_en: Charts, cards, printed pictures and sequential pictures, grains, food models
steps_sw:
1. Andaa mazingira wezeshi na zana husika (chati, kadi, picha mnato na picha mjongeo zenye aina mbalimbali za vyakula).
2. Waongoze watoto wakae mkao wowote unaofaa.
3. Ongoza watoto kutaja aina mbalimbali za vyakula kushirikisha uzoefu wao.
4. Onesha aina mbalimbali za vyakula (kama wali, mihogo, viazi vitamu) kwa kutumia vitu halisi, picha mnato, picha mjongeo, chati.
5. Alika mtoto mmoja baada ya mwingine kuchagua picha au kifani cha chakula na kutaja jina la chakula hicho.
6. Alika mtoto mmoja baada ya mwingine kwa kuzingatia usawa wa kijinsia na ujumuishi aoнgoze mchezo wa kutaja aina mbalimbali za vyakula.
7. Chunguza kama kila mtoto anashiriki kutaja aina mbalimbali za vyakula.

Tanbihi
1. Kumbuka kuainisha watoto wenye mahitaji maalum ili uweze kuwashirikisha kulingana na mahitaji yao.
2. Shughuli hii itawezeshwa kwa vipindi 5 katika muda tofauti, kwa kubadilisha aina za vyakula.
steps_en:
1. Prepare a supportive environment and relevant tools (charts, cards, printed and sequential pictures showing various types of foods).
2. Guide the children to sit in any suitable position.
3. Lead the children to name various types of foods, drawing on their own experience.
4. Show various types of foods (such as rice, cassava, sweet potatoes) using real items, printed pictures, sequential pictures, and charts.
5. Invite one child after another to choose a picture or food model and name that food.
6. Invite one child after another with regard to gender balance and inclusion to lead the game of naming various types of foods.
7. Check whether each child is participating in naming various types of foods.

Note
1. Remember to identify children with special needs so that you can include them according to their needs.
2. This activity will be conducted in 5 sessions at different times, by varying the types of foods.

subject: Afya na Mazingira: Miaka 2–3
title_sw: Shughuli 2: Kutaja mboga mbalimbali
title_en: Activity 2: Naming different vegetables
about_sw: Utambuzi wa aina mbalimbali za mboga, kuzungumza, kukuza msamiati.
about_en: Recognition of different types of vegetables, speaking, building vocabulary.
materials_sw: Chati, kadi, picha mnato, picha mjongeo mboga halisi na vifani vya mboga
materials_en: Chart, cards, printed pictures, animated pictures of real vegetables and vegetable models
steps_sw:
1. Andaa mazingira wezeshi na zana husika.
2. Waongoze watoto wakae mkao wowote unaofaa.
3. Ongoza watoto kutaja aina mbalimbali za mboga kushirikisha uzoefu wao.
4. Onesha aina mbalimbali za mboga kwa kutumia picha, mnato, mjongeo chati kama (kabeji, spinachi, jamii ya kunde)
5. Alika mtoto mmoja baada ya mwingine kwa kuzingatia usawa wa kijinsia na ujumuishi aongoze mchezo wa na kutaja aina mbalimbali za mboga kwa usahihi.
6. Waoneshe watoto chati/kadi/ zenye picha za aina mbalimbali za mboga waulize wanachokiona kwenye chati na kadi na kutaja. Sikiliza majibu yao kisha waelekeze kutaja kwa usahihi.
7. Chunguza kama kila mtoto anaweza kutaja aina za mboga mbalimbali.
Tanbihi
1. Kumbuka kuainisha watoto wenye mahitaji maalum ili uweze kuwashirikisha kulingana na mahitaji yao.
2. Shughuli hii itawezeshwa kwa vipindi 4 kwa wakati tofauti kwa kubadilisha aina za mboga.
steps_en:
1. Prepare a supportive environment and relevant tools.
2. Guide children to sit in any suitable posture.
3. Encourage children to name different types of vegetables, drawing on their experience.
4. Show different types of vegetables using pictures, models, animated charts (e.g., cabbage, spinach, legume family).
5. Invite one child after another, taking gender balance and inclusion into account, to lead a game of naming different types of vegetables correctly.
6. Show children charts/cards with pictures of different types of vegetables and ask what they see on the chart and cards and to name them. Listen to their answers then guide them to name correctly.
7. Check whether each child can name different types of vegetables.
Note
1. Remember to categorise children with special needs so you can involve them according to their needs.
2. This activity will be conducted over 4 sessions at different times by changing the types of vegetables.

subject: Afya na Mazingira: Miaka 2–3
title_sw: Shughuli 3: Kutaja Matunda mbalimbali
title_en: Activity 3: Naming different fruits
about_sw: Kutaja aina mbalimabali za Matunda, utambuzi wa aina mbalimbali za Matunda
about_en: Naming different types of fruits, recognition of different types of fruits.
materials_sw: Chati, kadi, picha mnato, picha mjongeo Matunda halisi na Vifani vya matunda
materials_en: Chart, cards, printed pictures, animated pictures of real fruits and fruit models
steps_sw:
1. Andaa mazingira wezeshi ikiwa ni pamoja na maandalizi ya eneo na zana husika.
2. Waongoze watoto wakae kwenye mkao wowote unaofaa.
3. Ongoza watoto kutaja aina mbalimbali za matunda
4. Onesha aina mbalimbali za matunda kwa kutumia picha mnato, picha mjongeo, chati (kama chungwa, embe, ndizi, pera, nanasi na matunda halisi)
5. Alika mtoto mmoja baada ya mwingine kutaja aina mbalimbali za matunda
6. Ongoza mchezo wa kutaja aina mbalimbali za matunda
7. Sikiliza majibu yao kisha waelekeze kutaja kwa usahihi.
8. Chunguza kama kila mtoto anaweza kutaja majina ya matunda
Tanbihi
1. Kumbuka kuainisha watoto wenye mahitaji maalum ili uweze kuwashirikisha kulingana na mahitaji yao
2. Shughuli hii itawezeshwa kwa vipindi 4 wakati tofauti kwa kubadili aina ya matunda.
steps_en:
1. Prepare a supportive environment including preparation of the area and relevant tools.
2. Guide children to sit in any suitable posture.
3. Encourage children to name different types of fruits.
4. Show different types of fruits using printed pictures, animated pictures, charts (e.g., orange, mango, banana, pear, pineapple and real fruits).
5. Invite one child after another to name different types of fruits.
6. Lead a game of naming different types of fruits.
7. Listen to their answers then guide them to name correctly.
8. Check whether each child can name the names of fruits.
Note
1. Remember to categorise children with special needs so you can involve them according to their needs.
2. This activity will be conducted over 4 sessions at different times by changing the type of fruits.

subject: Afya na Mazingira: Miaka 2–3
title_sw: Shughuli 4: Kueleza utaratibu mzuri wa Kula
title_en: Activity 4: Explaining good eating manners
about_sw: Kudumisha usafi, utambuzi, kujenga tabia na nidhamu ya usafi.
about_en: Maintaining cleanliness, recognition, building habits and discipline of cleanliness.
materials_sw: Sahani, vijiko, chakula, bakuli, vikombe, chombo cha maji ya kunawa, aproni
materials_en: Plates, spoons, food, bowls, cups, a handwashing water container, aprons
steps_sw:
1. Andaa vifaa tajwa hapo juu, wapange watoto kwenye mpangilio mzuri na kuweka mazingira rafiki ya ujifunzaji.
2. Wagawie watoto vifaa vinavyotumika katika tendo la kula chakula, chati, kadi, picha mnato/picha mjongeo zinazoonesha vifaa na tendo la kula chakula.
3. Waulize watoto wataje wanachokiona. Wawezeshe watoto kueleza utaratibu mzuri wakati wa kula chakula.
4. Onesha kwa vitendo; Alika mtoto mmoja kisha mwelekeze utaratibu mzuri wa kula chakula.
5. Wape Watoto fursa ya kuigiza utaratibu wa kula chakula.
6. Wapatie watoto chakula kwenye sahani na waambie wale kwa kizingatia utaratibu wa kula, chunguza kama kila mtoto anafuata utaratibu wa kula.
7. Chunguza kama kila mtoto ameweza kufuata utaratibu wa kula.
Tanbihi
1. Kumbuka kubainisha watoto wenye mahitaji maalum ili waweweze kushiriki ipasavyo katika taratibu nzuri ya kula chakula kulingana na mahitaji yao
2. Shughuli hii itawezeshwa kwa vipindi 4 kwa wakati tofauti
steps_en:
1. Prepare the materials listed above, arrange children in a good order and create a friendly learning environment.
2. Give children materials used in the act of eating food, charts, cards, printed pictures/animated pictures showing utensils and the act of eating food.
3. Ask children to name what they see. Enable children to explain good manners when eating food.
4. Demonstrate through actions; invite one child then guide them on good eating manners.
5. Give children the opportunity to role-play eating manners.
6. Give children food on plates and tell them to eat while observing eating manners; check whether each child follows eating manners.
7. Check whether each child has been able to follow eating manners.
Note
1. Remember to identify children with special needs so they can participate appropriately in good eating manners according to their needs.
2. This activity will be conducted over 4 sessions at different times.

subject: Kutumia Mazingira Kujenga Dhana za Kihisabati
title_sw: Shughuli 1: Kutaja vitu vya Kihisabati vinavyopatikana ndani ya darasa
title_en: Activity 1: Naming mathematical objects found inside the classroom
about_sw: Stadi zitakazojengwa: kuimarisha kumbukumbu, umakini kutambua msamiati wa kihisabati. Muda: Dakika 30.
about_en: Skills to be developed: strengthening memory, attentiveness in recognising mathematical vocabulary. Duration: 30 minutes.
materials_sw: Ubao, viti, meza, chaki, vikombe, vijiti, visoda, mawe madogo, vizibo, magunzi, chupa za plastiki, madirisha, mlango na picha mbalimbali
materials_en: Blackboard, chairs, table, chalk, cups, sticks, bottle tops, small stones, corks, maize cobs, plastic bottles, windows, door, and various pictures
steps_sw:
1. Andaa eneo salama, wezeshi na jumuishi kwa watoto kukaa/kusimama (mduara, nusu duara, au umbo la U) kulingana na mazingira
2. Panga visoda, mawe madogo, vijiti, na vitu vingine vya kuchezea kwenye meza au mkeka
3. Waongoze watoto kuimba wimbo wa kutaja vitu wanavyoviona kwa kurudia rudia. Mfano: vijiti, visoda, mawe.
4. Wape muda wa kugusa, kuchunguza, na kutaja kwa sauti. Tumia lugha rahisi inayohamasisha watoto kujifunza
5. Endelea na shughuli hili kadri muda unavyoruhusu
6. Chunguza kama mtoto anaweza kutaja vitu vya kihisabati anavyoviona
TANBIHI:
1. Zingatia watoto wenye changamoto ya uoni kuwapa vifaa vinavyong'aa
2. Shughuli hii itafanyika kwa vipindi 3 kwa siku tofauti kwa kutumia zana na vifaa tajwa au vifaa vingine vinavyopatikana katika mazingira ya ndani ya darasa
steps_en:
1. Prepare a safe, accessible and inclusive space for children to sit/stand (circle, semicircle, or U-shape) according to the environment
2. Arrange bottle tops, small stones, sticks, and other play items on a table or mat
3. Guide children to sing a song naming objects they see, repeatedly. Example: sticks, bottle tops, stones.
4. Give them time to touch, explore, and name aloud. Use simple language that encourages children to learn
5. Continue with this activity for as long as time allows
6. Check whether the child can name mathematical objects they see
NOTE:
1. For children with visual challenges, provide items that are shiny/bright
2. This activity will be done in 3 sessions on different days using the named tools and materials or other items found in the indoor classroom environment

subject: Kutumia Mazingira Kujenga Dhana za Kihisabati
title_sw: Shughuli 2: Kutaja vitu vya kihisabati vinavyopatikana nje ya chumba cha kujifunzia
title_en: Activity 2: Naming mathematical objects found outside the learning room
about_sw: Stadi zitakazojengwa: Kutambua msamiati wa kihisabati, kukuza lugha, kushirikiana, umakini, kuimarisha kumbukumbu kwenye manzigira halisi (study tour). Muda: Dakika 30.
about_en: Skills to be developed: Recognising mathematical vocabulary, developing language, cooperation, attentiveness, strengthening memory in real environments (study tour). Duration: 30 minutes.
materials_sw: Vikapu vidogo au mifuko au makopo kwa ajili ya kuwekea vitu watakavyookota
materials_en: Small baskets or bags or containers for storing items children will collect
steps_sw:
1. Chagua eneo salama, vutivu na lenye vitu vya asili kama miti, majani na maua.
2. Watoe watoto nje kwa kuimba wakati wa kutembelea hilo eneo. Zingatia watoto wenye mahitaji maalum wakati wa matembezi
3. Waruhusu watoto kuchunguza vitu vilivyopo kwenye mazingira hayo na kuokota vitu vichache tu (kama viwili au vitatu) wanavyoviona, mfano: jani, maua, kisoda.
4. Waulize maswali ya vitu walivyookota. Mfano: Hiki ni nini?.
5. Chunguza kama mtoto anaweza kutaja vitu alivyokota kwenye mazingira.
TANBIHI:
Shughuli hii itafanyika kwa vipindi 4 kwa siku tofauti katika mazingira tofauti ya nje ya chumba
steps_en:
1. Choose a safe, attractive area with natural items such as trees, grass, and flowers.
2. Take children outside while singing as you visit that area. Pay attention to children with special needs during the walk
3. Allow children to explore items found in that environment and collect only a few (two or three) items they see, e.g.: a leaf, flower, bottle top.
4. Ask them questions about the items they collected. Example: What is this?
5. Check whether the child can name the items they collected from the environment.
NOTE:
This activity will be done in 4 sessions on different days in different outdoor environments

subject: Kutumia Mazingira Kujenga Dhana za Kihisabati
title_sw: Shughuli 3a: Kupanga Vitu Kulingana na Sifa (Vitu mbalimbali)
title_en: Activity 3a: Sorting Objects by Attribute (Various Objects)
about_sw: Kubainisha sifa za msingi za vitu, kukuza msamiati wa kihisabati na kukuza umakini na uchunguzi wa mambo.
about_en: Identifying basic attributes of objects, developing mathematical vocabulary, and fostering attention and curiosity.
materials_sw: Vibao, vitofari, vizibo, vifaa vya jikoni, vifaa vya shuleni, kikapu, vifaa vya michezo
materials_en: Blocks, bottle tops, caps/lids, kitchen items, school items, a basket, play materials
steps_sw:
1. Andaa eneo salama, wezeshi na jumuishi kwa watoto kukaa katika vikundi vidogo vidogo.
2. Panga vitu mbalimbali (mipira, vifuniko, vyombo vya jikoni vya plastic, vibao, vitofali, kadi za rangi) kwenye meza au mkeka.
3. Tumia mchezo rahisi kuwawezesha watoto kupanga vitu vinavyofanana kwa pamoja.
4. Endelea na zoezi hili kadri muda unavyoruhusu.
5. Chunguza kama mtoto anaweza kutambua na kupanga vitu kulingana na sifa.
TANBIHI:
1. Kama kuna mtoto mwenye changamoto ya uoni, jitahidi kutumia zana mguso na vifaa vya kung'aa.
2. Shughuli hii itafanyika kwa vipindi 3 kwa siku tofauti kwa kutumia zana na vifaa zinazopatiakana katika mazingira.
steps_en:
1. Prepare a safe, enabling, and inclusive environment for children to sit in small groups.
2. Arrange various objects (balls, bottle tops, plastic kitchen utensils, blocks, bricks, colour cards) on a table or mat.
3. Use a simple game to help children sort objects that are alike together.
4. Continue with this exercise as time allows.
5. Observe whether the child can identify and sort objects according to their attributes.
NOTE:
1. If there is a child with a visual impairment, try to use tactile tools and bright/shiny materials.
2. This activity will be done in 3 sessions on different days using tools and materials available in the environment.

subject: Kutumia Mazingira Kujenga Dhana za Kihisabati
title_sw: Shughuli 3b: Kupanga vitu kulingana na sifa (Rangi zinazofanana)
title_en: Activity 3b: Sorting Objects by Attribute (Matching Colours)
about_sw: Kupanga vitu kwa rangi tofauti, kutambua rangi, kuongeza umakini, kukuza msamiati wa kihisabati.
about_en: Sorting objects by different colours, recognising colours, improving attention, and developing mathematical vocabulary.
materials_sw: Karatasi za rangi, mipira ya manyoya, vifuniko vya chupa, picha za rangi za wanyama, vibakuli vya rangi.
materials_en: Coloured paper, felt balls, bottle caps, coloured pictures of animals, coloured bowls.
steps_sw:
1. Andaa eneo salama, wezeshi na jumuishi kwa watoto kukaa/kusimama (mduara, nusu duara, au umbo la U) kulingana na mazingira.
2. Panga vifaa mbalimbali vilivyopendekezwa au vifaa vingine vinavyopatikana kwenye mazingira.
3. Weka rundo la vifaa vyote vilivyochanganywa rangi kwenye kapu au boksi au vimwage chini.
4. Waongoze watoto kuimba wimbo wakati wa kufanya shughuli hii. Mfano; kitu chekundu kinawekwa ndani ya kikapu chekundu huku wakichagua kitu cha rangi hiyo na kuweka kwenye kikapu.
5. Chunguza kama mtoto anaweza kutambua rangi na kuiweka kwenye kikapu sahihi.
TANBIHI:
1. Kwa watoto wenye changamoto ya uoni, hakikisha unaweka vitu vyanye rangi za kung'aa.
2. Shughuli hii itafanyika kwa vipindi 3 siku tofauti kwa kutumia vitu vyenye rangi nyingine. Zingatia rangi za msingi.
steps_en:
1. Prepare a safe, enabling, and inclusive environment for children to sit/stand (in a circle, semicircle, or U-shape) depending on the setting.
2. Arrange the recommended materials or other materials available in the environment.
3. Place a pile of all the mixed-colour items in a basket or box, or scatter them on the floor.
4. Guide children to sing a song while doing this activity. For example; a red item is placed in the red basket while they pick an item of that colour and put it in the basket.
5. Observe whether the child can identify a colour and place it in the correct basket.
NOTE:
1. For children with visual impairment, make sure you use items with bright colours.
2. This activity will be done in 3 sessions on different days using items of other colours. Focus on primary colours.

subject: Kutumia Mazingira Kujenga Dhana za Kihisabati
title_sw: Shughuli 4: Kutofautisha vitu vikubwa na vidogo
title_en: Activity 4: Distinguishing Big and Small Objects
about_sw: Kujenga ufahamu wa vipimo, umakini na kukuza msamiati wa kihisabati.
about_en: Building understanding of measurements/size, attention, and developing mathematical vocabulary.
materials_sw: Vikombe, sahani, bakuli, boksi, viatu, za ukubwa tofauti, vipande vya matunda ukubwa tofauti, boksi, viatu a ukubwa tofauti, vibao vyenye ukubwa tofauti.
materials_en: Cups, plates, bowls, boxes, shoes of different sizes, pieces of fruit of different sizes, boxes, shoes of different sizes, blocks of different sizes.
steps_sw:
1. Andaa eneo salama, wezeshi na jumuishi kwa watoto kukaa/kusimama (mduara, nusu duara, au umbo la U) kulingana na mazingira.
2. Panga vifaa vyenye ukubwa na udogo tofauti visivyo hatarishi kwa watoto. Zingatia watoto wenye mahitaji maalum.
3. Waongoze watoto kuimba/kucheza wimbo/mchezo kuonesha vitu mfano: "Huu mpira mkubwa… huu mdogo."
4. Waruhusu watoto kuchunguza na kuofautisha vitu hivyo.
5. Endelea na shughuli hii kadri muda unavyoruhusu.
6. Chunguza kama mtoto anaweza kutambua na kutofautisha ukubwa na udogo wa vitu.
TANBIHI:
1. Zingatia ukubwa wa vitu ili mtoto aweze kupata dhana ya kutofautisha vitu vikubwa na vidogo.
2. Shughuli hii itafanyika kwa kurudiwa vipindi 4 kwa siku tofauti kwa kutumia zana na vifaa tajwa hapo juu. Au zingine zinazopatikana katika mazingira.
steps_en:
1. Prepare a safe, enabling, and inclusive environment for children to sit/stand (in a circle, semicircle, or U-shape) depending on the setting.
2. Arrange materials of different sizes that are not dangerous for children. Consider children with special needs.
3. Guide children to sing/play a song/game to show objects, for example: "This ball is big… this one is small."
4. Allow children to explore and differentiate those objects.
5. Continue with this activity as time allows.
6. Observe whether the child can identify and distinguish the size (big and small) of objects.
NOTE:
1. Pay attention to the size of objects so that the child can grasp the concept of distinguishing big and small objects.
2. This activity will be repeated in 4 sessions on different days using the tools and materials mentioned above, or others available in the environment.

subject: Stadi za Kihisabati, Sayansi na Tehama: Miaka 2–3 | Kufanya Majaribio Rahisi ya Kisayansi
title_sw: Shughuli 1: Kuchunguza vitu katika Mazingira
title_en: Activity 1: Exploring Objects in the Environment
about_sw: Ujuzi wa kuchunguza na kuelewa tabia za vitu, kudadisi, Kujenga misamiati, kuhusisha (ukubwa, udogo, laini, ngumu,) uwezo wa kuoanisha vitu.
about_en: Skills of investigating and understanding the properties of objects, curiosity, building vocabulary, relating (big, small, soft, hard), ability to match objects.
materials_sw: Magunzi, chupa za plastiki, vijiko, sufuria, sahani za plastiki na za bati, vitambaa, mawe, mbegu, majani, sumaku, vijiti, vikapu
materials_en: Gourds, plastic bottles, spoons, pots, plastic and metal plates, cloths, stones, seeds, leaves, magnets, sticks, baskets
steps_sw:
1. Andaa vifaa tajwa hapo juu, wapange watoto kwenye mpangilio mzuri na kuweka mazingira rafiki ya ujifunzaji.
2. Andaa vikapu 3-4 vya kukusanyia vitu.
3. Waambie watoto kuwa "Leo tutatazama vitu kwenye mazingira yetu, tutaangalia, tutagusa, na tutataja majina ya vitu hivyo"
4. Wapatie watoto vikapu kwa ajili vya kukusanyia vitu walau 2–3
5. Waongoze watoto kuanza kukusanya vitu na kuhifadhi katika vikapu.
6. Chunguza kama kila mtoto anakusanya vitu.
7. Waambie warudi katika makundi yao na kuweka vifaa walivyokusanya kwa pamoja chini.
8. Waambie wataje majina ya vitu walivyokusanya.
9. Waulize maswali mfano; Taja vitu vingine unavyovijua? Uliviona wapi?.
10. Chunguza kama Watoto wanaweza kutaja vitu walivyokusanya.

Tanbihi:
1. Tumia vitu vyenye unamu wa mkwaruzo kwa watoto wenye uoni hafifu.
2. Shughuli hii itawezeshwa kwa vipindi 6 kwa wakati tofauti kwa kubadilisha vitu mbalimbali
steps_en:
1. Prepare the materials listed above, arrange children in a good order and create a friendly learning environment.
2. Prepare 3–4 baskets for collecting objects.
3. Tell the children: "Today we will look at objects in our environment, we will observe, touch, and name those objects."
4. Give children baskets for collecting at least 2–3 objects.
5. Guide children to start collecting objects and keeping them in the baskets.
6. Check that every child is collecting objects.
7. Tell them to return to their groups and place the objects they collected together on the ground.
8. Ask them to name the objects they collected.
9. Ask simple questions such as: Name other objects you know? Where did you see them?
10. Check whether children can name the objects they collected.

Note:
1. Use objects with tactile texture for children with visual impairments.
2. This activity can be done in 6 sessions at different times by changing various objects.

subject: Stadi za Kihisabati, Sayansi na Tehama: Miaka 2–3 | Kufanya Majaribio Rahisi ya Kisayansi
title_sw: Shughuli 2: Kupanga vitu katika mazingira kulingana na sifa
title_en: Activity 2: Sorting Objects in the Environment According to Attributes
about_sw: Ujuzi wa kupanga vitu kwa sifa, kujenga msamiati rahisi (ukubwa, ndogo, urefu, ufupi), uratibu wa macho na mikono, umakini, Kufuata maelekezo
about_en: Skills of sorting objects by attributes, building simple vocabulary (big, small, tall, short), eye-hand coordination, attentiveness, following instructions.
materials_sw: Magunzi, chupa za plastiki, vijiko, sahani, vitambaa, mawe, mbegu, majani, sumaku, vijiti, kadi zenye picha mbalimbali za vifaa.
materials_en: Gourds, plastic bottles, spoons, plates, cloths, stones, seeds, leaves, magnets, sticks, cards with various pictures of objects.
steps_sw:
1. Andaa vifaa tajwa hapo juu, wapange watoto kwenye mpangilio mzuri na kuweka mazingira rafiki ya ujifunzaji.
2. Waambie watoto kuwa "Leo tutapanga vitu vinavyopatikana katika mazingira yetu kulingana na sifa".
3. Waambie watoto wataje vitu vinavyopatikana katika mazingira yao ya nyumbani.
4. Gawa kadi picha za vifaa vilivyopo katika mazingira halisi kwa kila timu. Waambie wavitazame na kuvitaja vitu hivyo kwa majina.
5. Waongoze watoto kufanya yafuatayo katika vitu vilivyopo: kuonesha tunavyotumia wakati wa kusafiri, kuonesha vyenye jina la mnyama, kuonesha vifaa vya mawasiliano, kuonesha vitu vya majumbani.
6. Waambie watoto waweke pamoja vitu vinavyofanana. Mfano, Vyombo vya usafiri pamoja, Wanyama sehemu yao, vyombo vya mawasilaino sehemu yake.
7. Chunguza kama watoto wanapanga vitu kulingana na sifa.

Tanbihi
1. Bainisha Watoto wenye mahitaji maalum ili uweze kuwashirikisha kadiri ya uhitaji wao
2. Shughuli hii itawezeshwa kwa vipindi 5 kwa wakati tofauti.
steps_en:
1. Prepare the materials listed above, arrange children in a good order and create a friendly learning environment.
2. Tell the children: "Today we will sort objects found in our environment according to their attributes."
3. Ask children to name objects found in their home environment.
4. Distribute picture cards of objects found in the real environment to each team. Ask them to look at and name those objects.
5. Guide children to do the following with the objects: show what we use when travelling, show those with an animal name, show communication tools, show household items.
6. Tell children to put together objects that are similar. For example, transport items together, animals in their section, communication tools in their place.
7. Check whether children are sorting objects according to attributes.

Note:
1. Identify children with special needs so you can include them according to their requirements.
2. This activity can be done in 5 sessions at different times.

subject: Stadi za Kihisabati, Sayansi na Tehama: Miaka 2–3 | Kufanya Majaribio Rahisi ya Kisayansi
title_sw: Shughuli 3: Kutaja rangi za msingi
title_en: Activity 3: Naming Primary Colours
about_sw: Ujuzi wa kutambua rangi za msingi, Kukuza msamiati rahisi (nyekundu, bluu, njano).
about_en: Skills of identifying primary colours, building simple vocabulary (red, blue, yellow).
materials_sw: Vifaa vyote viwe vyenye rangi za msingi bluu, njano na nyekundu (Magunzi, vifuniko vya chupa, vitambaa, mipira midogo, kadi za rangi), kadi za rangi za msingi
materials_en: All materials should be in the primary colours blue, yellow and red (gourds, bottle caps, cloths, small balls, colour cards), primary colour cards
steps_sw:
1. Andaa vifaa tajwa hapo juu, wapange watoto kwenye mpangilio mzuri na kuweka mazingira rafiki ya ujifunzaji.
2. Wagawe watoto katika makundi ya watoto watatu.
3. Anza kwa kuonesha rangi moja baada ya nyingine. Waambie watoto wataje jina la rangi hiyo. Kama hawajui watajie kuwa, hii ni rangi nyekundu, hii ni rangi ya njano, hii ni rangi ya bluu.
4. Waoneshe moja ya kadi za rangi za msingi. Waambie wataje rangi hiyo.
5. Waoneshe vifaa vya rangi za msingi. Waambie nioneshe rangi ya bluu, manjano, nyekundu.
6. Weka vikapu vitatu katika eneo la wazi vyenye alama ya rangi nyekundu, njano na bluu.
7. Onesha namna ya kuchukua kifaa kimoja na kukiweka katika kapu lenye rangi husika.
8. Ruhusu kila mtoto kuchagua kitu chochote cha rangi za msingi na kuviweka katika kikapu cha rangi hiyo.
9. Chunguza kama wanaweka vitu katika kikapu husika.
