Tanbihi:
1. Bainisha Watoto wenye mahitaji maalum ili uweze kuwashirikisha kadiri ya uhitaji wao
2. Shughuli hii itawezeshwa kwa vipindi 5 kwa wakati tofauti kwa kuwaelekeza kutambua rangi moja moja katika kila kipindi, na kisha kufanya marudio.
steps_en:
1. Prepare the materials listed above, arrange children in a good order and create a friendly learning environment.
2. Divide children into groups of three.
3. Start by showing one colour at a time. Ask children to name that colour. If they do not know, tell them: this is red, this is yellow, this is blue.
4. Show one of the primary colour cards. Ask them to name that colour.
5. Show objects of primary colours. Ask them to show you the colour blue, yellow, red.
6. Place three baskets in an open area marked with red, yellow and blue colour symbols.
7. Show how to pick up one object and place it in the basket with the matching colour.
8. Allow each child to choose any object of a primary colour and place it in the basket of that colour.
9. Check whether they are placing objects in the correct basket.

Note:
1. Identify children with special needs so you can include them according to their requirements.
2. This activity can be done in 5 sessions at different times, focusing on one colour at a time in each session, then doing revision.

subject: Stadi za Kihisabati, Sayansi na Tehama: Miaka 2–3 / Kufanya Majaribio Rahisi ya Kisayansi
title_sw: Shughuli 4: Kuchora kwa kutumia rangi za msingi
title_en: Activity 4: Drawing using primary colours
about_sw: Kutambua rangi za msingi, kutofautisha rangi, kujenga misamiati rahisi, kujieleza, kushirikiana, uratibu wa macho na mikono, kujenga misuli midogo ya vidole
about_en: Identifying primary colours, distinguishing colours, building basic vocabulary, self-expression, cooperation, eye-hand coordination, developing small finger muscles
materials_sw: Karatasi nyeupe, rangi za maji (Bluu, Njano, Nyekundu), Rangi za kupaka, penseli, penseli za rangi, krayoni
materials_en: White paper, water colours (Blue, Yellow, Red), paint, pencils, colour pencils, crayons
steps_sw:
1. Andaa vifaa tajwa hapo juu, wapange watoto kwenye mpangilio mzuri na kuweka mazingira rafiki ya ujifunzaji.
2. Wambie kuwa leo tuitacheza "Mchezo wa rangi".
3. Onesha rangi moja kati ya rangi za msingi, kisha waulize "Hii rangi gani"? Endelea hivyo kwa rangi zote.
4. Mpe kila mtoto karatasi, penseli, krayoni na penseli za rangi. Waambie wachore kitu chochote kisha waseme wametumia rangi gani.
5. Waulize "Umechora kitu gani"? "Umewahi kukiona wapi"
6. Mpe kila mtoto karatasi nyeupe na rangi za maji, waelekeze kuweka viganja vyao kwenye rangi husika utakayowambia na kubandika kiganja katika karatasi.
7. Ruhusu kila mtoto kuendelea na shughuli hiyo.
8. Chunguza kama kila mtoto anapiga chapa.

Tanbihi:
1. Bainisha Watoto wenye mahitaji maalum ili uweze kuwashirikisha kadiri ya uhitaji wao
2. Shughuli hii itawezeshwa kwa vipindi 5 kwa wakati tofauti
steps_en:
1. Prepare the materials listed above, arrange children in a good order and create a friendly learning environment.
2. Tell them that today we will play the "Colour game".
3. Show one of the primary colours and ask "What colour is this"? Continue for all colours.
4. Give each child paper, a pencil, crayons and colour pencils. Tell them to draw anything and then say what colour they used.
5. Ask "What did you draw?" "Where have you seen it?"
6. Give each child white paper and water colours; guide them to dip their palms in the colour you tell them and press the palm onto the paper.
7. Allow each child to continue with the activity.
8. Check that every child is making a print.

Note:
1. Identify children with special needs so you can include them according to their needs.
2. This activity will be facilitated in 5 sessions at different times.

subject: Stadi za Kihisabati, Sayansi na Tehama: Miaka 2–3 / Kufanya Majaribio Rahisi ya Kisayansi
title_sw: Shughuli 5: Kutaja vitu vinavyotoa milio mbalimbali
title_en: Activity 5: Naming objects that make different sounds
about_sw: Kutofautisha milio ya vitu, Kusikiliza, Kujieleza, Kujenga msamiati rahisi, Kujiamini
about_en: Distinguishing sounds of objects, Listening, Self-expression, Building basic vocabulary, Self-confidence
materials_sw: Chupa za plastiki, vifuu vya nazi, vijiti, sahani ya udongo, sahani ya plastiki, sufuria, glass, meza, redio, simu
materials_en: Plastic bottles, coconut shells, sticks, clay plate, plastic plate, pot, glass, table, radio, mobile phone
steps_sw:
1. Andaa vifaa tajwa hapo juu, wapange watoto kwenye mpangilio mzuri na kuweka mazingira rafiki ya ujifunzaji.
2. Andaa vikundi vidogo vya watoto, Anza kwa kuwaambia watoto kuwa leo tutacheza mchezo wa majina ya "vitu vinavyotoa milio"
3. Onesha kitu kimoja kimoja kati ya ulivyoviandaa na kuwauliza "Hiki ni kitu gani"? Uliza kwa vitu kama vitatu
4. Kila unapouliza watoto watataja jina la kitu hicho.
5. Waongoze watoto kwenda katika mazingira uliyoyaandaa na waelekeze kila mmoja akusanye vitu vinavyotoa milio
6. Waambie warudi darasani na waulize "Umekusanya vitu gani"?
7. Chunguza kama kila mtoto anataja jina la kitu alicholeta

Tanbihi:
1. Bainisha Watoto wenye mahitaji maalum ili uweze kuwashirikisha kadiri ya uhitaji wao
2. Shughuli hii itawezeshwa kwa vipindi 5 kwa wakati tofauti.
steps_en:
1. Prepare the materials listed above, arrange children in a good order and create a friendly learning environment.
2. Prepare small groups of children. Begin by telling children that today we will play the game of naming "objects that make sounds".
3. Show each object you prepared one by one and ask "What object is this"? Ask for about three objects.
4. Each time you ask, children will name the object.
5. Guide children to the environment you prepared and direct each one to collect objects that make sounds.
6. Tell them to return to the classroom and ask "What objects have you collected"?
7. Check that every child names the object they brought.

Note:
1. Identify children with special needs so you can include them according to their needs.
2. This activity will be facilitated in 5 sessions at different times.

subject: Stadi za Kihisabati, Sayansi na Tehama: Miaka 2–3 / Kufanya Majaribio Rahisi ya Kisayansi
title_sw: Shughuli 6: Kusikiliza na kutafsiri milio katika mazingira
title_en: Activity 6: Listening to and interpreting sounds in the environment
about_sw: Kutofautisha milio ya vitu, kusikiliza, kujieleza, kujenga msamiati rahisi, kujiamini
about_en: Distinguishing sounds of objects, listening, self-expression, building basic vocabulary, self-confidence
materials_sw: Kengele, filimbi, marimba, chupa za plastiki, simu, redio, meza, vijiti, picha za vitu vinavyotoa sauti
materials_en: Bell, whistle, marimba, plastic bottles, mobile phone, radio, table, sticks, pictures of sound-making objects
steps_sw:
1. Andaa vifaa tajwa hapo juu, wapange watoto kwenye mpangilio mzuri na kuweka mazingira rafiki ya ujifunzaji.
2. Onesha picha za vitu mbalimbali, kisha waongoze watoto wataje vitu hivyo.
3. Onesha vitu halisi kama vile kengele, filimbi.
4. Waambie kuwa una vitu umeviweka kwenye maeneo tofauti ndani na nje.
5. Waambie kuwa utagonga kitu kimoja, wakishasikia sauti watakimbia na kusimama sehemu ambayo kuna hivyo vitu. Mfano, ukipuliza filimbi, watakimbia na kwenda sehemu yenye filimbi.
6. Endelea na mchezo hadi watoto wote wamepata nafasi ya kucheza katika vituo tofauti.
7. Waambie kuwa hatua inayofuata, utawaonesha vitu halisi au picha kisha wataigiza milio ya vitu hivyo, mfano gari.
8. Endelea na mchezo kila mtoto apate nafasi ya kuigiza milio ya vitu.
9. Baada ya kucheza uliza maswali yafuatayo: Mmesikia mlio wa vitu gani? Taja vitu vingine vinavyotoa milio.
10. Chunguza kama mtoto anaweza kusikiliza na kutambua milio ya vitu.

Tanbihi:
1. Bainisha Watoto wenye mahitaji maalum ili uweze kuwashirikisha kadiri ya uhitaji wao
2. Shughuli hii itawezeshwa kwa vipindi 5 ukibadilisha vifaa mbalimbali vya kuchezea.
steps_en:
1. Prepare the materials listed above, arrange children in a good order and create a friendly learning environment.
2. Show pictures of various objects, then guide children to name those objects.
3. Show real objects such as a bell and a whistle.
4. Tell them that you have placed objects in different areas inside and outside.
5. Tell them that you will strike one object; when they hear the sound they will run and stand near those objects. For example, if you blow the whistle, they will run to the area where the whistle is.
6. Continue the game until all children have had a chance to play at different stations.
7. Tell them that in the next step, you will show them real objects or pictures and they will imitate the sounds of those objects, e.g. a car.
8. Continue the game so every child gets a chance to imitate sounds of objects.
9. After playing, ask the following questions: What sounds of objects did you hear? Name other objects that make sounds.
10. Check whether each child can listen to and identify the sounds of objects.

Note:
1. Identify children with special needs so you can include them according to their needs.
2. This activity will be facilitated in 5 sessions, changing the various play materials each time.

subject: Kusoma katika hatua za awali
title_sw: Shughuli za ziada kwa watoto waliofikisha miaka 5 wakiwa kituoni – Kusoma katika hatua za awali
title_en: Additional activities for children who have reached age 5 at the centre – Early reading steps
about_sw: Shughuli za kusoma katika hatua za awali kwa watoto waliofikisha miaka 5 wanaohitaji changamoto zaidi.
about_en: Early reading activities for children who have reached age 5 and need additional challenge.
materials_sw: Kadi za herufi, chati ya herufi, kadi za silabi, kadi za maneno, kadi za picha, kadi za picha zenye maneno, vitabu vya picha, vibaofumbo vya herufi, sauti za herufi za irabu na konsonanti zilizorekodiwa
materials_en: Letter cards, letter chart, syllable cards, word cards, picture cards, picture cards with words, picture books, letter puzzles, recorded sounds of vowel and consonant letters
steps_sw:
1. kusikiliza nyimbo, mazungumzo na hadithi fupi
2. kucheza mchezo wa kupashana Habari
3. kufanya majadiliano/mazungumzo
4. kutega na kutegua vitendawili
5. kusimulia hadithi mbalimbali
6. kuelezea shughuli za kila siku
7. kusoma picha
8. kubainisha majina ya vitu mbalimbali katika mazingira
9. kutamka sauti za irabu
10. kuhusianisha herufi za irabu na sauti zake
11. kutamka sauti za konsonanti (b, m, k, d, n)
12. kuhusianisha maumbo ya herufi za konsonanti (b, m, k, d, n) na sauti zake
13. kubaini picha zenye maneno/majina yanayoanza na irabu au
steps_en:
1. Listening to songs, conversations and short stories
2. Playing the 'passing news' game
3. Conducting discussions/conversations
4. Posing and solving riddles
5. Narrating various stories
6. Explaining daily activities
7. Reading pictures
8. Identifying names of various objects in the environment
9. Pronouncing vowel sounds
10. Matching vowel letters with their sounds
11. Pronouncing consonant sounds (b, m, k, d, n)
12. Matching the shapes of consonant letters (b, m, k, d, n) with their sounds
13. Identifying pictures with words/names that begin with a vowel or

subject: Kuandika katika hatua za awali
title_sw: Shughuli za ziada kwa watoto waliofikisha miaka 5 wakiwa kituoni – Kuandika katika hatua za awali
title_en: Additional activities for children who have reached age 5 at the centre – Early writing steps
about_sw: Shughuli za kuandika katika hatua za awali kwa watoto waliofikisha miaka 5 wanaohitaji changamoto zaidi.
about_en: Early writing activities for children who have reached age 5 and need additional challenge.
materials_sw: Chaki, vibao, vijiti, udongo wa mfinyanzi, penseli, kalamu rashasha, karatasi, mkasi, vibaofumbo, shanga, mabua, mifuniko ya chupa za plastiki
materials_en: Chalk, slates, sticks, clay, pencils, crayons, paper, scissors, puzzles, beads, straws, plastic bottle caps
steps_sw:
1. Kuumba/kuunda maumbo ya irabu
2. Kufuatisha maumbo ya irabu
3. Kuandika herufi za irabu (a, e, i, o, u) kwa kufuata hatua
4. Kuumba/kuunda maumbo ya konsonanti (b, m, k, d, n)
5. Kufuatisha maumbo ya konsonanti (b, m, k, d, n)
6. Kuandika herufi za konsonanti (b, m, k, d, n) kwa kufuata hatua
steps_en:
1. Creating/forming shapes of vowels
2. Tracing shapes of vowels
3. Writing vowel letters (a, e, i, o, u) by following steps
4. Creating/forming shapes of consonants (b, m, k, d, n)
5. Tracing shapes of consonants (b, m, k, d, n)
6. Writing consonant letters (b, m, k, d, n) by following steps

subject: Kutumia mazingira, kujenga dhana za kihisabati na kufikiri kimantiki
title_sw: Shughuli za ziada kwa watoto waliofikisha miaka 5 wakiwa kituoni – Kutumia mazingira, kujenga dhana za kihisabati na kufikiri kimantiki
title_en: Additional activities for children who have reached age 5 at the centre – Using the environment, building mathematical concepts and logical thinking
about_sw: Shughuli za kutumia mazingira, kujenga dhana za kihisabati na kufikiri kimantiki kwa watoto waliofikisha miaka 5.
about_en: Activities for using the environment, building mathematical concepts and logical thinking for children who have reached age 5.
materials_sw: Kadi za herufi, chati ya herufi, kadi za silabi, kadi za maneno, kadi za picha, kadi za picha zenye maneno, vitabu vya picha, vibaofumbo vya herufi, sauti za herufi za irabu na konsonanti zilizorekodiwa
materials_en: Letter cards, letter chart, syllable cards, word cards, picture cards, picture cards with words, picture books, letter puzzles, recorded sounds of vowel and consonant letters
steps_sw:
1. kubaini maumbo mbalimbali
2. kubainisha vitu kulingana na sifa zake
3. kupanga vitu kwa mfuatano unaofanana
4. kucheza michezo ya kufananisha na kutofautisha
5. kubainisha nyakati tofauti za siku
6. kubainisha matendo yanayofanywa kulingana
7. kutofautisha siku katika juma
8. kulinganisha vitu kutokana na sifa zake
9. kupima vitu mbalimbali
10. kubainisha vitu vinavyosaidia kujenga dhana ya namba
11. kutamka namba 1 – 20
12. kuhesabu namba 1-20 kwa kutumia vitu
13. kuoanisha idadi ya vitu na namba
14. kutenda vitendo vya kuongeza na kupunguza vitu
15. kubainisha maumbo ya namba kwa kutumia vitu mbalimbali
16. kuumba/kuunda maumbo ya namba
17. kufuatisha maumbo ya namba 1-20
18. kuandika namba 1-9 hewani, mchangani, kwenye kibao na daftari
19. kutenda vitendo vinavyojenga dhana ya sifuri
steps_en:
1. Identifying various shapes
2. Identifying objects according to their attributes
3. Arranging objects in a similar sequence
4. Playing matching and differentiating games
5. Identifying different times of day
6. Identifying actions performed accordingly
7. Differentiating days of the week
8. Comparing objects based on their attributes
9. Measuring various objects
10. Identifying objects that help build the concept of number
11. Pronouncing numbers 1–20
12. Counting numbers 1–20 using objects
13. Matching the quantity of objects with numbers
14. Performing actions of adding and subtracting objects
15. Identifying number shapes using various objects
16. Creating/forming number shapes
17. Tracing number shapes 1–20
18. Writing numbers 1–9 in the air, in sand, on a slate and in a notebook
19. Performing activities that build the concept of zero

subject: Sanaa na Ubunifu
title_sw: Shughuli za Makuzi na Ujifunzaji wa Awali kwa Watoto wa Miaka 2–3: Sanaa na Ubunifu
title_en: Early Childhood Development and Learning Activities for Children Aged 2–3: Art and Creativity
about_sw: Kujenga Stadi zinazohusisha Utendaji wa Mikono kwa watoto wa miaka 2–3 kupitia shughuli za sanaa mbalimbali.
about_en: Building fine motor skills in children aged 2–3 through various art activities.
steps_sw:
1. Kutambua rangi
2. Kupaka rangi
3. Kupanga vitu mbalimbali katika mstari
4. Kuchapa kwa kutumia vidole, kiganja au majani maua katika sura mbalimbali
5. Kutunga kwa kutumia vitu mbalimbali (mfano shanga)
6. Kutengeneza mkufu kwa karatasi
7. Kutengeneza maumbo
8. Kutengeneza picha kwa kubandika
steps_en:
1. Identifying colours
2. Painting/colouring
3. Arranging various objects in a line
4. Printing using fingers, palm or flower petals in various shapes
5. Stringing using various objects (e.g. beads)
6. Making a paper necklace
7. Making shapes
8. Making pictures by sticking/collage

subject: Sanaa na Ubunifu
title_sw: Shughuli za Makuzi na Ujifunzaji wa Awali kwa Watoto wa Miaka 3–4: Sanaa na Ubunifu
title_en: Early Childhood Development and Learning Activities for Children Aged 3–4: Art and Creativity
about_sw: Kujenga Stadi zinazohusisha Utendaji wa Mikono kwa watoto wa miaka 3–4 kupitia shughuli za sanaa mbalimbali.
about_en: Building fine motor skills in children aged 3–4 through various art activities.
steps_sw:
1. Kuchambua rangi
2. Kubandika vitu mbalimbali
3. Kutengeneza vifani kwa karatasi na kuvipamba
4. Kutunga kwa kutumia vitu mbalimbali (mfano shanga)
5. Kutunga kwa kutumia vitu mbalimbali kwa kufuata ruwaza rahisi/pateni
6. Kujenga kwa vibao
7. Kufuatisha doti
8. Kupaka rangi
9. Kuchora picha za vitu mbalimbali
steps_en:
1. Sorting/distinguishing colours
2. Sticking various objects
3. Making models with paper and decorating them
4. Stringing using various objects (e.g. beads)
5. Stringing using various objects following a simple pattern
6. Building with blocks/planks
7. Dot-to-dot tracing
8. Painting/colouring
9. Drawing pictures of various objects

subject: Sanaa na Ubunifu
title_sw: Shughuli za Makuzi na Ujifunzaji wa Awali kwa Watoto wa Miaka 4–5: Sanaa na Ubunifu
title_en: Early Childhood Development and Learning Activities for Children Aged 4–5: Art and Creativity
about_sw: Kujenga Stadi zinazohusisha Utendaji wa Mikono kwa watoto wa miaka 4–5 kupitia shughuli za sanaa mbalimbali.
about_en: Building fine motor skills in children aged 4–5 through various art activities.
steps_sw:
1. Kukata picha za vitu mbalimbali
2. Kufinyanga kwa kutumia udongo
3. Kuchanganya rangi za msingi (buluu, njano na nyekundu)
4. Kupanga rangi za msingi
5. Kuunda/kutengeneza vifaa mbalimbali kwa kutumia magazeti, uzi, vitambaa, na rangi
6. Kutengeneza ruwaza (ABAB, AABB) kwa kutumia vitu mbalimbali mfano vijiti, mawe, mchanga
7. Kutengeneza vifaa vya kuigiza mfano taji, midoli na sanamu za vitu mbalimbali
8. Kutengeneza kazi za kufuma / kusuka
9. Kuchora maumbo na vitu mbalimbali
steps_en:
1. Cutting pictures of various objects
2. Moulding/sculpting using clay
3. Mixing primary colours (blue, yellow and red)
4. Arranging primary colours
5. Creating/making various items using newspapers, thread, cloth and paint
6. Making patterns (ABAB, AABB) using various objects such as sticks, stones, sand
7. Making props for role play e.g. crowns, dolls and models of various objects
8. Making weaving/knitting crafts
9. Drawing shapes and various objects

subject: Sanaa na Ubunifu: Miaka 3–4 | Kujenga Stadi Zinazohusisha Utendaji wa Mikono
title_sw: Shughuli 2: Kubandika vitu mbalimbali
title_en: Activity 2: Sticking/Collaging various items
about_sw: Kubandika, Kujenga umakini, utulivu, ubunifu, uimarishaji wa misuli midogo, uratibu wa macho na mikono.
about_en: Sticking/collaging; building concentration, calmness, creativity, strengthening fine muscles, hand-eye coordination.
materials_sw: Karatasi za rangi, tishu, karatasi za zawadi, magazeti, manila penseli au kalamu ya kuchorea mstari, pamba na gundi. Picha mbalimbali, majani makavu.
materials_en: Coloured paper, tissue paper, gift wrapping paper, newspapers, manila paper, pencil or ruler pen, cotton wool and glue. Various pictures, dry leaves.
steps_sw:
1. Andaa mazingira ikiwa ni pamoja na maandalizi ya eneo na zana husika.
2. Waweke watoto katika vikundi vidogo vidogo.
3. Wagawie vifaa ulivyoandaa.
4. Wape nafasi ya kuchagua kifaa wanachotaka kubandika.
5. Waongoze watoto kubandika kwenye boksi gumu au manila.
6. Wapitie watoto kuwasaidia pale wanaoshindwa.
7. Wape nafasi watoto ya kuonesha walichobandika.
8. Chunguza kama kama kila mtoto ameweza kubandika.

Tanbihi:
1. Shughuli hii itawezeshwa kwa vipindi 5 watoto wabandike karatasi, majani makavu, pamba, vitambaa na punje za maharage wanaweza pia kukata karatasi na kubandika kutengeneza vitu au maumbo tofauti.
2. Watoto wenye ulemavu wa kuona wenzao wawasaidie kwa kuwashika mkono na kuwangoza jinsi ya kubandika.
steps_en:
1. Prepare the environment including setting up the area and relevant tools.
2. Place children in small groups.
3. Distribute the materials you have prepared.
4. Give them the opportunity to choose the material they want to stick.
5. Guide children to stick on a hard box or manila paper.
6. Go around to help children where they struggle.
7. Give children the opportunity to show what they have stuck.
8. Check whether each child has been able to stick.

Note:
1. This activity can be extended over 5 sessions where children stick paper, dry leaves, cotton wool, fabric and bean seeds; they can also cut paper and stick to make different items or shapes.
2. Children with visual impairments should be helped by their peers by guiding their hands and showing them how to stick.

subject: Sanaa na Ubunifu: Miaka 3–4 | Kujenga Stadi Zinazohusisha Utendaji wa Mikono
title_sw: Shughuli 3: Kutengeneza vifani kwa karatasi na kuvipamba
title_en: Activity 3: Making masks from paper and decorating them
about_sw: Kutengeneza vifani, kujenga umakini, utulivu, ubunifu, uimarishaji wa misuli midogo, uratibu wa macho na mikono.
about_en: Making masks; building concentration, calmness, creativity, strengthening fine muscles, hand-eye coordination.
materials_sw: Pamba, kitambaa laini, mpira, chaki, kalamu, karatasi, rangi, kamba, kipande cha sponji, maski
materials_en: Cotton wool, soft cloth, rubber/ball, chalk, pencil, paper, paint/colours, rope/string, a piece of sponge, masks
steps_sw:
1. Andaa picha za maski za wanyama mbalimbali na ndege.
2. Waweke watoto kwenye makundi madogo madogo.
3. Watoto wataje vitu watakavyotumia.
4. Waelekeze watoto kwa hatua namna ya kutengeneza maski nao wafuate wakitumia vifaa ulivyowapatia.
5. Muelekeze mtoto kutoboa mashimo ya maski.
6. Muelekeze mtoto kupamba maski kwa kutumia rangi za krayoni.
7. Waambie wavae maski wajione wanavyoonekana.
8. Chunguza kama watoto wameweza kutengeneza maski.

Tanbihi:
1. Shughuli hii itawezeshwa kwa vipindi 4 kwa watoto kutengeneza vifani vya ndege na wanyama.
steps_en:
1. Prepare pictures of masks of various animals and birds.
2. Place children in small groups.
3. Children name the items they will use.
4. Guide children step by step on how to make masks and have them follow along using the materials you provided.
5. Guide the child to punch/cut holes in the mask.
6. Guide the child to decorate the mask using crayon colours.
7. Tell them to put on the masks and see how they look.
8. Check whether children have been able to make the masks.

Note:
1. This activity can be extended over 4 sessions for children to make masks of birds and animals.

subject: Sanaa na Ubunifu: Miaka 3–4 | Kujenga Stadi Zinazohusisha Utendaji wa Mikono
title_sw: Shughuli 4: Kutunga kwa kutumia vitu mbalimbali (shanga)
title_en: Activity 4: Threading/stringing using various items (beads)
about_sw: Kukuza misuli midogo ya vidole, umakini, ubunifu, kukuza kipaji, kutambua rangi.
about_en: Developing fine finger muscles, concentration, creativity, nurturing talent, colour recognition.
materials_sw: Shanga zenye ukubwa tofauti, kamba au uzi, picha zenye kuonesha shanga zilizotungwa.
materials_en: Beads of different sizes, rope or thread, pictures showing strung beads.
steps_sw:
1. Andaa eneo lililo safi na mazingira rafiki pamoja na vifaa.
2. Waweke watoto katika umbo U/nusu duara/ mduara au mkao mwingine kulingana na mazingira.
3. Waoneshe watoto vifaa mbalimbali ulivyoandaa kwa kuwauliza maswali kuhusiana na vifaa hivyo.
4. Waoneshe watoto namna ya kutunga shanga kwa kutofautisha rangi na ukubwa.
5. Mgawie kila mtoto shanga na kamba ili atunge shanga.
6. Mtembelee kila mtoto ili kuona ushiriki wake.
7. Wapongeze watoto kwa kila hatua.
8. Mwisho toa nafasi kwa kila mtoto kuonesha namna alivyotunga shanga.
9. Chunguza watoto wanapofanya kazi hiyo na kutoa msaada kwa mwenye uhitaji huo.

Tanbihi:
1. Endapo kuna mtoto mwenye changamoto ya kuona, tumia mbinu nyingine shirikishi mfano, kumgusisha na kumwongoza, kwa mtoto kiziwi kutoa maelekezo kwa vitendo (lugha ya alama).
2. Shughuli hii itawezeshwa kwa vipindi vitatu katika wakati tofauti na kwa kutumia vifaa tofauti mfano vizibo vya soda, vizibo vya chupa.
steps_en:
1. Prepare a clean area and friendly environment along with the materials.
2. Place children in a U-shape / semicircle / circle or another arrangement suitable to the environment.
3. Show children the various materials you have prepared by asking them questions about those materials.
4. Show children how to thread beads by differentiating colours and sizes.
5. Give each child beads and a rope/thread so they can string beads.
6. Visit each child to observe their participation.
7. Praise children at every step.
8. At the end, give each child the opportunity to show how they strung their beads.
9. Monitor children as they do the work and provide help to whoever needs it.

Note:
1. If there is a child with a visual impairment, use other inclusive methods such as guiding them by touch; for a deaf child, give instructions through actions (sign language).
2. This activity can be extended over three sessions at different times and using different materials such as soda bottle caps, bottle tops.

subject: Sanaa na Ubunifu: Miaka 3–4 | Kujenga Stadi Zinazohusisha Utendaji wa Mikono
title_sw: Shughuli 5: Kutunga kwa kutumia vitu mbalimbali kwa kufuata ruwaza rahisi/pateni
title_en: Activity 5: Creating with various materials by following a simple pattern/design
about_sw: Utungaji, kukuza misuli midogo ya vidole, umakini, ubunifu, kukuza kipaji, kutambua rangi
about_en: Composition, developing fine finger muscles, attentiveness, creativity, talent development, colour recognition
materials_sw: Shanga zenye ukubwa tofauti, kamba au uzi, vizibo vya soda, vizibo vya chupa, picha zenye kuonesha ruwaza mbalimbali
materials_en: Beads of different sizes, rope or thread, soda bottle caps, bottle tops, pictures showing various patterns
steps_sw:
1. Andaa eneo lililo safi na mazingira rafiki na vifaa.
2. Waweke watoto katika vikundi vya watoto watatu.
3. Waoneshe mfano rahisi wa ruwaza (pateni).
4. Waelekeze namna ya kutunga kwa kutumia vitu mbalimbali.
5. Mtembelee kila mtoto ili kuona ushiriki wake.
6. Wapongeze watoto kwa kila hatua.
7. Mwisho toa nafasi kwa kila mtoto aoneshe alivyotengeneza ruwaza.
8. Kusanya kazi za watoto na kuweka mahali salama.
9. Chunguza watoto wanapofanya kazi hiyo na kutoa msaada kwa mwenye uhitaji huo.

Tanbihi:
1. Endapo kuna mtoto mwenye changamoto ya kuona, tumia mbinu nyingine shirikishi mfano, kumgusisha na kumwongozo, kwa mtoto kiziwi kutoa maelekezo kwa vitendo (lugha ya alama).
2. Shughuli hii itawezeshwa kwa vipindi vitatu katika wakati tofauti.
steps_en:
1. Prepare a clean area with a friendly environment and materials.
2. Place children in groups of three.
3. Show children a simple pattern example.
4. Guide them on how to create using various materials.
5. Visit each child to observe their participation.
6. Praise children at every step.
7. At the end, give each child the opportunity to show the pattern they made.
8. Collect children's work and store it in a safe place.
9. Monitor children as they do the activity and provide support to whoever needs it.

Note:
1. If there is a child with a visual impairment, use other participatory methods such as touching and guiding; for a deaf child, give instructions through actions (sign language).
2. This activity will be carried out in three sessions at different times.

subject: Sanaa na Ubunifu: Miaka 3–4 | Kujenga Stadi Zinazohusisha Utendaji wa Mikono
title_sw: Shughuli 6: Kujenga kwa vibao (block building)
title_en: Activity 6: Building with blocks (block building)
about_sw: Kukuza misuli midogo ya vidole, umakini, ubunifu, kukuza kipaji, matumizi ya rangi, kujua maumbo mbalimbali
about_en: Developing fine finger muscles, attentiveness, creativity, talent development, use of colours, recognising various shapes
materials_sw: Vibao vyenye ukubwa tofauti na vyenye rangi mbalimbali
materials_en: Blocks of different sizes and various colours
steps_sw:
1. Andaa vifaa pamoja na jamvi au mkeka katika mazingira rafiki.
2. Waweke watoto katika umbo U/nusu duara/mduara au mkao mwingine kulingana na mazingira.
3. Waoneshe watoto vibao vilivyoandaliwa.
4. Waelekeze namna ya kujenga vibao kama vile mnara, nyumba na maumbo mbalimbali.
5. Waelekeze kila mtoto ajenge kitu anachokipenda kilichotofauti na mwingine, mfano nyumba, mnara.
6. Mtembelee mtoto kuona ushiriki wake na kumsaidia anaposhindwa.
7. Wapongeze watoto kwa kila hatua.
8. Waulize maswali mfano "mmetumia vibao kujenga nini?".
9. Mpe nafasi kila mtoto kueleza alichokijenga.
10. Chunguza watoto wanapofanya kazi hiyo na kutoa msaada kwa mwenye uhitaji huo.

Tanbihi:
1. Shughuli hii ya vipindi vitatu katika wakati tofauti kwa kuwapa.
steps_en:
1. Prepare materials along with a mat or rug in a friendly environment.
2. Seat children in a U-shape/semi-circle/circle or another arrangement depending on the environment.
3. Show children the prepared blocks.
4. Guide them on how to build with blocks such as a tower, house, and various shapes.
5. Guide each child to build something they like that is different from others, e.g., a house, tower.
6. Visit each child to observe their participation and assist when they struggle.
7. Praise children at every step.
8. Ask questions such as "What have you built with the blocks?".
9. Give each child an opportunity to explain what they built.
10. Monitor children as they do the activity and provide support to whoever needs it.

Note:
1. This activity will be carried out in three sessions at different times.

subject: Sanaa na Ubunifu: Miaka 3–4 | Kujenga Stadi Zinazohusisha Utendaji wa Mikono
title_sw: Shughuli 7: Kufuatisha doti
title_en: Activity 7: Connecting/tracing dots
about_sw: Stadi ya awali ya kuandika, kukuza misuli midogo ya vidole, umakini, ubunifu, kukuza kipaji, shabaha
about_en: Pre-writing skills, developing fine finger muscles, attentiveness, creativity, talent development, purpose/aim
materials_sw: Penseli, rangi, karatasi, kipande cha boksi, ubao mgumu
materials_en: Pencils, colours/crayons, paper, piece of cardboard/box, hard board
steps_sw:
1. Andaa vifaa, eneo lililo safi na mazingira rafiki.
2. Kuwa na picha ambazo zimewekewa doti. Mfano, nyumba, mpira, mnyama.
3. Waweke watoto katika umbo U/nusu duara/mduara au mkao mwingine kulingana na mazingira.
4. Waoneshe mfano wa kufuatishia doti.
5. Mpe kila mtoto zoezi la kufuatishia doti.
6. Mtembelee mtoto kuona ushiriki wake.
7. Mpe nafasi kila mtoto aoneshe namna alivyounganisha doti.
8. Wapongeze watoto kwa kila hatua.
9. Mwisho toa nafasi kwa kila mtoto aoneshe namna alivyounganisha doti.
10. Kusanya kazi za watoto na kuzitundika darasani.
11. Chunguza watoto wanapofanya kazi hiyo na kutoa msaada kwa mwenye uhitaji huo.

Tanbihi:
Shughuli hii itawezeshwa kwa vipindi vitatu katika wakati tofauti ukibadilisha zana za kutumia na picha zilizowekwa vidoti.
steps_en:
1. Prepare materials, a clean area, and a friendly environment.
2. Have pictures that have dots placed on them, e.g., a house, ball, animal.
3. Seat children in a U-shape/semi-circle/circle or another arrangement depending on the environment.
4. Show an example of connecting/tracing dots.
5. Give each child a dot-connecting exercise.
6. Visit each child to observe their participation.
7. Give each child an opportunity to show how they connected the dots.
8. Praise children at every step.
9. At the end, give each child an opportunity to show how they connected the dots.
10. Collect children's work and display it in the classroom.
11. Monitor children as they do the activity and provide support to whoever needs it.

Note:
This activity will be carried out in three sessions at different times, varying the tools used and the pictures with dots.

subject: Sanaa na Ubunifu: Miaka 3–4 / Kujenga Stadi Zinazohusisha Utendaji wa Mwili
title_sw: Shughuli 1(b): Kutembea kwenye msawazo wenye vikwazo (kujiviringisha)
title_en: Activity 1(b): Walking along a balance path with obstacles (rolling)
about_sw: Kuimarisha misuli mikubwa, ubunifu na umakini.
about_en: Strengthening gross muscles, creativity and attentiveness.
materials_sw: Picha zinazoonesha hatua za kujiviringisha
materials_en: Pictures showing the steps of rolling
steps_sw:
1. Andaa mazingira ambayo watoto watacheza mchezo wa kujivingirisha.
2. Bandika picha ukutani na waruhusu watoto kutembelea na kuangalia picha zinazoonesha watoto wakijiviringisha.
3. Waruhusu watoto wanapokua tayari kujiviringisha kama walivyoona kwenye picha au kwa kuangalia wenzao.
4. Mwite mtoto mmoja mmoja afanye kama vile ulivyofanya.
5. Angalia kama kila mtoto ameweza kujiviringisha huku ukitoa msaada kwa watoto wenye uhitaji.

Tanbihi:
1. Shughuli hii itawezeshwa kwa vipindi vitatu na kwa wakati tofauti ukibadilisha mbinu au kuwapatia watoto muda zaidi wa kufanya mazoezi.
steps_en:
1. Prepare an environment where children will play the rolling game.
2. Post pictures on the wall and allow children to walk around and look at pictures showing children rolling.
3. Allow children when they are ready to roll as they saw in the pictures or by watching their peers.
4. Call each child one by one to do as you demonstrated.
5. Check whether each child was able to roll while providing support to children who need it.

Note:
1. This activity can be conducted in three sessions at different times by changing the technique or giving children more time to practise.

subject: Sanaa na Ubunifu: Miaka 3–4 / Kujenga Stadi Zinazohusisha Utendaji wa Mwili
title_sw: Shughuli 1(c): Kutembea kwenye msawazo wenye vikwazo (Kuruka kwenye vitu mbalimbali)
title_en: Activity 1(c): Walking along a balance path with obstacles (Jumping over various objects)
about_sw: Kuruka, kushirikiana, kukuza misuli mikubwa na midogo, kukuza msamiati, kukuza umakini
about_en: Jumping, cooperating, developing gross and fine muscles, building vocabulary, developing attentiveness
materials_sw: Matairi ya gari, kigoda kifupi, meza fupi
materials_en: Car tyres, a short stool, a low table
steps_sw:
1. Andaa vifaa utakavyohitaji kutumia pamoja na mazingira rafiki kwa mtoto kucheza mchezo ulioandaa.
2. Waweke watoto kwenye umbo la nusu duara.
3. Waelekeze watoto matumizi ya vifaa watakavyotumia.
4. Kuwaelekeza watoto jinsi ya kuruka kwa makini.
5. Kuweka meza fupi au kigoda alafu kuwaambia watoto waruke.
6. Kuwaangalia jinsi wanavyoruka na kuangalia usalama wao pia.
7. Angalia ushiriki wa mtoto wakati wa kucheza na wahudumie kulingana na mahitaji yao.

Tanbihi:
1. Shughuli hii itawezeshwa mara nne kwa vipindi tofauti ukibadilisha zana za kutumia.
steps_en:
1. Prepare the materials you will need to use together with a child-friendly environment for the game you have prepared.
2. Place the children in a semicircle.
3. Guide children on the use of the materials they will use.
4. Guide the children on how to jump carefully.
5. Place a low table or stool and then tell the children to jump over it.
6. Observe how they jump and also check their safety.
7. Monitor the child's participation during play and assist them according to their needs.

Note:
1. This activity can be conducted four times in different sessions by changing the tools used.

subject: Sanaa na Ubunifu: Miaka 3–4 / Kujenga Stadi Zinazohusisha Utendaji wa Mwili
title_sw: Shughuli 2: Kuigiza mijongeo ya wanyama mbalimbali
title_en: Activity 2: Imitating the movements of various animals
about_sw: Kuigiza, kuimarisha misuli mikubwa na midogo, ubunifu na umakini.
about_en: Imitation, strengthening gross and fine muscles, creativity and attentiveness.
materials_sw: Picha/kadi za wanyama mbalimbali, runinga, tabuleti ikionesha wanyama wakijongea
materials_en: Pictures/cards of various animals, television, tablet showing animals in motion
steps_sw:
1. Andaa vifaa utakavyohitaji kutumia.
2. Andaa mazingira rafiki yatakayo ruhusu watoto kujongea.
3. Kaa na watoto katika umbo la nusu duara au mkao wowote unaofaa.
4. Waongoze watoto wataje wanyama wanaojua.
5. Waeleze kuwa watajifunza mijongeo ya wanyama (ambao mlezi ameandaa).
6. Onesha kwa mfano kwa kuigiza mjongeo wa mnyama mojawapo.
7. Weka kadi mezani halafu mtoto aje achague picha na aigize mjongeo wa mnyama anayemuona.
8. Angalia kama kila mtoto anaweza kujongea au kama anahitaji msaada.

Tanbihi:
Shughuli hii itawezeshwa kwa muda wa vipindi 3 katika muda tofauti unawezatumia video ya wanyama wakijongea na mchezo mtoto ajongee halafu wenzake waseme ni mnyama gani hujongea namna hiyo.
steps_en:
1. Prepare the materials you will need to use.
2. Prepare a friendly environment that will allow children to move around.
3. Sit with the children in a semicircle or any suitable arrangement.
4. Guide children to name animals they know.
5. Explain to them that they will learn the movements of animals (which the caregiver has prepared).
6. Demonstrate by imitating the movement of one of the animals.
7. Place cards on the table then have a child come, choose a picture and imitate the movement of the animal they see.
8. Check whether each child can move or whether they need support.

Note:
This activity can be conducted over 3 sessions at different times; you can use a video of animals moving and play a game where a child moves and peers guess which animal moves that way.

subject: Sanaa na Ubunifu: Miaka 3–4 | Kujenga Stadi Zinazohusisha Utendaji wa Mwili
title_sw: Shughuli 3: Kufanya mazoezi ya Mwendo kwa Mdundo rahisi
title_en: Activity 3: Doing Movement Exercises to a Simple Beat
about_sw: Kukuza misuli mikubwa na midogo, Kushirikiana, kukuza msamiati, kukuza umakini
about_en: Developing large and small muscles, cooperation, vocabulary development, developing attention/concentration
materials_sw: Ngoma, filimbi, kadi/picha zinazoonesha mchezo wa mazoezi kwa mdundo, redio, simu
materials_en: Drum, whistle, cards/pictures showing rhythm movement exercises, radio, phone
steps_sw:
1. Andaa mazingira rafiki na vifaa utakavyotumia wakati wa kuwaelekeza watoto juu ya mazoezi ya mwendo.
2. Wakaribishe watoto wakae katika umbo la duara.
3. Waeleze watoto kwamba wanakwenda kufanya mazoezi ya mwendo kwa mdundo.
4. Mlezi kufanya onesho mbinu la mazoezi ya mwendo kwa mdundo mfano kutumia viungo vya mwili (kichwa, mikono, miguu) kufuata mdundo unaopigwa.
5. Kuwapa fursa watoto kufanya mazoezi ya mwendo kwa kufuata mdundo kama walivyoona kwa mlezi.
6. Mlezi unaweza kuongeza kasi ya mapigo ya mdundo ili watoto wabadili kulingana na mapigo ya mdundo.
7. Chunguza kama kila mtoto anashiriki kikamilifu.
Tanbihi: Shughuli hii itawezeshwa kwa vipindi vitano kwa wakati tofauti ukibadilisha aina ya ala ya muziki unayotumia kama ulitumia ngoma, unaweza tumia filimbi au redio.
steps_en:
1. Prepare a friendly environment and the materials you will use when guiding children about movement exercises.
2. Welcome the children to sit in a circle.
3. Explain to the children that they are going to do movement exercises to a beat.
4. The caregiver demonstrates the technique of movement exercises to a beat, for example using body parts (head, hands, feet) to follow the beat being played.
5. Give children the opportunity to do movement exercises by following the beat as they saw from the caregiver.
6. The caregiver can increase the speed of the beat so that children adjust according to the beat.
7. Check that every child is participating fully.
Note: This activity can be done in five sessions at different times by changing the type of musical instrument used — if you used a drum, you can use a whistle or radio.

subject: Sanaa na Ubunifu: Miaka 3–4 | Kujenga Stadi Zinazohusisha Utendaji wa Mwili
title_sw: Shughuli 4: Kucheza michezo yenye vikwazo rahisi
title_en: Activity 4: Playing Games with Simple Obstacles
about_sw: Kukuza misuli mikubwa na midogo, kushirikiana, kukuza msamiati, kukuza umakini
about_en: Developing large and small muscles, cooperation, vocabulary development, developing attention/concentration
materials_sw: Matairi, filimbi, picha ya watoto wanaocheza mcheze wa vikwazo
materials_en: Tyres, whistle, pictures of children playing an obstacle game
steps_sw:
1. Andaa vifaa utakavyotumia kuwaonesha watoto michezo yenye vikwazo rahisi.
2. Weka matairi mawili ya gari/pikipiki kwa kuyachimbia (acha nafasi ambayo watoto watapita wakati wa kukimbia).
3. Kuwatoa watoto nje kwenye uwanja ambapo mchezo huu utafanyika.
4. Waeleze watoto kwamba wanakwenda kucheza mchezo.
5. Toa maelekezo ya jinsi mchezo unavyochezwa (watoto wakimbie na kisha waingie kwenye tairi moja na baadaye tairi jingine).
6. Waruhusu watoto waanze kucheza huo mchezo na hakikisha kila mtoto anashiriki kikamilifu.
7. Kuwasisitiza watoto wasishikane wakati wa kukimbia.
8. Kuwaangalia kwa makini wasije kuumia.
9. Kuwapongeza wanapo fanya vizuri.
Tanbihi:
1. Kumbuka kuainisha watoto wenye mahitaji maalumu ili uweze kuwashirikisha kulingana na mahitaji yao.
2. Shughuli hii itawezeshwa kwa vipindi vitano kwa wakati tofauti ukibadilisha aina ya vikwazo au ukiwapatia watoto nafasi ya kurudia vikwazo vilevile.
steps_en:
1. Prepare the materials you will use to show children games with simple obstacles.
2. Place two car/motorcycle tyres by partially burying them (leave a gap for children to pass through while running).
3. Take the children outside to the field where this game will take place.
4. Explain to the children that they are going to play a game.
5. Give instructions on how the game is played (children run and then enter one tyre and then another).
6. Allow children to start playing the game and ensure every child participates fully.
7. Remind children not to hold each other while running.
8. Watch them carefully so they do not get hurt.
9. Praise them when they do well.
Note:
1. Remember to identify children with special needs so you can include them according to their needs.
2. This activity can be done in five sessions at different times by changing the type of obstacles or giving children the opportunity to repeat the same obstacles.

subject: Sanaa na Ubunifu: Miaka 3–4 | Kujenga Stadi Zinazohusisha Utendaji wa Mwili
title_sw: Shughuli 5: Kuchapa kwa kutumia miguu kwa ruwaza
title_en: Activity 5: Foot Printing in a Pattern
about_sw: Kuchapa kwa miguu, kuimarisha misuli mikubwa na midogo, ubunifu na umakini
about_en: Foot printing, strengthening large and small muscles, creativity and concentration
materials_sw: Rangi za maji, bakuli za kuwekea rangi, karatasi nyeupe, mchoro wa chapa ya mguu ya ruwaza, maji makopo ya rangi aina tofauti tofauti michoro ya mguu
materials_en: Water paints, bowls for holding paint, white paper, a template/pattern of a foot print, tins of different colours, different foot print patterns
steps_sw:
1. Andaa vifaa vyote na mazingira kwa kubandika sakafuni michoro ya miguu kwa mfuatano maalum (ruwaza).
2. Kaa na watoto katika umbo la nusu duara mkao wowote unaofaa.
3. Waelekeze watoto walio vaa soksi wavue.
4. Anza kuwaonesha watoto jinsi ya kuchapa kwa kutumia miguu kwa ruwaza.
5. Weka mguu kwenye chombo chenye rangi na kukanyaga kwenye karatasi nyeupe zilizo kaa kwa ruwaza.
6. Waambie watoto wafanye hilo zoezi kwa ruwaza.
7. Angalia kama kila mtoto anaweza kushiriki kwenye zoezi hili.
Tanbihi: Shughuli hii itawezeshwa kwa vipindi vitatu kwa muda tofauti huku ukibadilisha ruwaza ambazo watoto watatumia wakati wa kuchapa kwa kutumia miguu.
steps_en:
1. Prepare all materials and the environment by sticking foot print patterns on the floor in a specific sequence (pattern).
2. Sit with the children in a semi-circle in any comfortable position.
3. Direct children who are wearing socks to remove them.
4. Begin showing children how to do foot printing in a pattern.
5. Place a foot in the container with paint and step onto white papers arranged in a pattern.
6. Tell the children to do that exercise following the pattern.
7. Check whether every child is able to participate in this exercise.
Note: This activity can be done in three sessions at different times while changing the patterns that children will use when foot printing.

subject: Sanaa na Ubunifu: Miaka 3–4 / Kujenga Stadi Zinazohusisha Ubunifu wa Sauti
title_sw: Shughuli 4: Kuimba nyimbo zinazohusisha matendo mbalimbali
title_en: Activity 4: Singing songs that involve various actions
about_sw: Kuimba, kushirikiana, kusaidiana, kutii, usafi, upendo katika familia, utambuzi wa sauti, ujasili, na ubunifu
about_en: Singing, cooperation, helping one another, obedience, cleanliness, love within the family, sound recognition, confidence, and creativity
materials_sw: Marimba ndogo, chupa za plastiki, ngoma, redio
materials_en: Small marimba, plastic bottles, drum, radio
steps_sw:
1. Andaa wimbo unaofaa wenye matendo rahisi kama kuruka kupunga mkono, au kugusa viungo kama: "Kama unafuraha na unajua piga makofi".
2. Waweke watoto katika umbo la duara.
3. Anza kwa kusikiliza wimbo pamoja kupitia redio, simu au wewe mwenyewe.
4. Mtoto asikilize mdundo.
5. Mfundishe matendo bila wimbo kwa kusema "Punga mkono" "Ruka juu" "Gusa kichwa" "Geuka".
6. Muelekeze mtoto kwa vitendo na sauti.
7. Imbeni pamoja na kurudiarudia.
8. Mpe nafasi mtoto ya kuongoza huku akichagua matendo mapya kama "tutembee taratibu" "kukimbia kama paka".
9. Chunguza kama watoto wameshiriki kuimba nyimbo zinazohusisha matendo.

Tanbihi:
1. Shughuli hii itawezeshwa kwa vipindi 10 kuimba nyimbo huku wakipunga mikono, wakiruka juu, kugusa kichwa, kutembea taratibu, kukimbia kama paka, wakigeuka na kukanyaga chini.
2. Watoto wenye ulemavu wa kusikia tumia kadi za picha, wenye changamoto za kuongea waruhusu kuonyesha kwa matendo.
steps_en:
1. Prepare a suitable song with simple actions like jumping, waving hands, or touching body parts e.g. "If you're happy and you know it clap your hands".
2. Arrange the children in a circle.
3. Begin by listening to the song together via radio, phone, or yourself.
4. Let the child listen to the rhythm.
5. Teach the actions without the song by saying "Wave your hand", "Jump up", "Touch your head", "Turn around".
6. Guide the child through the actions with sound.
7. Sing together repeatedly.
8. Give the child the opportunity to lead while choosing new actions such as "let's walk slowly", "run like a cat".
9. Check whether children have participated in singing songs involving actions.

Note:
1. This activity can be done in 10 sessions singing songs while waving hands, jumping up, touching the head, walking slowly, running like a cat, turning around, and stomping on the ground.
2. For children with hearing impairments use picture cards; for children with speech challenges allow them to demonstrate through actions.

subject: Sanaa na Ubunifu: Miaka 3–4 / Kujenga Stadi Zinazohusisha Ubunifu wa Sauti
title_sw: Shughuli 5: Kutengeneza vyombo vya muziki
title_en: Activity 5: Making musical instruments
about_sw: Utambuzi wa sauti, ubunifu, kuimarisha uwezo wa mikono na vidole
about_en: Sound recognition, creativity, strengthening hand and finger skills
materials_sw: Filimbi za bomba za mipapai, chupa ndogo ya plastiki weka mchele/maharage/mawe madogo, makopo ya plastiki, puto, karatasi na kamba
materials_en: Papaya stem whistles, small plastic bottles filled with rice/beans/small stones, plastic tins, balloons, paper and string
steps_sw:
1. Andaa vifaa vya kutosha utakavyotumia na watoto, hakikisha ni salama kwa watoto.
2. Waweke watoto katika umbo la Duara.
3. Mpe mtoto kopo la plastiki funika juu kwa puto au karatasi na uwaambie leo tunajifunza kutengeneza vyombo vya muziki.
4. Wakaribishe watoto wataje vitu wanavyoviona na vitakavyotumika kutengeneza vyombo vya muziki.
5. Waweke katika vikundi vya watoto watano.
6. Onyesha jinsi ya kutengeneza chombo cha muziki kwa kutumia chupa za plastiki, ngoma ndogo, vyungu, makopo, sufuria, vifuniko vya chupa vilivyo tobolewa na kuwekwa kamba.
7. Waelekeze watoto ili pia watengeneze katika vikundi vyao wakishirikiana na kusaidiana.
8. Chunguza kama watoto wameshiriki kutengeneza vyombo vya muziki.

Tanbihi:
- Shughuli hii itawezeshwa kwa vipindi 6 kwa kutumia vifaa mbalimbali kutengeneza vyombo mbalimbali vya muziki.
- Kwa watoto wenye ulemavu wa kusikia tumia ishara na kwa mtoto mwenye ulemavu wa akili mpe shughuli fupi na rudiarudia.
steps_en:
1. Prepare sufficient materials you will use with the children; ensure they are safe for the children.
2. Arrange the children in a circle.
3. Give the child a plastic tin covered on top with a balloon or paper and tell them that today we are learning to make musical instruments.
4. Invite the children to name the items they see and those that will be used to make musical instruments.
5. Place them in groups of five children.
6. Show how to make a musical instrument using plastic bottles, small drums, pots, tins, saucepans, bottle caps that have been pierced and threaded with string.
7. Guide the children to also make instruments in their groups while cooperating and helping each other.
8. Check whether children have participated in making musical instruments.

Note:
- This activity can be done in 6 sessions using different materials to make various musical instruments.
- For children with hearing impairments use sign language; for a child with intellectual disability give short and repetitive tasks.

subject: Sanaa na Ubunifu: Miaka 3–4 / Kujenga Stadi Zinazohusisha Ubunifu wa Sauti
title_sw: Shughuli 6: Kusimulia hadithi
title_en: Activity 6: Storytelling
about_sw: Kushirikiana, kusaidiana, kutii, usafi, upendo katika familia
about_en: Cooperation, helping one another, obedience, cleanliness, love within the family
materials_sw: Vitu halisi, picha vikaragosi, vinyago, kadi za picha, picha za wanyama, vitabu vya picha
materials_en: Real objects, cartoon pictures, puppets/dolls, picture cards, animal pictures, picture books
steps_sw:
1. Andaa hadithi fupi na yenye picha na maneno machache.
2. Waweke watoto katika umbo la "U".
3. Soma hadithi kwa sauti yenye hisia tofauti na sauti itoke kulingana na mhusika kwenye hadithi (kama ni Simba unguruma).
4. Eleza kwa sentensi fupi na rahisi mfano: "Kuku mdogo na rafiki zake". Kulikuwa na kuku mdogo alitembea shambani. Akaona ndege akasema: Habari rafiki. Wakaenda kucheza pamoja wakaruka juu wakaimba. Hadithi yangu imeishia hapo.
5. Muoneshe picha mtoto na muulize huyu ni nani?
6. Rudia hadithi mara kwa mara.
7. Chunguza kama mtoto kasimulia hadithi kwa maneno yake mwenyewe.

Tanbihi:
1. Shughuli hii itawezeshwa kwa vipindi 10 kusimulia hadithi za kushirikiana, usafi, ukarimu, upendo, vyakula, na kushirikiana, wanyama na mazingira. Epuka hadithi za hofu au ukatili wa kupita kiasi.
2. Watoto wenye ulemavu wa kusikia tumia picha kubwa, kadi za michoro, simulia kwa ishara, onyesha matendo makubwa; kwa watoto wasioona tumia sauti za hisia.
steps_en:
1. Prepare a short story with pictures and few words.
2. Arrange the children in a "U" shape.
3. Read the story aloud with different emotions and let your voice match the character in the story (e.g. if it is a lion, roar).
4. Explain with short and simple sentences, for example: "A little chick and its friends". There was a little chick that walked in the farm. It saw a bird and said: Hello friend. They went to play together, jumped up, and sang. My story ends there.
5. Show the child a picture and ask: who is this?
6. Repeat the story again and again.
7. Check whether the child has retold the story in their own words.

Note:
1. This activity can be done in 10 sessions telling stories about cooperation, cleanliness, generosity, love, food, sharing, animals, and the environment. Avoid stories about fear or excessive violence.
2. For children with hearing impairments use large pictures, drawing cards, tell using sign language, and show big actions; for children who cannot see use emotional sounds.

subject: Utamaduni, Imani na Tunu za Taifa
title_sw: Shughuli 1: Kuimba wimbo wa Taifa
title_en: Activity 1: Singing the National Anthem
about_sw: Kukuza uzalendo, kukuza lugha, kuimba, utulivu, heshima, Kujenga mahusiano, utii na kujenga umakini.
about_en: Developing patriotism, language development, singing, calmness, respect, building relationships, obedience and building attentiveness.
materials_sw: Radio, ngoma, na vifaa mbalimbali vya ala za muziki
materials_en: Radio, drum, and various musical instruments
steps_sw:
1. Tayarisha vifaa utakavyo vitumia pamoja na eneo.
2. Waambie watoto wasimame kwenye mduara/umbo la "U" au nusu duara. Simama eneo ambalo watoto wote watakuona vizuri.
3. Watambulishe watoto shughuli ya siku kwa kuwaalika kuimba wimbo wa Taifa.
4. Wasikilizishe watoto wimbo wa Taifa kutoka kwenye radio, simu, tableti au kifaa chochote ulichorekodia.
5. Imba na watoto wimbo wa Taifa ukiimba taratibu kwa kutamka matamshi kwa ufasaha.
6. Sikiliza na watoto wimbo wa Taifa huku mkishirikiana kupiga muziki kwa kutumia vifaa vya ala.
7. Waambie watoto waimbe beti za wimbo wa Taifa.
8. Fuatilia watoto waimbe kwa hatua na utaratibu, hakikisha kila mtoto anashiriki kikamilifu.
TANBIHI: Shughuli itawezeshwa kwa vipindi vitano tofauti kwa kusisitiza ubeti wa kwanza, wa pili, kisha beti zote mbili.
steps_en:
1. Prepare the materials you will use along with the space/area.
2. Tell the children to stand in a circle/"U" shape or semicircle. Stand in a position where all children can see you well.
3. Introduce the children to the day's activity by inviting them to sing the National Anthem.
4. Play the National Anthem for the children from a radio, phone, tablet or any device you have recorded it on.
5. Sing the National Anthem together with the children, singing slowly and pronouncing the words clearly.
6. Listen to the National Anthem together with the children while cooperating to play music using musical instruments.
7. Tell the children to sing the verses of the National Anthem.
8. Follow the children as they sing step by step and in order, ensuring every child participates fully.
NOTE: The activity will be conducted in five different sessions, focusing on the first verse, the second verse, and then both verses together.

subject: Utamaduni, Imani na Tunu za Taifa
title_sw: Shughuli 2: Kuimba wimbo wa Tanzania Tanzania Nakupenda
title_en: Activity 2: Singing the song 'Tanzania Nakupenda' (I Love You Tanzania)
about_sw: Kukuza uzalendo, stadi lugha, misamiati, Stadi ya kuimba, kukariri, utulivu, heshima, kujenga mahusiano, utii na kujenga umakini, kuimarisha misuli midogo.
about_en: Developing patriotism, language skills, vocabulary, singing skills, memorisation, calmness, respect, building relationships, obedience and building attentiveness, strengthening fine muscles.
materials_sw: Radio, ngoma, na vifaa mbalimbali vya ala za muziki
materials_en: Radio, drum, and various musical instruments
steps_sw:
1. Tayarisha eneo na vifaa mbalimbali utakavyovitumia.
2. Waambie watoto wakae kwenye mduara/umbo la "U" au nusu duara. Simama eneo ambalo watoto wote watakuona vizuri.
3. Wakaribishe watoto kwa kutambulisha shughuli ya siku kwa kuwasomea hadithi fupi kuhusu nchi ya Tanzania.
4. Wasikilizishe wimbo wa Tanzania Nakupenda uliorekodiwa kwenye simu au tabuleti.
5. Imba wimbo wa Tanzania Nakupenda ubeti wa kwanza, taratibu kwa hatua, huku watoto wakifuatilia.
6. Shirikiana na watoto kuimba wimbo wa Tanzania nakupenda ubeti wa kwanza, na kupiga muziki kwa kutumia vifaa vya ala.
7. Waambie watoto waimbe ubeti wa kwanza wa wimbo wa Tanzania Nakupenda.
8. Fuatilia watoto waimbe kwa hatua na utaratibu, hakikisha kila mtoto anashiriki kikamilifu.
TANBIHI:
1. Shughuli hii itawezeshwa kwa vipindi 5 katika siku tofauti: mara 3 za mwanzo kwa kubadilisha ubeti wa kwanza mpaka wa tatu, kisha mara ya nne na ya tano kuimba wimbo wote.
steps_en:
1. Prepare the space/area and various materials you will use.
2. Tell the children to sit in a circle/"U" shape or semicircle. Stand in a position where all children can see you well.
3. Welcome the children by introducing the day's activity by reading them a short story about the country of Tanzania.
4. Play the song 'Tanzania Nakupenda' recorded on a phone or tablet for them to listen.
5. Sing the first verse of 'Tanzania Nakupenda' slowly step by step, while children follow along.
6. Cooperate with the children to sing the first verse of 'Tanzania Nakupenda' and play music using musical instruments.
7. Tell the children to sing the first verse of the song 'Tanzania Nakupenda'.
8. Follow the children as they sing step by step and in order, ensuring every child participates fully.
NOTE:
1. This activity will be conducted in 5 sessions on different days: the first 3 times progressing from the first verse to the third verse, then the fourth and fifth times singing the whole song.

subject: Utamaduni, Imani na Tunu za Taifa: Miaka 3–4 / Kutambua Alama na Tunu za Taifa
title_sw: Shughuli 3: Kutaja rangi za bendera ya Tanzania
title_en: Activity 3: Naming the colours of the Tanzanian flag
about_sw: Kukuza uzalendo, kukuza lugha, Stadi za umakini, na kukariri, kuimarisha misuli midogo na mikubwa
about_en: Develop patriotism, develop language, attention skills, and memorisation; strengthen fine and gross muscles
materials_sw: Picha ya bendera iliyochorwa na kupakwa rangi / bendera halisi. Weka picha ya bendera ya Tanzania
materials_en: A drawn and coloured picture of the flag / an actual flag. Display a picture of the Tanzanian flag
steps_sw:
1. Andaa eneo la kujifunzia vifaa utakavyovitumia.
2. Waambie watoto wasimame/wakae kwenye mduara/umbo la "U" au nusu duara. Simama eneo ambalo watoto wote watakuona vizuri.
3. Wakaribishe watoto na tambulisha shughuli ya siku kwa kuimba wimbo wa bendera ya Tanzania huku ukionesha bendera au picha ya bendera.
4. Wagawie watoto karatasi zilizochorwa picha ya bendera na kupakwa rangi na kutaja rangi zilizopo.
5. Waambie watoto waoanishe rangi za bendera ya Tanzania na vitu vinavyopatikana / kuonekana katika mazingira. Hakikisha kila mtoto anashiriki kikamilifu.
6. Waongoze watoto kutumia / kuchezea vifaa mbalimbali mfano vibao fumbo, vyenye picha ya bendera.
7. Chunguza kama watoto wanashiriki kutaja na kupaka rangi.
TANBIHI: 1. Shughuli hii itawezeshwa kwa vipindi 3 kwa kufanya michezo mbalimbali ya kutambua na kuoanisha rangi zilizomo kwenye bendera na vitu vingine.
steps_en:
1. Prepare the learning area and the materials you will use.
2. Ask children to stand/sit in a circle or "U" shape or semi-circle. Stand in a position where all children can see you clearly.
3. Welcome the children and introduce the day's activity by singing a song about the Tanzanian flag while showing the flag or a picture of the flag.
4. Distribute to children sheets of paper with a drawn picture of the flag, already coloured, and name the colours present.
5. Ask children to match the colours of the Tanzanian flag with objects found / seen in the environment. Ensure every child participates fully.
6. Guide children to use / play with various materials such as puzzle boards featuring the flag.
7. Check whether children are participating in naming and colouring.
NOTE: 1. This activity can be facilitated over 3 sessions by doing various games of identifying and matching colours found on the flag and other objects.

subject: Utamaduni, Imani na Tunu za Taifa: Miaka 3–4 / Kutambua Alama na Tunu za Taifa
title_sw: Shughuli 4: Kupaka rangi bendera ya Tanzania
title_en: Activity 4: Colouring the Tanzanian flag
about_sw: Kukuza uzalendo, stadi za uchoraji, kuimarisha misuli midogo na mikubwa, uratibu wa macho na mikono, umakini.
about_en: Develop patriotism, drawing skills, strengthen fine and gross muscles, eye-hand coordination, and attention.
materials_sw: Picha iliyo chorwa na kupakwa rangi ya bendera, picha za bendera ambazo hazija pakwa rangi, rangi za krayoni, penseli, daftari ambalo halina mistari
materials_en: A drawn and coloured picture of the flag, pictures of the flag that have not yet been coloured, crayon colours, pencils, unlined exercise books
steps_sw:
1. Andaa eneo na vifaa vya kujifunzia kulingana na mazingira.
2. Waweke watoto wasimame/wakae kwenye mduara/umbo la "U" au nusu duara. Simama eneo ambalo watoto wote watakuona vizuri.
3. Wakaribishe watoto na tambulisha shughuli ya siku kwa kuimba wimbo wenye maudhui ya bendera ya Taifa ukitaja rangi zilizopo huku ukionesha picha ya bendera ya Tanzania.
4. Wagawie watoto vifaa mfano: karatasi zilizochorwa bendera, watakavyotumia kupaka rangi Bendera ya Tanzania.
5. Wasaidie watoto kupaka rangi kila moja kwa sehemu husika. Hakikisha kila mtoto anashiriki kikamilifu.
6. Fuatilia jinsi watoto wanavyopaka rangi, waelekeze kushika krayoni na hakikisha wanashiriki kupaka rangi.
TANBIHI: 1. Shughuli hii itawezeshwa kwa vipindi vitano tofauti, kupaka rangi na kufuatisha mchoro wa bendera.
steps_en:
1. Prepare the learning area and materials according to the environment.
2. Have children stand/sit in a circle or "U" shape or semi-circle. Stand in a position where all children can see you clearly.
3. Welcome the children and introduce the day's activity by singing a song about the National flag, naming the colours present, while showing a picture of the Tanzanian flag.
4. Distribute materials to children, for example: sheets of paper with the flag drawn, which they will use to colour the Tanzanian flag.
5. Help children colour each section in the correct place. Ensure every child participates fully.
6. Monitor how children are colouring, guide them on how to hold crayons, and ensure they participate in colouring.
NOTE: 1. This activity can be facilitated over five different sessions, colouring and tracing the outline of the flag.

subject: Utamaduni, Imani na Tunu za Taifa: Miaka 3–4 / Kutambua Alama na Tunu za Taifa
title_sw: Shughuli 5: Kufuatisha Mwenge wa Uhuru
title_en: Activity 5: Tracing the Torch of Freedom (Uhuru Torch)
about_sw: Kukuza uzalendo, Stadi za uchoraji, kuimarisha misuli midogo, uratibu wa macho na mikono, umakini na uzalendo
about_en: Develop patriotism, drawing skills, strengthen fine muscles, eye-hand coordination, attention and patriotism
materials_sw: Picha zenye mchoro wa mwenge za kufuatisha, kalamu ya risasi, penseli za rangi
materials_en: Pictures with torch outlines for tracing, pencils, coloured pencils
steps_sw:
1. Andaa eneo la ujifunzaji na vifaa utakavyo tumia.
2. Waelekeze watoto wakae kwenye mduara/umbo la "U" au nusu duara na wewe ukae eneo ambalo watoto wote watakuona vizuri.
3. Wakaribishe watoto na tambulisha shughuli ya siku kwa kuwaonesha picha ya mwenge wa uhuru na kuwauliza inafanana na nini?
4. Wasimulie hadithi fupi kuhusu mwenge wa uhuru.
5. Wagawie watoto picha katika karatasi ambazo zimechorwa ili kufuatishia mchoro wa Mwenge wa Uhuru.
6. Waongoze watoto kufuatishia mchoro ukiwaelekeza kushika kalamu.
7. Fuatilia jinsi watoto wanavyoshika kalamu wakifuatisha mchoro, msaidie mtoto anayehitaji msaada.
TANBIHI: 1. Shughuli hii inaweza kuwezeshwa kwa vipindi 5 tofauti, kwa kubadilisha kalamu za rangi, penseli na krayoni. 2. Hakikisha mchoro ni mkubwa na sehemu za kufuatiswa zimekolezwa vizuri ili watoto wote waweze kuona vizuri.
steps_en:
1. Prepare the learning area and the materials you will use.
2. Direct children to sit in a circle or "U" shape or semi-circle, and you sit in a position where all children can see you clearly.
3. Welcome the children and introduce the day's activity by showing a picture of the Uhuru Torch and asking them what it looks like.
4. Tell a short story about the Uhuru Torch.
5. Distribute to children pictures on sheets of paper that have been drawn for tracing the outline of the Uhuru Torch.
6. Guide children to trace the outline while directing them on how to hold the pencil.
7. Monitor how children hold the pencil while tracing, and assist any child who needs help.
NOTE: 1. This activity can be facilitated over 5 different sessions by alternating coloured pencils, lead pencils, and crayons. 2. Ensure the outline is large and the sections to be traced are clearly darkened so all children can see well.

subject: Utamaduni, Imani na Tunu za Taifa: Miaka 3–4 — Kutambua Alama na Tunu za Taifa
title_sw: Shughuli 6: Kupaka rangi Mwenge wa Uhuru
title_en: Activity 6: Colouring the Torch of Independence (Uhuru Torch)
about_sw: Kuimarisha misuli midogo na mikubwa, uratibu wa macho na mikono, stadi za kupaka rangi, utulivu, na kujenga umakini
about_en: Strengthening fine and gross muscles, hand-eye coordination, colouring skills, calmness, and building concentration
materials_sw: Picha ya mwenge iliyochorwa na kupakwa rangi, picha za mwenge wa Uhuru ambazo hazijapakwa rangi, rangi za krayoni, penseli, daftari lisilo na mistari
materials_en: A picture of a torch drawn and coloured, pictures of the Uhuru Torch that have not been coloured, crayon colours, pencils, plain exercise book
steps_sw:
1. Tayarisha vifaa na mazingira yanayofaa kwa watoto kupaka rangi.
2. Waongoze watoto wakae kwenye mduara/umbo la "U" au nusu duara. Simama eneo ambalo watoto wote watakuona vizuri.
3. Wakaribishe watoto na tambulisha shughuli ya siku kwa kuwagawia au kuwaonesha picha za mwenge ambao umepakwa rangi.
4. Wagawie watoto picha kubwa zenye mchoro wa mwenge wa uhuru ambazo hazijapakwa rangi.
5. Waongoze watoto wapake rangi picha ya mwenge wa Uhuru.
6. Fuatilia jinsi watoto wanavyo fuatilishia mchoro na kupaka rangi, msaidie mtoto ambaye anashindwa kushika kalamu.

TANBIHI:
1. Shughuli hii itawezeshwa kwa vipindi vinne tofauti, watoto wanaweza kupewa uhuru wa kuchagua na kubadilisha rangi wanazotaka
steps_en:
1. Prepare materials and an environment suitable for children to colour.
2. Guide children to sit in a circle/"U" shape or semicircle. Stand in a position where all children can see you well.
3. Welcome the children and introduce the day's activity by distributing or showing them pictures of a torch that has been coloured.
4. Give each child a large picture with an outline of the Uhuru Torch that has not been coloured.
5. Guide the children to colour the picture of the Uhuru Torch.
6. Monitor how children trace the outline and apply colour; assist any child who struggles to hold a pencil.

NOTE:
1. This activity will be facilitated over four different sessions; children may be given freedom to choose and change colours they want.

subject: Utamaduni, Imani na Tunu za Taifa: Miaka 3–4 — Kutambua Utamaduni wa Jamii Yake
title_sw: Shughuli 1: Kusalimia – rika lake, wakubwa, wadogo
title_en: Activity 1: Greeting – peers, elders, younger people
about_sw: Kukuza lugha, stadi za kujenga mahusiano na utambulisho, heshima, adabu, nidhamu, utii, upendo, urafiki
about_en: Developing language, skills for building relationships and identity, respect, good manners, discipline, obedience, love, friendship
materials_sw: Vibao, vitabu, picha, tabuleti au runinga.
materials_en: Charts, books, pictures, tablet or television.
steps_sw:
1. Tayarisha vifaa mbalimbali vya ujifunzaji.
2. Waambie watoto wasimame/wakae kwenye mduara/umbo la "U" au nusu duara. Simama eneo ambalo watoto wote watakuona vizuri.
3. Wakaribishe watoto na tambulisha shughuli ya siku kwa kuwaongoza kuimba wimbo wa kusalimiana (Niamkapo asubuhi…).
4. Waongoze watoto kuendelea kuimba kwa watu walio katika familia.
5. Gawia watoto kadi/picha za watu wakisalimiana na waulize wanaona nini katika picha hizo?.
6. Wawezeshe watoto kutumia/kuchezea vifaa mbalimbali vilivyoandaliwa mfano au picha zenye maudhui ya shughuli tajwa.
7. Waulize watoto maswali rahisi yanayohusiana na salamu mfn: unapoamka asubuhi unamsalimiaje baba, mama, bibi, mjomba, shangazi, dada, kaka, au rafiki yako? Wajibu huku wakiigiza kusalimia.
8. Chunguza jinsi watoto wanavyosalimiana, msaidie mtoto ambaye hajaweza kusalimia.

TANBIHI:
1. Shughuli hii itawezeshwa kwa vipindi vitatu tofauti, watoto wakiongozwa kuigiza kusalimia watu tofauti tofauti
steps_en:
1. Prepare various learning materials.
2. Tell the children to stand/sit in a circle/"U" shape or semicircle. Stand in a position where all children can see you well.
3. Welcome the children and introduce the day's activity by leading them to sing a greeting song (When I wake up in the morning…).
4. Guide the children to continue singing about people in the family.
5. Distribute cards/pictures of people greeting each other and ask them what they see in those pictures.
6. Enable children to use/play with various materials prepared, such as pictures with content related to the named activity.
7. Ask children simple questions related to greetings, e.g.: When you wake up in the morning, how do you greet your father, mother, grandmother, uncle, aunt, sister, brother, or your friend? Let them answer while acting out the greeting.
8. Observe how children greet each other; assist any child who has not been able to greet.

NOTE:
1. This activity will be facilitated over three different sessions, with children guided to act out greeting different people.

subject: Utamaduni, Imani na Tunu za Taifa: Miaka 3–4 — Kutambua Utamaduni wa Jamii Yake
title_sw: Shughuli 2: Kutaja mavazi
title_en: Activity 2: Naming clothing
about_sw: Kukuza stadi za Lugha, kujenga usikivu, kukariri, umakini
about_en: Developing language skills, building listening ability, repetition, concentration
materials_sw: Picha za mavazi yanayovaliwa kwenye jamii, runinga, tabuleti, mavazi halisi (suruali, gauni, kaptula, shati, blauzi, T-shirt, kanga, mtandio)
materials_en: Pictures of clothing worn in the community, television, tablet, actual clothing (trousers, dress, shorts, shirt, blouse, T-shirt, kanga, headscarf)
steps_sw:
1. Andaa eneo la ujifunzaji na uweke vifaa vinavyohitajika.
2. Waongoze watoto wasimame/wakae kwenye mduara/umbo la "U" au nusu duara na wewe uwe eneo ambalo watoto wote watakuona vizuri.
3. Wakaribishe watoto na tambulisha shughuli ya siku kwa kuwasomea hadithi fupi kuhusu mavazi mbalimbali.
4. Waongoze watoto mmoja mmoja ataje majina ya mavazi ambayo amevaa (sketi, shati, suruali, kaptula, soksi…n. k).
5. Imba wimbo wenye kutaja majina ya aina mbalimbali za mavazi huku ukionesha mavazi na/au picha za mavazi.
6. Gawa picha zenye aina mbalimbali za Mavazi ya kitamaduni na waongoze watoto kuimba wimbo wa mavazi huku wakionesha mavazi katika picha na mavazi halisi.
7. Waongoze watoto wabaini kutoka katika picha na mavazi halisi majina ya mavazi wanayoyafahamu (kwa kuzingatia jinsi)
8. Waongoze watoto kuchezea kibao fumbo chenye picha ya mavazi.
9. Chunguza jinsi watoto wanavyobaini mavazi kutoka katika picha na mavazi halisi. Hakikisha kila mtoto anashiriki kikamilifu.

TANBIHI:
Shughuli hii inaweza kuwezeshwa kwa vipindi vitano tofauti kwa kuongeza shughuli za kufuatisha na kupaka rangi picha za mavazi mbalimbali.
steps_en:
1. Prepare the learning area and place the required materials.
2. Guide children to stand/sit in a circle/"U" shape or semicircle, and you stand in a position where all children can see you well.
3. Welcome the children and introduce the day's activity by reading them a short story about different clothing.
4. Guide the children one by one to name the clothing they are wearing (skirt, shirt, trousers, shorts, socks… etc.).
5. Sing a song that names different types of clothing while showing the clothing and/or pictures of clothing.
6. Distribute pictures showing different types of traditional clothing and guide children to sing the clothing song while showing clothing in pictures and actual clothing.
7. Guide children to identify from pictures and actual clothing the names of garments they know (taking gender into consideration).
8. Guide children to play with a puzzle board containing pictures of clothing.
9. Observe how children identify clothing from pictures and actual clothing. Ensure every child participates fully.

NOTE:
This activity can be facilitated over five different sessions by adding follow-up activities and colouring pictures of different clothing.

subject: Lugha na Mawasiliano: Miaka 3–4 | Kusikiliza katika Mazingira Tofauti
title_sw: Shughuli 1b: Kutambua na kuigiza vitu vinavyotoa sauti/milio
title_en: Activity 1b: Identifying and imitating things that make sounds/noises
about_sw: Kusikiliza, kutofautisha sauti mbalimbali, kuonesha hisia, kujenga msamiati
about_en: Listening, distinguishing different sounds, expressing feelings, building vocabulary
materials_sw: Sauti za wanyama zilizorekodiwa, sauti za watu na ndege zilizorekodiwa
materials_en: Recorded animal sounds, recorded sounds of people and birds
steps_sw:
1. Andaa mazingira tulivu yenye kuvuta usikivu.
2. Waelekeze watoto kukaa katika nusu duara kwenye zulia/mkeka kulingana na idadi.
3. Wajengee utayari wa kusikiliza sauti mbalimbali, na wataarifu kuwa utawauliza maswali baada ya kusikiliza.
4. Waulize watoto waigize sauti za Wanyama wanazozifahamu.
5. Wape watoto muda wa dakika kumi wakusikiliza sauti mbalimbali.
6. Waulize watoto sauti waliyoipenda zaidi na kuiigiza.
7. Fuatilia ushiriki wa kila mtoto, na kutoa msaada pale inapowezekana.
8. Chunguza namna watoto wanavyoitikia baada ya kusikiliza sauti mbalimbali za wanyama.

Tanbihi: Shughuli hii itawezeshwa kwa vipindi 2 katika muda tofauti kwa kutumia mbinu tofauti.
steps_en:
1. Prepare a calm environment that attracts attention/listening.
2. Direct the children to sit in a semicircle on a mat/rug according to their number.
3. Build their readiness to listen to various sounds, and inform them that you will ask them questions after listening.
4. Ask the children to imitate the sounds of animals they know.
5. Give the children ten minutes to listen to various sounds.
6. Ask the children which sound they liked most and to imitate it.
7. Monitor each child's participation and offer assistance where possible.
8. Observe how the children respond after listening to various animal sounds.

Note: This activity can be done in 2 sessions at different times using different techniques.

subject: Lugha na Mawasiliano: Miaka 3–4 | Kusikiliza katika Mazingira Tofauti
title_sw: Shughuli 2a: Kusikiliza mazungumzo
title_en: Activity 2a: Listening to conversations
about_sw: Kusikiliza, kuona mpangilio wa mazungumzo (mmoja akizungumza, mwingine akisikiliza), kukuza lugha uwezo wa kujibu maswali mafupi, uuweka umakini kwa mzungumzaji
about_en: Listening, understanding the structure of a conversation (one speaks, the other listens), developing language ability to answer short questions, maintaining attention on the speaker
materials_sw: Kadi za picha zinazoonyesha maeneo yenye watu na vitu vingi (mfano: sokoni, msikitini, kanisani), mazungumzo mafupi ya kurekodiwa, vitu halisi vya kuelezea (mfano: mpira, kikombe, kitabu), viti kwa ajili ya kukaa mduara
materials_en: Picture cards showing places with many people and things (e.g. market, mosque, church), short recorded conversations, real objects for description (e.g. ball, cup, book), chairs for sitting in a circle
steps_sw:
1. Waelekeze watoto wakae katika vikundi.
2. Wape kadi zinazoonesha maeneo tofauti yenye watu na vitu vingi.
3. Wape muda wa dakika tano kushirikishana wanaona nini katika kadi hizo na kujadiliana.
4. Chagua watoto kutoka kikundi kimoja wawashirikishe wenzao kwa kuelezea walichona kwenye kadi. Wakati wengine wanawasikiliza.
5. Wape watoto wengine nafasi ya kuelezea walichosikiliza.
6. Waulize watoto maswali rahisi kuhusiana na mazungumzo waliyosikiliza.

Tanbihi:
1. Endapo una mtoto mwenye uoni hafifu hakikisha unatengeneza kadi zenye picha kubwa na kumuonesha kadi hizo kwa karibu.
2. Shughuli hii itawezeshwa kwa vipindi 2 kwa namna tofauti.
steps_en:
1. Direct the children to sit in groups.
2. Give them cards showing different places with many people and things.
3. Give them five minutes to share what they see in those cards and discuss.
4. Choose children from one group to share with their peers by describing what they saw on the card, while others listen.
5. Give other children a chance to describe what they heard.
6. Ask the children simple questions about the conversations they listened to.

Note:
1. If you have a child with low vision, make sure you prepare cards with large pictures and show them the cards up close.
2. This activity can be done in 2 sessions in different ways.

subject: Lugha na Mawasiliano: Miaka 3–4 | Kusikiliza katika Mazingira Tofauti
title_sw: Shughuli 2b: Kusikiliza mazungumzo
title_en: Activity 2b: Listening to conversations
about_sw: Kusikiliza kwa ufahamu, Kupata stadi za kuzungumza, Kuongeza msamiati kupitia kusikia maneno mapya, Uwezo wa kujibu maswali mafupi
about_en: Listening with comprehension, acquiring speaking skills, building vocabulary through hearing new words, ability to answer short questions
materials_sw: Kadi za picha zinazoonyesha maeneo yenye watu na vitu vingi (mfano: sokoni, msikitini, kanisani), Mazungumzo mafupi ya kurekodiwa
materials_en: Picture cards showing places with many people and things (e.g. market, mosque, church), short recorded conversations
steps_sw:
1. Andaa mazingira tulivu ya kuwawezesha watoto kuwa na usikivu mzuri.
2. Waelekeze watoto wakae katika umbo la 'U' na kusikiliza kwa makini mazungumzo katika vikundi.
3. Waambie watakwenda kusikiliza mazungumzo yaliyorekodiwa.
4. Wasikilizishe mazungumzo yaliyorekodiwa kwa muda wa dakika 10.
5. Wape watoto wengine nafasi ya kuelezea walichosikiliza.
6. Waulize watoto maswali rahisi kuhusiana na mazungumzo waliyosikiliza.

Tanbihi:
1. Kwa mtoto mwenye changamoto ya usikivu mweke karibu na redio au kuongeza sauti.
2. Shughuli hii inaweza kuwezeshwa kwa vipindi viwili kwa namna tofauti kwa kusikiliza mazungumzo ya kawaida au runinga.
steps_en:
1. Prepare a calm environment to enable children to listen well.
2. Direct the children to sit in a 'U' shape and listen carefully to conversations in groups.
3. Tell them they will listen to recorded conversations.
4. Play the recorded conversations for 10 minutes.
5. Give other children a chance to describe what they heard.
6. Ask the children simple questions about the conversations they listened to.

Note:
1. For a child with a hearing challenge, seat them close to the radio or increase the volume.
2. This activity can be done in two sessions in different ways by listening to everyday conversations or television.

subject: Lugha na Mawasiliano: Miaka 3–4 | Kusikiliza katika Mazingira Tofauti
title_sw: Shughuli 5: Kufuatisha maneno rahisi
title_en: Activity 5: Following simple words
about_sw: Kufuata maagizo mafupi, kukuza lugha.
about_en: Following short instructions, developing language.
materials_sw: Kadi za picha za vitu (mpira, kikombe, kiti, gari), vitu halisi vya darasani na kadi za vitendo (ruka, simama, kaa)
materials_en: Picture cards of objects (ball, cup, chair, car), real classroom objects and action cards (jump, stand, sit)
steps_sw:
1. Andaa kadi zenye picha za vitendo rahisi kulingana na idadi ya watoto.
2. Andaa mazingira wezeshi (ndani au nje ya darasa).
3. Waelekeze Watoto kukaa katika vikundi.
4. Gawa kadi zisipopungua tano katika kila kikundi.
5. Waelekeze kucheza mchezo wa kuokota kadi na kutaja jina la picha ya kadi uliyookota. Kisha, Watoto wengine katika kikundi wanarudia.
6. Warejeshe watoto wote kurudi na kukaa katika mkao wa U.
7. Waulize watoto wakutajia majina ya picha wanazozikumbuka.
8. Hakikisha kila mtoto ameshiriki.
9. Wapongeze watoto kwa ushiriki wao.

Tanbihi:
1. Hakikisha unazungukia kwenye vikundi na kusaidia watoto wanaohitaji msaada wa ziada.
2. Shughuli hii itawezeshwa kw vipindi 3 katika muda tofauti kwa kutumia zana pendekezwa
steps_en:
1. Prepare cards with pictures of simple actions according to the number of children.
2. Prepare an enabling environment (inside or outside the classroom).
