3. Direct children to sit in groups.
4. Distribute no fewer than five cards in each group.
5. Direct them to play the game of picking up a card and naming the picture on the card picked. Then other children in the group repeat.
6. Return all children to sit in a U-formation.
7. Ask children to tell you the names of the pictures they remember.
8. Make sure every child has participated.
9. Praise children for their participation.

Note:
1. Make sure you circulate among the groups and assist children who need extra help.
2. This activity will be implemented in 3 sessions at different times using the recommended materials.

subject: Lugha na Mawasiliano: Miaka 3–4 | Kusikiliza katika Mazingira Tofauti
title_sw: Shughuli 6: Kusikiliza maelekezo / maagizo
title_en: Activity 6: Listening to directions / instructions
about_sw: Kufuata maelekezo mafupi, kukuza msamiati umakini na kusikiliza kwa makini, uwezo wa kuchakata taarifa haraka, uratibu wa mwili
about_en: Following short directions, developing attentive listening vocabulary, ability to process information quickly, body coordination.
materials_sw: Kadi za vitendo (simama, kaa, kimbia, ruka), vifaa halisi (mpira, kiti, kikapu, kadi za rangi)
materials_en: Action cards (stand, sit, run, jump), real objects (ball, chair, basket, colour cards)
steps_sw:
1. Andaa kadi zinazoonesha maneno au maagizo rahisi (mf simama, kaa).
2. Ongoza watoto wakae kwenye umbo la U, nusu duara, duara au wowote unaofaa.
3. Waulize watoto kama wamewahi kusikiliza maelekezo/maagizo (mfano kaa chini).
4. Toa maagizo mafupi kama: "Simama", "Gusa mpira", "Kaa chini".
5. Watoto wafuate maagizo hayo mmoja mmoja.
6. Ongeza ugumu kidogo: maagizo mawili mfululizo (mfano: "Chukua mpira uweke kwenye kikapu").
7. Fanya mchezo wa "Fuata amri ya mlezi" ambapo watoto hufanya kitendo kilichotajwa haraka.
8. Rudia maagizo kwa njia ya wimbo au mchezo wa kushindana kwa upole.
9. Wapongeze watoto kwa ushiriki wao.
10. Chunguza kama mtoto anaweza kufuata maagizo.

Tanbihi:
1. Kwa watoto watakaonesha changamoto ya kufuata maelekezo ni vizuri kuwafuatilia kwa karibu kwa shughuli zinazofuata.
2. Shughuli hii itawezeshwa kwa vipindi 2 katika muda tofauti kwa kutumia mbinu tofauti
steps_en:
1. Prepare cards showing simple words or instructions (e.g. stand, sit).
2. Guide children to sit in a U-shape, semi-circle, circle or any suitable formation.
3. Ask children if they have ever listened to directions/instructions (e.g. sit down).
4. Give short instructions such as: 'Stand up', 'Touch the ball', 'Sit down'.
5. Children follow those instructions one by one.
6. Add a little difficulty: two consecutive instructions (e.g. 'Pick up the ball and put it in the basket').
7. Play the game 'Follow the caregiver's command' where children perform the stated action quickly.
8. Repeat instructions through a song or gentle competition game.
9. Praise children for their participation.
10. Check whether a child can follow instructions.

Note:
1. For children who show difficulty following directions, it is good to monitor them closely in subsequent activities.
2. This activity will be implemented in 2 sessions at different times using different techniques.

subject: Lugha na Mawasiliano: Miaka 3–4 | Kuzungumza katika Mazingira Tofauti
title_sw: Shughuli 1: Kuimba Nyimbo Mbalimbali
title_en: Activity 1: Singing Various Songs
about_sw: Kukuza kumbukumbu uelewa wa lugha ya picha, na kukuza msamiati changamano (mfano: majaribio, nidhamu).
about_en: Developing memory and understanding of picture language, and developing complex vocabulary (e.g. experiments, discipline).
materials_sw: Kadi za picha zinazoendana na nyimbo zitakazoimbwa, vifaa vya TEHAMA vilivyorekodiwa nyimbo orodha ya nyimbo zilizorekodiwa, ngoma, filimbi, manyanga, gitaa, kinanda, mavazi ya asili, vikaragosi, picha zinazohusiana na nyimbo, midoli inayohusiana na nyimbo, marimba, na vifaa vingine vya muziki.
materials_en: Picture cards matching the songs to be sung, ICT equipment with recorded songs, a list of recorded songs, drum, whistle, rattles, guitar, keyboard, traditional attire, puppets, pictures related to the songs, dolls related to the songs, xylophone, and other musical instruments.
steps_sw:
1. Andaa zana stahiki zitakazotumika pamoja na wimbo.
2. Imba wimbo, huku watoto wakikusikiliza.
3. Anza kuimba, imba mstari mmoja baada ya mwingine na watoto warudie baada yako.
4. Waelekeze watoto waimbe wenyewe kisha waulize maswali ya ufahamu.
5. Wapongeze watoto ipasavyo pia waulize watoto wataje wahusika na kuelezea ujumbe wa wimbo waliouisikiliza/walioimba.
6. Chunguza kama mtoto anashiriki kuimba na kujibu maswali ya ufahamu.

Wimbo: hii ni sauti ya nini?
Moooo, mooo. Hii ni sauti ya nini, sauti ya ng'ombe. Ng'ombe ng'ombe ni rafiki yetu anatupa maziwa Meee, meee.. Hii ni sauti ya nini, sauti ya mbuzi, Mbuzi mbuzi ni rafiki yetu anatupa nyama Kokokooo koo, Hii ni sauti ya nini, sauti ya kuku, Kuku kuku ni rafiki yetu anatupa mayai Beee beee, Hii ni sauti ya nini, sauti ya kondoo Kondoo kondoo, ni rafiki yetu anatupa nyama.

Tanbihi:
1. Shughuli hii itawezeshwa kwa vipindi 4 katika muda tofauti kwa kutumia zana/ vifaa stahiki
steps_en:
1. Prepare the appropriate materials to be used together with the song.
2. Sing the song while children listen.
3. Begin singing, sing one line after another and children repeat after you.
4. Direct children to sing on their own then ask comprehension questions.
5. Praise children appropriately and also ask children to name the characters and explain the message of the song they listened to/sang.
6. Check whether the child participates in singing and answers comprehension questions.

Song: What sound is this?
Moooo, mooo. What sound is this, it is the sound of a cow. The cow is our friend and gives us milk. Meee, meee… What sound is this, it is the sound of a goat. The goat is our friend and gives us meat. Kokokooo koo, What sound is this, it is the sound of a chicken. The chicken is our friend and gives us eggs. Beee beee, What sound is this, it is the sound of a sheep. The sheep is our friend and gives us meat.

Note:
1. This activity will be implemented in 4 sessions at different times using appropriate materials/equipment.

subject: Lugha na Mawasiliano: Miaka 3–4 | Kuzungumza katika Mazingira Tofauti
title_sw: Shughuli 2: Kusimulia Hadithi
title_en: Activity 2: Telling a Story
about_sw: Kukuza ujuzi wa kusimulia matukio kwa mtiririko sahihi (mwanzo, kati, mwisho), kukuza ubunifu, na kutumia maneno ya kuunganisha (halafu, kwa hiyo, lakini).
about_en: To develop the skill of narrating events in the correct sequence (beginning, middle, end), foster creativity, and use connecting words (then, therefore, but).
materials_sw: Kitabu cha hadithi chenye picha za kina na maelezo kidogo, wanasesere wa vidole, vinyago au masanduku ya uigizaji.
materials_en: A storybook with detailed pictures and brief descriptions, finger puppets, toys or role-play boxes.
steps_sw:
1. Andaa hadithi fupi pamoja na zana stahiki kulingana na hadithi uliyoiandaa.
2. Simulia hadithi fupi kwa maneno machache kisha Waulize watoto wachache kusimulia tena hadithi hiyo. Waongoze kutumia maneno ya mpangilio kama 'Kwanza', 'Pili', 'Mwisho'.
3. Uliza maswali kuhusu nia ya mhusika, mfano: 'Kwa nini simba aliogopa, halafu akaanza kulia?'.
4. Mpe nafasi mtoto yeyote katika darasa asimulie hadithi.
5. Watoto wengine wasikilize hadithi inayosimuliwa na mwenzao.
6. Kwa watoto ambao watakuwa wanaishiwa maneno wakati wa kusimulia, wahamasishe kwa kuwauliza maswali ya kuwaongoza ili wamalizie hadithi yao.
7. Hakikisha idadi kubwa ya watoto wameshiriki.
8. Chunguza kama Watoto wanaweza kusimulia hadithi na kupanga matukio kulingana na hadithi.

Tanbihi:
1. Katika usimuliaji wa hadithi, toa upendeleo kwa watoto wasiopenda kuongea au waoga na wapongeze wanapojaribu.
2. Shughuli hii itawezeshwa kwa vipindi 3 kwa namna tofauti tofauti.
steps_en:
1. Prepare a short story along with appropriate materials related to the story you have selected.
2. Narrate the short story briefly, then ask a few children to retell the story. Guide them to use sequencing words like 'First', 'Second', 'Finally'.
3. Ask questions about the character's motivation, e.g.: 'Why was the lion afraid and then started to cry?'.
4. Give every child in the class an opportunity to tell the story.
5. Other children listen to the story being told by their peer.
6. For children who run out of words while narrating, encourage them by asking guiding questions to help them finish their story.
7. Ensure a large number of children have participated.
8. Assess whether children can narrate a story and sequence events according to the story.

Note:
1. During storytelling, give preference to children who are shy or reluctant to speak, and praise them when they try.
2. This activity will be carried out over 3 sessions in different ways.

subject: Lugha na Mawasiliano: Miaka 3–4 | Kuzungumza katika Mazingira Tofauti
title_sw: Shughuli 3: Kueleza Shughuli za Kila Siku
title_en: Activity 3: Describing Daily Activities
about_sw: Kujenga stadi za lugha na mawasiliano, kujiamini na kujenga ufikiri wa kimantiki.
about_en: To build language and communication skills, self-confidence, and logical thinking.
materials_sw: Kadi zenye picha za matukio yanayoweza kufanyika kila siku, chati ya picha, vitu halisi.
materials_en: Cards with pictures of events that can happen daily, a picture chart, real objects.
steps_sw:
1. Andaa vifaa na zana zinazoonesha shughuli za kila siku. Kadi na vitu halisi vinavyoonesha shughuli/utaratibu wa siku.
2. Kuimba wimbo rahisi kuhusu utaratibu wa asubuhi.
3. Waelekeze watoto kukaa katika vikundi kulingana na idadi yao.
4. Gawa kadi za picha katika vikundi na waelekeze Watoto wapange kadi hizo kwa mtiririko sahihi wa shughuli zinazofanyika kila siku.
5. Waelekeze waelezee kulingana na walivypanga kadi zao.
6. Toa msaada pale inapohitajika kwa kuwauliza maswali.
7. Chunguza Maneno ya msingi yanayojirudiarudia wakati wa kuelezea picha hizo.
8. Chunguza kama mtoto anaweza kueleza matukio anayoyafanya kila siku.

Tanbihi:
1. Hakikisha watoto wote wameshiriki kwa wale wenye aibu unapaswa kuwahimiza na kuwapongeza ili wajenge kujiamini.
2. Shughuli hii hii itawezeshwa kwa vipindi 3 katika muda tofauti kwa kutumia zana/vifaa stahiki.
steps_en:
1. Prepare materials and tools that show daily activities. Cards and real objects showing daily activities/routines.
2. Sing a simple song about the morning routine.
3. Guide children to sit in groups according to their number.
4. Distribute picture cards to groups and guide children to arrange the cards in the correct sequence of daily activities.
5. Guide them to explain based on how they arranged their cards.
6. Provide support where needed by asking questions.
7. Observe key words that are repeated while describing the pictures.
8. Assess whether the child can describe activities they do every day.

Note:
1. Ensure all children have participated; those who are shy should be encouraged and praised to build their confidence.
2. This activity will be carried out over 3 sessions at different times using appropriate tools/materials.

subject: Lugha na Mawasiliano: Miaka 3–4 | Kuzungumza katika Mazingira Tofauti
title_sw: Shughuli 4: Kufuatilia na Kujibu Mazungumzo ya Rika
title_en: Activity 4: Following and Responding to Peer Conversations
about_sw: Umakini, kukuza msamiati, kujiamini, hisia na kijamii.
about_en: Attentiveness, vocabulary development, self-confidence, emotional and social skills.
materials_sw: Kadi iliyoandikwa mazungumzo ya watu wawili, mazungumzo yaliyorekodiwa.
materials_en: A card written with a dialogue between two people, recorded conversations.
steps_sw:
1. Rekodi mazungumzo ya watu wawili kwenye kifaa cha TEHAMA.
2. Waambie watoto watasikiliza mazungumzo hayo na kujibu maswali kutokana na mazungumzo hayo.
3. Watoto wakae kwenye mkao rafiki ambao utawasaidia kusikiliza mazungumzo hayo.
4. Wasikilizishe Watoto mazungumzo hayo.
5. Katika jozi watoto waigize mazungumzo waliyoyasikia.
6. Waulize maswali kutokana na mazungumzo waliyoyasikiliza na kuigiza pia.

Tanbihi:
Shughuli hii itawezeshwa kwa vipindi 3 katika muda tofauti kwa kutumia zana/vifaa stahiki.
steps_en:
1. Record a conversation between two people on an ICT device.
2. Tell the children they will listen to the conversation and answer questions based on it.
3. Children should sit in a comfortable position that will help them listen to the conversation.
4. Play the conversation for the children to listen.
5. In pairs, children act out the conversation they heard.
6. Ask questions based on the conversation they listened to and acted out.

Note:
This activity will be carried out over 3 sessions at different times using appropriate tools/materials.

subject: Lugha na Mawasiliano: Miaka 3–4 – Kuandika katika Hatua za Awali
title_sw: Shughuli ya 1: Kuumba maumbo mbalimbali kwa kutumia udongo
title_en: Activity 1: Creating various shapes using clay
about_sw: Ubunifu, kuimarisha misuli midogo, udadisi, umakini, utafiti, uhusiano wa macho na mikono
about_en: Creativity, strengthening small muscles, curiosity, concentration, exploration, hand-eye coordination
materials_sw: Udongo wa mfinyanzi, unga wa ngano, maji na karatasi zilizolowekwa na kufinyangwa, rangi, brashi, jagi na beseni, dofu, maji
materials_en: Potter's clay, wheat flour, water and paper soaked and kneaded, paint, brushes, a jug and basin, dough, water
steps_sw:
1. Andaa mazingira wezeshi kwa ajili ya kufanya shughuli ya kuumba maumbo
2. Waelekeze watoto kukaa katika mikika au maturubali kulingana na mazingira
3. Waulize watoto wataje vitu mbalimbali wanavyovipenda
4. Gawa udongo wa mfinyanzi kwa watoto
5. Wape muda wa kufinyanga udongo
6. Mpe kila mtoto fursa ya kutengeneza kitu chochote anachokipenda
7. Fuatilia kwa karibu na kuwauliza watoto maswali, wametengeneza vitu gani na kwa nini
8. Waagize wakapange vitu walivyotengeneza kwenye eneo uliloliandaa
Tanbihi:
1. Hakikisha watoto wananawa mikono baada ya kumaliza kufinyanga
2. Shughuli hii inaweza kuwezeshwa kwa vipindi viwili kwa kuwapa watoto fursa ya kutengeneza vitu mbalimbali kama vile; namba na herufi
steps_en:
1. Prepare an enabling environment for the shape-making activity
2. Direct children to sit in circles or triangles according to the environment
3. Ask children to name various things they like
4. Distribute potter's clay to the children
5. Give them time to knead the clay
6. Give each child an opportunity to make anything they like
7. Monitor closely and ask children questions about what they have made and why
8. Ask them to arrange the items they made in the area you prepared
Note:
1. Ensure children wash their hands after finishing kneading
2. This activity can be done in two sessions to give children opportunities to make various items such as numbers and letters

subject: Lugha na Mawasiliano: Miaka 3–4 – Kuandika katika Hatua za Awali
title_sw: Shughuli ya 2: Kupaka rangi kwa kutumia rangi za maji
title_en: Activity 2: Painting using watercolours
about_sw: Ubunifu, uhusiano wa macho na mikono, utambuzi wa rangi, kuonesha hisia, kutofautisha
about_en: Creativity, hand-eye coordination, colour recognition, expressing feelings, differentiating
materials_sw: Karatasi, picha za vitu zilizopakwa rangi na ambazo hazijapakwa rangi, rangi mbalimbali, penseli za rangi, chaki za rangi, ubao mgumu au maboksi, picha ambazo hazijapakwa rangi
materials_en: Paper, pictures of coloured and uncoloured objects, various colours, coloured pencils, coloured chalk, a hard board or boxes, uncoloured pictures
steps_sw:
1. Tayarisha eneo la watoto kufanyia kazi na vifaa vitakavyotumiwa kupaka rangi
2. Wakaribishe watoto kwenye mchezo wa kupaka rangi
3. Kaa na watoto katika umbo la U, nusu duara au mduara
4. Waoneshe watoto picha za vitu ambavyo hazijapakwa rangi
5. Waoneshe picha za vitu vilevile ambazo zimepakwa rangi
6. Wapatie watoto picha ambazo hazijapakwa rangi ili waweze kuzipaka rangi
7. Mpatie kila mtoto kipande cha picha ambayo haina rangi na penseli ya rangi
8. Waachie watoto wapake rangi kwa uhuru
9. Wape watoto nafasi ya kuonesha picha walizopaka rangi. Chunguza kama mtoto anaweza kupaka rangi
10. Uliza maswali kwa mfano "Umepaka rangi gani? Kwa nini umepaka rangi hiyo au hizo? Umewahi kuona rangi kama hii wapi?"
Tanbihi:
1. Bainisha kama kuna watoto ambao baadhi ya rangi zinawadhuru na kuwapa msaada stahiki
2. Shughuli hii itawezeshwa kwa vipindi 4 katika muda tofauti kwa kutumia zana/vifaa tajwa hapo juu
steps_en:
1. Prepare the children's work area and the materials to be used for painting
2. Welcome the children to the painting activity
3. Sit with the children in a U-shape, semicircle, or circle
4. Show the children pictures of uncoloured objects
5. Show pictures of the same objects that are coloured
6. Give the children uncoloured pictures so they can colour them
7. Give each child a piece of an uncoloured picture and a coloured pencil
8. Let the children paint freely
9. Give children a chance to show the pictures they have coloured. Check whether the child can apply colour
10. Ask questions such as "What colour did you use? Why did you use that colour or those colours? Where have you seen a colour like this?"
Note:
1. Identify if there are children who are allergic to some colours and give them appropriate support
2. This activity will be done in 4 sessions at different times using the tools/materials mentioned above

subject: Lugha na Mawasiliano: Miaka 3–4 – Kuandika katika Hatua za Awali
title_sw: Shughuli ya 3: Kufuatisha kwa kuunganisha nukta
title_en: Activity 3: Tracing by connecting dots
about_sw: Kuimarisha misuli midogo ya vidole, uhusiano wa macho na mkono, umakini
about_en: Strengthening small finger muscles, hand-eye coordination, concentration
materials_sw: Karatasi zenye herufi za nukta, penseli
materials_en: Papers with dotted letters, pencils
steps_sw:
1. Andaa sehemu salama kwa ajili ya watoto kujifunza kuandika
2. Kaa na watoto kwenye umbo la "U" au duara
3. Wagawie kadi zenye herufi za irabu
4. Waelekeze wasomeane katika jozi
5. Mpatie kila mtoto penseli na karatasi zenye herufi za irabu zilizoandikwa katika mtindo wa nukta
6. Elekeza kila mtoto kufuatisha herufi hizo kwa kuunganisha nukta
7. Uliza mtoto mmoja mmoja amepata herufi gani baada ya kuunganisha nukta
8. Waambie watoto waandike herufi kwa mtiririko
9. Fuatilia watoto wanapokuwa wanaandika herufi hizo
Tanbihi:
1. Bainisha watoto wenye mahitaji maalum ili uweze kuwashirikisha kadiri ya uhitaji wao
2. Shughuli hii itawezeshwa kwa kipindi kimoja ili kukamilisha herufi zote
steps_en:
1. Prepare a safe area for children to learn to write
2. Sit with the children in a "U" shape or circle
3. Distribute cards with vowel letters
4. Direct them to read to each other in pairs
5. Give each child a pencil and papers with vowel letters written in dot format
6. Direct each child to trace those letters by connecting the dots
7. Ask each child individually what letter they got after connecting the dots
8. Tell the children to write the letters in sequence
9. Monitor the children as they write those letters
Note:
1. Identify children with special needs so you can involve them according to their needs
2. This activity will be done in one session to complete all the letters

subject: Lugha na Mawasiliano: Miaka 3–4 | Kuandika katika Hatua za Awali
title_sw: Shughuli ya 4: Kuumba maumbo ya herufi za irabu
title_en: Activity 4: Creating shapes of vowel letters
about_sw: Ubunifu, kuimarisha misuli midogo, udadisi, umakini, utafiti, uhusiano wa macho na mikono
about_en: Creativity, strengthening fine muscles, curiosity, attentiveness, research, eye-hand coordination
materials_sw: Udongo wa mfinyanzi, unga wa ngano, maji na karatasi zilizolowekwa na kufinyangwa, rangi, brashi, jagi, beseni, dofu, maji
materials_en: Clay, wheat flour, water and pre-soaked and kneaded paper, paint, brushes, jug, basin, dough, water
steps_sw:
1. Andaa mazingira wezeshi kwa ajili ya kufanya shughuli ya kuumba herufi.
2. Waelekeze watoto kukaa katika mikeka au maturubali kulingana na mazingira.
3. Gawa kadi za herufi za irabu kwa watoto.
4. Gawa udongo wa mfinyanzi kwa watoto.
5. Waelekeze watoto waumbe maumbo ya herufi za irabu kwa kutumia udongo.
6. Fuatilia kwa karibu na kuwauliza watoto maswali, wameumba maumbo gani ya herufi.
7. Wape nafasi ya kutaja maumbo ya herufi waliyotengeneza.
8. Waagize wakapange maumbo hayo ya herufi kwenye eneo uliloliandaa.
9. Fuatilia kama watoto wanaumba maumbo ya herufi ya herufi za irabu.

Tanbihi:
1. Hakikisha watoto wananawa mikono baada ya kumaliza kufinyanga.
2. Shughuli hii inaweza kuwezeshwa kwa vipindi vitatu ili kuwapa watoto fursa ya kuumba maumbo mengi zaidi ya herufi.
steps_en:
1. Prepare an enabling environment for the letter-shaping activity.
2. Direct children to sit on mats or rugs according to the setting.
3. Distribute vowel letter cards to the children.
4. Distribute clay to the children.
5. Guide children to form the shapes of vowel letters using clay.
6. Follow up closely and ask children questions about which letter shapes they have made.
7. Give them the opportunity to name the letter shapes they have created.
8. Instruct them to arrange those letter shapes in the area you prepared.
9. Monitor whether children are forming the correct shapes of vowel letters.

Note:
1. Ensure children wash their hands after finishing kneading/moulding.
2. This activity can be facilitated over three sessions to give children more opportunity to create more letter shapes.

subject: Lugha na Mawasiliano: Miaka 3–4 | Kuwasiliana katika Mazingira Tofauti
title_sw: Shughuli ya 1: Kusalimiana kwa heshima na mlezi au rika
title_en: Activity 1: Greeting respectfully with a caregiver or peers
about_sw: Nidhamu, ujasiri, mahusiano, lugha, utambuzi wa majira, upendo
about_en: Discipline, confidence, relationships, language, awareness of time/occasion, love
materials_sw: Picha zinazoonesha watu wakisalimiana katika mazingira mbalimbali kama vile: kanisani, msikitini, hospitalini, shuleni, video zinazoonesha watu wakisalimiana katika mazingira mbalimbali kama vile: kanisa, msikiti, hospitali, shule
materials_en: Pictures showing people greeting in various settings such as: church, mosque, hospital, school; videos showing people greeting in various settings such as: church, mosque, hospital, school
steps_sw:
1. Andaa sehemu salama kwa ajili ya watoto kujifunza.
2. Andaa picha mbalimbali zinazoonesha watu wakisalimiana katika mazingira tofauti tofauti.
3. Kaa na watoto kwenye umbo la 'U', nusu duara au mkao unaofaa kujifunza kwa njia ya kucheza.
4. Wagawie watoto picha zinazoonesha watu wakisalimiana katika mazingira tofauti.
5. Wape fursa ya kuelezea wanaona nini kwenye picha hizo.
6. Waongoze watoto kuigiza namna ya kusalimiana kwa kuzingatia rika na utamaduni wao.
7. Waulize maswali ya kudodosa kujua kama huwa wanasalimia watu au hata wao kwa wao.
8. Chunguza kama watoto wanasalimiana kwa kuzingatia rika.

Tanbihi:
1. Toa afua stahiki kwa watoto wenye mahitaji maalumu.
2. Shughuli hii itawezeshwa kwa vipindi 3 katika muda tofauti kwa kutumia zana/vifaa tajwa hapo juu.
steps_en:
1. Prepare a safe space for children to learn.
2. Prepare various pictures showing people greeting in different settings.
3. Sit with the children in a 'U' shape, semi-circle or a suitable arrangement for play-based learning.
4. Distribute to children pictures showing people greeting in different settings.
5. Give them the opportunity to describe what they see in the pictures.
6. Guide children to role-play how to greet, taking into account age and their culture.
7. Ask probing questions to find out whether they usually greet people or even each other.
8. Observe whether children greet each other taking into account age/seniority.

Note:
1. Make appropriate accommodations for children with special needs.
2. This activity will be facilitated in 3 sessions at different times using the materials/tools mentioned above.

subject: Lugha na Mawasiliano: Miaka 3–4 | Kuwasiliana katika Mazingira Tofauti
title_sw: Shughuli ya 2: Kuagana kwa heshima
title_en: Activity 2: Saying farewell respectfully
about_sw: Nidhamu, ujasiri, mahusiano, lugha, upendo
about_en: Discipline, confidence, relationships, language, love
materials_sw: Picha zinazoonesha watu wakiagana, video zinazoonesha watu wakiagana
materials_en: Pictures showing people saying goodbye, videos showing people saying goodbye
steps_sw:
1. Andaa sehemu salama kwa ajili ya watoto kujifunza.
2. Andaa picha mbalimbali zinazoonesha watu wakiagana.
3. Wagawie watoto katika jozi kuchunguza picha hizo.
4. Waulize watoto maswali ili waeleze wanaona nini kwenye picha hizo.
5. Andaa video zinazoonesha watu wakiagana.
6. Waonesha watoto video za watu wakiagana.
7. Fuatilia mwitikio wa watoto wakitazama video hiyo.

Tanbihi:
1. Toa afua stahiki kwa watoto wenye changamoto ya uoni, au usikivu.
2. Shughuli hii itawezeshwa kwa vipindi 3 katika muda tofauti kwa kutumia zana/vifaa stahiki.
steps_en:
1. Prepare a safe space for children to learn.
2. Prepare various pictures showing people saying goodbye.
3. Distribute the children in pairs to examine the pictures.
4. Ask children questions so they can explain what they see in the pictures.
5. Prepare videos showing people saying goodbye.
6. Show children videos of people saying goodbye.
7. Monitor the children's reactions while they watch the video.

Note:
1. Make appropriate accommodations for children with visual or hearing challenges.
2. This activity will be facilitated in 3 sessions at different times using appropriate tools/materials.

subject: Lugha na Mawasiliano: Miaka 3–4 / Kuwasiliana katika Mazingira Tofauti
title_sw: Shughuli ya 3: Kujieleza katika mazingira tofauti
title_en: Activity 3: Expressing oneself in different environments
about_sw: Muda: Dakika 30. Stadi zitakazojengwa: Nidhamu, mahusiano, lugha, kujiamini, upendo, hisia.
about_en: Duration: 30 minutes. Skills to be developed: Discipline, relationships, language, self-confidence, love, emotions.
materials_sw: Kadi zinazoonesha picha mbalimbali zinazoonesha maeneo tofauti kama vile: hospitali, shuleni, msikitini, kanisani, uwanja wa mpira wa miguu wenye wachezaji na watazamaji
materials_en: Cards showing various pictures depicting different settings such as: a hospital, school, mosque, church, football field with players and spectators
steps_sw:
1. Kaa na watoto kwenye umbo la "U", nusu duara au mkao unaofaa kwa kuwaandaa kuwa tayari kujifunza.
2. Weka kadi za picha kwenye meza au mkeka, kisha waulize wanaona nini katika picha hizo.
3. Watoto wakae katika makundi kulingana na idadi ya picha ulizoandaa.
4. Wape nafasi ya kujadili picha hizo katika makundi yao.
5. Pitia katika makundi kufuatilia ushiriki wa kila mtoto kwa namna wanayoelezea picha hizo kulingana na muktadha.
6. Wape nafasi watoto kushirikishana katika kundi kubwa.
7. Waulize maswali kama walishawahi kutembelea maeneo hayo waliyoyaelezea.
8. Chunguza kama watoto wanashiriki kujieleza katika mazingira tofauti.
Tanbihi:
1. Himiza kila mtoto aweze kushiriki na kutoa afua stahiki.
2. Shughuli hii itawezeshwa kwa vipindi vinne ili kutoa nafasi zaidi ya kila mtoto kujieleza katika muktadha mbalimbali.
steps_en:
1. Sit with the children in a "U" shape, semicircle or appropriate arrangement to prepare them for learning.
2. Place picture cards on the table or mat, then ask them what they see in the pictures.
3. Children sit in groups according to the number of pictures you have prepared.
4. Give them the opportunity to discuss the pictures in their groups.
5. Go around the groups to follow each child's participation in the way they describe the pictures according to context.
6. Give children the opportunity to share in the large group.
7. Ask questions about whether they have ever visited the places they described.
8. Check whether children are participating in expressing themselves in different environments.
Note:
1. Encourage every child to participate and contribute appropriately.
2. This activity will be carried out over four sessions to give each child more opportunity to express themselves in various contexts.

subject: Lugha na Mawasiliano: Miaka 3–4 / Kuwasiliana katika Mazingira Tofauti
title_sw: Shughuli ya 4: Kuwasiliana kwa kutumia mchezo wa simu
title_en: Activity 4: Communicating using a telephone game
about_sw: Muda: Dakika 30. Stadi zitakazojengwa: Nidhamu, usikivu, kujiamini, mahusiano, lugha, upendo, hisia.
about_en: Duration: 30 minutes. Skills to be developed: Discipline, listening, self-confidence, relationships, language, love, emotions.
materials_sw: Kadi zenye picha za watu wakipashana habari
materials_en: Cards with pictures of people sharing news
steps_sw:
1. Andaa sehemu salama kwa ajili ya watoto kujifunza.
2. Andaa kadi picha mbalimbali zinazoonesha watu wakipashana habari.
3. Waambie watoto kuwa leo watajifunza somo zuri la kupashana habari.
4. Kaa na watoto kwenye umbo la "U", nusu duara au mkao unaofaa kujifunza kwa njia ya kucheza.
5. Waombe watoto wakae kwenye duara. Waeleze kwamba, "Ni yule tu utakayemgusa ndiye anayeruhusiwa kuzungumza. Wengine wote tunasikiliza."
6. Anza kwa kuelezea habari fupi sana. Mfano: "Leo nilikula uji mtamu sana. Ulikuwa wa moto!"
7. Mwongoze mtoto mmoja kutoe habari fupi huku wengine wakisikiliza kwa makini. Baada ya mtoto kumaliza, sifu jitihada yake (mfano: "Nzuri sana ulisema ulipanda baiskeli!").
8. Uliza watoto kuhusu habari waliyosimuliwa.
9. Chunguza kama watoto wameweza kupashana habari na kusikilizana.
Tanbihi:
1. Bainisha watoto wenye mahitaji maalum ili uweze kuwashirikisha kadiri ya uhitaji wao.
2. Shughuli hii itawezeshwa kwa vipindi 4 katika muda tofauti kwa kutumia zana/vifaa stahiki.
steps_en:
1. Prepare a safe area for children to learn.
2. Prepare various picture cards showing people sharing news.
3. Tell children that today they will learn a great lesson about sharing news.
4. Sit with children in a "U" shape, semicircle or appropriate arrangement for learning through play.
5. Ask children to sit in a circle. Explain that, "Only the person you touch is allowed to speak. All others, we listen."
6. Start by sharing very short news. Example: "Today I ate very sweet porridge. It was hot!"
7. Guide one child to share brief news while others listen carefully. After the child finishes, praise their effort (e.g., "Very good, you said you rode a bicycle!").
8. Ask children about the news they were told.
9. Check whether children have been able to share news and listen to each other.
Note:
1. Identify children with special needs so you can include them according to their needs.
2. This activity will be carried out over 4 sessions at different times using appropriate tools/materials.

subject: Lugha na Mawasiliano: Miaka 3–4 / Kuwasiliana katika Mazingira Tofauti
title_sw: Shughuli ya 5: Kutoa maoni binafsi
title_en: Activity 5: Giving personal opinions
about_sw: Muda: Dakika 30. Stadi zitakazojengwa: Nidhamu, utambuzi, uchaguzi, usikivu, kujiamini, mahusiano, lugha, upendo, hisia.
about_en: Duration: 30 minutes. Skills to be developed: Discipline, recognition, choice-making, listening, self-confidence, relationships, language, love, emotions.
materials_sw: Picha mbalimbali, kadi za rangi tofaotofauti, vitu halisi
materials_en: Various pictures, cards of different colours, real objects
steps_sw:
1. Andaa sehemu salama kwa ajili ya watoto kujifunza.
2. Watoto wakae katika jozi.
3. Waambie watoto utawapatia kadi/picha wanapaswa kuzichunguza na kujadiliana kuhusu hizo kadi kwa kusema wanapenda nini na hawapendi nini.
4. Waelekeze watoto wakae katika jozi, kisha wagawie kadi za picha.
5. Toa nafasi mtoto mmoja mmoja kueleza anapenda nini au hapendi nini katika picha.
6. Uliza maswali ya udadisi na kumchochea mtoto kuongea zaidi.
Tanbihi:
1. Bainisha watoto wenye mahitaji maalum ili uweze kuwashirikisha kadiri ya uhitaji wao.
2. Shughuli hii itawezeshwa kwa vipindi 4 katika muda tofauti kwa kutumia mbinu mbalimbali na zana/vifaa stahiki.
steps_en:
1. Prepare a safe area for children to learn.
2. Children sit in pairs.
3. Tell children that you will give them cards/pictures which they should examine and discuss, saying what they like and do not like.
4. Direct children to sit in pairs, then distribute picture cards.
5. Give each child the opportunity to explain what they like or do not like in the picture.
6. Ask curious questions and encourage the child to speak more.
Note:
1. Identify children with special needs so you can include them according to their needs.
2. This activity will be carried out over 4 sessions at different times using various methods and appropriate tools/materials.

subject: Lugha na Mawasiliano: Miaka 3–4 / Kuwasiliana katika Mazingira Tofauti
title_sw: Shughuli ya 6: Kufuata kanuni za mawasiliano
title_en: Activity 6: Following communication rules
about_sw: Stadi zitakazojengwa: Uvumilivu, kutawala hisia, umakini.
about_en: Skills to be developed: Patience, emotional self-regulation, attentiveness.
materials_sw: Viti, mikeka na meza.
materials_en: Chairs, mats and a table.
steps_sw:
1. Andaa igizo dhima katika mazingira ya darasani wahusika wakiwa watoto watatu na wewe mwenyewe (mlezi).
2. Waelekeze watoto kukaa katika mkao wa kutazama igizodhima.
3. Waelezee kuwa watakwenda kutazama igizodhima.
4. Wakaribishe watoto uliowaandaa kwa ajili ya igizodhima waweze kuwasilisha.
[Igizo]: Mtoto wa 1: mimi nataka kuongea! Mtoto wa 2: Hapana mimi kwanza! Mtoto wa 3: Sikilizeni mimi! Mlezi: Watoto wangu, tusimame kidogo. Tukiongea tunafuata kanuni za mawasiliano. Watoto: Kanuni gani mwalimu. Mlezi: • Sikiliza rafiki yako amalize kuongea kwanza • Subiri zamu yako • Ongea kwa sauti ya kusikika na yenye upendo. Watoto: Tutafuata kanuni za mawasiliano. Mlezi: Vizuri sana.
5. Waulize watoto wengine maswali kutokana na igizodhima. Mfano umejifunza nini katika igizo hilo?
6. Jumuisha kwa kuwaeleza kuwa, tukipeana zamu katika kuzungumza tutasikilizana vizuri zaidi.
Tanbihi: 1. Bainisha watoto wenye mahitaji maalumu ili uweze kuwashirikisha kadiri ya uhitaji wao. 2. Shughuli hii itawezeshwa kwa vipindi 3 kwa kutumia mbinu tofauti ili watoto waweze kujenga tabia ya kusubiriana au kupeana zamu wakati wa kuongea.
steps_en:
1. Prepare a role-play set in a classroom context with three child characters and yourself (the caregiver).
2. Direct the children to sit in a position to watch the role-play.
3. Explain to them that they will watch a role-play.
4. Invite the children you prepared for the role-play to come and communicate.
[Role-play]: Child 1: I want to speak! Child 2: No, me first! Child 3: Listen to me! Caregiver: My children, let us pause for a moment. When we speak we follow communication rules. Children: What rules, teacher? Caregiver: • Listen to your friend until they finish speaking first • Wait your turn • Speak in an audible and kind voice. Children: We will follow the communication rules. Caregiver: Very good.
5. Ask the other children questions based on the role-play. For example: what did you learn from that role-play?
6. Conclude by explaining that when we take turns during conversation we will listen to each other better.
Note: 1. Identify children with special needs so you can include them to the extent required. 2. This activity can be done in 3 sessions at different times using different techniques so that children can build habits of waiting or taking turns when speaking.

subject: Kuhusiana: Miaka 3–4 / Kujenga Uhusiano wa Msingi na Watu Wengine
title_sw: Shughuli 1a: Kujitambulisha kwa kutaja majina
title_en: Activity 1a: Introducing oneself by stating names
about_sw: Stadi zitakazojengwa: Kujieleza, kujiamini, stadi za awali za lugha, stadi za kijamii.
about_en: Skills to be developed: Self-expression, self-confidence, early language skills, social skills.
materials_sw: Kadi zenye majina matatu ya kila mtoto.
materials_en: Cards containing three names of each child.
steps_sw:
1. Andika majina matatu ya kila mtoto kwa kutumia muundo unaokidhi mahitaji ya kila mtoto katika kadi kubwa za rangi. Mfano: Kadi zenye maandishi ya kuonekana vizuri kwa mtoto mwenye uoni hafifu.
2. Wakaribishe watoto wakae kwenye umbo la U/ nusu duara/ duara au mkao mwingine kulingana na mazingira.
3. Waulize wataje majina yao kama wanavyoyafahamu.
4. Mpatie kila mtoto kadi yenye majina yake (mfano: Maria Gabriel).
5. Waambie watoto kuwa tunaenda kucheza mchezo wa majina.
6. Waoneshe mfano wa kunyanyua kadi na kutaja majina yako.
7. Kila mtoto atanyanyua kadi na kutaja majina yake kisha atampa nafasi mwenzake anayemfuatia.
8. Karibisha mtoto mmoja aoneshe kadi na ataje majina yake.
9. Sikiliza kama mtoto anaweza kutaja majina yake.
10. Endelea hivyo hadi kila mtoto apate nafasi ya kujitambulisha.
11. Chunguza kama kila mtoto anaweza kutaja jina lake.
TANBIHI: 1. Shughuli hii itawezeshwa kwa vipindi 3 kwa wakati tofauti kwa kutumia mbinu mbalimbali.
steps_en:
1. Write three names of each child using a format that meets each child's needs on large coloured cards. Example: Cards with large writing for a child with low vision.
2. Invite the children to sit in a U-shape / semicircle / circle or another arrangement according to the setting.
3. Ask them to say their names as they know them.
4. Give each child a card with their names (example: Maria Gabriel).
5. Tell the children that we are going to play a names game.
6. Show them an example by lifting your card and stating your names.
7. Each child will lift their card and state their names then pass the turn to the next child.
8. Invite one child to show their card and state their names.
9. Listen to check whether the child can state their names.
10. Continue until every child has had a chance to introduce themselves.
11. Check whether every child can say their own name.
NOTE: 1. This activity can be done in 3 sessions at different times using various techniques.

subject: Kujenga Uhusiano wa Msingi na Watu Wengine – Kuhusiana: Miaka 3–4
title_sw: Shughuli 1b: Kujitambulisha kwa kutaja majina yake
title_en: Activity 1b: Introducing oneself by stating one's names
about_sw: Kujieleza, kujiamini, stadi za awali za lugha, stadi za kijamii, uratibu wa mwendo, kukuza misuli mikubwa na midogo, uratibu wa macho na mikono, umakini
about_en: Self-expression, self-confidence, early language skills, social skills, movement coordination, development of large and small muscles, eye-hand coordination, attentiveness
materials_sw: Mpira
materials_en: Ball
steps_sw:
1. Andaa mpira au kifaa rahisi na salama kwa watoto kudaka na kurusha.
2. Andaa sehemu ya nje au ndani ya kuchezea mchezo.
3. Wakaribishe Watoto wakae kwenye umbo la U/ nusu duara/ Duara au mkao mwingine kulingana na mazingira.
4. Waambie watoto leo tutaimba wimbo wa jieleze. Jieleze jieleze jieleze jieleze, jieleze jieleze najieleza mama x2 Mimi hapa ni Melisa, mama yangu ni Maria, baba yangu ni Mario nimeshajieleza mama.
5. Anza kwa kuimba wimbo wa jieleze hatua kwa hatua huku watoto wakirudia.
6. Toa mfano kwa kushika mpira kisha kujieleza na rusha mpira kwa mtoto mwingine.
7. Mtoto akidaka mpira aaje Katikati ya duara au mbele ya nusu duara huku akiimba wimbo na wenzake kuitikia na baada ya kujieleza na kutaja majina yake arushe mpira kwa mwenzake.
8. Endelea hivyo hadi kila mtoto apate nafasi ya kujieleza.
9. Chunguza kama mtoto anaweza kutaja majina yake.
10. Waruhusu watoto kuendelea mchezo na baada ya kumaliza kurudisha mpira unapokaa.
TANBIHI:
1. Kama kuna mtoto asiyeona, mpatie mpira mkononi na muongoze pa kurusha mpira baada yake.
2. Shughuli hii itawezeshwa kwa vipindi 3 kwa wakati tofauti kwa kutumia mbinu tofauti.
steps_en:
1. Prepare a ball or a simple, safe object for children to catch and throw.
2. Prepare an outdoor or indoor play area.
3. Welcome the children to sit in a U-shape / semicircle / circle or another arrangement depending on the environment.
4. Tell the children today we will sing a self-introduction song. 'Jieleze jieleze jieleze jieleze, jieleze jieleze najieleza mama x2 Mimi hapa ni Melisa, mama yangu ni Maria, baba yangu ni Mario nimeshajieleza mama.'
5. Begin singing the self-introduction song step by step while the children repeat.
6. Demonstrate by holding the ball, then introducing yourself and throwing the ball to another child.
7. When a child catches the ball, they come to the centre of the circle or in front of the semicircle, sing the song with peers responding, and after introducing themselves and stating their names, throw the ball to another child.
8. Continue until every child has had a chance to introduce themselves.
9. Check whether the child can state their names.
10. Allow children to continue the game and afterwards return the ball to its place.
NOTE:
1. If there is a child with visual impairment, place the ball in their hand and guide them to throw it afterwards.
2. This activity will be repeated in 3 sessions at different times using different methods.

subject: Kujenga Uhusiano wa Msingi na Watu Wengine – Kuhusiana: Miaka 3–4
title_sw: Shughuli 2: Kutaja jinsi yake
title_en: Activity 2: Stating one's gender
about_sw: Utambuzi wa jinsi, kujieleza, kujiamini, stadi za awali za lugha
about_en: Gender awareness, self-expression, self-confidence, early language skills
materials_sw: Kadi zenye picha mbalimbali za mavazi ya kike na kiume, kadi mbili kubwa zinazoonesha mtoto wa kike na wakiume.
materials_en: Cards with various pictures of female and male clothing; two large cards showing a girl and a boy.
steps_sw:
1. Andaa kadi zenye picha za mavazi ya mtoto wa kike na mtoto wa kiume. Kadi ziwe kuonekana na zenye ukubwa mzuri.
2. Wakaribishe Watoto wakae kwenye umbo la U/ nusu duara/duara. au mkao mwingine kulingana na mazingira.
3. Bandika picha kubwa mbili ukutani au ziweke chini mbele ya watoto wote wazione.
4. Sambaza picha zenye mavazi tofauti kwenye mkeka.
5. Waoneshe mfano kwa kuangalia picha ya mavazi ichague waoneshe watoto picha uliyoichagua kisha kaiweke kwenye picha kubwa kama ni vazi la kike weka kwenye picha ya mtoto wa kike na kama ni vazi la kiume, weka picha kwenye picha ya mtoto wa kiume.
6. Mkaribishe mtoto mmoja aje achague picha kisha akaoanishe na picha kubwa za jinsi.
7. Chunguza kama mtoto anaweza kuoanisha picha ya vazi na jinsi.
8. Endeleza mchezo huu hadi kila mtoto apate nafasi ya kuchagua picha.
TANBIHI:
1. Kama kuna mtoto mwenye changamoto ya kuona, andaa kadi mguso za jinsi na mavazi na kumsaidia kumwabia kadi aliyoishika ni ya nini.
2. Shughuli hii itawezeshwa kwa vipindi 3 kwa wakati tofauti kwa kutumia mbinu mbalimbali.
steps_en:
1. Prepare cards with pictures of clothing for a girl and a boy. Cards should be visible and of good size.
2. Welcome the children to sit in a U-shape / semicircle / circle or another arrangement depending on the environment.
3. Stick two large pictures on the wall or place them on the floor in front of all children so they can see.
4. Spread cards with different clothing on the mat.
5. Demonstrate by looking at a clothing picture, choose it, show the children the picture you chose, then place it next to the large picture – if it is female clothing place it next to the girl's picture; if male clothing, place it next to the boy's picture.
6. Invite one child to come, choose a picture and match it to the large gender pictures.
7. Check whether the child can match the clothing picture to the correct gender.
8. Continue this game until every child has had a chance to choose a picture.
NOTE:
1. If there is a child with a visual impairment, prepare tactile gender and clothing cards and help them identify what card they are holding.
2. This activity will be repeated in 3 sessions at different times using various methods.

subject: Kujenga Uhusiano wa Msingi na Watu Wengine – Kuhusiana: Miaka 3–4
title_sw: Shughuli 3: Kusalimiana na wenzake
title_en: Activity 3: Greeting peers
about_sw: Stadi za mawasiliano, stadi za utaratibu wa nidhamu, kujiamini
about_en: Communication skills, discipline/orderliness skills, self-confidence
materials_sw: Kadi za picha zikionesha watoto wakisalimiana kwa namna tofauti tofauti
materials_en: Picture cards showing children greeting each other in various ways
steps_sw:
1. Andaa kadi mbalimbali zinazoonesha watoto wakisalimiana ikiwemo kupunga mikono, kugusa kiganja kwa kiganja, kutabasamu.
2. Wakaribishe watoto kukaa kwenye umbo la U/nusu duara/ duara au mkao mwingine kulingana na mazingira.
3. Waoneshe picha ulizonazo za namna tofauti ya kusalimiana.
4. Chagua picha moja na waoneshe mfano kwa kusalimiana na mtoto kama picha inavyoonesha.
5. Wakati wa kusalimiana watumie maneno kama (mambo, poa, hujambo, sijambo).
6. Wakaribishe watoto kwenye jozi, kila jozi ichague picha na kusalimiana kisha wachague picha nyingine.
7. Wakimaliza kusalimiana kwa kutumia picha zote, wabadilishane jozi na kusalimiana na mtoto mwingine.
8. Shughuli imalizike unapoona unafaa kwa kuwaonesha watoto mahali pa kuweka picha zilizotumika.
9. Chunguza kama mtoto anaweza kusalimiana na wenzake.
TANBIHI:
Shughuli hii itawezeshwa kwa vipindi 2 tofauti na kwa kutumia mbinu mbalimbali.
steps_en:
1. Prepare various cards showing children greeting each other, including waving hands, touching palm to palm, and smiling.
2. Welcome the children to sit in a U-shape / semicircle / circle or another arrangement depending on the environment.
3. Show them the pictures you have of different ways of greeting.
4. Choose one picture and demonstrate by greeting a child as shown in the picture.
5. During greetings, use words such as (mambo, poa, hujambo, sijambo).
6. Invite children into pairs; each pair chooses a picture and greets each other, then chooses another picture.
7. When they finish greeting using all the pictures, pairs swap and greet another child.
8. End the activity when appropriate by showing children where to place the used pictures.
9. Check whether the child can greet peers.
NOTE:
This activity will be repeated in 2 different sessions using various methods.

subject: Kuhusiana: Miaka 3 – 4 / Kujenga Uhusiano wa Msingi na Watu wengine
title_sw: Shughuli 4a: Kutambulisha majina ya watu anaoishi nao nyumbani.
title_en: Activity 4a: Introducing the names of people the child lives with at home.
about_sw: Utambuzi wa wazazi ndugu na jamaa, kujiamini, stadi za kijamii, stadi za lugha
about_en: Recognition of parents, relatives and family, self-confidence, social skills, language skills
materials_sw: Kadi za picha zikionesha wazazi, bau na bibi, dada na kaka, shangazi, mjomba
materials_en: Picture cards showing parents, grandfather and grandmother, sister and brother, aunt, uncle
steps_sw:
1. Andaa kadi mbalimbali zinazoonesha wazazi ndugu na jamaa ambao mtoto anaweza kuwa anaishi nao nyumbani
2. Wakaribishe watoto kukaa kwenye umbo la U/nusu duara/ duara au mkao mwingine kulingana na mazingira.
3. Waulize watoto wataje watu wanaoishi nao nyumbani.
4. Waoneshe picha ulizonazo moja baada ya nyingine na waulize wanamuona nani.
5. Baada ya watoto kutaja watu wanaowaona kwenye picha weka picha chini na na waambie utaenda kuchagua picha za watu unaoishi nao nyumbani.
6. Anza kwa kuonesha mfano, chukua picha za watu unaoishi nao kisha waoneshe watoto watu unaoishi nao (kwa uhusiano wao).
7. Wakaribishe watoto kwa kumuita mtoto mmoja aje aokote picha za watuanaoishi nao nyumbani. Na awataje kwa wenzake.
8. Chunguza kama mtoto anaweza kutambua wazazi na watu anao ishi nao nyumbani.
9. Endelea na zoezi ukihakikisha kuwa watoto wote wanapata nafasi ya kufanya zoezi hilo.
10. Shughuli imalizike unapoona inafaa kwa kuwaonesha watoto mahali pa kuweka picha zilizotumika.
TANBIHI:
1. Kama kuna watoto wenye changamoto ya uoni, muulize kwa kumtajia majina ya ndugu na kuonyesha wapi anaweza kuokota na ziwe picha mguso.
2. Shughuli hii itawezeshwa kwa vipindi 3 kwa wakati tofauti kwa kwa kutumia mbinu mbalimbali.
steps_en:
1. Prepare various cards showing parents, relatives and family members who the child may be living with at home.
2. Invite children to sit in a U-shape/semicircle/circle or another arrangement suitable for the environment.
3. Ask children to name the people they live with at home.
4. Show them the pictures you have one after another and ask them who they see.
5. After children have named the people they see in the pictures, put the pictures down and tell them you will go and select pictures of people who live with you at home.
6. Start by demonstrating: take pictures of the people you live with and then show the children the people you live with (by their relationship).
7. Invite children by calling one child to come and pick up pictures of the people who live with them at home and name them to their peers.
8. Check whether the child can identify parents and people they live with at home.
9. Continue with the exercise ensuring all children get a chance to do that exercise.
10. End the activity when you feel it is appropriate by showing children where to put the pictures that were used.
NOTE:
1. If there are children with visual challenges, help them by naming the relatives and showing where they can pick up tactile pictures.
2. This activity will be carried out in 3 sessions at different times using various methods.

subject: Kuhusiana: Miaka 3 – 4 / Kujenga Uhusiano wa Msingi na Watu wengine
title_sw: Shughuli 4b: Kutambulisha majina ya wazazi wake na watu wengine anaoishi nao nyumbani.
title_en: Activity 4b: Introducing the names of his/her parents and other people the child lives with at home.
about_sw: Utambuzi wa wazazi ndugu na jamaa, kujiamini, stadi za kijamii, stadi za lugha
about_en: Recognition of parents, relatives and family, self-confidence, social skills, language skills
materials_sw: Kadi za picha zikionesha wazazi, babu na bibi, dada, kaka, shangazi, mjomba
materials_en: Picture cards showing parents, grandfather and grandmother, sister, brother, aunt, uncle
steps_sw:
1. Andaa kadi mbalimbali zinazoonesha wazazi ndugu na jamaa ambao mtoto anaweza kuwa anaishi nao nyumbani.
2. Wakaribishe Watoto kukaa kwenye umbo la U/nusu duara/ duara au mkao mwingine kulingana na mazingira.
3. Weka picha ambazo ulikuwa umeshazitumia kwenye mkeka ili watoto waizione.
4. Anza kwa kuonesha mfano, chukua picha ya mtu unaeishi nae na utaje jina lake. Mfano: "Mimi ninaishi na mama yangu anaitwa Maria" Fanya kwa kadi tatu tofauti.
5. Wakaribishe watoto kwa kumuita mtoto mmoja aje aokote picha aseme mahusiano yake na majina yake.
6. Chunguza kama mtoto anaweza kutambua wazazi na watu anaoishi nao nyumbani na kutaja majina yao.
7. Endelea mchezo huo huku ukihakikisha kuwa watoto wote wanapata nafasi ya kufanya zoezi hilo.
8. Shughuli imalizike unapoona inafaa kwa kuwaonesha watoto mahali pa kuweka picha zilizotumika.
TANBIHI:
Shughuli hii itawezeshwa kwa vipindi viwili kwa kutumia mbinu mbalimbali mfano: Kuigiza mtu anayeishi nae na kutaja jina lake (namuigiza babu yangu anaitwa Juma).
steps_en:
1. Prepare various cards showing parents, relatives and family members who the child may be living with at home.
2. Invite children to sit in a U-shape/semicircle/circle or another arrangement suitable for the environment.
3. Place the pictures you had previously used on a mat so that children can see them.
4. Start by demonstrating: take a picture of a person you live with and say their name. Example: "I live with my mother whose name is Maria." Do this for three different cards.
5. Invite children by calling one child to come and pick up a picture, state their relationship and say their name.
6. Check whether the child can identify parents and people they live with at home and mention their names.
7. Continue the game ensuring all children get a chance to do that exercise.
8. End the activity when you feel it is appropriate by showing children where to put the pictures that were used.
NOTE:
This activity will be carried out in two sessions using various methods, for example: Role-playing a person who lives with them and saying their name (I am playing my grandfather whose name is Juma).

subject: Kuhusiana: Miaka 3 – 4 / Kujenga Uhusiano wa Msingi na Watu wengine
title_sw: Shughuli 5: Kutaja jina la kituo chake.
title_en: Activity 5: Naming his/her daycare centre.
about_sw: Utambuzi wa jina la kituo, kujiamini, stadi za kijamii, stadi za lugha, umakini
about_en: Recognition of the daycare centre's name, self-confidence, social skills, language skills, attentiveness
materials_sw: Kadi / picha ya kituo, kadi au picha ya nembo ya kituo
materials_en: Card / picture of the centre, card or picture of the centre's logo/emblem
steps_sw:
1. Andaa kadi, picha au mbinu jumuishi kama una mtoto mwenye mahitaji maalumu yenye nembo na jina la kituo.
2. Wakaribishe watoto kukaa kwenye umbo la U/nusu duara/ duara au mkao mwingine kulingana na mazingira.
3. Waoneshe watoto picha ya kituo na uwaulize hapo ni wapi? Watoto watakuambia ni wapi.
4. Waambie watoto leo tutaenda kuimba wimbo wa kituo chetu.
5. Waambie utaimba na watakusikiliza kisha mtaimba pamoja.
Furaha kituo chetu twakipenda sana x2 Kina mazingira bora, sisi twayafurahia, Michezo tunayocheza, tunaipenda pia, Walezi wanatulea vyema, wote twawafurahia.
6. Wakaribishe watoto kuimba wimbo huo pamoja na wewe.
7. Baada ya kuimba wimbo mara kadhaa sasa waambie watoto kituo chetu kinaitwa Furaha.
8. Waambie watoto utawapatia picha ya kituo na kila mtoto atashika picha. Akishika picha ataje jina la kituo.
9. Anza kwa kuonesha mfano shika picha ya kituo na sema jina la kituo kisha mpatie mtoto afanye hivyohivyo pia.
10. Endelea na zoezi ukihakikisha kuwa watoto wote wanapata nafasi ya kufanya zoezi hilo.
11. Chunguza kama mtoto anaweza kutaja jina la kituo chake.
TANBIHI:
Shughuli hii itawezeshwa kwa vipindi 2 unaweza badilisha picha na kutumia nyingine zenye namna tofauti ya kusalimia
steps_en:
1. Prepare cards, pictures or inclusive tools (if you have a child with special needs) featuring the logo and name of the centre.
2. Invite children to sit in a U-shape/semicircle/circle or another arrangement suitable for the environment.
3. Show children a picture of the centre and ask them where that is. Children will tell you where it is.
4. Tell children that today we are going to sing a song about our centre.
5. Tell them you will sing and they will listen, then you will all sing together.
(Song): Furaha kituo chetu twakipenda sana x2 / Kina mazingira bora, sisi twayafurahia / Michezo tunayocheza, tunaipenda pia / Walezi wanatulea vyema, wote twawafurahia.
6. Invite children to sing that song together with you.
7. After singing the song several times, now tell the children our centre is called Furaha.
8. Tell children you will give each child a picture of the centre to hold. When holding the picture, the child should say the name of the centre.
9. Start by demonstrating: hold the picture of the centre, say the name of the centre, then give it to a child to do the same.
10. Continue with the exercise ensuring all children get a chance to do that exercise.
11. Check whether the child can name their centre.
NOTE:
This activity will be carried out in 2 sessions; you can replace the picture and use others with different ways of greeting.

subject: Kuhusiana: Miaka 3–4 | Kujenga Uhusiano wa Msingi na Watu Wengine
title_sw: Shughuli 6a: Kutaja matendo yanayoonesha tabia njema.
title_en: Activity 6a: Naming actions that show good behaviour.
about_sw: Utambuzi wa matendo ya tabia njema, kujiamini, stadi za kijamii, stadi za lugha, subira.
about_en: Recognition of good behaviour actions, self-confidence, social skills, language skills, patience.
materials_sw: Kadi zinazoonesha hatua za kumsogelea mlezi, kumuwekea mkono begani, viti viwili, mkeka.
materials_en: Cards showing steps for approaching a caregiver and placing a hand on their shoulder, two chairs, a mat.
steps_sw:
1. Andaa kadi au picha zinazoonesha matendo yanayoonesha tabia njema ukizingatia mahitaji ya Watoto maalumu.
2. Wakaribishe watoto kukaa kwenye umbo la U/nusu duara/ duara au mkao mwingine kulingana na mazingira.
3. Waambie watoto "Leo nitawaonesha mchezo wa kuniambia unahitaji kuongea nami hata pale ninapokuwa naongea na mtu mwingine."
4. Weka viti viwili mbele ya watoto kwa msaada wa watoto.
5. Omba watoto wawili wakae na kuzungumza kwenye viti mmoja akiwa mwalimu. Tembea karibu yao na weka mkono juu ya bega la mtoto ambaye anaigiza kama mwalimu.
6. Badilishana na mtoto huyo kwa kukaa kwenye kiti na mwambie mtoto afanye kama wewe huku wenzake wakitazama.
7. Mtoto ataenda mbali na kuja kukuwekea mkono begani kisha utaweka mkono wako juu ya ule mkono alioweka mtoto begani kwako kuonesha kwamba umegundua yupo na utamsikiliza.
8. Waweke watoto kwenye vikundi vya watoto watatu na waigize mmoja akiwa mwalimu, mwinginemtoto anayezungumza na mwalimu na mtoto wa tatu akiwa anaomba ruhusa kisha wabadilishane kila mtoto apate nafasi ya kuwa mtoto anayehitaji kuongea na mlezi.
9. Chunguza kama mtoto anaweza kusubiri kuzungumza na mlezi kwa kumshika bega.

TANBIHI: Shughuli hii itawezeshwa kwa vipindi 2 unaweza badilisha picha au kutumia mbinu mbalimbali zitakazoonesha matendo ya tabia njema.
steps_en:
1. Prepare cards or pictures showing actions that demonstrate good behaviour, taking into account the needs of children with special needs.
2. Invite children to sit in a U-shape/semicircle/circle or another arrangement suitable for the environment.
3. Tell the children: "Today I will show you a game to let me know you need to talk to me even when I am talking to someone else."
4. Place two chairs in front of the children with the children's help.
5. Ask two children to sit and talk on the chairs, one acting as the teacher. Walk near them and place your hand on the shoulder of the child acting as the teacher.
6. Switch with that child by sitting in the chair and tell the child to do as you did while the others watch.
7. The child will move away and come to place their hand on your shoulder, then you place your hand on top of the hand the child placed on your shoulder to show you have noticed them and will listen.
8. Place children in groups of three and have them role-play: one as teacher, one as a child talking to the teacher, and one as a child asking permission; then rotate so each child gets a turn to be the child who needs to speak to the caregiver.
9. Check whether the child is able to wait to speak to the caregiver by touching their shoulder.

NOTE: This activity can be conducted in 2 sessions; you can change the pictures or use various methods to show actions of good behaviour.

subject: Kuhusiana: Miaka 3–4 | Kujenga Uhusiano wa Msingi na Watu Wengine
title_sw: Shughuli 6b: Kutaja matendo yanayoonesha tabia njema.
title_en: Activity 6b: Naming actions that show good behaviour.
about_sw: Kujenga tabia njema, kuomba msamaha, kujiamini, kuimarisha misuli mikubwa na midogo, stadi za kijamii, stadi za lugha.
about_en: Building good behaviour, asking for forgiveness, self-confidence, strengthening large and small muscles, social skills, language skills.
materials_sw: Mpira, kadi za picha.
materials_en: A ball, picture cards.
steps_sw:
1. Andaa kadi zenye mbinu mbalimbali zinazoonyesha kuomba msamaha.
2. Wakaribishe watoto kukaa kwenye umbo la U/nusu duara/ duara au mkao mwingine kulingana na mazingira.
3. Waambie watoto: "Leo tutasikia hadithi kuhusu rafiki yetu Bakanja, ambaye alijaribu kufanya jambo vizuri, lakini akakosea."
Hadithi! Hadithi! Hadithi njoo unifundishe!! Bakanja alikuwa akicheza mpira na marafiki zake. Alitaka kujaribu kucheza mpira kwa haraka sana. Alipokuwa akikimbia na mpira, alimsukuma rafiki yake kwa bahati mbaya na akaanguka chini. Bakanja alijawa na hofu, kwani hakutaka kuumiza wengine. Aliamka, akajua alikuwa amekosea. Alimsogelea rafiki yake na kumwambia samahani naomba unisamehe sana sikutaka kukuumiza. Kisha akamshika mkono na kumsaidia kuinuka. Rafiki yake alimwambia asante Bakanja nimekusamehe hukufanya makusudi.
4. Wasomee hadithi na angalia kama mtoto anasikiliza na kufuatilia hadithi kwa makini.
5. Rudia baadhi ya maneno na watoto wakufuatilize wakati wa kusimulia hadithi. Hasa neno "nisamehe".
6. Waulize watoto maswali rahisi kutoka kwenye hadithi: Mfano: Bakanja alimfanyia nini rafiki yake?
7. Chunguza kama mtoto anaweza kutaja matendo ya tabia njema kwenye hadithi.

TANBIHI: Shughuli hii hii itawezeshwa kwa vipindi vitatu, kwa kutumia mbinu tofauti. Mfano: Kuigiza hadithi ya Bakanja ukiwa umewagawa katika makundi.
steps_en:
1. Prepare cards with various methods showing how to ask for forgiveness.
2. Invite children to sit in a U-shape/semicircle/circle or another arrangement suitable for the environment.
3. Tell the children: "Today we will hear a story about our friend Bakanja, who tried to do something good but made a mistake."
Story! Story! Story come and teach me!! Bakanja was playing football with his friends. He wanted to try to kick the ball very fast. As he was running with the ball, he accidentally pushed his friend who fell down. Bakanja was filled with fear because he did not want to hurt others. He stood up and realised he had made a mistake. He approached his friend and said: 'Sorry, I beg you to forgive me, I did not want to hurt you.' Then he held his friend's hand and helped him get up. His friend said: 'Thank you Bakanja, I forgive you, you did not do it on purpose.'
4. Read the story to them and observe whether the child is listening and following the story carefully.
5. Repeat some words with the children to follow along during the storytelling, especially the word "forgive me".
6. Ask children simple questions from the story. Example: What did Bakanja do to his friend?
7. Check whether the child can name the good behaviour actions in the story.

NOTE: This activity can be conducted in three sessions using different methods. Example: Acting out the story of Bakanja while divided into groups.

subject: Kuhusiana: Miaka 3–4 | Kujenga Uhusiano wa Msingi na Watu Wengine
title_sw: Shughuli 6c: Kutaja matendo yanayoonesha tabia njema.
title_en: Activity 6c: Naming actions that show good behaviour.
about_sw: Tabia njema, kujiamini, kuimarisha misuli mikubwa na midogo, stadi za kijamii, stadi za lugha, umakini, mahusiano.
about_en: Good behaviour, self-confidence, strengthening large and small muscles, social skills, language skills, attentiveness, relationships.
materials_sw: Vitu mbalimbali vilivyopo kwenye mazingira kama, visoda, midoli, rangi, chupa, mpira, kitambaa, kengele, kijiko, ua, karatasi, penseli.
materials_en: Various objects found in the environment such as bottle caps, dolls, paints, bottles, a ball, cloth, a bell, a spoon, a flower, paper, a pencil.
steps_sw:
1. Andaa vitu mbalimbali ambavyoutavitumia viwe rafiki kwa mtoto na aweze kuvibeba.
2. Wakaribishe watoto kukaa kwenye umbo la U/nusu duara/ duara au mkao mwingine kulingana na mazingira.
3. Weka vitu vyote kwenye mkeka au meza, washirikishe watoto wakusaidie pia.
4. Waulize watoto wanaona nini na wataje vitu wanavyoviona.
5. Waambie leo watajifunza kusema "Hapana Tafadhali".
6. Mwagize mtoto achukue kitu kimoja na akuletee, akikupatia mwambie "hapana tafadhali sihitaji mpira asante."
7. Kisha mtoto arudishe mpira kwenye mkeka au meza.
8. Wakaribishe watoto kuja kuchukua kitu na kumpelekea rafiki. Rafiki aseme Hapana Tafadhali sihitaji kitu hiki asante.
9. Chunguza namna watoto wanavyotumia maneno ya "Hapana Tafadhali".

TANBIHI: Shughuli hii itawezeshwa kwa vipindi viwili tofauti. Mfano: Kipindi cha pili tumia mifano kwa vitendo kama ("naomba twende kucheza, mtoto ajibu Hapana tafadhali) tumia vitendo vingi (nisindikize nje, njoo tukae pamoja, naomba sweta lako).
steps_en:
1. Prepare various objects that are child-friendly and that the child can carry.
2. Invite children to sit in a U-shape/semicircle/circle or another arrangement suitable for the environment.
3. Place all the objects on a mat or table and involve the children to help you.
4. Ask the children what they see and have them name the objects they see.
5. Tell them that today they will learn to say "No Thank You".
6. Ask a child to pick one object and bring it to you; when they hand it to you say "No thank you, I don't need the ball, thank you."
7. Then the child returns the ball to the mat or table.
8. Invite children to come and pick an object and take it to a friend. The friend says: No Thank You, I don't need this thing, thank you.
9. Observe how children use the words "No Thank You".

NOTE: This activity can be conducted in two different sessions. Example: In the second session use action-based examples such as ("I ask that we go to play" – child replies "No thank you") and use many actions ("Escort me outside", "Come let us sit together", "I want your sweater").

subject: Kujenga Uhusiano wa Msingi na Watu Wengine
title_sw: Shughuli 8b: Kusafisha Mazingira
title_en: Activity 8b: Cleaning the Environment
about_sw: Kufanya usafi, ushirikiano, kujiamini, stadi za kijamii, stadi za lugha, umakini, mahusiano
about_en: Cleanliness, cooperation, self-confidence, social skills, language skills, carefulness, relationships
materials_sw: Kitambaa, beseni, maji, ndoo, jagi
materials_en: Cloth, basin, water, bucket, jug
steps_sw:
1. Andaa vifaa ambavyo watoto wanaweza kuvitumia kufuta vumbi katika maeneo mbalimbali ndani ya kituo au nyumbani.
2. Wakaribishe Watoto kukaa kwenye umbo la U/nusu duara/ duara au mkao mwingine kulingana na mazingira.
3. Waambie watoto leo tunaenda kuimba wimbo.
4. Waonyeshe vifaa mtakavyotumia na wataje majina yake. Tunafuta vumbi, Tunafuta vumbi, kwa kitambaa, kwa kitambaa. Loanisha maji, loanisha maji, Safisha mezani, Safisha kabati. Tunafagia chini, Tunafagia chini, kwa ufagio, kwa ufagio. Kusanya uchafu, weka kwenye ndoo, ya takataka, ya takataka.
5. Weka kadi chini na wakaribishe watoto waokote kadi za vifaa na wataje kazi za vifaa hivyo.
6. Chunguza kama mtoto anaweza kutaja kifaa na kazi yake.
7. Wape nafasi watoto wote kufanya zoezi hili mara nyingi kadri muda unavyoruhusu.

TANBIHI: Shughuli hii itawezeshwa kwa vipindi viwili tofauti kwa kutumia mbinu tofauti yenye lengo la kusafisha.
steps_en:
1. Prepare materials that children can use to dust in various areas inside the centre or at home.
2. Invite children to sit in a U-shape/semicircle/circle or another arrangement suitable to the environment.
3. Tell the children that today we are going to sing a song.
4. Show them the materials and name them. (Song lyrics): We are dusting, we are dusting, with a cloth, with a cloth. Wet with water, wet with water, Clean the table, clean the cupboard. We are sweeping the floor, we are sweeping the floor, with a broom, with a broom. Collect the dirt, put it in the bucket, the rubbish bin, the rubbish bin.
5. Place cards on the floor and invite children to pick up cards of materials and name the uses of those materials.
6. Check whether the child can name a tool and its use.
7. Give all children the opportunity to do this exercise as many times as time allows.

NOTE: This activity will be facilitated in two different sessions using different methods with the aim of cleaning.

subject: Kueleza Hisia na Mahitaji
title_sw: Shughuli 1a: Kupaka rangi picha zinazoonesha hisia tofauti
title_en: Activity 1a: Colouring pictures that show different emotions
about_sw: Kulinganisha na kutofautisha, kujiamini, umakini, uratibu wa macho na mikono, kufuata maelekezo, ujenzi wa misuli midogo ya vidole, ubunifu
about_en: Comparing and contrasting, self-confidence, carefulness, eye-hand coordination, following instructions, development of fine finger muscles, creativity
materials_sw: Vioo vya kujitazama vidogo, kadi/picha za hisia, karatasi yenye mchoro wa sura ya biandamu, penseli za rangi, rangi ya maji, krayoni
materials_en: Small mirrors, emotion cards/pictures, paper with a drawing of a human face, coloured pencils, watercolours, crayons
steps_sw:
1. Andaa zana kama zilivyopendekezwa.
2. Andaa wimbo unaohusu hisia.
3. Chora picha ya sura ya binadamu kwenye karatasi.
4. Onesha namna ya kuimba wimbo wa hisia mbalimbali huku ukiigiza hisia hizo.
5. Watoto waimbe wimbo wa hisia na kuigiza hisia hizo.
6. Onesha uso wenye hisia tofauti, kila ukiigiza waambie watoto wabashiri na kutaja hisia hiyo.
7. Wapatie watoto vioo vidogo wajiangalie na kutengeneza sura tofauti mfano, furaha, hasira.
8. Mpatie kila mtoto karatasi yenye sura ya uso wa binadamu, wape vifaa vya kupakia rangi. Waambie waipake rangi hiyo sura.
9. Chunguza kama mtoto anabaini hisia.

TANBIHI: Shughuli hii itawezeshwa kwa vipindi viwili kwa wakati tofauti.
steps_en:
1. Prepare materials as recommended.
2. Prepare a song about emotions.
3. Draw a picture of a human face on paper.
4. Show how to sing the emotions song while acting out those emotions.
5. Children sing the emotions song and act out those emotions.
6. Show a face with different emotions; each time you act one out, ask children to guess and name that emotion.
7. Give children small mirrors to look at themselves and make different expressions, for example happiness, anger.
8. Give each child paper with a drawing of a human face and colouring materials. Tell them to colour that face.
9. Check whether the child can identify emotions.

NOTE: This activity will be facilitated in two sessions at different times.

subject: Kueleza Hisia na Mahitaji
title_sw: Shughuli 1b: Kupaka rangi picha zinazoonesha hisia tofauti
title_en: Activity 1b: Colouring pictures that show different emotions
about_sw: Kulinganisha na kutofautisha, kujiamini, umakini, uratibu wa macho na mikono, kufuata maelekezo, ujenzi wa misuli midogo ya vidole, ubunifu
about_en: Comparing and contrasting, self-confidence, carefulness, eye-hand coordination, following instructions, development of fine finger muscles, creativity
materials_sw: Picha kubwa yenye uso wa furaha, krayon, penseli za rangi, rangi ya maji
materials_en: A large picture with a happy face, crayons, coloured pencils, watercolours
steps_sw:
1. Andaa zana kama ilivyopendekezwa au kwa kuzingatia mahitaji ya watoto uliona.
2. Chora picha kubwa yenye sura ya furaha.
3. Waongoze watoto kukaa/kusimama katika mkao ambao wote watapata fursa ya kukuona vizuri.
4. Inua karatasi yenye mchoro mkubwa unaoonesha hisia ya furaha.
5. Wambie waangalie mchoro, kisha waulize "Amefurahi au amekasirika?".
6. Wapatie watoto karatasi yenye mchoro wa furaha, kisha wambie wapake rangi.
7. Watoto wakuoneshe kazi zao za kupaka rangi.
8. Chunguza kama mtoto ameweza kutofautisha hisia tofauti.

TANBIHI: Shughuli hii itawezeshwa kwa vipindi viwili kwa wakati tofauti.
steps_en:
1. Prepare materials as recommended or taking into account the needs of the children you observed.
2. Draw a large picture with a happy face.
3. Guide children to sit/stand in a position where they will all have the opportunity to see you clearly.
4. Hold up the paper with the large drawing showing the emotion of happiness.
5. Tell them to look at the drawing, then ask "Is he/she happy or angry?".
6. Give children paper with a happy face drawing, then tell them to colour it.
7. Children show you their colouring work.
8. Check whether the child has been able to distinguish different emotions.

NOTE: This activity will be facilitated in two sessions at different times.

subject: Kueleza Hisia na Mahitaji
title_sw: Shughuli ya 4a: Kudhibiti hisia
title_en: Activity 4a: Controlling emotions
about_sw: Kutambua hisia, kuelezea hisia, kuwasiliana, ubunifu, usikivu, umakini
about_en: Recognising emotions, expressing emotions, communicating, creativity, listening, attentiveness
materials_sw: Kifani cha aisikirimu
materials_en: An ice-cream cone prop
steps_sw:
1. Andaa wimbo wa wimbo.
2. Waongoze watoto kukaa mkao wa umbo la U/duara/nusu duara au mkao mwingine unaofaa.
3. Elekeza namna ya kuimba wimbo wa Aisikirimu... Aisikirimu soda ya mirinda, Imejaa topu topu telo, mimi ni musa, mimi ni telo Nakupenda wewe pamoja na mwalimu Kula karanga x2 Jumatatu shule.
4. Wambie kuwa watakapoimba "Kula karanga x2" Jumatatu shule" watatakiwa kutulia bila kutikisika.
5. Mtoto atakayetikisika/tabasamu/sogea atatolewa katika mchezo.
6. Wape Watoto uhuru na fursa ya kuendeleza mchezo wakionyesha hisia.
7. Chunguza kama mtoto ametulia bila kutikisika.
8. Uliza "Ulijisikiaje ulipotolewa kwenye mchezo"?
steps_en:
1. Prepare a song.
2. Guide the children to sit in a U-shape/circle/semicircle or another suitable arrangement.
3. Introduce the way to sing the Ice Cream song... Ice cream soda ya mirinda, Full of bubbles telo, I am musa, I am telo I love you together with the teacher Eat peanuts x2 on Monday at school.
4. Tell them that when they sing "Eat peanuts x2 on Monday at school" they will be required to keep still without moving.
5. Any child who moves/smiles/shifts will be eliminated from the game.
6. Give children freedom and opportunity to continue the game while showing emotions.
7. Check whether the child remained still without moving.
8. Ask "How did you feel when you were eliminated from the game?"

subject: Kueleza Hisia na Mahitaji
title_sw: Shughuli: 4b: Kudhibiti hisia
title_en: Activity 4b: Controlling emotions
about_sw: Kukubali kushindwa, kushirikiana, kujenga misuli mikubwa na midogo, uratibu wa macho na mikono, umakini, kusikiliza
about_en: Accepting defeat, cooperating, developing gross and fine muscles, hand-eye coordination, attentiveness, listening
materials_sw: Filimbi, ngoma, kengele, mipira midogo, vikapu
materials_en: Whistle, drum, bell, small balls, baskets
steps_sw:
1. Andaa mazingira salama.
2. Wambie Watoto kuwa leo tutacheza mchezo unaoitwa "Kuongeza hazina".
3. Gawa watoto katika timu mbili (A na B) zenye idadi sawa ya wachezaji.
4. Weka mipira katikati ya eneo la kuchezea.
5. Weka kikapu mbele ya kila timu umbali wa meta 10 kutoka mipira ilipo. Kila kikapu kiwekee alama ya kutambulisha timu.
6. Wambie sasa watoto wasimame katika mistari miwili kila timu ikiwa na mtoto mmoja mbele na wengine wafuate nyuma yake.
7. Mchezo ukiisha kila timu ihesabu imeweka mipira mingapi katika kapu. Timu yenye mipira mingi ndio washindi.
8. Chunguza kama mipira inawekwa katika kikapu sahihi.
9. Uliza "Ulijisikiaje timu yako kushindwa"?
steps_en:
1. Prepare a safe environment.
2. Tell the children that today we will play a game called "Adding to the treasure".
3. Divide children into two teams (A and B) with equal numbers of players.
4. Place the balls in the middle of the playing area.
5. Place a basket in front of each team 10 metres away from where the balls are. Mark each basket to identify the team.
6. Tell the children to stand in two lines with one child in front of each team and others following behind.
7. When the game ends, each team counts how many balls they placed in the basket. The team with the most balls wins.
8. Check whether the balls are being placed in the correct basket.
9. Ask "How did you feel when your team lost?"

subject: Kujenga Stadi za Kujitegemea
title_sw: Shughuli: 1: Kupanga vitu mbalimbali
title_en: Activity 1: Sorting various objects
about_sw: Kupanga vitu kulingana na sifa, Kuchambua vitu, Umakini, Misuli mikubwa na midogo, Uratibu wa macho na mikono, lugha
about_en: Sorting objects according to attributes, Analysing objects, Attentiveness, Gross and fine muscles, Hand-eye coordination, Language
materials_sw: Mifuniko ya chupa rangi tofauti, vizibo aina tofauti, vijiti, mipira midogo, maumbo, chupa za plastiki, magunzi, vibao
materials_en: Bottle caps of different colours, various types of corks, sticks, small balls, shapes, plastic bottles, cobs, boards
steps_sw:
1. Andaa zana za kutosha kulingana na idadi ya watoto.
2. Andaa eneo linalofaa kufanyia shughuli hii na vikapu vya kuwekea vitu.
3. Weka vitu tofauti mbele ya Watoto na uwaulize "Mnaona nini hapa mbele"?.
4. Onesha mfano wa namna ya kupanga vitu. Mfano, nachukua mfuniko wa kijani, nauweka katika kikapu cha rangi ya kijani.
5. Waambie kuwa watacheza mchezo wa kupanga vitu na watafanya kama ulivyoonesha.
6. Gawa watoto katika makundi mawili (A na B) zenye idadi sawa ya wachezaji.
7. Weka kikapu chenye vitu mchanganyiko mbele ya kila timu.
8. Waambie kuwa ukipiga makofi, mchezaji mmoja toka kila timu atakimbia, ataokota kitu kimoja na kukiweka katika kikapu chenye jina la vitu la hivyo.
9. Chunguza kama mtoto anapanga vitu vinavyofanana sehemu moja.
10. Uliza swali "Kwa nini hiki kitu kiliwekwa hapa"?
steps_en:
1. Prepare enough tools according to the number of children.
2. Prepare a suitable area for this activity and baskets for holding objects.
3. Place different objects in front of the children and ask "What do you see here in front"?
4. Demonstrate an example of how to sort objects. For example, I pick up a green cap and put it in the green basket.
5. Tell them they will play a game of sorting objects and will do it as you demonstrated.
6. Divide children into two groups (A and B) with equal numbers of players.
7. Place a basket containing mixed objects in front of each team.
8. Tell them that when you clap your hands, one player from each team will run, pick up one object and place it in the basket labelled with the name of that type of object.
9. Check whether the child is sorting similar objects into the same section.
10. Ask the question "Why was this object placed here"?

subject: Kujenga Stadi za Kujitegemea
title_sw: Shughuli 3b: Kutenda matendo ya kujitegemea
title_en: Activity 3b: Performing self-reliance actions
about_sw: Kujitegemea, kujiamini, uratibu wa macho na mikono, kusikiliza, kufuata maelekezo rahisi
about_en: Self-reliance, self-confidence, eye-hand coordination, listening, following simple instructions
materials_sw: Viatu, kofia, masweta, soksi na vitu vingine vya kuvaa wenyewe
materials_en: Shoes, hats, sweaters, socks and other items of clothing to wear by themselves
steps_sw:
1. Andaa zana/vifaa vyote vinavyohitajika kukamilisha shughuli hii
2. Weka zana/vifaa hivyo katika sehemu safi.
3. Wambie watoto kuwa leo tutafanya kazi ya "kuvaa na kurekebisha mavazi yetu".
4. Chukua vazi moja mfano, kofia ivae na kurekebisha huku watoto wanakuangalia.
5. Unda vikundi vya watoto 4-5, katika kila kikundi mpatie kila mtoto vazi moja.
6. Wambie kila mtoto avae na kurekebisha vazi lake
7. Baada ya muda mfupi kulingana na unavyoona, watoto kila mtoto mpe vazi lingine.
8. Chunguza kama kila mtoto anavaa na kurekebisha vazi.

TANBIHI: Shughuli hii itawezeshwa kwa vipindi viwili kwa kutumia vitu tofauti
steps_en:
1. Prepare all tools/materials needed to complete this activity.
2. Place those tools/materials in a clean area.
3. Tell the children that today we will do the task of "wearing and adjusting our clothes".
4. Take one item of clothing, for example a hat, put it on and adjust it while the children are watching you.
5. Form groups of 4-5 children; in each group give each child one item of clothing.
6. Tell each child to put on and adjust their clothing item.
7. After a short time, as you see fit, give each child a different clothing item.
8. Check whether each child is wearing and adjusting the clothing item.

NOTE: This activity will be facilitated in two sessions using different items.

subject: Kujenga Stadi za Kujitegemea
title_sw: Shughuli 3c: Kutenda matendo ya kujitegemea
title_en: Activity 3c: Performing self-reliance actions
about_sw: Kujitegemea, kujiamini, uratibu wa macho na mikono, kusikiliza, kufuata maelekezo rahisi, utaratibu, uwajibikaji
about_en: Self-reliance, self-confidence, eye-hand coordination, listening, following simple instructions, orderliness, responsibility
materials_sw: Vikapu, Viatu, vitabu, masweta, mabegi, midoli, krayoni, penseli, vifutio, vichongeo
materials_en: Baskets, shoes, books, sweaters, bags, dolls, crayons, pencils, erasers, pencil sharpeners
steps_sw:
1. Andaa zana/vifaa vyote vinavyohitajika kukamilisha shughuli.
2. Andaa sehemu ya kila mtoto kuweka vitu vyake.
3. Wambie watoto kuwa leo tutafanya kazi ya "Kupanga na kutunza vitu vyetu".
