4. Onesha na eleza kuwa, kila mtoto ana vitu vyake vimewekwa mahali. Tukianza kucheza, kila mtoto atachukua kitu kimoja kimoja na kukipeleka katika kikapu/mfuko wake.
5. Anza kwa kuwachukua watoto wachache kuanza kwenda katika maeneo yao na kupanga vitu vyao katika sehemu yake.
6. Endelea hivyo hadi kila mtoto aweze kupanga vitu vyake katika sehemu husika.
7. Chunguza kama kila mtoto anapanga vitu vyake sehemu husika.

TANBIHI: Shughuli hii itawezeshwa kwa vipindi viwili katika wakati tofauti kwa kutumia mbinu tofauti
steps_en:
1. Prepare all tools/materials needed to complete the activity.
2. Prepare an area for each child to keep their belongings.
3. Tell the children that today we will do the task of "Arranging and taking care of our things".
4. Show and explain that each child has their belongings placed somewhere. When we start playing, each child will pick up one item at a time and take it to their basket/bag.
5. Start by taking a few children to go to their areas and arrange their things in their designated spot.
6. Continue like this until each child is able to arrange their things in the appropriate area.
7. Check whether each child is arranging their things in the appropriate area.

NOTE: This activity will be facilitated in two sessions at different times using different methods.

subject: Kujenga Stadi za Kujitegemea
title_sw: Shughuli 3d: Kutenda matendo ya kujitegemea
title_en: Activity 3d: Performing self-reliance actions
about_sw: Kujitegemea, kujiamini, uratibu wa macho na mikono, kusikiliza, kufuata maelekezo rahisi, utaratibu, uwajibikaji
about_en: Self-reliance, self-confidence, eye-hand coordination, listening, following simple instructions, orderliness, responsibility
materials_sw: Vikapu, viatu, vitabu, masweta, mabegi, midoli, krayoni, penseli, vifutio, vichongeo
materials_en: Baskets, shoes, books, sweaters, bags, dolls, crayons, pencils, erasers, pencil sharpeners
steps_sw:
1. Andaa zana/vifaa voyote vinavyohitajika kukamilisha shughuli.
2. Andaa sehemu ya kila mtoto kuweka vitu vyake.
3. Waambie watoto kuwa leo tutafanya kazi ya "Kupanga na kutunza vitu vyetu".
4. Onesha na eleza kuwa, kila mtoto ana vitu vyake vimewekwa mahali. Tukianza kucheza, kila mtoto atachukua kitu kimoja kimoja na kukipeleka katika kikapu/mfuko wake.
5. Anza kwa kuwachukua watoto wachache kuanza kwenda katika maeneo yao na kupanga vitu vyao katika sehemu yake.
6. Endelea hivyo hadi kila mtoto aweze kupanga vitu vyake katika sehemu husika.
7. Chunguza kama kila mtoto anapanga vitu vyake sehemu husika.

TANBIHI: Shughuli hii itawezeshwa kwa vipindi viwili kwa kutumia vitu tofauti
steps_en:
1. Prepare all tools/materials needed to complete the activity.
2. Prepare an area for each child to keep their belongings.
3. Tell the children that today we will do the task of "Arranging and taking care of our things".
4. Show and explain that each child has their belongings placed somewhere. When we start playing, each child will pick up one item at a time and take it to their basket/bag.
5. Start by taking a few children to go to their areas and arrange their things in their designated spot.
6. Continue like this until each child is able to arrange their things in the appropriate area.
7. Check whether each child is arranging their things in the appropriate area.

NOTE: This activity will be facilitated in two sessions using different items.

subject: Kuhusiana: Miaka 3 – 4 | Kujenga Stadi za Kushirikiana
title_sw: Shughuli 1a: Kufanya kazi katika vikundi
title_en: Activity 1a: Working in groups
about_sw: Stadi zitakazojengwa: Ushirikiano, kusikiliza, kufuata maelekezo, umakini, kujenga misuri mikubwa na midogo
about_en: Skills to be built: Cooperation, listening, following instructions, attention, building large and small structures
materials_sw: Kadi yenye picha ya vizibo, mikufu, bangili, uzi, kamba, vizibo
materials_en: Cards with pictures of beads, necklaces, bangles, thread, rope, beads
steps_sw:
1. Andaa kadi yenye picha ya vizibo, mikufu, bangili, uzi, Kamba, vizibo.
2. Andaa eneo la nje au ndani kuchezea mchezo.
3. Waongoze watoto kwenda eneo la kuchezea.
4. Waambie watoto kwamba watacheza mchezo wa kutunga.
5. Waoneshe watoto namna ya kucheza mchezo huo.
6. Unda vikundi vya watoto 5-6.
7. Waambie katika kila kikundi wacheze mchezo wa kutunga.
8. Chunguza kama kila mtoto anashirikiana na wenzake.
9. Waruhusu Watoto kuendeleza mchezo, na baadae kurejesha vitu vinapokaa.

TANBIHI: Shughuli hii itawezeshwa kwa vipindi vitatu kwa nyakati tofauti

Ushiriki wa wazazi nyumbani: Mwelekeze mzazi kumjengea mtoto stadi za kushirikiana na wenzake hata pindi anapokua nyumbani kwa kumpa shughuli zinazomlazimu kushirikiana na wengine.
steps_en:
1. Prepare cards with pictures of beads, necklaces, bangles, thread, rope, beads.
2. Prepare an outdoor or indoor area for the game.
3. Guide the children to the play area.
4. Tell the children they will play a stringing game.
5. Show the children how to play that game.
6. Form groups of 5-6 children.
7. Tell each group to play the stringing game.
8. Observe whether each child is cooperating with peers.
9. Allow children to continue the game, and afterwards return items to their places.

NOTE: This activity can be done in three sessions at different times.

Parent involvement at home: Guide the parent to build the child's skills of cooperating with peers even at home by giving them tasks that require cooperating with others.

subject: Kuhusiana: Miaka 3 – 4 | Kujenga Stadi za Kushirikiana
title_sw: Shughuli 1b: Kufanya kazi katika vikundi
title_en: Activity 1b: Working in groups
about_sw: Stadi zitakazojengwa: Ushirikiano, kusikiliza, kufuata maelekezo, umakini, kutatua changamoto, uvumilivu
about_en: Skills to be built: Cooperation, listening, following instructions, attention, problem solving, patience
materials_sw: Kadi yenye picha ya gari, mfuniko wa ndoo, kamba
materials_en: Cards with pictures of a car, bucket lid, rope
steps_sw:
1. Andaa eneo kuchezea kadi yenye picha ya gari, mfuniko wa ndoo, kamba.
2. Waambie watoto kuwa watacheza mchezo wa kuendesha gari.
3. Waulize maswali yanayoendana na mchezo kwa mfano 'Gari ni nini? Huwaunaona magari wapi? Mtu anayeendesha gari anaitwa nani?'
4. Wagawe watoto katika makundi ya watu nane mpaka tisa.
5. Funga kamba kuwazunguka watoto kiasi kwamba kundi la watoto wote wawe ndani.
6. Waelekeze watoto namna ya kucheza mchezo.
7. Watakapoelewa mchezo, waache wacheze wenyewe.
8. Chunguza kama watoto wanafuata maelekezo na kuhusika katika mchezo.
9. Mchezo utamalizika inapoona inafaa.

TANBIHI: Shughuli hii itawezeshwa kwa vipindi viwili kwa nyakati tofauti.

Ushiriki wa wazazi nyumbani: Mwelekeze mzazi kumjengea mtoto stadi za kushirikiana na wenzake hata pindi anapokua nyumbani kwa kumpa shughuli zinazomlazimu kushirikiana na wengine.
steps_en:
1. Prepare the play area with cards showing pictures of a car, bucket lid, and rope.
2. Tell the children they will play a driving game.
3. Ask questions related to the game, for example 'What is a car? Where do you see cars? What is a person who drives a car called?'
4. Divide the children into groups of eight to nine people.
5. Tie a rope around the children so that the whole group is inside.
6. Guide the children on how to play the game.
7. Once they understand the game, let them play on their own.
8. Observe whether children are following instructions and participating in the game.
9. The game ends when appropriate.

NOTE: This activity can be done in two sessions at different times.

Parent involvement at home: Guide the parent to build the child's skills of cooperating with peers even at home by giving them tasks that require cooperating with others.

subject: Kuhusiana: Miaka 3 – 4 | Kujenga Stadi za Kushirikiana
title_sw: Shughuli 2a: Kucheza michezo mbalimbali katika vikundi
title_en: Activity 2a: Playing various games in groups
about_sw: Stadi zitakazojengwa: Kujenga uhusiano, kujieleza, kujenga hisia, umakini, kujiamini
about_en: Skills to be built: Building relationships, self-expression, building emotions, attention, self-confidence
materials_sw: Mpira, picha ya tembo na sungura, mikeka, kadi zenye sura za hisia mbali mbali
materials_en: Ball, pictures of an elephant and a rabbit, mats, cards with various facial expressions
steps_sw:
1. Andaa eneo la kukaa ili kusimulia hadithi, picha za wanyama na mikeka.
2. Waongoze watoto kwenda eneo la kusimulia hadithi.
3. Wambie watoto wakae katika umbo la duara.
4. Wambie watoto kuwa utawasimulia hadithi ya tembo na Sungura.
5. Wasimulie watoto hadithi ya tembo na sungura: Tembo mdogo na sungura walikuwa marafiki. Siku moja, Sungura alikuwa akicheza msituni na akakuta Tembo Mdogo akiwa analia. 'Kwa nini unalia?' Sungura akauliza. Tembo Mdogo akasema, 'Nimepoteza mpira wangu, sijui umeangukia wapi.' Sungura akasema, 'Usiogope, tutautafuta pamoja.' Wakaenda chini ya mti hakuna mpira. Wakaangalia kwenye nyasi hakuna. Hatimaye, Sungura akasema, 'tuangalie nyuma ya kichaka!' Walipoangalia, wakauona mpira! Tembo Mdogo akafurahi sana. Wote wakacheka na kuruka ruka. Tembo akasema, 'Asante kwa kunisaidia.' Sungura akajibu, 'Ndiyo maana marafiki tupo tunashirikiana!'
6. Waulize watoto maswali tofauti tofauti kuhusu hadithi husika.
7. Chunguza kama kila mtoto anashiriki kwa hisia na kujiamini.

TANBIHI: Shughuli hii itawezeshwa kwa vipindi 3 kwa wakati tofauti.

Ushiriki wa wazazi nyumbani: Mwelekeze mzazi kumjengea mtoto stadi za kushirikiana na wenzake katika michezo mbalimbali.
steps_en:
1. Prepare a sitting area for storytelling, pictures of animals, and mats.
2. Guide the children to the storytelling area.
3. Ask the children to sit in a circle.
4. Tell the children that you will tell them a story about an elephant and a rabbit.
5. Tell the children the story of the elephant and the rabbit: Little Elephant and Rabbit were friends. One day, Rabbit was playing in the forest and found Little Elephant crying. 'Why are you crying?' Rabbit asked. Little Elephant said, 'I lost my ball, I don't know where it fell.' Rabbit said, 'Don't worry, we will look for it together.' They went under a tree — no ball. They looked in the grass — nothing. Finally, Rabbit said, 'Let's look behind the bush!' When they looked, they saw the ball! Little Elephant was very happy. They all laughed and jumped. Elephant said, 'Thank you for helping me.' Rabbit replied, 'That is why we are friends — we cooperate!'
6. Ask the children various questions about the story.
7. Observe whether each child participates with emotion and confidence.

NOTE: This activity can be done in 3 sessions at different times.

Parent involvement at home: Guide the parent to build the child's skills of cooperating with peers in various games.

subject: Kujenga Stadi za Kushirikiana – Kuhusiana: Miaka 3–4
title_sw: Shughuli 2b: Kucheza michezo mbalimbali katika vikundi
title_en: Activity 2b: Playing various games in groups
about_sw: Muda: Dakika 30. Stadi zitakazojengwa: Kujenga uhusiano, kujieleza, kudhibiti hisia, umakini.
about_en: Duration: 30 minutes. Skills to be built: Building relationships, self-expression, emotional regulation, attentiveness.
materials_sw: Kadi zenye sura za hisia mbali mbali
materials_en: Cards with various facial expressions of emotions
steps_sw:
1. Andaa eneo la kuchezea.
2. Waongoze watoto kwenda eneo la kucheza kisha kaa nao katika umbo la duara.
3. Imba na watoto wimbo ufuatao kwa kurudia rudia ili waweze kuuimba:
"Mwenzenu ninalia, ninalia ninalia
Unalia kitu gani kitu gani kitu gani
Mwenzenu sina dada sina dada sina dada
Mchague dada yako dada yako dada yako
Anacheza na dada yakee na dada yake
Anacheza na dada yakee na dada yake"
4. Mwambie mtoto mmoja ajitolee kusimama katikati ya duara na awaongoze wengine kucheza na kufanya vitendo.
5. Mwambie mtoto anayeongoza amchague mtoto mwingine (huku akicheza) aje katikati ya duara kwa kutaja dada/kaka/baba/mwalimu/mama na acheze nae.
6. Mwambie mtoto wa pili (ambaye amechaguliwa na mtoto wa kwanza) kumchagua mtoto mwingine (watatu) huku akiimba wimbo.
7. Chunguza kama kila mtu anaweza kujieleza kwa ufasaha.
8. Mchezo utaisha utakapoona inafaa.
TANBIHI: Shughuli hii itawezeshwa kwa vipindi viwili tofauti.
Ushiriki wa wazazi nyumbani: Mwelekeze mzazi amjengee mtoto stadi za kushirikiana na wenzake katika michezo mbalimbali.
steps_en:
1. Prepare the play area.
2. Guide the children to the play area and sit with them in a circle.
3. Sing the following song repeatedly with the children so they can learn it:
"Your friend is crying, crying, crying
What are you crying for, what, what
Your friend has no sister, no sister, no sister
Choose your sister, your sister, your sister
She is playing with her sister, her sister
She is playing with her sister, her sister"
4. Ask one child to volunteer to stand in the middle of the circle and lead the others in playing and doing actions.
5. Ask the leading child to choose another child (while playing) to come to the middle of the circle by naming sister/brother/father/teacher/mother and play with them.
6. Ask the second child (chosen by the first) to choose another child (three) while singing the song.
7. Check whether each person can express themselves clearly.
8. End the game when you see it is appropriate.
NOTE: This activity will be facilitated in two separate sessions.
Parent involvement at home: Guide the parent to build the child's cooperation skills with peers in various games.

subject: Kujenga Stadi za Kushirikiana – Kuhusiana: Miaka 3–4
title_sw: Shughuli 3a: Kutaja kazi zinazofanywa kwa kushirikiana
title_en: Activity 3a: Naming tasks done cooperatively
about_sw: Muda: Dakika 30. Stadi zitakazojengwa: Utambuzi wa vitu, kuzikiliza, umakini, kuchambua vitu.
about_en: Duration: 30 minutes. Skills to be built: Recognition of things, listening, attentiveness, analysing things.
materials_sw: Kukuza upendo, kujali, kuhurumiana, kufarijiana, kushirikiano
materials_en: Promoting love, caring, compassion, comforting each other, cooperation
steps_sw:
1. Andaa eneo la kuchezea, andaa vifaa vya kuchezea.
2. Waambie watoto wasimame katika duara.
3. Waongoze watoto wafanye vitendo vinavyoashiria kujali wengine.
4. Waulize watoto watamsaidiaje mwenzao anayeumwa?
5. Wakishajibu, wapongeze kisha waambie pamoja na majibu mazuri tuimbe wimbo ufuatao huku tukishika viungo vinavyotajwa:
Pili pili mti gani uwashao jamani x2
Kichwa kinauma, haya pole mwanangu pole
Macho yanuma, haya pole mwanangu pole
Kiuno kinuma, haya pole mwanangu pole
6. Waambie watoto waendelee kutaja viungo vingine kulingana na muda.
7. Waulize maswali na kuwaongezea taarifa ili kujenga uelewa zaidi.
8. Chunguza kama kila mtoto anaweza kuchambua vitu kwa umakini.
TANBIHI: Shughuli hii itawezeshwa kwa vipindi viwili kwa nyakati tofauti.
Ushiriki wa wazazi nyumbani: Mwelekeze mzazi kumsaidia mtoto katika kutambua na kutaja kazi anazoweza kushirikiana wakati akiwa nyumbani.
steps_en:
1. Prepare the play area and play materials.
2. Tell the children to stand in a circle.
3. Guide the children to perform actions that show caring for others.
4. Ask the children how they would help a sick friend.
5. After they answer, praise them then, together with good answers, sing the following song while touching the body parts mentioned:
Pili pili what tree burns, people x2
The head aches, now gently my child, gently
The eyes hurt, now gently my child, gently
The waist aches, now gently my child, gently
6. Tell the children to continue naming other body parts according to time.
7. Ask questions and add information to build more understanding.
8. Check whether each child can analyse things carefully.
NOTE: This activity will be facilitated in two sessions at different times.
Parent involvement at home: Guide the parent to help the child identify and name tasks they can cooperate on at home.

subject: Kujenga Stadi za Kushirikiana – Kuhusiana: Miaka 3–4
title_sw: Shughuli 3b: Kutaja kazi zinazofanywa kushirikiana
title_en: Activity 3b: Naming tasks done cooperatively
about_sw: Muda: Dakika 30. Stadi zitakazojengwa: Utambuzi wa vitu, kuzikiliza, umakini, kuchambua vitu.
about_en: Duration: 30 minutes. Skills to be built: Recognition of things, listening, attentiveness, analysing things.
materials_sw: Picha ya ng'ombe, picha ya nyumba, gari, vibao vya fumbo cha ng'ombe, gari na nyumba
materials_en: Picture of a cow, picture of a house, a car, puzzle pieces of a cow, car and house
steps_sw:
1. Andaa eneo la kuchezea, andaa vifaa vya kuchezea.
2. Wapange kwenye vikundi vya watoto 6–8.
3. Wambie watoto kuwa watacheza mchezo wa kutengeneza vitu.
4. Waelekeze watoto namna ya kucheza mchezo wa kutengezeza vitu kwa kutumia vibao fumbo.
5. Waruhusu watoto wa waendelee na mchezo.
6. Chunguza kama kila mtoto anashiriki katika utambuzi wa vitu.
7. Mchezo utamalizika utakapoona inafaa.
TANBIHI: Shughuli hii itawezeshwa kwa vipindi viwili kwa siku tofauti kwa kutumia zana na mbinu tofauti.
Ushiriki wa wazazi nyumbani: Mwelekeze mzazi kumsaidia mtoto kutambua na kutaja kazi anazoweza.
steps_en:
1. Prepare the play area and play materials.
2. Arrange them in groups of 6–8 children.
3. Tell the children they will play an object-making game.
4. Guide the children on how to play the object assembly game using puzzle pieces.
5. Allow the children to continue with the game.
6. Check whether each child participates in object recognition.
7. End the game when you see it is appropriate.
NOTE: This activity will be facilitated in two sessions on different days using different tools and methods.
Parent involvement at home: Guide the parent to help the child identify and name tasks they are able to do.

subject: Kutunza Afya ya Mwili
title_sw: Shughuli 2: Kuonesha matumizi ya vifaa vya usafi wa mwili
title_en: Activity 2: Demonstrating the use of body hygiene tools
about_sw: Kudumisha usafi na afya, kujenga tabia na nidhamu ya usafi.
about_en: Maintaining cleanliness and health, building habits and discipline of hygiene.
materials_sw: Maji safi na salama, sabuni ya kuogea, dodoki/brashi la kuogea, beseni/ndoo, bomba la kumwaga maji kwa juu, taulo/kitambaa safi, bebeo la sabuni ya kuogea, mafuta ya kujipaka (ngozi), picha mnato, picha mjongeo na kadi/chati za picha zinazoonesha tendo la kusafisha mwili, mwanasesere, karatasi zenye michoro ya vifaa vya kufanyia usafi wa mwili
materials_en: Clean and safe water, bath soap, bath sponge/brush, basin/bucket, overhead water pump, clean towel/cloth, soap dish, body lotion (skin), still pictures, sequential pictures and picture cards/charts showing body-washing actions, doll, papers with drawings of body hygiene tools
steps_sw:
1. Andaa vifaa tajwa hapo juu, wapange watoto kwenye mpangilio mzuri na kuweka mazingira rafiki ya ujifunzaji.
2. Wagawie watoto vifaa halisi vinavyotumika kufanyia usafi wa mwili, chati, kadi, picha mnato/picha mjongeo zinazoonesha vifaa na tendo usafi wa mwili.
3. Wape fursa watoto kubainisha vifaa walivyopewa.
4. Washirikishe watoto kueleza matumizi ya vifaa vya usafi wa mwili.
5. Wape watoto fursa ya kuigiza namna ya kutumia vifaa hivyo.
6. Wafuatilie watoto wanavyoonesha vifaa hivyo na kuwapa msaada unaohitajika. Mtoto 1: Mimi ni sabuni, kazi yangu ni kutoa uchafu. Mtoto 2: Mimi ni taulo, kazi yangu ni kkausha maji mwilini.
7. Chunguza kama kila mtoto ametaja na kueleza vifaa vinavyotumika kusafisha mwili.
Tanbihi:
1. Kumbuka kubainisha watoto wenye mahitaji maalum ili uweze kuwashirikisha ipasavyo kulingana na mahitaji yao.
2. Shughuli hii inaweza kuwezeshwa kwa vipindi vitatu kwa siku tofauti kwa kutumia mbinu na zana stahiki.
steps_en:
1. Prepare the materials listed above, arrange children in a good formation and create a friendly learning environment.
2. Give children real items used for body hygiene, charts, cards, still/sequential pictures showing hygiene tools and body-washing actions.
3. Give children the opportunity to identify the items they have been given.
4. Engage children in explaining the uses of body hygiene tools.
5. Give children the opportunity to role-play how to use those tools.
6. Follow up on how children demonstrate the tools and provide needed assistance. Child 1: I am soap, my job is to remove dirt. Child 2: I am a towel, my job is to dry water from the body.
7. Check whether each child has named and explained the tools used to clean the body.
Note:
1. Remember to identify children with special needs so you can involve them appropriately according to their needs.
2. This activity can be carried out over three sessions on different days using appropriate methods and tools.

subject: Kutunza Afya ya Mwili
title_sw: Shughuli 3: Kuimba wimbo unaoonyesha hatua za kusafisha kinywa
title_en: Activity 3: Singing a song that shows the steps of cleaning teeth/mouth
about_sw: Kudumisha usafi na afya, utambuzi, kujenga tabia na nidhamu ya usafi.
about_en: Maintaining cleanliness and health, recognition, building habits and discipline of hygiene.
materials_sw: Maji safi na salama, mswaki, dawa ya meno, kikombe, picha mnato, picha mjongeo na kadi/chati za picha zinazoonesha tendo la kusafisha kinywa na karatasi zenye michoro ya vifaa vya kusafisha kinywa
materials_en: Clean and safe water, toothbrush, toothpaste, cup, still pictures, sequential pictures and picture cards/charts showing tooth/mouth-cleaning actions, and papers with drawings of tooth-cleaning tools
steps_sw:
1. Andaa vifaa tajwa hapo juu, wapange watoto kwenye mpangilio mzuri na kuweka mazingira rafiki ya ujifunzaji.
2. Waoneshe watoto vifaa halisi vinavyotumika kufanyia usafi wa kinywa, chati, kadi, picha mnato/picha mjongeo zinazoonesha vifaa na tendo usafi wa kinywa.
3. Waambie tutaimba kwa pamoja wimbo wa usafi wa kinywa huku tukionesha vitendo vya kusafisha kinywa.
WIMBO:
Safisha kinywa x3
Meno ya mbele, meno ya mbele na ya pembeni
Juu na chini, juu na chini, mwisho ulimi
4. Endelea na mchezo hadi watoto wote waweze kuimba kwa usahihi.
5. Fuatilia kama kila mtoto anaweza kusafisha kinywa.
Tanbihi:
1. Kumbuka kubainisha watoto wenye mahitaji maalum ili uweze kuwashirikisha ipasavyo kulingana na mahitaji yao.
2. Shughuli hii inaweza kuwezeshwa kwa vipindi vitatu kwa siku tofauti kwa kutumia mbinu na zana stahiki.
steps_en:
1. Prepare the materials listed above, arrange children in a good formation and create a friendly learning environment.
2. Show children the real items used for mouth/teeth hygiene, charts, cards, still/sequential pictures showing hygiene tools and mouth-cleaning actions.
3. Tell them we will sing together a song about mouth hygiene while demonstrating mouth-cleaning actions.
SONG:
Clean the mouth x3
Front teeth, front teeth and side teeth
Up and down, up and down, finally the tongue
4. Continue the activity until all children can sing correctly.
5. Follow up on whether each child can clean their mouth.
Note:
1. Remember to identify children with special needs so you can involve them appropriately according to their needs.
2. This activity can be carried out over three sessions on different days using appropriate methods and tools.

subject: Kutunza Afya ya Mwili
title_sw: Shughuli 4: Kutambua aina za nguo
title_en: Activity 4: Identifying types of clothing
about_sw: Utambuzi, kudumisha utaratibu wa uvaaji, kufuata maelekezo.
about_en: Recognition, maintaining order in dressing, following instructions.
materials_sw: Vifaa halisi (blauzi, sketi, suruali, shati, fulana, gauni, chupi, boksa, vesti, kaptula, sweta, koti), picha mnato, picha mjongeo na kadi/chati za picha nguo
materials_en: Real items (blouse, skirt, trousers, shirt, vest/T-shirt, dress, underpants, boxer shorts, vest, shorts, sweater, coat), still pictures, sequential pictures and picture cards/charts of clothing
steps_sw:
1. Andaa vifaa tajwa hapo juu, wapange watoto kwenye mpangilio mzuri na kuweka mazingira rafiki ya ujifunzaji.
2. Wagawie watoto vifaa halisi, chati, kadi, picha mnato/picha mjongeo zenye picha za nguo mbalimbali kisha wabainishe aina za nguo kulingana na vifaa walivyopewa.
3. Waulize watoto wataje majina ya nguo na waeleze zinavaliwa na wavulana au wasichana. Sikiliza majibu yao.
4. Waelekeze watoto kutaja na kuainisha nguo zinazovaliwa na wavulana au wasinacha kwa uelewa zaidi.
5. Endelea hadi watoto wote waweze kuainisha nguo zinazovaliwa na wavulana au wasichana.
6. Chunguza kama kila mtoto anaweza kutambua aina za nguo.
Tanbihi:
1. Kumbuka kubainisha watoto wenye mahitaji maalum ili uweze kuwashirikisha ipasavyo kulingana na mahitaji yao.
2. Shughuli hii inaweza kuwezeshwa kwa vipindi vitatu kwa siku tofauti kwa kutumia mbinu na zana stahiki.
steps_en:
1. Prepare the materials listed above, arrange children in a good formation and create a friendly learning environment.
2. Give children real items, charts, cards, still/sequential pictures with various clothing images, then have them identify types of clothing according to the items they have been given.
3. Ask children to name the clothes and explain whether they are worn by boys or girls. Listen to their answers.
4. Guide children to name and categorize clothes worn by boys or girls for greater understanding.
5. Continue until all children can categorize clothes worn by boys or girls.
6. Check whether each child can identify types of clothing.
Note:
1. Remember to identify children with special needs so you can involve them appropriately according to their needs.
2. This activity can be carried out over three sessions on different days using appropriate methods and tools.

subject: Kutunza Afya ya Mwili
title_sw: Shughuli 5: Kufanya usafi wa nguo nyepesi
title_en: Activity 5: Doing light laundry
about_sw: Kudumisha usafi na afya, utambuzi, kujenga tabia na nidhamu ya usafi, unadhifu na utanashati, kuongeza misamiati mipya
about_en: Maintaining cleanliness and health, awareness, building habits and discipline of hygiene, neatness and tidiness, expanding new vocabulary
materials_sw: Maji safi na salama, sabuni ya kufulia, beseni/ndoo, nguo (taulo, kitambaa, soksi), vibanio vya nguo, brashi ya kufulia, Kamba ya kuanikia nguo, picha mnato, picha mjongeo na kadi/chati za picha zinazoonesha tendo la kufua nguo
materials_en: Clean and safe water, laundry soap, basin/bucket, clothes (towel, cloth, socks), clothes pegs, washing brush, clothesline, flashcards, video clips and picture cards/charts showing the act of washing clothes
steps_sw:
1. Andaa vifaa tajwa hapo juu, wapange watoto kwenye mpangilio mzuri na kuweka mazingira rafiki ya ujifunzaji.
2. Waoneshe watoto vifaa halisi vinavyotumika katika tendo la kufua nguo, chati, kadi, picha mnato/picha mjongeo zinazoonesha vifaa na tendo la kufua nguo.
3. Waulize watoto wataje wanachokiona ili kujua uelewa na uzoefu wao katika vifaa na tendo la kufua nguo.
4. Onesha kwa vitendo namna ya kufua nguo.
5. Wagawe watoto kwenye makundi ya watoto watano (5) na uwape vifaa wafue wenyewe.
6. Endelea na shughuli hadi watoto wote waweze kushiriki kikamilifu.
7. Chunguza mtoto mmoja baada ya mwingine kama anafanya usafi wa nguo kwa usahihi.

Tanbihi:
1. Kumbuka kubainisha watoto wenye mahitaji maalum ili uweze kuwashirikisha ipasavyo kulingana na mahitaji yao.
2. Shughuli hii itawezeshwa kwa vipindi vitano (5).
steps_en:
1. Prepare the materials listed above, arrange the children in a good order and create a child-friendly learning environment.
2. Show the children real materials used in washing clothes, charts, cards, flashcards/video clips showing the materials and the act of washing clothes.
3. Ask the children to name what they see in order to gauge their understanding and experience with the materials and act of washing clothes.
4. Demonstrate how to wash clothes.
5. Divide children into groups of five (5) and give them materials to wash themselves.
6. Continue the activity until all children are able to participate fully.
7. Observe one child after another to see if they are washing clothes correctly.

Note:
1. Remember to identify children with special needs so you can include them appropriately according to their needs.
2. This activity will be facilitated over five (5) sessions.

subject: Kutunza Afya ya Mwili
title_sw: Shughuli 6: Usafi wa pua
title_en: Activity 6: Nose hygiene
about_sw: Kujenga stadi/maarifa ya kudumisha usafi, utambuzi, kujenga tabia na nidhamu ya usafi
about_en: Building skills/knowledge for maintaining cleanliness, awareness, building habits and discipline of hygiene
materials_sw: Maji safi na salama, kitambaa (leso, picha mnato, picha mjongeo na kadi/chati za picha zinazoonesha tendo la kusafisha pua
materials_en: Clean and safe water, cloth (handkerchief), flashcards, video clips and picture cards/charts showing the act of cleaning the nose
steps_sw:
1. Andaa vifaa tajwa hapo juu, wapange watoto kwenye mpangilio mzuri na kuweka mazingira rafiki ya ujifunzaji.
2. Wape watoto vifaa halisi vinavyotumika katika tendo la kusafisha pua, chati, kadi, picha mnato/picha mjongeo zinazoonesha vifaa na tendo la kusafisha pua.
3. Waulize watoto wataje wanachokiona ili kujua uelewa na uzoefu wao katika vifaa na tendo la kusafisha pua. Wawezeshe watoto kutaja majina ya vifaa kwa usahihi.
4. Alika mtoto mmoja baada ya mwingine kwa kuzingatia usawa wa jinsia na ujumuishi aende mbele kisha mwambie achukue kitambaa chake asafishe pua huku wenzake wakimtazama. Msaidie mtoto kama anapata changamoto.
5. Wasisitize watoto kusafisha pua zao pindi zinapochafuka ili kudumisha usafi.
6. Chunguza mtoto mmoja baada ya mwingine ili kubaini kama ameweza kusafisha pua vizuri.

Tanbihi:
Kumbuka kubainisha watoto wenye mahitaji maalum ili uweze kuwashirikisha ipasavyo kulingana na mahitaji yao.
Shughuli hii itawezeshwa kwa vipindi vitano (5).
steps_en:
1. Prepare the materials listed above, arrange the children in a good order and create a child-friendly learning environment.
2. Give children real materials used in cleaning the nose, charts, cards, flashcards/video clips showing the materials and the act of cleaning the nose.
3. Ask the children to name what they see in order to gauge their understanding and experience with the materials and the act of cleaning the nose. Enable children to correctly name the materials.
4. Invite one child at a time, considering gender balance and inclusion, to come forward, then tell them to take their cloth and clean their nose while their peers watch. Help the child if they face a challenge.
5. Emphasize to children to clean their noses whenever they become dirty in order to maintain hygiene.
6. Observe one child after another to determine if they have been able to clean their nose properly.

Note:
Remember to identify children with special needs so you can include them appropriately according to their needs.
This activity will be facilitated over five (5) sessions.

subject: Kutambua Vyakula vya Aina Mbalimbali
title_sw: Shughuli 1: Kuimba nyimbo mbalimbali za vyakula
title_en: Activity 1: Singing various food songs
about_sw: Utambuzi wa vyakula mbalimbali, kufuata maelekezo, kukuza lugha
about_en: Awareness of various foods, following instructions, developing language
materials_sw: Vitabu vya nyimbo, nyimbo za kurekodiwa, picha mjongeo
materials_en: Song books, recorded songs, video clips
steps_sw:
1. Andaa vifaa tajwa hapo juu, wapange watoto kwenye mpangilio mzuri na kuweka mazingira rafiki ya ujifunzaji.
2. Waambie watoto tutaimba wimbo wa kutaja vyakula.

Lishee lishee lishe muhimuu x2
Mboga za majani, mchicha na kisamvu vyote vyakula,
Machungwa, mapapai, embe na tikiti, yote matunda,
Mchele na mahindi, mihogo na viazi vyote vyakula,
Maharage na mayai, nyama na samaki vyote vyakula.
Lishee lishee Lishee muhimuu x2

3. Alika watoto mmoja baada ya mwingine kwa kuzingatia usawa wa jinsia na ujumuishi aongoze kuimba wimbo.
4. Endelea hadi watoto wote waweze kuimba wimbo kwa usahihi.
5. Chunguza mtoto mmoja mmoja ili kubaini kama ameweza.

Tanbihi:
1. Kumbuka kubainisha watoto wenye mahitaji maalum ili uweze kuwashirikisha ipasavyo kulingana na mahitaji yao.
2. Shughuli hii itawezeshwa kwa vipindi vitano.
steps_en:
1. Prepare the materials listed above, arrange the children in a good order and create a child-friendly learning environment.
2. Tell the children we will sing a song naming foods.

Eat eat eat what is important x2
Green vegetables, spinach and cassava leaves are all foods,
Oranges, papayas, mangoes and watermelons are all fruits,
Rice and maize, cassava and potatoes are all foods,
Beans and eggs, meat and fish are all foods.
Eat eat eat what is important x2

3. Invite one child at a time, considering gender balance and inclusion, to lead the singing of the song.
4. Continue until all children are able to sing the song correctly.
5. Observe each child individually to determine if they have been able.

Note:
1. Remember to identify children with special needs so you can include them appropriately according to their needs.
2. This activity will be facilitated over five sessions.

subject: Kutambua Vyakula vya Aina Mbalimbali
title_sw: Shughuli 2: Kuchunguza picha za vyakula mbalimbali na kutaja majina yake
title_en: Activity 2: Examining pictures of various foods and naming them
about_sw: Utambuzi wa vyakula mbalimbali, kufuata maelekezo, kukuza lugha.
about_en: Recognition of various foods, following instructions, developing language.
materials_sw: Picha mnato, picha mjongeo, kadi/chati za picha za vyakula mbalimbali, rangi na karatasi zilizochorwa picha za vyakula
materials_en: Printed pictures, animated pictures, cards/charts of pictures of various foods, colours and papers with drawn food pictures
steps_sw:
1. Andaa vifaa tajwa hapo juu, wapange watoto kwenye mpangilio mzuri na kuweka mazingira rafiki ya ujifunzaji.
2. Alika Watoto kuimba nyimbo zinazohusu vyakula wanavyokula kila siku.
3. Gawa picha za vyakula kwa Watoto kisha waelekeze kuhusianisha vyakula wanavyokula na picha wanazoziona.
4. Wagawe watoto kwenye makundi ya watoto 6 na wapatie kila kikundi kadi 5 zenye picha za vyakula mbalimbali kisha kila mtoto apate nafasi ya kutaja majina ya vyakula kulingana na picha husika kwenye kadi. Msaidie mtoto kama anapata changamaoto.
5. Baada ya kutambua na kutaja majina ya vyakula, chukua karatasi iliyochorwa picha ya chakula uipake rangi huku watoto wakikuangalia.
6. Alika watoto wawili kwa kuzingatia usawa wa kijinsia na ujumishi wapake rangi huku wenzao wakiangalia kisha wagawie watoto wote karatasi zilizochorwa picha za vyakula ili wapake rangi na uwasaidie watoto wanaopata changamoto ya kupaka rangi.
7. Chunguza mtoto mmoja mmoja ili kubaini kama ameweza kutambua na kutaja majina ya vyakula.

Tanbihi:
1. Kumbuka kubainisha watoto wenye mahitaji maalum ili uweze kuwashirikisha ipasavyo kulingana na mahitaji yao.
2. (Shughuli hii itawezeshwa kwa vipindi vitatu)
steps_en:
1. Prepare the materials listed above, arrange the children in a good order and create a friendly learning environment.
2. Invite the children to sing songs related to foods they eat every day.
3. Distribute pictures of foods to the children then guide them to match the foods they eat with the pictures they see.
4. Divide children into groups of 6 and give each group 5 cards with pictures of various foods, then each child gets a chance to name the foods according to the pictures on the cards. Help the child if they encounter difficulty.
5. After identifying and naming the foods, take a paper with a drawn food picture and colour it while the children watch.
6. Invite two children, considering gender balance and inclusion, to colour while their peers watch, then give all children papers with drawn food pictures to colour and help those who have difficulty colouring.
7. Assess each child individually to determine whether they have been able to identify and name the foods.

Note:
1. Remember to identify children with special needs so you can include them appropriately according to their needs.
2. (This activity will be implemented in three sessions)

subject: Kutambua Vyakula vya Aina Mbalimbali
title_sw: Shughuli 3: Kutaja vyombo mbalimbali vya kulia chakula
title_en: Activity 3: Naming various eating utensils
about_sw: Utambuzi wa vyombo mbalimbali vya kulia chakula, kufuata maelekezo, kukuza lugha.
about_en: Recognition of various eating utensils, following instructions, developing language.
materials_sw: Vifaa halisi (sahani, kijiko, bakuli, kikombe, sinia, kisosi, bilauri), picha mnato, picha mjongeo na kadi/chati za picha za vyombo vya kulia chakula
materials_en: Real objects (plate, spoon, bowl, cup, tray, saucer, glass), printed pictures, animated pictures and cards/charts of pictures of eating utensils
steps_sw:
1. Andaa vifaa tajwa hapo juu, wapange watoto kwenye mpangilio mzuri na kuweka mazingira rafiki ya ujifunzaji.
2. Waoneshe watoto vifaa halisi au picha za vyombo vya kulia chakula kisha uwulize wachokiona na usikilize majibu yao.
3. Alika mtoto mmoja baada ya mwingine kwa kuzingatia aguse na ataje jina la chombo kimoja kimoja. Msaidie mtoto kama anapata changamaoto.
4. Endelea na mchezo hadi watoto wote waweze kutambua na kutaja majina ya vyombo vya kulia chakula.
5. Chunguza mtoto mmoja mmoja ili kubaini kama ameweza kutaja majina ya vyombo vya kulia chakula.

Tanbihi:
1. Kumbuka kubainisha watoto wenye mahitaji maalum ili uweze kuwashirikisha ipasavyo kulingana na mahitaji yao.
2. Shughuli hii itawezeshwa kwa vipindi vitatu.
steps_en:
1. Prepare the materials listed above, arrange the children in a good order and create a friendly learning environment.
2. Show children the real objects or pictures of eating utensils then ask them what they see and listen to their answers.
3. Invite one child after another, considering inclusion, to touch and name each utensil one by one. Help the child if they encounter difficulty.
4. Continue the game until all children are able to identify and name the eating utensils.
5. Assess each child individually to determine whether they have been able to name the eating utensils.

Note:
1. Remember to identify children with special needs so you can include them appropriately according to their needs.
2. This activity will be implemented in three sessions.

subject: Kutambua Vyakula vya Aina Mbalimbali
title_sw: Shughuli 4: Kutaja aina mbalimbali za mboga
title_en: Activity 4: Naming various types of vegetables
about_sw: Utambuzi wa aina mbalimbali za mboga za majani
about_en: Recognition of various types of green vegetables
materials_sw: Chati, kadi, picha mnato, picha mjongeo mboga halisi na vifanani vya mboga mbalimbali, karatasi za zilizochorwa picha za mboga mbalimbali
materials_en: Charts, cards, printed pictures, animated pictures of real vegetables and models of various vegetables, papers with drawn pictures of various vegetables
steps_sw:
1. Andaa mazingira wezeshi ikiwa ni pamoja na maandalizi ya eneo na zana husika (chati, kadi, picha mnato na picha mjongeo zenye aina mbalimbali za mboga).
2. Waoneshe watoto aina mbalimbali za mboga kwa kutumia chati, kadi, picha mnato, picha mjongeo, mboga halisi kama kabichi, spinachi, jamii ya kunde, nyama, samaki, dagaa kisha waambie watoto wataje wanachokiona na uwasadie kama wanaopata changamoto.
3. Alika mtoto mmoja baada ya mwingine kwa kuzingatia usawa wa kijinsia na ujumuishi aguse na kutaja aina mbalimbali za mboga.
4. Endelaa na mchezo hadi watoto wote wapate nafasi ya kugusa mboga mbalimbali na kutaja majina yake.
5. Endelaa na mchezo hadi watoto wote wapate nafasi ya kugusa mboga mbalimbali na kutaja majina yake.
6. Chunguza kama kila mtoto ameweza kutaja majina ya mboga.

Tanbihi:
1. Kumbuka kuwawezesha watoto wenye mahitaji maalum ili uweze kushiriki kikamilifu.
2. Shughuli hii itawezeshwa kwa vipindi vitano.
steps_en:
1. Prepare an enabling environment including preparation of the area and relevant tools (charts, cards, printed pictures and animated pictures of various types of vegetables).
2. Show children various types of vegetables using charts, cards, printed pictures, animated pictures, real vegetables such as cabbage, spinach, legume family, meat, fish, dried fish, then ask children to name what they see and help those who encounter difficulty.
3. Invite one child after another, considering gender balance and inclusion, to touch and name the various types of vegetables.
4. Continue the game until all children get a chance to touch various vegetables and name them.
5. Continue the game until all children get a chance to touch various vegetables and name them.
6. Assess whether each child has been able to name the vegetables.

Note:
1. Remember to enable children with special needs so that they can participate fully.
2. This activity will be implemented in five sessions.

subject: Kutambua Vyakula vya Aina Mbalimbali
title_sw: Shughuli 5: Kubainisha aina mbalimbali za matunda
title_en: Activity 5: Identifying different types of fruits
about_sw: Utambuzi wa aina mbalimabali za matunda
about_en: Recognition of different types of fruits
materials_sw: Chati, kadi, picha mnato, picha mjongeo matunda halisi na vifanani vya matunda, penseli
materials_en: Chart, cards, printed pictures, fruit sequence pictures, real fruits and fruit replicas, pencil
steps_sw:
1. Andaa mazingira wezeshi ikiwa ni pamoja na maandalizi ya eneo na vifaa tajwa hapo juu
2. Waongoze watoto wakae kwenye umbo la U, nusu duara, duara au mkao wowote unaofaa.
3. Waulize watoto wataje matunda wanayoyafahamu ili kubaini uelewa wao. Sikiliza majibu yao.
4. Waoneshe picha za matunda kwa kutumia chati, kadi, matunda halisi, picha mnato mjongeo kama chungwa, embe, ndizi, pera, nanasi.
5. Chakua chati yenye picha mbalimbali za matunda na kadi zenye picha zinazofanana na picha zilizoko kwenye chati. Watoto wahusianishe kwa kuchukua kadi moja ya tunda na kuweka kwenye picha ya tunda linalofanana kwenye chati.
6. Alika watoto wawili kwa kuzingatia usawa wa kijinsia na ujumuishi wahusianishe picha huku wengine wakiangalia.
7. Endelea na mchezo hadi watoto wote waweze kuhusianisha matunda kwa usahihi.
8. Wapatie watoto karatasi zenye picha za mboga wakapake rangi wakiwa nyumbani.
9. Chunguza kama kila mtoto ameweza kutaja majina ya matunda.

Tanbihi
1. Kumbuka kuainisha watoto wenye mahitaji maalum ili uweze kuwashirikisha kulingana na mahitaji yao.
2. Shughuli hii inaweza kuwezeshwa kwa vipindi vitatu kwa siku tofauti kwa kutumia mbinu na zana stahiki.
steps_en:
1. Prepare an enabling environment including area setup and the materials listed above.
2. Guide children to sit in a U-shape, semicircle, circle or any suitable arrangement.
3. Ask children to name fruits they know in order to assess their understanding. Listen to their answers.
4. Show pictures of fruits using a chart, cards, real fruits, printed sequence pictures such as orange, mango, banana, pear, pineapple.
5. Take a chart with various fruit pictures and cards with matching pictures. Children match by picking one fruit card and placing it on the matching picture on the chart.
6. Invite two children at a time, considering gender balance and inclusion, to match the pictures while others watch.
7. Continue the game until all children can correctly match the fruits.
8. Give children papers with vegetable pictures to colour at home.
9. Check whether each child was able to name the fruits.

Note
1. Remember to identify children with special needs so you can include them according to their needs.
2. This activity can be facilitated in three sessions on different days using appropriate techniques and tools.

subject: Kutambua Vyakula vya Aina Mbalimbali
title_sw: Shughuli 6: Kutambua ladha ya vyakula
title_en: Activity 6: Identifying the taste of foods
about_sw: Kutambua na kutofautisha ladha ya vyakula
about_en: Recognising and distinguishing the taste of foods
materials_sw: Vyakula mbalimbali, chati, kadi, picha mnato, picha mjongeo za vyakula mbalimbali
materials_en: Various foods, chart, cards, printed pictures, sequence pictures of various foods
steps_sw:
1. Andaa mazingira wezeshi ikiwa ni pamoja na maandalizi ya eneo na vifaa tajwa hapo juu
2. Waulize watoto wataje vyakula wanavyovifahamu ili kubaini uelewa wao. Sikiliza majibu yao.
3. Waoneshe vyakula, picha za vyakula kwa kutumia chati, kadi, picha mnato, picha mjongeo au kama, sukari, chumvi, chungwa, mchungu, mgagani, mnafu na limau.
4. Kueleza ladha ya vyakula kutokana na picha na vyakula walivyochunguza. Wafafanulie watoto kutambua ladha ya vyakula.
5. Wagawe watoto kwenye makundi, kisha wapatie vyakula vyenye ladha tofauti (tamu, chachu, chungu, chumvi).
6. Mpatie kila mtoto chakula aina moja baada ya nyingine aonje na aseme kina ladha gani.
7. Hakiksha vyakula/vitu wanavyoonja watoto ni safi na salama
8. Endelea na mchezo hadi watoto wote waonje vyakula na kusema vina ladha gani.
9. Chunguza kama kila mtoto ameweza kutambua ladha mbalimbali za vyakula

Tanbihi
1. Kumbuka kuainisha watoto wenye mahitaji maalum ili uweze kuwashirikisha kulingana na mahitaji yao
2. Shughuli hii itawezeshwa kwa vipindi 7
steps_en:
1. Prepare an enabling environment including area setup and the materials listed above.
2. Ask children to name foods they know in order to assess their understanding. Listen to their answers.
3. Show foods and food pictures using a chart, cards, printed pictures, sequence pictures, or items such as sugar, salt, orange, bitter leaf, coconut, mnafu and lemon.
4. Explain the taste of foods based on the pictures and foods they examined. Help children identify the taste of foods.
5. Divide children into groups, then give them foods with different tastes (sweet, sour, bitter, salty).
6. Give each child one type of food at a time to taste and say what taste it has.
7. Ensure that the foods/items children are tasting are clean and safe.
8. Continue the activity until all children have tasted the foods and said what taste they have.
9. Check whether each child was able to identify the different tastes of foods.

Note
1. Remember to identify children with special needs so you can include them according to their needs.
2. This activity will be facilitated in 7 sessions.

subject: Kutambua Vyakula vya Aina Mbalimbali
title_sw: Shughuli 7: Kutambua wanyama wanaoliwa na wasioliwa
title_en: Activity 7: Identifying animals that are eaten and those that are not eaten
about_sw: Kutofautisha wanyama wanaoliwa na wasioliwa, kufuata maelekezo
about_en: Distinguishing animals that are eaten from those that are not eaten, following instructions
materials_sw: Chati, kadi, picha mnato, picha mjongeo na vifanani vya wanyama
materials_en: Chart, cards, printed pictures, sequence pictures and animal replicas/models
steps_sw:
1. Andaa mazingira wezeshi ikiwa ni pamoja na maandalizi ya eneo na vifaa tajwa hapo juu.
2. Waulize watoto wataje wanyama wanaowafahamu ili kubaini uelewa wao. Sikiliza majibu yao.
3. Waoneshe picha za wanyama kwa kutumia chati, kadi, picha mnato, picha mjongeo au vifanani kama ng'ombe, mbuzi, paka, mbwa.
4. Waongoze wtoto wataje na kueleza kama wanyama hao wanaliwa au hawailiwi. Wasaidie watoto wanapopata changamoto.
5. Waongoze Watoto kuimba wimbo ufuatao wa nyama nyama (ukitaja jina la mnyama anaeliwa wataruka juu na kusema inaliwa na ukitaja jina la mnyama asieliwa watasema hailiiwi bila kuruka)

Nyama nyama nyama, nyama x2
Ya ng'ombe, inaliwa
Ya mbwa, hailiiwi
Nyama nyama nyama, nyama x2
Ya kuku, inaliwa
Ya paka, hailiiwi

6. Endelea na mchezo hadi watoto wote waweze kutambua wanyama wanaoliwa na wasioliwa.
7. Chunguza kama kila mtoto ameweza kutambua wanyama wanaoliwa na wasioliwa.

Tanbihi
1. Kumbuka kuainisha watoto wenye mahitaji maalum ili uweze kuwashirikisha kulingana na mahitaji yao
2. Shughuli hii inaweza kuwezeshwa kwa vipindi vitatu kwa siku tofauti kwa kutumia mbinu na zana stahiki.
steps_en:
1. Prepare an enabling environment including area setup and the materials listed above.
2. Ask children to name animals they know in order to assess their understanding. Listen to their answers.
3. Show pictures of animals using a chart, cards, printed pictures, sequence pictures or models such as cow, goat, cat, dog.
4. Guide children to name and explain whether those animals are eaten or not eaten. Help children when they face challenges.
5. Guide children to sing the following song about meat (when the name of an animal that is eaten is mentioned, they jump up and say 'inaliwa/it is eaten'; when the name of an animal that is not eaten is mentioned, they say 'hailiiwi/it is not eaten' without jumping):

Nyama nyama nyama, nyama x2
Ya ng'ombe, inaliwa (Beef, it is eaten)
Ya mbwa, hailiiwi (Dog, it is not eaten)
Nyama nyama nyama, nyama x2
Ya kuku, inaliwa (Chicken, it is eaten)
Ya paka, hailiiwi (Cat, it is not eaten)

6. Continue the activity until all children can identify animals that are eaten and those that are not eaten.
7. Check whether each child was able to identify animals that are eaten and those that are not eaten.

Note
1. Remember to identify children with special needs so you can include them according to their needs.
2. This activity can be facilitated in three sessions on different days using appropriate techniques and tools.

subject: Kutambua Vyakula vya Aina Mbalimbali
title_sw: Shughuli 8: Kutaja vyakula vinavyoharibu meno
title_en: Activity 8: Naming foods that damage teeth
about_sw: Utambuzi wa vyakula vinavyoharibu meno
about_en: Recognition of foods that damage teeth
materials_sw: Vyakula halisi, chati, kadi, picha mnato, picha mjongeo za vyakula vinavyotakiwa kuliwa kwa wingi (wali, ugali, mboga za majani, matunda) na vyakula visivyotakiwa kuliwa kwa wingi kama (juisi za viwandani, peremende, chokuleti, biskuti)
materials_en: Real foods, charts, cards, printed pictures, animated pictures of foods recommended to be eaten in large quantities (rice, ugali, green vegetables, fruits) and foods not recommended to be eaten in large quantities such as (factory juices, sweets, chocolate, biscuits)
steps_sw:
1. Andaa mazingira wezeshi ikiwa ni pamoja na maandalizi ya eneo na vifaa husika (vyakula halisi, chati, kadi, picha mnato na picha za vyakula mbalimbali).
2. Waulize watoto wataje vyakula ambavyo huwa wanakula na vinaharibu meno.
3. Onesha vyakula mbalimbali vinavyotakiwa kuliwa kwa wingi (wali, ugali, mboga za majani, matunda) na vinavyoharibu meno (juisi za viwandani, peremende, chokuleti, biskuti) kwa kutumia chati, kadi, picha mnato, picha mjongeo.
4. Waalike watoto kutaja majina ya vyakula hivyo kisha wafafanulie kwa kueleza faida ya vyakula vinavyotakiwa kuliwa kwa wingi na madhara ya vyakula visivyotakiwa kuliwa kwa wingi.
5. Waambie watoto tutacheza mchezo wa vyakula vinavyotakiwa kuliwa kwa wingi na visivyotakiwa kuliwa kwa wingi. Eleza kuwa nikitaja jina la chakula kinachiotakiwa kuliwa kwa wingi utaruka juu na kusema 'ninakula' na nikitaja jina la chakula kisichatakiwa kuliwa kwa wingi utakaa kimya na hutakiwi kuruka.
6. Endelea na mchezo hadi watoto wote waweze kutambua vyakula vinavyotakiwa kuliwa kwa wingi na visivyotakiwa kuliwa kwa wingi. Chunguza kila mtoto kama ameweza kutofautisha vyakula vinavyotakiwa kuliwa kwa wingi na visivyotakiwa kuliwa kwa wingi.

Tanbihi:
1. Kila kipindi tumia aina 4 za vyakula vinavyotakiwa kuliwa kwa wingi na vile vinavyoharibu meno.
2. Shughuli hii inaweza kuwezeshwa kwa vipindi vitatu kwa siku tofauti kwa kutumia mbinu na zana stahiki.
steps_en:
1. Prepare an enabling environment including setting up the area and relevant materials (real foods, charts, cards, printed pictures and pictures of various foods).
2. Ask children to name foods they usually eat that damage teeth.
3. Show various foods recommended to be eaten in large quantities (rice, ugali, green vegetables, fruits) and those that damage teeth (factory juices, sweets, chocolate, biscuits) using charts, cards, printed pictures, animated pictures.
4. Invite children to name those foods then explain the benefits of foods recommended to be eaten in large quantities and the harms of foods not recommended to be eaten in large quantities.
5. Tell children we will play a game about foods recommended to be eaten in large quantities and those not recommended. Explain that when you name a food recommended to be eaten in large quantities they should jump up and say 'I eat it' and when you name a food not recommended to be eaten in large quantities they should stay quiet and must not jump.
6. Continue the game until all children can identify foods recommended to be eaten in large quantities and those not recommended. Check each child to see if they can distinguish between foods recommended and not recommended to be eaten in large quantities.

Note:
1. Each session use 4 types of foods recommended to be eaten in large quantities and those that damage teeth.
2. This activity can be facilitated over three sessions on different days using appropriate techniques and tools.

subject: Kutunza Mazingira Katika Jamii Yake
title_sw: Shughuli 1: Kutaja vitu wanavyoviona kwenye mazingira
title_en: Activity 1: Naming things they see in the environment
about_sw: Utambuzi wa vitu vinavyopatikana kwenye mazingira yake
about_en: Recognition of things found in their environment
materials_sw: Chati, kadi, picha mnato, picha mjongeo za vitu vinavyopatikana kwenye mazingira
materials_en: Charts, cards, printed pictures, animated pictures of things found in the environment
steps_sw:
1. Andaa vifaa tajwa hapo juu, wapange watoto kwenye mpangilio mzuri na kuweka mazingira rafiki ya ujifunzaji.
2. Waambie leo tutaangalia vitu vinavyopatikana ndani na nje ya kituo, kila mmoja aangalie kwa makini ili tukirudi ndani kila mmoja atasema ameona nini.
3. Waongoze watoto kuangalia vitu vilivyopo ndani na nje ya kituo.
4. Baada ya watoto kurudi darasani, alika mtoto mmoja baada ya mwingine ataje vitu alivyoviona. Wasaidie watoto wanaopata changamoto.
5. Endelea na mchezo hadi watoto wote wataje vitu walivyoviona ndani na nje ya kituo.
6. Hitimsha kwa kuwaonesha watoto chati, kadi, picha mnato au picha mjongeo za picha za vitu mbalimbali na uwaambie kuwa vitu vyote mlivyoviona ndani na nje ya kituo na kwenye picha ndio mazingira yetu.
7. Chunguza kila mtoto kama ameweza kutaja vitu alivyoviona.

Tanbihi:
1. Kumbuka kuwabainisha watoto wenye mahitaji maalum ili uweze kuwashirikisha kulingana na mahitaji yao.
2. Shughuli hii inaweza kuwezeshwa kwa vipindi vitatu kwa siku tofauti kwa kutumia mbinu na zana stahiki.
steps_en:
1. Prepare the materials listed above, arrange children in a good order and create a friendly learning environment.
2. Tell them today we will look at things found inside and outside the centre, everyone should look carefully so that when we return inside each one will say what they saw.
3. Guide children to look at things inside and outside the centre.
4. After children return to the classroom, invite one child after another to name things they saw. Help children who face challenges.
5. Continue until all children have named things they saw inside and outside the centre.
6. Conclude by showing children charts, cards, printed pictures or animated pictures of various things and tell them that all the things they saw inside and outside the centre and in the pictures are our environment.
7. Check each child to see if they were able to name things they saw.

Note:
1. Remember to identify children with special needs so you can include them according to their needs.
2. This activity can be facilitated over three sessions on different days using appropriate techniques and tools.

subject: Kutunza Mazingira Katika Jamii Yake
title_sw: Shughuli 2: Kusikiliza na kusimulia hadithi zinazohusu mazingira na usalama wake katika mazingira
title_en: Activity 2: Listening to and narrating stories about the environment and safety in the environment
about_sw: Kusikiliza, kusimulia, kutamka maneno, umakini, kutambua mazingira salama na mazingira hatarishi
about_en: Listening, narrating, pronouncing words, attentiveness, identifying safe environments and dangerous environments
materials_sw: Kitabu cha hadithi, chati, kadi, picha mnato, picha mjongeo, sauti zilizorekodiwa zinazohu hadithi za mazingira
materials_en: Story book, charts, cards, printed pictures, animated pictures, recorded sounds related to environment stories
steps_sw:
1. Andaa vifaa tajwa hapo juu na wapange watoto kwenye mpangilio mzuri na kuweka mazingira rafiki ya ujifunzaji.
2. Tambulisha kwa watoto kuhusu hadithi nzuri ya Kirikuu utakayowasimulia.
3. Waoneshe picha zinazohusu hadithi ya Kirikuu.
4. Simulia kwa kutumia picha zinazoendana na matukio ya hadithi na kuonesha ishara za matukio husika kama vile furaha, huzuni, kulia, maumivu, huruma, kuogopa, kupanda na kushuka kwa sauti.
5. Waulize watoto waseme hadithi inafundisha nini kisha sikilia majibu yao na wasaidie ikihitajika.
6. Hitimsha kwa kuwaambia watoto wasiwe wanacheza kwenye mazingira hatarishi.
7. Chunguza kila mtoto kama ameweza kuhadithia na kusema fundisho la hadithi hiyo.

Tanbihi:
1. Kumbuka kuwabainisha watoto wenye mahitaji maalum ili uweze kuwashirikisha kulingana na mahitaji yao.
2. Shughuli hii itawezeshwa kwa vipindi 6. Tumia hadithi mbalimbali zinazohusu mazingira na usalama kwa kuzingatia hatua zilizoelekezwa katika shughuli hii.
steps_en:
1. Prepare the materials listed above, arrange children in a good order and create a friendly learning environment.
2. Introduce children to the good story of Kirikuu that you will tell them.
3. Show them pictures related to the Kirikuu story.
4. Narrate using pictures that match the events of the story and show expressions for relevant events such as joy, sadness, crying, pain, compassion, fear, raising and lowering of voice.
5. Ask children to say what the story teaches, then listen to their answers and help if needed.
6. Conclude by telling children not to play in dangerous environments.
7. Check each child to see if they were able to retell and state the lesson of the story.

Note:
1. Remember to identify children with special needs so you can include them according to their needs.
2. This activity will be facilitated over 6 sessions. Use various stories about the environment and safety following the steps outlined in this activity.

subject: Kutunza Mazingira Katika Jamii Yake
title_sw: Shughuli 3: Kusafisha mazingira
title_en: Activity 3: Cleaning the environment
about_sw: Kutunza mazingira, tabia na nidhamu ya usafi
about_en: Caring for the environment, cleanliness habits and discipline
materials_sw: Chati, kadi, picha mnato, picha mjongeo zenye vifaa vya kusafisha na vifaa halisi (ufagio, reki, kizoleo cha uchafu, pipa la taka, jembe, fyekeo, beleshi, toroli, glovu, mabuti) mazingira
materials_en: Charts, cards, printed pictures, animated pictures showing cleaning tools and real tools (broom, rake, dustpan, rubbish bin, hoe, slasher, shovel, trolley, gloves, boots) for the environment
steps_sw:
1. Andaa vifaa tajwa hapo juu, wapange watoto kwenye mpangilio mzuri na kuweka mazingira rafiki ya ujifunzaji.
2. Waulize watoto wataje vifaa vya kufanyia usafi wa mazingira wanavyovifahamu. Sikiliza majibu yao.
3. Waoneshe vifaa mbalimbali vya kufanyia usafi wa mazingira kisha wataje majina ya vifaa hivyo na kazi zake. Wasaidie wanaopata changamoto.
4. Wapatie vifaa vya kusafishia mazingira kulingana umri wao kisha waambie wasafishe mazingira. Wawezeshe wanaopata changamoto ya kutumia vifaa hivyo.
5. Baada ya kumaliza kusafisha mazingira, waambie warudishe vifaa sehemu husika kisha wanawe mikono.
6. Imba wimbo ufuatao unaohusu kufanya usafi pamoja na watoto (watoto wataimba huku wanaokota taka na kuziweka kwenye pipa la taka):
Mtoto msafi nani x2
Mtoto msafi mimi x2
Naokota takataka, nachukua takataka
Weka hapa weka pale, mazingira safiiii
7. Hitimsha kwa kuwaambia watoto wajenge utaratibu wa kusafisha mazingira ili kuepuka maradhi.
8. Chunguza kila mtoto kama ameweza kufanya usafi wa mazingira
Tanbihi:
1. Kumbuka kuwabainisha watoto wenye mahitaji maalum ili uweze kuwashirikisha kulingana na mahitaji yao.
2. Shughuli hii itawezeshwa kwa vipindi 6.
steps_en:
1. Prepare the materials listed above, arrange children in a good order and create a friendly learning environment.
2. Ask children to name the cleaning tools they know. Listen to their answers.
3. Show them various environmental cleaning tools then have them name the tools and their uses. Help those who find it difficult.
4. Give them cleaning tools appropriate for their age and ask them to clean the environment. Support those who find it challenging to use the tools.
5. After finishing cleaning the environment, tell them to return the tools to their proper place and then wash their hands.
6. Sing the following song about cleaning together with the children (children sing while picking up litter and putting it in the rubbish bin):
Who is a clean child? x2
I am a clean child x2
I pick up rubbish, I take the rubbish
Put here, put there, a very clean environment
7. Conclude by telling children to build a habit of cleaning the environment to avoid diseases.
8. Assess each child on whether they were able to clean the environment.
Note:
1. Remember to identify children with special needs so you can include them according to their needs.
2. This activity will be implemented in 6 sessions.

subject: Kutunza Mazingira Katika Jamii Yake
title_sw: Shughuli 4: Kuelezea wanyama wanaofugwa na wasiofugwa
title_en: Activity 4: Describing domestic and wild animals
about_sw: Kutambua wanyama mbalimbalia wanaofugwa na wasiofugwa
about_en: Identifying various domestic and wild animals
materials_sw: Vifani vya wanyama, chati, kadi, picha mnato, picha mjongeo zenye wanyama wanaofugwa na Wanyama wa porini
materials_en: Animal figurines, charts, cards, printed pictures, animated pictures showing domestic animals and wild animals
steps_sw:
1. Andaa vifaa tajwa hapo juu na wapange watoto kwenye mpangilio mzuri na kuweka mazingira rafiki ya ujifunzaji.
2. Waulize watoto wataje wanyama wanaofugwa kisha wachunguze picha mbalimbali za wanyama wakufugwa.
3. Waongoze kutaja majina ya wanyama hao. Wasaidie kama wanapata changamoto.
4. Tumia wimbo au hadithi kueleza zaidi wanyama wafugwao.
5. Waulize watoto wataje wanyama wasiofugwa kisha wachunguze picha mbalimbali za wanyama wasiofugwa.
6. Waongoze kutaja majina ya wanyama hao. Wasaidie kama wanapata chngamoto.
7. Wagawe watoto kwenye makundi na uwagawie maboksi mawili (boksi moja la kuweka kadi za wanyama wakufugwa na jingine la kuweka kadi za wanyama wa wasiofugwa) na kisha waelekeze kuchambua kadi hizo na kuweka kadi kwenye boksi husika.
8. Pita kila kundi kubaini kama wameainisha wanyama wafugwao na wanyama wa wasiofugwa kwa na uwasaidie kama kuna changamoto.
9. Chunguza kila mtoto kama ameweza kubainisha wanyama.
Tanbihi:
1. Kumbuka kuwabainisha watoto wenye mahitaji maalum ili uweze kuwashirikisha kulingana na mahitaji yao.
2. shughuli hii itawezeshwa kwa vipindi 10.
steps_en:
1. Prepare the materials listed above and arrange children in a good order and create a friendly learning environment.
2. Ask children to name domestic animals then have them examine various pictures of domestic animals.
3. Guide them to name those animals. Help them if they find it difficult.
4. Use a song or story to further explain domestic animals.
5. Ask children to name wild animals then have them examine various pictures of wild animals.
6. Guide them to name those animals. Help them if they find it difficult.
7. Divide children into groups and give each group two boxes (one box for placing cards of domestic animals and another for wild animals) then direct them to sort the cards and place them in the correct box.
8. Go to each group to check whether they have correctly categorised domestic and wild animals and help them where there are challenges.
9. Assess each child on whether they were able to identify the animals.
Note:
1. Remember to identify children with special needs so you can include them according to their needs.
2. This activity will be implemented in 10 sessions.

subject: Kutunza Mazingira Katika Jamii Yake
title_sw: Shughuli 5: Kueleza picha za maeneo muhimu ya kijamii yanayopatikana kwenye mazingira yake
title_en: Activity 5: Describing pictures of important community places found in their environment
about_sw: Kutambua maeneo muhimu yanayopatikana katika mazingira yao
about_en: Identifying important places found in their environment
materials_sw: Chati, kadi, picha mnato, picha mjongeo za soko, kanisa, msikiti, shule, uwanja wa mpitra, hospitali, kiwanja cha ndege na vipande vya karatasi kuwakilisha pesa
materials_en: Charts, cards, printed pictures, animated pictures of a market, church, mosque, school, stadium, hospital, airport and pieces of paper to represent money
steps_sw:
1. Andaa vifaa tajwa hapo juu na wapange watoto kwenye mpangilio mzuri na kuweka mazingira rafiki ya ujifunzaji.
2. Waulize watoto kama wamewahi kutembelea maeneo kama vile sokoni, kanisani, msikitini na shuleni.
3. Waoneshe watoto picha za maeneo hayo kulingana na mazingira yao.
4. Watoto kutaja vitu na watu wanaopatikana kwenye maeneo hayo mfano sokoni kuna wauzaji, wateja na bidhaa (mchele, maharage, nyanya).
5. Watoto kufanya igizo dhima kwa kutumia eneo mojawapo mfano sokoni.
6. Chunguza kila mtoto kama ameweza kutaja vitu na watu wanaopatikana kwenye maeneo muhimu katika mazingira yake.
Tanbihi:
1. Kumbuka kuwabainisha watoto wenye mahitaji maalum ili uweze kuwashirikisha kulingana na mahitaji yao.
2. Shughuli hii inaweza kuwezeshwa kwa vipindi sita kwa siku tofauti kwa kutumia mbinu na zana stahiki.
steps_en:
1. Prepare the materials listed above and arrange children in a good order and create a friendly learning environment.
2. Ask children if they have ever visited places such as the market, church, mosque and school.
3. Show children pictures of those places according to their environment.
4. Children name things and people found in those places, for example at the market there are sellers, customers and goods (rice, beans, tomatoes).
5. Children perform role play using one of the places, for example the market.
6. Assess each child on whether they were able to name things and people found in important places in their environment.
Note:
1. Remember to identify children with special needs so you can include them according to their needs.
2. This activity can be implemented in six sessions on different days using appropriate techniques and materials.

subject: Kutunza Mazingira Katika Jamii Yake
title_sw: Shughuli 6: Kutofautisha wanyama, ndege na wadudu wanaopatikana kwenye mazingira
title_en: Activity 6: Differentiating animals, birds and insects found in the environment
about_sw: Kutambua wanyama, ndege na wadudu wanaopatina kwenye mazingira
about_en: Identifying animals, birds and insects found in the environment
materials_sw: Vifani vya wanyama, ndege na wadudu, hati, kadi, picha mnato, picha mjongeo za wanyama
materials_en: Animal, bird and insect figurines/models, charts, cards, printed pictures, animated pictures of animals
steps_sw:
1. Andaa vifaa tajwa hapo juu na wapange watoto kwenye mpangilio mzuri na kuweka mazingira rafiki ya ujifunzaji.
2. Watoto wachunguze picha za wanyama, ndege na wadudu kisha waulize wataje wanachokiona.
3. Imba wimbo wa kutaja majina ya wanyama, ndege na wadudu:
Simba, simba ni mnayama mkali
Simba, simba, ni mfalme wa pori
Nyuki nyuki, ni mdudu mzuri
Nyuki, nyuki, asali yake tamu
Njiwa, njiwa, ni ndege mzuri
Njiwa, njiwa, ni ndege mpole
4. Endelea kuimba kwa kutaja wanyama, ndege na wadudu mbalimbali ili kujenga utambuzi kwa mtoto.
5. Wapatie watoto picha mbalimbali za wanyama, ndege na wdudu kisha wachunguze kuzitofautisha kwa kuzipanga kulingana na sifa zao.
6. Chunguza kila mtoto kama ameweza kutaja wanyama, ndege na wadudu na kueleza sifa zao.
Tanbihi:
1. Kumbuka kuwabainisha watoto wenye mahitaji maalum ili uweze kuwashirikisha kulingana na mahitaji yao.
2. Shughuli hii itawezeshwa kwa vipindi 6.
steps_en:
1. Prepare the materials listed above and arrange children in a good arrangement, creating a friendly learning environment.
2. Children examine pictures of animals, birds and insects, then ask them to name what they see.
3. Sing a song naming animals, birds and insects:
Lion, lion is a fierce animal
Lion, lion, is the king of the wild
Bee, bee, is a good insect
Bee, bee, its honey is sweet
Dove, dove, is a beautiful bird
Dove, dove, is a gentle bird
4. Continue singing by naming various animals, birds and insects to build the child's recognition.
5. Give children various pictures of animals, birds and insects, then have them examine and differentiate them by sorting according to their characteristics.
6. Check each child to see if they can name animals, birds and insects and explain their characteristics.
Note:
1. Remember to identify children with special needs so you can include them according to their needs.
2. This activity will be facilitated over 6 periods.

subject: Kutunza Mazingira Katika Jamii Yake
title_sw: Shughuli 7: Kubaini wanyama na wadudu hatarisha kwenye mazingira
title_en: Activity 7: Identifying dangerous animals and insects in the environment
about_sw: Kutambua wanyama na wadudu hatari na kuchukua tahadhari, kufuata maelekezo
about_en: Identifying dangerous animals and insects and taking precautions, following instructions
materials_sw: Chati, kadi, picha mnato, picha mjongeo za wanyama na wadudu hatari
materials_en: Charts, cards, printed pictures, animated pictures of dangerous animals and insects
steps_sw:
1. Andaa vifaa tajwa hapo juu na wapange watoto kwenye mpangilio mzuri na kuweka mazingira rafiki ya ujifunzaji.
2. Waoneshe watoto picha za wanyama na wadudu hatari kisha waulize wataje wanachokiona. Watataja majina ya wanyama na wadudu hao na kueleza athari zao (nyoka, mbwa) na wadudu (nge, mbu, nzi).
3. Imba wimbo wa wanyama na wadudu hatari; watoto wataitikia kwa kusema mwache apite na kuigiza sauti ya mnyama/mdudu huyo na kusema ni hatari:
Nyoka huyo, nyoka huyo
Mwache apite mwache apite,
siii siiii ni hatari Simba huyo, simba huyo
Mwache apite mwache apite, woooh
woooh ni hatari Nge huyo, nge huyo
Mwache apite mwache apite, nge nge ni hatari.
4. Endelea na mchezo hadi watoto wote waweze kutambua wanyama na wadudu hatari.
5. Chunguza kila mtoto kama ameweza kutaja majina ya wanyama na wadudu hatari.
Tanbihi:
1. Kumbuka kuwabainisha watoto wenye mahitaji maalum ili uweze kuwashirikisha kulingana na mahitaji yao.
2. Shughuli hii itawezeshwa kwa vipindi 7.
steps_en:
1. Prepare the materials listed above and arrange children in a good arrangement, creating a friendly learning environment.
2. Show children pictures of dangerous animals and insects, then ask them to name what they see. They will name those animals and insects and explain their effects (snake, dog) and insects (scorpion, mosquito, fly).
3. Sing a song about dangerous animals and insects; children will respond by saying 'let it pass' and imitating the sound of that animal/insect and saying it is dangerous:
That snake, that snake
Let it pass, let it pass,
no no it's dangerous that lion, that lion
Let it pass, let it pass, woooh
woooh it's dangerous that scorpion, that scorpion
Let it pass, let it pass, scorpion scorpion is dangerous.
4. Continue the game until all children can identify dangerous animals and insects.
5. Check each child to see if they can name dangerous animals and insects.
Note:
1. Remember to identify children with special needs so you can include them according to their needs.
2. This activity will be facilitated over 7 periods.

subject: Kutunza Mazingira Katika Jamii Yake
title_sw: Shughuli 8: Kutambua na kuelezea vitu hatarishi kwenye mazingira yake
title_en: Activity 8: Identifying and explaining dangerous objects in the child's environment
about_sw: Kutambua vitu hatarishi na kuchukua hatua
about_en: Identifying dangerous objects and taking action
materials_sw: Chati, kadi, picha mnato, picha mjongeo za msumari, chupa iliyovunjika, kisu, wembe, moto, dimbwi la maji
materials_en: Charts, cards, printed pictures, animated pictures of a nail, broken bottle, knife, razor blade, fire, pool of water
steps_sw:
1. Andaa vifaa tajwa hapo juu na wapange watoto kwenye mpangilio mzuri na kuweka mazingira rafiki ya ujifunzaji.
2. Waelekeze watoto kuchunguza picha za vitu hatarishi na kisha waulize wataje wanachokiona. Sikiliza majibu yao na wafafanulie kwa kutaja majina na madhara ya vitu hatarishi (msumari chupa zilizopasuka, madimbwi ya maji machafu, kisu na watu).
3. Wagawe watoto kwenye makundi kisha wapatie kadi za vitu hatarishi (4) na visivyo hatarishi (4) kisha waambie wachambue kwa kutenga pamoja vitu hatarishi na visivyohatarishi. Wasaidie watoto wanaoshindwa kubainisha vitu hatarishi na visivyohatarishi.
4. Endelea na mchezo hadi watoto wote waweze kutambua vitu hatarishi katika mazingira.
5. Chunguza kila mtoto kama ameweza kutaja vitu na watu wanaopatiakana kwenye maeneo muhimu katika mazingira yake.
Tanbihi:
1. Kumbuka kuwabainisha watoto wenye mahitaji maalum ili uweze kuwashirikisha kulingana na mahitaji yao.
2. Shughuli hii itawezeshwa kwa vipindi 8.
steps_en:
1. Prepare the materials listed above and arrange children in a good arrangement, creating a friendly learning environment.
2. Guide children to examine pictures of dangerous objects and then ask them to name what they see. Listen to their answers and explain by naming the dangerous objects and their harms (nail, broken bottles, dirty water pools, knife and people).
3. Divide children into groups then give them cards of dangerous objects (4) and non-dangerous objects (4) and tell them to sort by separating dangerous and non-dangerous objects. Help children who struggle to identify dangerous and non-dangerous objects.
4. Continue the game until all children can identify dangerous objects in the environment.
5. Check each child to see if they can name objects and people found in important areas in their environment.
Note:
1. Remember to identify children with special needs so you can include them according to their needs.
2. This activity will be facilitated over 8 periods.

subject: Kutunza Mazingira Katika Jamii Yake
title_sw: Shughuli 9: Kucheza michezo inayohusu usalama katika mazingira
title_en: Activity 9: Playing games related to environmental safety
about_sw: Kusikiliza, kusimulia, kutamka maneno, umakini, kutambua mazingira salama na mazingira hatarishi
about_en: Listening, narrating, pronouncing words, attentiveness, identifying safe environments and dangerous environments
materials_sw: Kitabu cha hadithi, chati, kadi, picha mnato, picha mjongeo, sauti zilizorekodiwa zinazohu hadithi za mazingira
materials_en: Story book, chart, cards, still pictures, video clips, recorded sounds related to environmental stories
steps_sw:
1. Andaa vifaa tajwa hapo juu na wapange watoto kwenye mpangilio mzuri na kuweka mazingira rafiki ya ujifunzaji.
2. Waambie leo nitawasimulia hadithi nzuri ya Kirikuu, nisikilizeni kwa makini baadae na nyinyi mtasimulia na kusema hadithi inatufundisha nini.
3. Waoneshe picha zinazohusu usalama katika mazingira.
4. Watoto wafanye mchezo wa kuigiza kuhusu usalama katika mazingira.
5. Waulize watoto wacheze mchezo unahusu nini kisha, sikiliza majibu yao na wasaidie ikihitajika.
6. Alika watoto kwa kuzingatia usawa wa kijinsia na ujumuishi jinsi ya kuchukua ya usalama katika mazingira. Wasaidie watoto wanaopata changamoto.
7. Hitimsha kwa kuwaambia watoto wasiwe wanacheza kwenye mazingira hatarishi.
8. Chunguza kila mtoto kama ameweza kuhadithia na kusema fundisho la hadithi hiyo.
Tanbihi:
1. Kumbuka kuwabainisha watoto wenye mahitaji maalum ili uweze kuwashirikisha kulingana na mahitaji yao.
2. Shughuli hii itawezeshwa kwa vipindi 5.
steps_en:
1. Prepare the materials listed above and arrange children in a good order, creating a child-friendly learning environment.
2. Tell them: today I will tell you a nice story about Kirikuu, listen carefully, and afterwards you will narrate and say what the story teaches us.
3. Show them pictures related to environmental safety.
4. Children role-play about safety in the environment.
5. Ask children what the game is about, then listen to their answers and assist where needed.
6. Invite children, considering gender balance and inclusion, on how to stay safe in the environment. Support children who are struggling.
7. Conclude by telling children not to play in dangerous environments.
8. Assess each child whether they can narrate and state the lesson of the story.
Notes:
1. Remember to identify children with special needs so you can include them according to their needs.
2. This activity can be done in 5 sessions.

subject: Kutunza Mazingira Katika Jamii Yake
title_sw: Shughuli 10: Kupanda na kutunza maua
title_en: Activity 10: Planting and caring for flowers
about_sw: Tabia ya kupenda kutunza mazingira, kufanya kazi na kufuata maelekezo
about_en: Developing a habit of caring for the environment, working and following instructions
materials_sw: Vitu halisi (miche au mbegu za maua, maji, udongo, makopo, mbolea, jembe, vijiti)
materials_en: Real objects (flower seedlings or seeds, water, soil, tins/pots, fertilizer, hoe, sticks)
steps_sw:
1. Andaa mazingira wezeshi ikiwa ni pamoja na maandalizi ya eneo na vifaa tajwa hapo juu.
2. Waulize watoto kama wamewahi kushiriki zoezi la kupanda maua mbalimbali.
3. Waoneshe miche/mbegu za mimea mbalimbali kisha waulize wataje majina ya miche/mbegu za mimea hiyo. Wasaidie watoto kama wanapata changamoto ya kubaini na kutaja majina ya miche/mbegu za mimea.
4. Onesha kwa vitendo namna ya kupanda maua/miche/mbegu kwa kuzingatia hatua, mfano:
• Tia udongo changanya na mbolea
• Panda mche/mbegu kwenye udongo
• Nyunyiza maji kiasi ili udongo ulowe kufanya mche/mbegu iote
• Weka sehemu yenye mwanga na hewa.
5. Wagawe watoto kwenye makundi na waaongoze kupanda maua/mbegu/miche. Chunguza kila kikundi na uwasaidie inapihitajika.
6. Chunguza kama kila mtoto ameshiriki kikamilifu kwenye zoezi la kupanda maua.
Tanbihi:
1. Kumbuka kuainisha watoto wenye mahitaji maalum ili uweze kuwashirikisha kulingana na mahitaji yao.
2. Shughuli hii inaweza kuwezeshwa kwa vipindi vitatu kwa siku tofauti kwa kutumia mbinu na zana stahiki.
steps_en:
1. Prepare a supportive environment including preparing the area and the materials listed above.
2. Ask children if they have ever participated in the activity of planting various flowers.
3. Show them various plant seedlings/seeds, then ask them to name the seedlings/seeds of those plants. Support children who have difficulty identifying and naming the seedlings/seeds.
4. Demonstrate how to plant flowers/seedlings/seeds following the steps, for example:
• Mix soil with fertilizer
• Plant the seedling/seed in the soil
• Sprinkle enough water so the soil is moist for the seedling/seed to germinate
• Place in a location with light and air.
5. Divide children into groups and guide them to plant flowers/seeds/seedlings. Monitor each group and assist where needed.
6. Check whether each child has fully participated in the flower planting activity.
Notes:
1. Remember to identify children with special needs so you can include them according to their needs.
2. This activity can be done in three sessions on different days using appropriate techniques and tools.

subject: Kutunza Mazingira Katika Jamii Yake
title_sw: Shughuli 11: Kuchukua tahadhari dhidi ya vitu hatarishi
title_en: Activity 11: Taking precautions against dangerous objects
about_sw: Kutambua vitu hatarishi na kuchukua tahadhari, kufuata maelekezo
about_en: Identifying dangerous objects and taking precautions, following instructions
materials_sw: Chati, kadi, picha mnato, picha mjongeo za msumari, chupa iliyovunjika, kisu, wembe, moto, dimbwi la maji
materials_en: Chart, cards, still pictures, video clips of a nail, broken bottle, knife, razor blade, fire, pool of water
steps_sw:
1. Andaa vifaa tajwa hapo juu na wapange watoto kwenye mpangilio mzuri na kuweka mazingira rafiki ya ujifunzaji.
