2. Waoneshe watoto picha za vitu hatarishi kisha waulize wataje wanachokiona. Sikiliza majibu yao na wafafanulie kwa kutaja majina na madhara ya vitu hatarishi (msumri unachoma, kisu kinakata).
3. Weka chini kadi zenye picha za vitu hatarishi kwa umbali hatua nne/tano.
4. Wagawe watoto kwenye makundi kisha kila kundi lipite kwa uelekeo wa kadi, wafikapo kwenye kadi yenye picha mfano 'moto/msumari' watataja jina la kitu hatarishi, kutaja madhara yake (moto unaunguza, msumari unachoma) na kukwepa ili wasidhurike.
5. Endelea na mchezo hadi watoto wote waweze kutambua vitu hatari na namna ya kuchukua tahadhari.
6. Chunguza kila mtoto kama ameweza kutaja vitu na kuchukua tahadhari dhidi ya vitu hatarishi.
Tanbihi:
1. Kumbuka kuwabainisha watoto wenye mahitaji maalum ili uweze kuwashirikisha kulingana na mahitaji yao.
2. Shughuli hii inaweza kuwezeshwa kwa vipindi vitatu kwa siku tofauti kwa kutumia mbinu na zana stahiki.
steps_en:
1. Prepare the materials listed above and arrange children in a good order, creating a child-friendly learning environment.
2. Show children pictures of dangerous objects, then ask them to name what they see. Listen to their answers and explain by naming the dangerous objects and their harms (a nail burns/pierces, a knife cuts).
3. Place cards with pictures of dangerous objects on the ground at a distance of four/five steps.
4. Divide children into groups, then each group walks in the direction of the cards; when they reach a card with a picture such as 'fire/nail' they will name the dangerous object, state its harm (fire burns, a nail pierces) and dodge it so they are not hurt.
5. Continue the game until all children can identify dangerous objects and how to take precautions.
6. Assess each child whether they can name objects and take precautions against dangerous objects.
Notes:
1. Remember to identify children with special needs so you can include them according to their needs.
2. This activity can be done in three sessions on different days using appropriate techniques and tools.

subject: Kutumia Mazingira Kujenga Dhana za Kihisabati
title_sw: SHUGHULI 1: KUTAJA MAUMBO MBALIMBALI
title_en: ACTIVITY 1: NAMING VARIOUS SHAPES
about_sw: Kubaini maumbo mbalimbali (pembe tatu, pembe nne, duara, nyota), kukuza msamiati ya kihisabati na umakini
about_en: Identify various shapes (triangle, rectangle/square, circle, star), develop mathematical vocabulary and attentiveness
materials_sw: Sahani, yai, bakuli, maboksi, mpira, vizibo, visoda, meza, kitabu, CD za zamani, kadi na picha mbalimbali za maumbo
materials_en: Plates, egg, bowl, boxes, ball, bottle caps, soda bottles, table, book, old CDs, cards and various pictures of shapes
steps_sw:
1. Andaa eneo salama, wezeshi na jumuishi kwa watoto kukaa (mduara, nusu duara, au umbo la U) kulingana na mazingira. Zingatia Watoto wenye mahitaji maalum.
2. Panga maumbo kwa kuyachanganya kwenye mkeka/turubai au meza ili watoto waone na kufuata.
3. Waoneshe maumbo (anza maumbo ya msingi) kwa kuwauliza jina la umbo. Tumia mchezo kuchagiza shughuli hii.
4. Endelea na shughuli hii kadri muda unavyoruhusu.
5. Chunguza kama mtoto anaweza kutofautisha maumbo na kuyapanga kulipanga.
TANBIHI: Shughuli hii itafanyika kwa kurudiwa mara mbili (2) kwa siku tofauti kwa kutumia zana na vifaa pendekezwa pamoja na vingine vinavyopatikana kwenye mazingira. Shughuli inayofuata endelea na maumbo wasiyoyafahamu.
steps_en:
1. Prepare a safe, accessible and inclusive space for children to sit (circle, semi-circle, or U-shape) according to the environment. Pay attention to children with special needs.
2. Arrange shapes by mixing them on a mat/carpet or table for children to see and follow.
3. Show shapes (start with basic shapes) by asking the name of the shape. Use a game to make this activity fun.
4. Continue with this activity as time allows.
5. Check whether the child can differentiate shapes and sort them.
NOTE: This activity will be repeated twice (2) on different days using the suggested tools and materials as well as others available in the environment. The following activity continues with shapes they are not familiar with.

subject: Kutumia Mazingira Kujenga Dhana za Kihisabati
title_sw: SHUGHULI 2: KUUNDA MAUMBO MBALIMBALI KWA KUTUMIA VITU TOFAUTI
title_en: ACTIVITY 2: CREATING VARIOUS SHAPES USING DIFFERENT OBJECTS
about_sw: Kutambua maumbo na sifa zake, kuongeza msamiati ya kihisabati na umakini na ushirikiano
about_en: Recognise shapes and their properties, increase mathematical vocabulary and attentiveness and cooperation
materials_sw: Vjiti, magunzi, udongo, unga wa ngano, vitofari, Kadi au picha za maumbo mbalimbali (duara, pembe nne, pembetatu, nyota), karatasi, rangi, penseli, mkasi, gundi
materials_en: Sticks, corn cobs, clay, wheat flour, tiles, cards or pictures of various shapes (circle, rectangle/square, triangle, star), paper, colours/paints, pencil, scissors, glue
steps_sw:
1. Andaa eneo salama, wezeshi na jumuishi kwa watoto kukaa (mduara, nusu duara, au umbo la U) kulingana na mazingira. Zingatia Watoto wenye mahitaji maalum.
2. Panga vitu mbalimbali vya kuunda maumbo mbalimbali katika eneo salama la kujifunzia. (meza, mkeka au turubai).
3. Tumia mbinu ya maigizo, Kuonesha namna ya kuunda maumbo kwa magunzi au vitofari hatua kwa hatua.
4. Waruhusu watoto kuunda maumbo kwa kutumia magunzi au vitofari. Toa msaada pale inapobidi.
5. Imba wimbo utakaochagiza Watoto kufanya shughuli hiyo kwa furaha.
6. Chunguza kama mtoto anaweza kuunda maumbo.
TANBIHI: Shughuli hii itawezeshwa kwa kurudiwa mara mbili (2) kwa siku tofauti kwa kutumia zana na vifaa pendekezwa na vingine vinavyopatikana kwenye mazingira.
steps_en:
1. Prepare a safe, accessible and inclusive space for children to sit (circle, semi-circle, or U-shape) according to the environment. Pay attention to children with special needs.
2. Arrange various materials for creating different shapes in a safe learning area (table, mat or carpet).
3. Use role-play techniques, demonstrate how to create shapes using corn cobs or tiles step by step.
4. Allow children to create shapes using corn cobs or tiles. Provide assistance where necessary.
5. Sing a song that will motivate children to do the activity with joy.
6. Check whether the child can create shapes.
NOTE: This activity will be facilitated by repeating it twice (2) on different days using suggested tools and materials as well as others available in the environment.

subject: Kutumia Mazingira Kujenga Dhana za Kihisabati
title_sw: Shughuli 3: Kupanga Vitu Kulingana na Sifa
title_en: Activity 3: Sorting Objects by Attribute
about_sw: Kupanga vitu kulingana na sifa tofauti, kuongeza umakini, na kukuza msamiati ya kihisabati
about_en: Sorting objects according to different attributes, improving concentration, and developing mathematical vocabulary
materials_sw: Visoda, magunzi, vijiti, chupa za plastiki, maboksi madogo, kadi, kadi fumbo namba, vibao fumbo namba, vitu halisi (mawe, vigunzi, vibao, visoda nk)
materials_en: Bottle caps, cardboard tubes, sticks, plastic bottles, small boxes, cards, number puzzle cards, number puzzle boards, real objects (stones, buttons, sticks, bottle caps, etc.)
steps_sw:
1. Andaa eneo salama, wezeshi na jumuishi kwa watoto kukaa (mduara, nusu duara, au umbo la U) kulingana na mazingira. Zingatia watoto wenye uoni kuwapa vifaa vya kung'aa.
2. Panga rundo la vifaa vilivyochanganywa vyenye rangi tofauti kwenye kapu au boksi au mwaga chini.
3. (Mkeka/turubai) vifaa hivyo.
4. Anza kwa kuwaonesha watoto rundo la vitu vyenye rangi tofauti. Kisha onesha namna ya kupanga rangi vinavyofanana.
5. Tumia mchezo kuwezesha watoto kuendelea kupanga vitu mbalimbali kulingana na rangi.
6. Chunguza kama kila mtoto ameweza kupanga vitu kulingana na sifa.

Tanbihi: Shughuli hii itawezeshwa vipindi viwili kwa muda tofauti. Shughuli inayofuata unaweza kupanga vitu vinavyofanana umbo. Mfano: sahani, bakuli, matunda.
steps_en:
1. Prepare a safe, accessible, and inclusive space for children to sit (circle, semicircle, or U-shape) according to the environment. Be mindful of children with visual impairments by giving them shiny materials.
2. Place a pile of mixed materials of different colours in a basket, box, or spread them on the floor.
3. Spread out (on a mat/tarpaulin) those materials.
4. Begin by showing children a pile of objects of different colours. Then demonstrate how to sort objects by matching colours.
5. Use play to encourage children to continue sorting various objects by colour.
6. Check whether each child was able to sort objects by attribute.

Note: This activity can be facilitated in two sessions at different times. In the next activity you can sort objects that are the same shape. Examples: plates, bowls, fruits.

subject: Kutumia Mazingira Kujenga Dhana za Kihisabati
title_sw: Shughuli 4: Kulinganisha Vitu Vikubwa na Vidogo
title_en: Activity 4: Comparing Big and Small Objects
about_sw: Kutambua sifa ya ukubwa na udogo, kukuza misamiati ya kihisabati, umakini na ushirikiano
about_en: Identifying the attribute of big and small, developing mathematical vocabulary, concentration and cooperation
materials_sw: Mipira, vitenesi, vibao, maboksi, vijiti, vitofari, vibao, beseni, bakuli, sahani, vijiko, picha na kadi mbalimbali
materials_en: Balls, tennis balls, boards, boxes, sticks, spoons, boards, basins, bowls, plates, spoons, various pictures and cards
steps_sw:
1. Andaa eneo salama, wezeshi na jumuishi kwa watoto kukaa (mduara, nusu duara, au umbo la U) kulingana na mazingira. Zingatia watoto wenye mahitaji maalum.
2. Andaa meza fupi iwe rahisi watoto kuona na kufuata.
3. Panga vitu mbalimbali kwa kuvichanganya katika meza moja au sehemu yoyote utakayoweka kulingana na mazingira.
4. Tumia mchezo kuwezesha watoto kulinganisha vitu vikubwa na vidogo mbalimbali.
5. Endelea kuruhusu watoto kuchukua vitu ulivyorundika, kuchunguza ukubwa na udogo wa kitu kisha wapeleke kwenye meza ulizoziweka.
6. Chunguza kama mtoto anaweza kutambua na kutofautisha ukubwa na udogo wa vitu mbalimbali.

Tanbihi: Shughuli hii itawezeshwa kwa vipindi viwili kwa siku tofauti kwa kutumia zana na vifaa tajwa na zingine zinazopatikana kwenye mazingira kwa kutumia mbinu ya michezo.
steps_en:
1. Prepare a safe, accessible, and inclusive space for children to sit (circle, semicircle, or U-shape) according to the environment. Be mindful of children with special needs.
2. Prepare a low table that is easy for children to see and follow.
3. Arrange various objects by mixing them on one table or any surface you set up according to the environment.
4. Use play to help children compare various big and small objects.
5. Continue allowing children to pick up objects you have piled, examine the size (big/small) of the object, then place them on the designated tables.
6. Check whether the child can identify and differentiate the size (big and small) of various objects.

Note: This activity can be facilitated in two sessions on different days using the mentioned tools and materials as well as others available in the environment using a play-based approach.

subject: Kutumia Mazingira Kujenga Dhana za Kihisabati
title_sw: Shughuli 5: Kutofautisha Vitu Kulingana na Sifa
title_en: Activity 5: Differentiating Objects According to Attribute
about_sw: Kutambua sifa za msingi za vitu, kukuza msamiati wa kihisabati, umakini na ushirikiano
about_en: Identifying basic attributes of objects, developing mathematical vocabulary, concentration and cooperation
materials_sw: Mbao, vizibo, vifaa vya jikoni, vifaa vya shuleni, vikapu, ndoo, vifaa vya michezo
materials_en: Boards, lids/stoppers, kitchen utensils, school supplies, baskets, buckets, play equipment/toys
steps_sw:
1. Andaa eneo salama, wezeshi na jumuishi kwa watoto kukaa (mduara, nusu duara, au umbo la U) kulingana na mazingira. Zingatia watoto wenye mahitaji maalum.
2. Tumia wimbo kuwezesha watoto kutofautisha vitu vyenye sifa tofauti. Mfano: vyombo vya jikoni (bakuli, sahani, glasi).
3. Wape muda wa kuchunguza na kutofautisha vitu hivyo. Uliza maswali rahisi. Mfano: Hiki ni nini? Kwanini umeweka hapa?
4. Chunguza kwenya hatua za upangaji kama kila mtoto anaweza kutambua na kuelewa sifa tofauti za vitu mbalimbali.

Tanbihi: Shughuli hii itawezeshwa kwa vipindi viwili kwa siku tofauti kwa kutumia zana na vifaa pendekezwa na vingine vinavyopatikana kwenye mazingira. Shughuli inayofuata unaweza kutofautisha kwa kutumia vifaa vya michezo (mpira, vitenesi, viatu, jezi.)
steps_en:
1. Prepare a safe, accessible, and inclusive space for children to sit (circle, semicircle, or U-shape) according to the environment. Be mindful of children with special needs.
2. Use a song to help children differentiate objects with different attributes. Example: kitchen utensils (bowl, plate, glass).
3. Give them time to examine and differentiate those objects. Ask simple questions. Example: What is this? Why did you put it here?
4. Observe the sorting steps to check whether each child can identify and understand the different attributes of various objects.

Note: This activity can be facilitated in two sessions on different days using the suggested tools and materials as well as others available in the environment. In the next activity you can differentiate using play equipment (ball, tennis ball, shoes, jersey).

subject: Stadi za Hisabati, Sayansi na Tehama: Miaka 3–4 – Kutumia Mazingira Kujenga Dhana za Kihisabati
title_sw: SHUGHULI 12: KUFUATISHA NAMBA (1–5)
title_en: Activity 12: Tracing Numbers (1–5)
about_sw: Kupata stadi za awali za kuandika namba, kukuza msamiati ya kihisabati, ushirikiano na umakini
about_en: To gain early number-writing skills, develop mathematical vocabulary, cooperation and concentration
materials_sw: Penseli, rangi, karatasi za rangi za manila, video iliyorekodiwa
materials_en: Pencils, crayons, coloured manila paper, a recorded video
steps_sw:
1. Andaa eneo salama na lenye nafasi ya kutosha kuruhusu watoto kukaa kwenye viti na meza. Zingatia watoto wenye mahitaji maalum.
2. Panga vifaa pendekezwa (penseli, karatasi na picha).
3. Onesha namna ya kuwezesha watoto namna ya kufuatisha namba moja hewani hatua kwa hatua.
4. Unaweza kuendelea kufuatisha namba zinazofuata mchangani, kibaoni, na kwenye karatasi kwa kuwachorea vidoti doti vya namba husika.
5. Tumia maneno rahisi wakati wa kuwawezesha watoto.
6. Chunguza kama mtoto anaweza kufuatisha namba moja kwa kufuata hatua.

TANBIHI: Shughuli hii itawezeshwa kwa vipindi vinne kwa wakati tofauti kwa kutumia zana na vifaa pendekezwa au vifaa vingine vinavyopatikana kwenye mazingira.
steps_en:
1. Prepare a safe and spacious area to allow children to sit on chairs and at tables. Pay attention to children with special needs.
2. Arrange the recommended materials (pencils, paper and pictures).
3. Demonstrate to children how to trace the number one in the air step by step.
4. You may continue tracing subsequent numbers in sand, on a board, and on paper by drawing dotted outlines of the relevant numbers.
5. Use simple language when facilitating the children.
6. Check whether the child can trace the number one by following the steps.

NOTE: This activity will be facilitated over four sessions at different times using recommended tools and materials or other materials available in the environment.

subject: Stadi za Hisabati, Sayansi na Tehama: Miaka 3–4 – Kutumia Mazingira Kujenga Dhana za Kihisabati
title_sw: SHUGHULI 13: KUPAKA RANGI NAMBA 1–5
title_en: Activity 13: Colouring Numbers 1–5
about_sw: Kupata uwezo kupaka rangi, kukuza msamiati wa kihisabati, kukuza ushirikiano na umakini
about_en: To develop the ability to colour, build mathematical vocabulary, foster cooperation and concentration
materials_sw: Karatasi, penseli za rangi, rangi ya maji au brashi ndogo za kupakia rangi, karatasi za rangi, apron ya mtoto, kitambaa cha kusafisha, kadi za picha au picha kubwa za maumbo mbalimbali ya namba
materials_en: Paper, coloured pencils, watercolour paints or small brushes for applying colour, coloured paper, a child's apron, a cleaning cloth, picture cards or large pictures of various number shapes
steps_sw:
1. Andaa eneo salama na lenye nafasi ya kutosha kuruhusu watoto kukaa kwenye viti na meza. Zingatia watoto wenye mahitaji maalum.
2. Panga vitu mbalimbali vya kupanga rangi katika eneo salama la kujifunzia.
3. Wawezeshe watoto kupaka rangi namba 1–5 hatua kwa hatua.
4. Waruhusu watoto kuendelea kupaka rangi. Imba wimbo utakaochagiza watoto kufanya shughuli hiyo kwa furaha.
5. Chunguza kama mtoto anaweza kufanya shughuli hiyo.

Tanbihi: Shughuli hii itawezeshwa kwa vipindi vinne kwa siku tofauti. Unaweza kuendelea kutumia vifaa pendekezwa na vingine vinavyopatikana kwenye mazingira.
steps_en:
1. Prepare a safe and spacious area to allow children to sit on chairs and at tables. Pay attention to children with special needs.
2. Arrange various colouring materials in a safe learning area.
3. Guide children to colour numbers 1–5 step by step.
4. Allow children to continue colouring. Sing a song that will motivate children to do the activity joyfully.
5. Check whether the child can perform the activity.

Note: This activity will be facilitated over four sessions on different days. You may continue using recommended materials and other materials available in the environment.

subject: Stadi za Hisabati, Sayansi na Tehama: Miaka 3–4 – Kufanya Majaribio Rahisi ya Kisayansi
title_sw: Shughuli 1: Kuchunguza vitu katika Mazingira yanayomzunguka
title_en: Activity 1: Exploring Objects in the Surrounding Environment
about_sw: Kutambua na kuchunguza vitu, kufikiri kimantiki, kujieleza, kujiamini, kutofautisha vitu, uratibu wa macho na mikono, kujenga misuli midogo ya vidole, kujenga misuli mikubwa ya mwili, kusikiliza, kushirikiana.
about_en: To identify and explore objects, think logically, express oneself, build self-confidence, distinguish objects, develop eye-hand coordination, build small finger muscles, build large body muscles, listen, and cooperate.
materials_sw: Vitu halisi katika mazingira mfano, magunzi, chupa za plastiki, vijiko, sufuria, vijiti, majani
materials_en: Real objects from the environment, for example: corncobs, plastic bottles, spoons, pots, sticks, leaves
steps_sw:
1. Andaa vifaa tajwa hapo juu, wapange watoto kwenye mpangilio mzuri na kuweka mazingira rafiki ya ujifunzaji.
2. Andaa eneo la ndani au nje lenye vitu vya kuangalia/kuchunguza.
3. Andaa vikapu 5 au zaidi vya kutosha kukusanyia vitu katika makundi tofauti.
4. Andaa kadi za maneno kubwa, ndogo, laini, nzito, nyepesi.
5. Waongoze watoto kwenda nje kuzunguka katika mazingira na kuchunguza vitu vilivyopo na kisha kukusanya baadhi ya vitu na kuja navyo.
6. Onesha mfano, chukua majani mawili na uwaoneshe. Kisha waulize, kuna tofauti gani kati ya majani haya? Lipi kubwa na lipi dogo?
7. Baada ya kurudi darasani, wachunguze vitui vilivyoko darasani. Kisha waongoze watoto kuweka vitu katika makundi (Laini/Ngumu, Nzito/Nyepesi, Vikubwa/Vidogo).
8. Chunguza kama watoto wanakusanya vitu na kuweza kuvitofautisha.

TANBIHI: Shughuli hii itawezeshwa kwa vipindi 4 kwa siku tofauti kwa kutumia mbinu na zana stahiki.
steps_en:
1. Prepare the materials listed above, arrange the children in a good formation and create a friendly learning environment.
2. Prepare an indoor or outdoor area with objects to observe/explore.
3. Prepare 5 or more baskets sufficient to collect objects into different groups.
4. Prepare word cards: big, small, soft, heavy, light.
5. Guide the children to go outside and walk around the environment, explore the objects found there, then collect some objects and bring them back.
6. Demonstrate by taking two leaves and showing them. Then ask: what is the difference between these leaves? Which is big and which is small?
7. After returning to the classroom, examine the objects in the classroom. Then guide children to sort the objects into groups (Soft/Hard, Heavy/Light, Big/Small).
8. Check whether children are collecting objects and are able to differentiate them.

NOTE: This activity will be facilitated over 4 sessions on different days using appropriate methods and tools.

subject: Stadi za Hisabati, Sayansi na Tehama: Miaka 3 – 4 | Kufanya Majaribio Rahisi ya Kisayansi
title_sw: Shughuli 5: Kutengeneza mpira wa sabuni
title_en: Activity 5: Making a soap bubble
about_sw: Umakini, uratibu wa macho na mikono, kujiamini, kujieleza.
about_en: Carefulness, eye-hand coordination, self-confidence, self-expression.
materials_sw: Maji yenye sabuni kwenye chombo kidogo, kifuniko chenye tundu, trei
materials_en: Soapy water in a small container, a lid with a hole, a tray
steps_sw:
1. Andaa eneo la nje au ndani lisiloteleza.
2. Tengeneza makundi ya watoto 5-6.
3. Kaa na watoto katika mkao ambao kila mmoja anakuona vizuri.
4. Wambie kuwa "Leo tutatengeneza mipira ya sabuni".
5. Nyanyua kifaa kimoja baada ya kingine na uwaulize "Hiki ni nini?".
6. Onesha namna ya kupuliza, rudia mara kadhaa kutoa fursa kwa watoto kuona vizuri.
7. Toa fursa ya kujaribu kwa mtoto mmoja kwa mfululizo.
8. Wape fursa ya kuendelea na kupuliza mpaka watakavyoweza.
9. Wambie waangalie angani kitu gani kinatokea
Tanbihi:
1. Watoto wenye changamoto ya kupumua waruhusu watumie fimbo ya viputo/sabuni badala ya kupuliza kwa nguvu.
2. Shughuli hii itawezeshwa kwa vipindi vitano kwa siku tofauti. Zingatia zana na mbinu stahiki.
steps_en:
1. Prepare a non-slippery outdoor or indoor space.
2. Form groups of 5–6 children.
3. Sit with the children in a position where each one can see you well.
4. Tell them "Today we will make soap bubbles".
5. Pick up one item after another and ask them "What is this?".
6. Demonstrate how to blow, repeating several times to give children a good chance to observe.
7. Give one child at a time the chance to try in sequence.
8. Give them the opportunity to continue blowing as much as they can.
9. Tell them to watch the sky to see what appears.
Note:
1. Children with breathing challenges should be allowed to use a bubble wand/soap stick instead of blowing forcefully.
2. This activity can be delivered in five sessions on different days. Use appropriate tools and techniques.

subject: Stadi za Hisabati, Sayansi na Tehama: Miaka 3 – 4 | Kufanya Majaribio Rahisi ya Kisayansi
title_sw: Shughuli 6: Kutaja vitu vinavyovutwa na sumaku
title_en: Activity 6: Naming objects that are attracted by a magnet
about_sw: Kutofautisha vitu vinavyovutwa na sumaku na visivyovutwa, umakini, kusikiliza, kujenga msamiati mpya, uratibu wa macho na mikono.
about_en: Distinguishing objects attracted by a magnet from those that are not, carefulness, listening, building new vocabulary, eye-hand coordination.
materials_sw: Sumaku, vifuniko vya chupa, karatasi, mawe, vijiti, vyuma vidogo
materials_en: A magnet, bottle caps, paper, stones, sticks, small metal objects
steps_sw:
1. Andaa vifaa tajwa hapo juu, wapange watoto kwenye mpangilio mzuri na kuweka mazingira rafiki ya ujifunzaji.
2. Gawa watoto katika vikundi vya watoto.
3. Waambie kuwa "Leo tutacheza mchezo wa vitu vinavyoweza kuvutwa na sumaku na visivyovutwa na sumaku".
4. Waoneshe watoto vifaa ulivyoandaa wataje majina ya vifaa hivyo.
5. Onesha jinsi ya kuweka sumaku karibu na vitu ili kubaini kama vinavutwa ama havivutwi.
6. Kila kikundi kigawie sumaku moja na vitu mbalimbali waendelee kucheza mchezo wa sumaku.
7. Zunguka katika vikundi kuangalia kama wanatumia sumaku kuvuta na kutovuta vitu.
8. Waulize watoto maswali: Vitu gani vimevutwa na sumaku?
9. Vitu gani havijavutwa na sumaku?
10. Chunguza kama mtoto anaweza kushiriki kunasa vitu kwa kutumia sumaku.
Tanbihi: Shughuli hii itawezeshwa kwa vipindi sita kwa siku tofauti. Tumia zana na mbinu zinazofaa.
steps_en:
1. Prepare the materials listed above, arrange the children in a good formation and create a friendly learning environment.
2. Divide the children into groups.
3. Tell them "Today we will play a game about objects that can be attracted by a magnet and those that cannot".
4. Show the children the prepared materials and ask them to name the items.
5. Demonstrate how to hold the magnet close to objects to find out if they are attracted or not.
6. Give each group one magnet and various objects and let them continue playing the magnet game.
7. Go around the groups to observe whether they are using the magnet to attract and repel objects.
8. Ask the children: Which objects were attracted by the magnet?
9. Which objects were not attracted by the magnet?
10. Observe whether a child can participate in catching objects using a magnet.
Note: This activity can be delivered in six sessions on different days. Use appropriate tools and techniques.

subject: Stadi za Hisabati, Sayansi na Tehama: Miaka 3 – 4 | Kufanya Majaribio Rahisi ya Kisayansi
title_sw: Shughuli 7: Kufanya majaribio rahisi ya kutumia vitu vinavyovutwa na sumaku
title_en: Activity 7: Doing simple experiments using objects attracted by a magnet
about_sw: Kutofautisha vitu vinavyovutwa na visivyovutwa na sumaku, umakini, uratibu wa macho na mikono, kuimarisha misuli midogo ya vidole.
about_en: Distinguishing objects attracted and not attracted by a magnet, carefulness, eye-hand coordination, strengthening small finger muscles.
materials_sw: Sumaku na vitu vinavyoweza kuvutwa/kutovutwa na sumaku
materials_en: A magnet and objects that can be attracted/not attracted by a magnet
steps_sw:
1. Siku moja kabla ya kipindi wambie watoto waje na vitu vinavyoweza kuvutwa na sumaku na visivyovutwa.
2. Waambie kuwa "Leo tutaendelea kufanya majaribio ya sumaku".
3. Waambie wakwambie majina ya vitu walivyokujanavyo.
4. Waongoze watoto kwa kurudia kuvitaja kwa usahihi na kuwaambia warudie kuvitaja kila kimoja.
5. Waongoze watoto kutafuta vitu vingine vinavyoweza kuvutwa na sumaku katika mazingira ya kituoni.
6. Waongoze kuvikusanya na kuviweka sehemu moja katika kila kikundi.
7. Waambie kila kikundi kuendelea kucheza mchezo wa kusogeza vitu kwa kutumia sumaku.
8. Waambie wataje tofauti ya vitu vinavyovutwa na sumaku na visivyovutwa na sumaku.
9. Chunguza kama watoto wanashiriki kufanya majaribio rahisi ya kuvuta vitu kwa sumaku.
Tanbihi: Shughuli hii itawezeshwa kwa vipindi vitatu kwa siku tofauti. Tumia zana na mbinu stahiki.
steps_en:
1. One day before the session, tell the children to bring objects that can be attracted by a magnet and those that cannot.
2. Tell them "Today we will continue doing magnet experiments".
3. Ask them to tell you the names of the objects they have brought.
4. Guide the children by repeating the correct names and asking them to name each one again.
5. Guide the children to find other objects in the classroom environment that can be attracted by a magnet.
6. Guide them to collect and place those objects together in one section of each group.
7. Tell each group to continue playing the game of moving objects using a magnet.
8. Ask them to state the differences between objects attracted by a magnet and those that are not.
9. Observe whether the children are participating in doing simple experiments of attracting objects with a magnet.
Note: This activity can be delivered in three sessions on different days. Use appropriate tools and techniques.

subject: Stadi za Hisabati, Sayansi na Tehama: Miaka 3–4
title_sw: Shughuli 2a: Kutaja matumizi mbalimbali ya vifaa vya TEHAMA
title_en: Activity 2a: Naming the various uses of ICT devices
about_sw: Kutambua vifaa mbalimbali vya Tehama, kukuza lugha na mawasiliano
about_en: Identifying various ICT devices, developing language and communication
materials_sw: Vifaa bandia au halisi kama simu, rimoti, kompyuta mpakato, radio, runinga au kadi za picha mbalimbali zenye vifaa mbalimbali vya TEHAMA. Hakikisha vifaa hivyo ni salama kwa ajili ya watoto kutumia.
materials_en: Toy or real devices such as a phone, remote control, laptop, radio, television, or various picture cards showing different ICT devices. Ensure those devices are safe for children to use.
steps_sw:
1. Andaa vifaa vilivyopendekezwa ikiwa ni pamoja na mazingira salama na rafiki kwa ajili ya utekelezaji wa shughuli hiyo kupitia uchangamshi wa mchezo.
2. Waongoze watoto katika makundi ya watoto 5–6 au mkao mwingine unaofaa kutokana na mazingira halisi ulionayo yatakayowezesha uendeshaji wa shughuli hii.
3. Waongoze watoto kwa maswali. Mfano: Nani anaweza kutukumbusha vifaa mbalimbali vya TEHAMA?
4. Waoneshe watoto kadi za picha au kifaa halisi kimoja kimoja cha tehama kwa ajili ya kutaja, ikiwa sehemu ya kumbukumbu.
5. Watambulishe watoto kuwa "leo tutaangalia namna ya kutumia vifaa mbalimbali vya tehama".
6. Waongoze watoto katika makundi yao kwa kutumia mchezo kuigiza matumizi ya vifaa mbalimbali vya tehama. Mfano: Kuigiza kupiga na kupokea simu, kupiga picha, kusoma gazeti au jarida.
7. Waongoze watoto kwa maswali kutoka katika michezo waliocheza nini matumizi ya hivyo vitu. Mfano: Nani anaweza kutuambia matumizi ya simu, kamera, gazeti.
8. Chunguza kama watoto wanashiriki kutaja vifaa vya Tehama na matumizi yake.
TANBIHI: Shughuli itawezeshwa katika vipindi vitatu au zaidi katika vipindi tofauti tofauri kwa kutumia mbinu mbalimbali huku ukizingatia uhalisia wa mazingira yako.
steps_en:
1. Prepare the recommended materials together with a safe and friendly environment for carrying out the activity through play-based learning.
2. Guide children into groups of 5–6 or another suitable arrangement based on the real environment you have that will allow the activity to run.
3. Guide children with questions. Example: Who can remind us of the various ICT devices?
4. Show children picture cards or one real ICT device at a time for naming, as a memory exercise.
5. Introduce children to the idea that "today we will look at how to use various ICT devices".
6. Guide children in their groups to use role-play to act out the uses of various ICT devices. Example: Acting out making and receiving a phone call, taking a photo, reading a newspaper or magazine.
7. Guide children with questions from the games about what the uses of those items are. Example: Who can tell us the uses of a phone, camera, newspaper?
8. Check whether children are participating in naming ICT devices and their uses.
NOTE: The activity can be implemented in three or more sessions at different times using various methods while taking into account the reality of your environment.

subject: Stadi za Hisabati, Sayansi na Tehama: Miaka 3–4
title_sw: Shughuli 2b: Kutaja matumizi ya vifaa mbalimbali vya TEHAMA
title_en: Activity 2b: Naming the uses of various ICT devices
about_sw: Kutambua vifaa mbalimbali vya Tehama, kukuza lugha na mawasiliano
about_en: Identifying various ICT devices, developing language and communication
materials_sw: Vifaa bandia au halisi kama simu, rimoti, kompyuta mpakato, radio, runinga au kadi za picha mbalimbali zenye vifaa mbalimbali vya TEHAMA. Hakikisha vifaa hivyo ni salama kwa ajili ya watoto kutumia.
materials_en: Toy or real devices such as a phone, remote control, laptop, radio, television, or various picture cards showing different ICT devices. Ensure those devices are safe for children to use.
steps_sw:
1. Andaa vifaa vilivyopendekezwa ikiwa ni pamoja na mazingira salama na rafiki kwa ajili ya utekelezaji wa shughuli hiyo kupitia uchangamshi wa mchezo.
2. Waongoze watoto wakae katika umbo la u/nusu duara au mkao mwingine unaofaa kutokana na mazingira halisi ulionayo yatakayowezesha uendeshaji wa shughuli hiyo.
3. Waongoze watoto kwa maswali. Mfano: Nani anaweza kutukumbusha vifaa mbalimbali vya TEHAMA?
4. Watambulishe watoto kuwa "leo tutasikiliza hadithi kupitia runinga".
5. Waongoze watoto kwa kuwaekea simulizi ya hadithi kupitia runinga/televisheni iliozingatia umri. Mfano: "youtube" au mfumo wowote ulioandaa.
6. Baada ya kusikiliza hadithi, unaweza kuwaongoza watoto kwa maswali. Mfano: mmejifunza nini, nani anaweza kutuambia matumizi ya runinga ni nini?
Tanbihi: Shughuli itawezeshwa katika vipindi vitatu au zaidi katika vipindi tofauti kwa kutumia mbinu mbalimbali huku ukizingatia uhalisia wa mazingira yako.
steps_en:
1. Prepare the recommended materials together with a safe and friendly environment for carrying out the activity through play-based learning.
2. Guide children to sit in a U-shape/semicircle or another suitable arrangement based on the real environment you have that will allow the activity to run.
3. Guide children with questions. Example: Who can remind us of the various ICT devices?
4. Introduce children to the idea that "today we will listen to a story through the television".
5. Guide children by playing them a story through a television/screen appropriate for their age. Example: YouTube or any available platform.
6. After listening to the story, you can guide children with questions. Example: What did you learn? Who can tell us what the uses of a television are?
Note: The activity can be implemented in three or more sessions at different times using various methods while taking into account the reality of your environment.

subject: Stadi za Hisabati, Sayansi na Tehama: Miaka 3–4
title_sw: Shughuli 2c: Kutaja matumizi ya vifaa mbalimbali vya TEHAMA
title_en: Activity 2c: Naming the uses of various ICT devices
about_sw: Kutambua vifaa mbalimbali vya Tehama, kukuza lugha na mawasiliano
about_en: Identifying various ICT devices, developing language and communication
materials_sw: Vifaa bandia au halisi kama simu, rimoti, kompyuta mpakato, radio, runinga au kadi za picha mbalimbali zenye vifaa mbalimbali vya TEHAMA. Hakikisha vifaa hivyo ni salama kwa ajili ya watoto kutumia.
materials_en: Toy or real devices such as a phone, remote control, laptop, radio, television, or various picture cards showing different ICT devices. Ensure those devices are safe for children to use.
steps_sw:
1. Andaa vifaa vilivyopendekezwa ikiwa ni pamoja na mazingira salama na rafiki kwa ajili ya utekelezaji wa shughuli hiyo kupitia uchangamshi wa mchezo.
2. Waongoze watoto wakae katika umbo la u/nusu duara au mkao mwingine unaofaa kutokana na mazingira halisi ulionayo yatakayowezesha uendeshaji wa shughuli hiyo.
3. Waongoze watoto kwa maswali mfano: Watoto wanaweza kuigiza kutumia vifani vya tehama.
4. Watambulishe watoto kuwa "leo tutasikiliza makala kutoka katika radio".
5. Waongoze watoto kwa kuwaekea makalai kupitia radio iliozingatia umri mfano: "kipindi cha watoto" au "habari" au "nyimbo".
6. Unaweza kuwaongoza watoto kwa maswali baada ya kusikiliza mfano: mmejifunza nini, nani anaweza kutuambia matumizi ya radio ni nini?
7. Chunguza kama watoto wanashiriki kutaja matumizi ya vifaa vya Tehama.
TANBIHI: Shughuli itawezeshwa katika vipindi vitatu au zaidi katika vipindi tofauti kwa kutumia mbinu mbalimbali huku ukizingatia uhalisia wa mazingira yako.
steps_en:
1. Prepare the recommended materials together with a safe and friendly environment for carrying out the activity through play-based learning.
2. Guide children to sit in a U-shape/semicircle or another suitable arrangement based on the real environment you have that will allow the activity to run.
3. Guide children with questions, for example: Children can act out using ICT devices.
4. Introduce children to the idea that "today we will listen to an article from the radio".
5. Guide children by playing them age-appropriate content through the radio, for example: a 'children's programme', 'news', or 'songs'.
6. You can guide children with questions after listening, for example: What did you learn? Who can tell us what the uses of the radio are?
7. Check whether children are participating in naming the uses of ICT devices.
NOTE: The activity can be implemented in three or more sessions at different times using various methods while taking into account the reality of your environment.

subject: Stadi za Hisabati, Sayansi na Tehama: Miaka 3 – 4
title_sw: Shughuli 3: Kuwasha na kuzima vifaa mbalimbali vya TEHAMA
title_en: Activity 3: Turning on and off various ICT devices
about_sw: Kujua namna ya kuwasha na kuzima vifaa mbalimbali vya TEHAMA, Kujenga misuli mikubwa na midogo. Kukuza lugha na mawasiliano
about_en: To know how to turn on and off various ICT devices; to develop gross and fine muscles; to promote language and communication
materials_sw: Vifaa bandia au vifaa halisia vya TEHAMA kama Redio, runinga, komputa mpakato, tabuleti, simu
materials_en: Toy/pretend or real ICT devices such as a radio, television, laptop computer, tablet, mobile phone
steps_sw:
1. Andaa mazingira Salama na vifaa vilivyo salama kwa matumizi na watoto.
2. Waongoze watoto wakae katika umbo la u/nusu duara au mkao mwingine unaofaa kutokana na mazingira halisi ulionayo yatakayowezesha uendeshaji wa shughuli.
3. Waongoze watoto kwa maswali Mfano: watoto wanaweza kuigiza kutumia vifani vya vifaa vya tehama)
4. Waongoze watoto namna sahihi ya kushika na kuwapa fursa na uhuru wa kuvishika kwa awamu na kwa utaratibu kwa uangalizi.
5. Waongoze kwa vitendo kitufe cha Kuwasha/Kuzima kwa kuelekeza kidole katika vitufe hivyo huku ukiwasha na kuzima huku ukiwapa nafasi ya kuona mabadiliko. Mfano: Mabadiliko ya mwanga katika skrini, au sauti
6. Waongoze watoto kwa awamu na uhuru wa kujaribu kuwasha/kuzima au kubonyeza kitufe cha kuwasha/kuzima kwa usimamizi wa karibu endapo kinatumika kifaa halisia.
7. Chunguza kama watoto wote wanaweza kutambua kitufe cha kuzima/kuwasha katika vifaa mbalimbali vya bandia au halisia
8. Wape watoto nafasi ya kufanya majaribio ya kubonyeza kitufe cha kuwasha na kuzima kwa kutumia vifaa bandia au halisi kulingana na uhalisia wa mazingira yako.
TANBIHI: Shughuli hii itawezeshwa kwa vitatu (3) au zaidi katika vipindi tofauti kulingana na mazingira na uelewa wa watoto.
steps_en:
1. Prepare a safe environment and safe equipment/devices for children's use.
2. Guide children to sit in a U/semicircle shape or another appropriate seating arrangement based on the real environment you have that will enable the activity to run.
3. Guide children with questions (Example: children can pretend to use parts/controls of ICT devices).
4. Guide children on the correct way to hold the devices and give them freedom to hold them in turns and in an orderly manner under supervision.
5. Demonstrate with actions the On/Off button by pointing a finger at those buttons while turning on and off, giving them a chance to see the changes. Example: changes in screen brightness, or sound.
6. Guide children in turns and with freedom to try turning on/off or pressing the on/off button under close supervision if a real device is being used.
7. Check whether all children can identify the off/on button on various toy or real devices.
8. Give children the opportunity to experiment by pressing the on/off button using toy or real devices according to the reality of your environment.
NOTE: This activity will be facilitated in three (3) or more separate sessions depending on the environment and children's understanding.

subject: Kusoma katika hatua za awali
title_sw: Shughuli za ziada kwa watoto waliofikisha miaka 5 wakiwa kituoni – Kusoma katika hatua za awali
title_en: Additional activities for children who have reached age 5 at the centre – Early reading steps
about_sw: Shughuli za kusoma kwa watoto wa miaka 5 au zaidi ili kuwaandaa kwa ajili ya kuingia darasa la kwanza.
about_en: Reading activities for children aged 5 or older to prepare them for entry into Standard One.
materials_sw: Kadi za herufi, chati ya herufi, kadi za silabi, kadi za maneno, kadi za picha, kadi za picha zenye maneno, vitabu vya picha, vibaofumbo vya herufi, sauti za herufi za irabu na konsonanti zilizorekodiwa
materials_en: Letter cards, letter charts, syllable cards, word cards, picture cards, picture cards with words, picture books, letter puzzles, recorded sounds of vowel and consonant letters
steps_sw:
1. Kusikiliza nyimbo, mazungumzo na hadithi fupi
2. Kucheza mchezo wa kupashana habari
3. Kufanya majadiliano/mazungumzo
4. Kutega na kutegua vitendawili
5. Kusimulia hadithi mbalimbali
6. Kuelezea shughuli za kila siku
7. Kusoma picha
8. Kubainisha majina ya vitu mbalimbali katika mazingira
9. Kutamka sauti za irabu
10. Kuhusianisha herufi za irabu na sauti zake
11. Kutamka sauti za konsonanti (b, m, k, d, n)
12. Kuhusianisha maumbo ya herufi za konsonanti (b, m, k, d, n) na sauti zake
13. Kubaini picha zenye maneno/majina yanayoanza na irabu au konsonanti zilizofunzwa
steps_en:
1. Listen to songs, conversations and short stories
2. Play the passing-on-news game
3. Conduct discussions/conversations
4. Pose and solve riddles
5. Narrate various stories
6. Describe daily activities
7. Read pictures
8. Identify names of various objects in the environment
9. Pronounce vowel sounds
10. Match vowel letters to their sounds
11. Pronounce consonant sounds (b, m, k, d, n)
12. Match the shapes of consonant letters (b, m, k, d, n) to their sounds
13. Identify pictures with words/names beginning with taught vowels or consonants

subject: Kuandika katika hatua za awali
title_sw: Shughuli za ziada kwa watoto waliofikisha miaka 5 wakiwa kituoni – Kuandika katika hatua za awali
title_en: Additional activities for children who have reached age 5 at the centre – Early writing steps
about_sw: Shughuli za kuandika kwa watoto wa miaka 5 au zaidi ili kuwaandaa kwa ajili ya kuingia darasa la kwanza.
about_en: Writing activities for children aged 5 or older to prepare them for entry into Standard One.
materials_sw: Chaki, vibao, vijiti, udongo wa mfinyanzi, penseli, kalamu rashasha, karatasi, mkasi, vibaofumbo, shanga, mabua, mifuniko ya chupa za plastiki
materials_en: Chalk, slates, sticks, clay, pencils, crayons, paper, scissors, puzzles, beads, straws, plastic bottle caps
steps_sw:
1. Kuumba/kuunda maumbo ya irabu
2. Kufuatisha maumbo ya irabu
3. Kuandika herufi za irabu (a, e, i, o, u) kwa kufuata hatua
4. Kuumba/kuunda maumbo ya konsonanti (b, m, k, d, n)
5. Kufuatisha maumbo ya konsonanti (b, m, k, d, n)
6. Kuandika herufi za konsonanti (b, m, k, d, n) kwa kufuata hatua
steps_en:
1. Form/create vowel shapes
2. Trace vowel shapes
3. Write vowel letters (a, e, i, o, u) by following steps
4. Form/create consonant shapes (b, m, k, d, n)
5. Trace consonant shapes (b, m, k, d, n)
6. Write consonant letters (b, m, k, d, n) by following steps

subject: Kutumia mazingira, kujenga dhana za kihisabati na kufikiri kimantiki
title_sw: Shughuli za ziada kwa watoto waliofikisha miaka 5 wakiwa kituoni – Kutumia mazingira, kujenga dhana za kihisabati na kufikiri kimantiki
title_en: Additional activities for children who have reached age 5 at the centre – Using the environment, building mathematical concepts and logical thinking
about_sw: Shughuli za hisabati na mantiki kwa watoto wa miaka 5 au zaidi ili kuwaandaa kwa ajili ya kuingia darasa la kwanza.
about_en: Mathematics and logical thinking activities for children aged 5 or older to prepare them for entry into Standard One.
materials_sw: Kadi za herufi, chati ya herufi, kadi za silabi, kadi za maneno, kadi za picha, kadi za picha zenye maneno, vitabu vya picha, vibaofumbo vya herufi, sauti za herufi za irabu na konsonanti zilizorekodiwa
materials_en: Letter cards, letter charts, syllable cards, word cards, picture cards, picture cards with words, picture books, letter puzzles, recorded sounds of vowel and consonant letters
steps_sw:
1. Kubaini maumbo mbalimbali
2. Kubainisha vitu kulingana na sifa zake
3. Kupanga vitu kwa mfuatano unaofanana
4. Kucheza michezo ya kufananisha na kutofautisha
5. Kubainisha nyakati tofauti za siku
6. Kubainisha matendo yanayofanywa kulingana
7. Kutofautisha siku katika juma
8. Kulinganisha vitu kutokana na sifa zake
9. Kupima vitu mbalimbali
10. Kubainisha vitu vinavyosaidia kujenga dhana ya namba
11. Kutamka namba 1–20
12. Kuhesabu namba 1–20 kwa kutumia vitu
13. Kuoanisha idadi ya vitu na namba
14. Kutenda vitendo vya kuongeza na kupunguza vitu
15. Kubainisha maumbo ya namba kwa kutumia vitu mbalimbali
16. Kuumba/kuunda maumbo ya namba
17. Kufuatisha maumbo ya namba 1–20
18. Kuandika namba 1–9 hewani, mchangani, kwenye kibao na daftari
19. Kutenda vitendo vinavyojenga dhana ya sifuri
steps_en:
1. Identify various shapes
2. Classify objects according to their attributes
3. Arrange objects in a matching sequence
4. Play matching and differentiating games
5. Identify different times of the day
6. Identify corresponding actions
7. Differentiate days of the week
8. Compare objects based on their attributes
9. Measure various objects
10. Identify objects that help build the concept of number
11. Count numbers 1–20
12. Count numbers 1–20 using objects
13. Match quantity of objects to numerals
14. Perform actions of adding and subtracting objects
15. Identify number shapes using various objects
16. Form/create number shapes
17. Trace number shapes 1–20
18. Write numbers 1–9 in the air, in sand, on a slate and in a notebook
19. Perform activities that build the concept of zero

subject: Sanaa na Ubunifu
title_sw: Shughuli za Makuzi na Ujifunzaji wa Awali kwa Watoto wa Miaka 2–5: Sanaa na Ubunifu
title_en: Early Childhood Development and Learning Activities for Children Aged 2–5: Arts and Creativity
about_sw: Kujenga Stadi zinazohusisha Utendaji wa Mikono kwa watoto wa miaka 2–3, 3–4, na 4–5 kupitia shughuli mbalimbali za sanaa na ubunifu.
about_en: Building skills related to fine motor performance for children aged 2–3, 3–4, and 4–5 through various arts and creativity activities.
steps_sw:
MIAKA 2–3:
1. Kutambua rangi
2. Kupaka rangi
3. Kupanga vitu mbalimbali katika mstari
4. Kuchapa kwa kutumia vidole, kiganja au majani maua katika sura mbalimbali
5. Kutunga kwa kutumia vitu mbalimbali (mfano shanga)
6. Kutengeneza mkufu kwa karatasi
7. Kutengeneza maumbo
8. Kutengeneza picha kwa kubandika

MIAKA 3–4:
1. Kuchambua rangi
2. Kubandika vitu mbalimbali
3. Kutengeneza vifani kwa karatasi na kuvipamba
4. Kutunga kwa kutumia vitu mbalimbali (mfano shanga)
5. Kutunga kwa kutumia vitu mbalimbali kwa kufuata ruwaza rahisi/pateni
6. Kujenga kwa vibao
7. Kufuatisha doti
8. Kupaka rangi
9. Kuchora picha za vitu mbalimbali

MIAKA 4–5:
1. Kukata picha za vitu mbalimbali
2. Kufinyanga kwa kutumia udongo
3. Kuchanganya rangi za msingi (buluu, njano na nyekundu)
4. Kupanga rangi za msingi
5. Kuunda/kutengeneza vifaa mbalimbali kwa kutumia magazeti, uzi, vitambaa, na rangi
6. Kutengeneza ruwaza (ABAB, AABB) kwa kutumia vitu mbalimbali mfano vijiti, mawe, mchanga
7. Kutengeneza vifaa vya kuigiza mfano: taji, midoli na sanamu za vitu mbalimbali
8. Kutengeneza kazi za kufuma / kusuka
9. Kuchora maumbo na vitu mbalimbali
steps_en:
AGES 2–3:
1. Identifying colours
2. Painting/colouring
3. Arranging various objects in a line
4. Printing using fingers, palm or flowers in various shapes
5. Stringing using various items (e.g. beads)
6. Making a necklace from paper
7. Making shapes
8. Making pictures by collage/sticking

AGES 3–4:
1. Sorting colours
2. Sticking/collaging various items
3. Making paper models and decorating them
4. Stringing using various items (e.g. beads)
5. Stringing using various items following a simple pattern
6. Building with blocks/planks
7. Dot-to-dot tracing
8. Painting/colouring
9. Drawing pictures of various objects

AGES 4–5:
1. Cutting pictures of various objects
2. Moulding with clay
3. Mixing primary colours (blue, yellow and red)
4. Arranging primary colours
5. Creating/making various items using newspapers, thread, fabric, and paint
6. Making patterns (ABAB, AABB) using various objects such as sticks, stones, sand
7. Making props for role-play e.g. crowns, dolls and sculptures of various objects
8. Making weaving/knitting work
9. Drawing shapes and various objects

subject: Sanaa na Ubunifu – Kujenga Stadi Zinazohusisha Utendaji wa Mikono
title_sw: Shughuli 1: Kukata picha za vitu mbalimbali
title_en: Activity 1: Cutting pictures of various objects
about_sw: Kukata vitu kwa kutumia mkasi, kukuza misuli midogo ya vidole, umakini, ubunifu, kukuza kipaji
about_en: Cutting objects using scissors, developing small finger muscles, concentration, creativity, and talent development
materials_sw: Mikasi, karatasi, penseli, vipande vya boksi
materials_en: Scissors, paper, pencils, pieces of cardboard/box
steps_sw:
1. Andaa vifaa na eneo lililo safi na mazingira rafiki
2. Waweke Watoto katika umbo U/nusu duara/ mduara au mkao mwingine kulingana na mazingira
3. Waoneshe Watoto vifaa mbalimbali ulivyoandaa kwa kuwauliza maswali kuhusiana na vifaa hivyo.
4. Waulize maswali kuwa wanaweza kuchora picha gani na kisha kuikata.
5. Onesha mfano wa namna ya kuchora picha moja na kisha uikate.
6. Waelekeze Watoto wachague picha wazipendazo kisha wachore na kuzikata.
7. Chunguza Watoto wanapofanya kazi hiyo na kutoa msaada kwa mwenye uhitaji huo.
8. Mwalike mtoto mmoja mmoja aende mbele na kuonesha picha zake alizozichora na kukata.
9. Malizia kwa kuwaulize maswali endapo kama kuna picha zilizofanana
10. Waulize maswali wataje majina ya picha zilizochorwa na kukatwa, na kubaini picha zinazofanana..
11. Waelekeze watoto kubandika picha walizozichora ukutani

Tanbihi: Shughuli hii itawezeshwa kwa vipindi vitatu kwa kubadilisha picha mbalimbali.
steps_en:
1. Prepare materials and a clean, child-friendly environment.
2. Seat the children in a U-shape / semicircle / circle or another arrangement suitable for the environment.
3. Show the children the various materials you have prepared and ask questions related to those materials.
4. Ask them what pictures they can draw and then cut out.
5. Demonstrate how to draw one picture and then cut it out.
6. Guide the children to choose pictures they like, then draw and cut them out.
7. Observe the children as they work and offer assistance to whoever needs it.
8. Invite each child one by one to come forward and show the pictures they drew and cut.
9. Conclude by asking questions about whether there are any similar pictures.
10. Ask them to name the pictures that were drawn and cut, and to identify pictures that look alike.
11. Guide the children to paste the pictures they drew on the wall.

Note: This activity can be carried out in three sessions by changing the different pictures.

subject: Sanaa na Ubunifu: Miaka 4–5 – Kujenga Stadi Zinazohusisha Utendaji wa Mikono
title_sw: Shughuli 8: Kutengeneza kazi za kusuka/kufuma
title_en: Activity 8: Making weaving/knitting works
about_sw: Ubunifu, kuimarisha misuli ya mikono, kukuza vipaji na misamiati
about_en: Creativity, strengthening hand muscles, developing talents and vocabulary
materials_sw: Kamba, majani ya mgomba, nyasi, makuti ya nazi, ukili, vitu vilivyosukwa mfano mkeka
materials_en: Rope, banana leaves, grass, coconut palm leaves, sisal fibre, woven items such as a mat
steps_sw:
1. Andaa mkeka au jamvi pamoja na vifaa vingine katika eneo lenye mazingira rafiki.
2. Kaa na watoto katika umbo ambalo watakuona.
3. Waoneshe Watoto vifaa vilivyosukwa.
4. Waoneshe vifaa vya kutumia.
5. Waelekeze namna ya kusuka kwa kutumia vifaa mbalimbali.
6. Wagawe Watoto katika makundi.
7. Gawa kifaa kimoja kwa kila kundi.
8. Waelekeze kutengeneza kitu wanachokipenda mfano pambo.
9. Chunguza kila hatua inayofanyika endapo mtoto ameweza kushiriki na kumsaidia pale inapohitajika.

Tanbihi: Shughuli hii itawezeshwa kwa vipindi vitano katika siku tofauti, na kwa kubadilisha vifaa vilivyoyumika.
steps_en:
1. Prepare a mat or rug together with other materials in a child-friendly environment.
2. Sit with the children in a formation where they can see you.
3. Show the children the woven items.
4. Show the materials to be used.
5. Guide them on how to weave using various materials.
6. Divide the children into groups.
7. Give one material to each group.
8. Guide them to make something they like, for example a decoration.
9. Monitor each step being done and assist the child where necessary.

Note: This activity can be facilitated over five sessions on different days, and by varying the materials used.

subject: Sanaa na Ubunifu: Miaka 4–5 – Kujenga Stadi Zinazohusisha Utendaji wa Mikono
title_sw: Shughuli 9a: Kuchora maumbo mbalimbali
title_en: Activity 9a: Drawing various shapes
about_sw: Kutambua maumbo na vitu mbalimbali
about_en: Recognising various shapes and objects
materials_sw: Picha za maumbo (mraba, duara, mstatiri, umbo la yai na pembe tatu), penseli, karatasi, maboksi, rangi, vibao vinavyoonesha maumbo
materials_en: Pictures of shapes (square, circle, rectangle, oval and triangle), pencils, paper, boxes, colours/crayons, boards showing shapes
steps_sw:
1. Andaa eneo lenye mazingira rafiki pamoja na vifaa.
2. Kaa na watoto kwenye umbo la 'U' au duara.
3. Waambie watoto kwamba watacheza mchezo mzuri unaoitwa kutengeneza maumbo.
4. Weka picha mbele ya watoto au uwambie waangalie darasani na wataje maumbo wanayoyaona.
5. Waambie watoto wajipange katika maumbo tofauti (kwa mfano duara).
6. Waambie Watoto wachore maumbo hayo.
7. Chunguza kama kila mtoto anaweza kushiriki kuchora umbo lolote.
8. Waambie Watoto waoneshe michoro ya maumbo waliyoichora.
9. Hakikisha watoto wote wameshiriki kuchora na uwapongeze.

Tanbihi:
1. Endapo kuna mtoto mwenye changamoto ya kuona, tumia mbinu nyingine shirikishi mfano, kumgusisha na kumwongozo, kwa mtoto kiziwi kutoa maelekezo kwa vitendo (lugha ya alama).
2. Shughuli hii itawezeshwa kwa vipindi vinne kwa kurudia kipindi na kubadilisha matumizi ya vifaa.
steps_en:
1. Prepare a child-friendly area together with the materials.
2. Sit with the children in a 'U' shape or circle.
3. Tell the children they will play a fun game called making shapes.
4. Place pictures in front of the children or ask them to look around the room and name the shapes they see.
5. Tell the children to arrange themselves into different shapes (for example a circle).
6. Tell the children to draw those shapes.
7. Check whether each child is able to participate in drawing any shape.
8. Ask the children to show the shape drawings they have made.
9. Ensure all children have participated in drawing and praise them.

Note:
1. If there is a child with a visual impairment, use other participatory methods such as guiding by touch; for a deaf child give instructions through actions (sign language).
2. This activity can be facilitated over four sessions by repeating and varying the use of materials.

subject: Sanaa na Ubunifu: Miaka 4–5 – Kujenga Stadi Zinazohusisha Utendaji wa Mikono
title_sw: Shughuli 9b: Kuchora maumbo ya vitu mbalimbali
title_en: Activity 9b: Drawing shapes of various objects
about_sw: Kutambua maumbo mbalimbali, kuimarisha misuli, ushirikiano, ubunifu, kukuza vipaji, kukuza misamiati
about_en: Recognising various shapes, strengthening muscles, cooperation, creativity, developing talents, developing vocabulary
materials_sw: Karatasi, vipande vya boksi, penseli na rangi mbalimbali, ubao mgumu
materials_en: Paper, pieces of cardboard/box, pencils and various colours/crayons, a hard board
steps_sw:
1. Andaa vifaa na eneo lenye mazingira rafiki.
2. Kaa na watoto kwenye umbo ambalo watoto watakuona.
3. Waoneshe watoto vifaa vilivyoandaliwa.
4. Waelekeze watoto watoke nje na kuangalia vitu mbalimbali wanavyoviona.
5. Waulize maswali ya ufahamu mfano 'umeona nini ulipotoka nje'.
6. Waongoze watoto kutoa majibu ya vitu walivyoviona.
7. Waambie watoto wachore vitu walivyoviona nje na kupaka rangi.
8. Mtembelee kila mtoto kuona anavyochora picha ya kitu alichokiona.
9. Chunguza kama watoto wameweza kuchora vitu mbalimbali walivyoviona na kupaka rangi.
10. Waongoze watoto mmoja mmoja kuonesha picha aliyoichora kisha wabandike ukutani.

Tanbihi: Shughuli hii itawezeshwa kwa vipindi vitatu kwa kubadilisha mazingira.
steps_en:
1. Prepare the materials and a child-friendly area.
2. Sit with the children in a formation where the children can see you.
3. Show the children the prepared materials.
4. Guide the children to go outside and observe various objects they can see.
5. Ask comprehension questions such as 'what did you see when you went outside'.
6. Guide the children to give answers about the objects they saw.
7. Tell the children to draw the objects they saw outside and colour them.
8. Visit each child to see how they are drawing the picture of the object they saw.
9. Check whether the children were able to draw the various objects they saw and colour them.
10. Guide the children one by one to show the picture they drew and then stick it on the wall.

Note: This activity can be facilitated over three sessions by changing the environment.

subject: Sanaa na Ubunifu: Miaka 4–5 | Kujenga Stadi Zinazohusisha Utendaji wa Mwili
title_sw: Shughuli 1: Kucheza michezo ya kuigiza kwa vikundi
title_en: Activity 1: Playing group role-play games
about_sw: Kuigiza, kuimarisha misuli mikubwa na midogo, ubunifu na umakini, ushirikiano, kukuza lugha
about_en: Role-playing, strengthening large and small muscles, creativity and care, cooperation, language development
materials_sw: Picha au kadi za kama vile askari, daktari na mwalimu, vifaa mbalimbali wanavyotumia hawa kama sindano, chaki, filimbi, kofia, koti.
materials_en: Pictures or cards of professionals such as a soldier, doctor and teacher, various tools they use such as syringes, chalk, a whistle, a hat, a coat.
steps_sw:
1. Andaa vifaa vitakavyotumika pamoja na mazingira ambapo mchezo huo utachezwa
2. Kaa na watoto katika umbo la U au mkao wowote unaofaa.
3. Waeleze kwamba leo watacheza mchezo wa kuigiza wataalamu mbalimbali
4. Wagawe watoto kwenye makundi ambapo kila kundi lichague picha/kadi ya taaluma wanayoipenda
5. Waongoze watoto wajadili vitendo mbalimbali vya taaluma waliyoichagua. Mf askari.
6. Wape fursa ya kuigiza kwa vikundi taaluma waliyoichagua
7. Baada ya vikundi vyote kuwasilisha waulize maswali yanayohusiana na walichokiwakilisha mf. Mmependa kitendo gani zaidi kilichooneshwa? Ukiwa mkubwa ungependa ukiwa nani?
8. Angalia kama kila mtoto anashiriki kwenye zoezi hili.

Tanbihi: Shughuli hii Itawezeshwa kwa vipindi sita katika muda tofauti.
steps_en:
1. Prepare the materials to be used along with the environment where the game will be played
2. Sit with the children in a U-shape or any suitable arrangement.
3. Tell them that today they will play a game of role-playing various professionals
4. Divide children into groups where each group chooses a picture/card of a profession they like
5. Guide children to discuss various actions of the profession they chose, e.g. a soldier.
6. Give them the opportunity to role-play as a group the profession they chose
7. After all groups have presented, ask questions related to what they represented, e.g. Which action did you like most that was shown? When you grow up, who would you like to be?
8. Check that every child is participating in this exercise.

Note: This activity will be facilitated in six sessions at different times.

subject: Sanaa na Ubunifu: Miaka 4–5 | Kujenga Stadi Zinazohusisha Utendaji wa Mwili
title_sw: Shughuli 2: Kuvuta kamba
title_en: Activity 2: Tug of war (rope pulling)
about_sw: Kuvuta kamba, kuimarisha misuli mikubwa na midogo, ubunifu na umakini, ushirikiano, kukuza lugha
about_en: Rope pulling, strengthening large and small muscles, creativity and care, cooperation, language development
materials_sw: Kamba ya kuvuta (iwe ngumu ambayo haitaumiza mikono ya watoto ndefu kulingana na idadi ya watoto) filimbi, chaki ya kuweka alama
materials_en: A tug-of-war rope (firm enough not to hurt children's hands, long enough according to the number of children), a whistle, chalk for marking
steps_sw:
1. Andaa vifaa utakavyotumia pamoja na mazingira ambapo mchezo huo utachezwa.
2. Watoe watoto nje ya darasa katika sehemu ya wazi yenye nafasi na waeleze mchezo wa leo.
3. Mlezi waoneshe watoto picha mbalimbali zinazoonesha mchezo wa kuvuta kamba na kanuni rahisi zinazoongoza mchezo huo
4. Chora alama au mstari ambao unatenganisha makundi mawili (Kundi litakalovuka mstari huo litakua limeshindwa mchezo).
5. Waoneshe vifaa mbalimbali ambavyo umeandaa na namna vinavyotumika.
6. Onesha kwa vitendo jinsi mchezo huo unavyochezwa.
7. Wagawe watoto katika timu mbili zitakazoshindana na wape fursa ya kujadili namna ya kushinda.
8. Waruhusu watoto kuanza kushindana kwa kupuliza filimbi kuashiria kuanza mchezo.
9. Baada ya mchezo waulize maswali mchanganyiko kuhusiana na mchezo waliocheza mf. Walifanyaje mpaka wakashinda mchezo?.
10. Chunguza kama kila mtoto ameweza kushiriki kuvuta kamba.

Tanbihi:
1. Kumbuka kuainisha watoto wenye mahitaji maalumu ili uweze kuwashirikisha kulingana na mahitaji yao
2. Shughuli hii itawezeshwa kwa vipindi vitatu katika muda tofauti.
steps_en:
1. Prepare the materials you will use along with the environment where the game will be played.
2. Take children outside the classroom to an open spacious area and explain today's game.
3. The caregiver should show children various pictures depicting the tug-of-war game and the simple rules guiding the game
4. Draw a mark or line that separates the two groups (the group that crosses that line will have lost the game).
5. Show the various materials you have prepared and how they are used.
6. Demonstrate by action how the game is played.
7. Divide children into two competing teams and give them an opportunity to discuss how to win.
8. Allow children to start competing by blowing a whistle to signal the start of the game.
9. After the game, ask mixed questions about the game they played, e.g. What did they do until they won the game?
10. Check whether every child was able to participate in the tug of war.

Note:
1. Remember to identify children with special needs so you can include them according to their needs
2. This activity will be facilitated in three sessions at different times.

subject: Sanaa na Ubunifu: Miaka 4–5 | Kujenga Stadi Zinazohusisha Utendaji wa Mwili
title_sw: Shughuli 3: Kubeba vitu kichwani bila kuangusha
title_en: Activity 3: Carrying items on the head without dropping them
about_sw: Kubeba vitu, Kuimarisha misuli mikubwa na midogo, ubunifu na umakini, ushirikiano, kukuza lugha
about_en: Carrying items, strengthening large and small muscles, creativity and care, cooperation, language development
materials_sw: Chupa ya maji, sahani, filimbi, kikombe picha/kadi zinazoonesha mchezo wa kubeba vitu bila kuangusha
materials_en: A water bottle, a plate, a whistle, a cup, pictures/cards showing the game of carrying items without dropping them
steps_sw:
1. Andaa vifaa na mazingira ambapo mchezo huo utachezwa na chagua aina moja ya kitu/kifaa ambacho watabeba bila kuangusha kisha watoe watoto nje ya darasa katika sehemu yenye nafasi.
2. Chora mstari sehemu ya kuanzia na kuishia yaani anapobebea kitu hadi anapofikisha. Zingatia umbali kati ya sehemu hizo mbili kulingana na umri wa watoto.
3. Waeleze mchezo ambao watoto wataucheza kisha waoneshe vifaa mbalimbali ambavyo umeandaa na namna vinavyotumika.
4. Onesha kwa vitendo jinsi mchezo huo unavyochezwa. Beba sahani kichwani kisha utembee kutoka sehemu ya kuanzia na kuelekea mwisho yaani.
5. Waeleze kanuni mbalimbali za kufuata unavyocheza mchezo huo mfano kutembea kwa makini na kwa mwendo ambao hutaangusha kitu kwa kichwa na huruhusiwi kushika kwa mkono.
6. Baada ya mchezo waulize maswali mchanganyiko kuhusiana na mchezo waliocheza mf. Walifanyaje mpaka wakashinda mchezo?
7. Chunguza kama kila mtoto ameweza kubeba kitu kichwani na kutembea nacho.

Tanbihi: Shughuli hii itawezeshwa kwa vipindi vitatu katika muda tofauti ukibadilisha vitu vya kubeba kichwani.
steps_en:
1. Prepare the materials and the environment where the game will be played, choose one type of item/object that they will carry without dropping, then take children outside the classroom to a spacious area.
2. Draw a starting and finishing line, i.e. where the child starts carrying the item to where they reach. Consider the distance between those two points according to the age of the children.
3. Explain the game the children will play, then show them the various materials you have prepared and how they are used.
4. Demonstrate by action how the game is played. Place a plate on your head then walk from the starting point towards the finishing point.
5. Explain the various rules to follow when playing the game, for example walking carefully and at a pace that will not cause the item on the head to fall, and you are not allowed to hold it with your hand.
6. After the game, ask mixed questions about the game they played, e.g. What did they do until they won the game?
7. Check whether every child was able to carry an item on their head and walk with it.

Note: This activity will be facilitated in three sessions at different times, changing the items to be carried on the head.

subject: Sanaa na Ubunifu: Miaka 4–5 / Kujenga Stadi Zinazohusisha Utendaji wa Mwili
title_sw: Shughuli 4: Kuumba maumbo mbalimbali kwa kutumia miili yao
title_en: Activity 4: Creating various shapes using their bodies
about_sw: Kuumba maumbo, Kuimarisha misuli mikubwa na midogo, ubunifu na umakini, kukuza lugha
about_en: Creating shapes, strengthening large and small muscles, creativity and concentration, developing language
materials_sw: Maumbo mbalimbali yaliyotengenezwa kwa kuchongwa, kadi za maumbo, Chati ya maumbo mbalimbali
materials_en: Various shapes made by carving, shape cards, a chart of various shapes
steps_sw:
1. Andaa vifaa utakavyotumia pamoja na mazingira ambapo mchezo huo utachezwa
2. Waongoze watoto kukaa katika mkao wa U au mkao mwingine unaofaa.
3. Waongoze watoto kutaja maumbo mbalimbali wanayoyajua
4. Waeleze watoto kwamba watacheza mchezo wa kuunda maumbo kwa kutumia miili yao.
5. Wagawe watoto katika vikundi
6. Wape fursa ya kuchagua kadi ya umbo lolote wanalolipenda
7. Watoto wajadili katika vikundi jinsi ya kuumba umbo hilo kwa kwa mkao. Mf mkao wa duara
8. Wape fursa watoto ya kuumba maumbo uliyoandaa mfano duara, pembetatu, mraba
9. Angalia kama watoto wanashiriki katika hatua za kuumba maumbo.
10. Baada ya mchezo waulize maswali mchanganyiko kuhusiana na mchezo waliocheza mf. Watoto umbo mliloliumba linafanana na kitu gani?

Tanbihi: Shughuli hii Itawezeshwa kwa vipindi vitatu katika muda tofauti.
steps_en:
1. Prepare the materials you will use together with the environment where the game will be played
2. Guide the children to sit in a U-shape or another suitable arrangement.
3. Guide the children to name various shapes they already know
4. Explain to the children that they will play a game of creating shapes using their bodies.
5. Divide the children into groups
6. Give them the opportunity to choose a card of any shape they like
7. Children discuss in groups how to create that shape using a pose. E.g. a circular pose
8. Give children the opportunity to create the shapes you have prepared, for example circle, triangle, square
9. Observe whether the children are participating in the steps of creating shapes.
10. After the game, ask mixed questions about the game they played, e.g. Children, what does the shape you created resemble?

Note: This activity will be facilitated in three sessions at different times.

subject: Sanaa na Ubunifu: Miaka 4–5 / Kujenga Stadi Zinazohusisha Utendaji wa Mwili
title_sw: Shughuli 5: Mazoezi ya mwendo kwa mdundo mchanganyiko
title_en: Activity 5: Movement exercises to mixed rhythm
about_sw: Kuimarisha misuli mikubwa na midogo, ubunifu na umakini, kukuza lugha
about_en: Strengthening large and small muscles, creativity and concentration, developing language
materials_sw: Ngoma, filimbi, mavazi ya jadi, njuga, redio, simu, runinga
materials_en: Drum, whistle, traditional attire, rattles, radio, phone, television
steps_sw:
1. Andaa vifaa utakavyotumia pamoja na mazingira salama ambapo mchezo huo utachezwa
2. Waongoze watoto kukaa katika mkao wa U au mkao mwingine unaofaa.
3. Waeleze watoto kwamba wanakwenda kucheza mchezo wa mazoezi ya mwendo kwa mdundo mchanganyiko
4. Waeleze watoto kwamba utapiga ngoma na watoto wacheze kwa kufuata mdundo wanaousikia.
5. Waeleze kuwa utabadili mapigo ya ngoma na watoto wanafuate mapigo hayo kwa kuendelea kucheza
6. Anza kupiga ngoma kwa mdundo rahisi na watoto kucheza kwa kufuata mdundo huo. Ongeza mapigo ya ngoma na watoto wafuate kwa kucheza
7. Baada ya mchezo waulize watoto maswali yanayohusiana na mchezo waliokuwa wanacheza. Mfano Wamejisikiaje wakati wanacheza mchezo huo

Tanbihi: 1. Shughuli hii itawezeshwa kwa vipindi vinne katika muda tofauti ukibadilisha aina ya vifaa vya kupiga mapigo.
steps_en:
1. Prepare the materials you will use together with a safe environment where the game will be played
2. Guide the children to sit in a U-shape or another suitable arrangement.
3. Explain to the children that they are going to play a movement exercise game to mixed rhythm
4. Explain to the children that you will beat the drum and the children should move following the rhythm they hear.
5. Explain that you will change the drum beats and children should follow those beats by continuing to move
6. Start beating the drum with a simple rhythm and children move following that rhythm. Increase the drum beats and children follow by moving
7. After the game, ask the children questions related to the game they were playing. For example: How did they feel while playing that game

Note: 1. This activity will be facilitated in four sessions at different times, changing the type of percussion instruments.

subject: Sanaa na Ubunifu: Miaka 4–5 / Kujenga Stadi Zinazohusisha Utendaji wa Mwili
title_sw: Shughuli 6: Kucheza mchezo wa msawazo
title_en: Activity 6: Playing a balance game
about_sw: Kuimarisha misuli mikubwa na midogo, ubunifu na umakini, kukuza lugha
about_en: Strengthening large and small muscles, creativity and concentration, developing language
materials_sw: Kamba, filimbi, chaki, kijiti cha kuchorea, picha zinazoonesha mchezo wa msawazo
materials_en: Rope, whistle, chalk, drawing stick, pictures showing a balance game
steps_sw:
1. Andaa vifaa utakavyotumia pamoja na mazingira salama ambapo mchezo huo utachezwa.
2. Waongoze watoto kukaa katika mkao wa U au mkao mwingine unaofaa.
3. Waeleze watoto kwmba wanakwenda kucheza mchezo wa kuruka kwa kufuata alama zilizowekwa.
4. Chora maduara manne kwenye sakafu kwa kutumia chaki au kijiti (au zaidi kulingana na uwezo wa watoto).
5. Wapange mstari mmoja ulionyooka kisha ruhusu kila mtoto kuruka kwa kuingia kila duara alilochora kwa bila kukanyaga mstari hadi mwisho.
6. Hakikisha kila mtoto anashiriki kikamilifu mchezo huo.
7. Baada ya mchezo wape fursa watoto kujadili mchezo walioucheza kwa kuwauliza maswali. Mfano wamejisikiaje wakati wanacheza mchezo huo.
8. Chunguza ikiwa kila mtoto ameshriki kwa kuruka kila duara bila klukanyaga mstari.

Tanbihi: 1. Shughuli hii itawezeshwa kwa vipindi sita kwa namna tofauti.
steps_en:
1. Prepare the materials you will use together with a safe environment where the game will be played.
2. Guide the children to sit in a U-shape or another suitable arrangement.
3. Explain to the children that they are going to play a jumping game following the marks that have been set.
4. Draw four circles on the floor using chalk or a stick (or more depending on the ability of the children).
5. Arrange them in a straight line then allow each child to jump by entering each circle drawn without stepping on the line until the end.
6. Ensure every child participates fully in the game.
7. After the game, give children the opportunity to discuss the game they played by asking them questions. For example: How did they feel while playing that game.
8. Check whether every child participated by jumping in each circle without stepping on the line.

Note: 1. This activity will be facilitated in six sessions in different ways.

subject: Sanaa na Ubunifu: Miaka 4–5 | Kujenga Stadi Zinazohusisha Utendaji wa Mwili
title_sw: Shughuli 7: Kucheza Michezo yenye vikwazo
title_en: Activity 7: Playing Games with Obstacles
about_sw: Kuimarisha misuli mikubwa na midogo, ubunifu na umakini, kukuza lugha
about_en: Strengthening large and small muscles, creativity and concentration, developing language
materials_sw: magunia, filimbi, chaki, kijiti cha kuchorea, picha zinazoonesha mchezo wa kuruka kwa vikwazo
materials_en: sacks, whistle, chalk, drawing stick, pictures showing obstacle jumping games
steps_sw:
1. Andaa vifaa utakavyotumia pamoja na mazingira ambapo mchezo huo utachezwa.
2. Waongoze watoto kwenda uwanjani au sehemu ya wazi kwa ajili ya kwenda kucheza mchezo wa mbio za kwenye magunia.
3. Waeleze watoto kwmba wanakwenda kucheza mchezo wa mbio za kwenye magunia.
4. Waoneshe picha mbalimbali zinazoonesha jinsi mchezo huo unavyochezwa.
5. Eleza kwa ufupi kanuni zinazoongoza mchezo huo.
6. Onesha kwa vitendo jinsi mchezo wa kukimbia kwenye magunia unavyochezwa.
7. Baada ya kuonesha mchezo huo wapange watoto kwenye mstari na wasaidie kuvaa magunia (wacheze kwa makundi kulingana na idadi ya magunia, na idadi ya watoto).
8. Weka alama sehemu ya kuanzia na sehemu ya kuishia. Kumbuka kuweka umbali ambao unaendana na umri wa watoto.
9. Ruhusu watoto waanze mchezo kwa kupuliza kipenda au filimbi.
10. Hakikisha kila mtoto anashiriki kikamilifu mchezo huo.

Tanbihi: Shughuli hii itawezeshwa kwa vipindi 6 kwa namna tofauti.
steps_en:
1. Prepare the materials you will use along with the environment where the game will be played.
2. Guide the children to go to the field or open area in order to play the sack race game.
3. Tell the children that they are going to play the sack race game.
4. Show them various pictures illustrating how the game is played.
5. Briefly explain the rules that guide the game.
6. Demonstrate in action how the sack running game is played.
7. After demonstrating the game, line up the children and help them put on the sacks (play in groups according to the number of sacks and the number of children).
8. Mark the starting point and the finishing point. Remember to set a distance that is appropriate for the children's age.
9. Allow the children to start the game by blowing a whistle or horn.
10. Make sure every child participates fully in the game.

Note: This activity will be facilitated over 6 sessions in different ways.

subject: Sanaa na Ubunifu: Miaka 4–5 | Kujenga Stadi Zinazohusisha Ubunifu wa Sauti
title_sw: Shughuli 1: Kuchunguza milio kutoka kwenye vitu
title_en: Activity 1: Exploring Sounds from Objects
about_sw: Kujenga udadisi, kusikiliza, kukuza uwezo wa kubaini sauti mbalimbali, kuimarisha misuli na kukuza misamiati
about_en: Building curiosity, listening, developing the ability to identify various sounds, strengthening muscles and expanding vocabulary
materials_sw: Chupa za plastiki, mifuko ya karatasi, vikombe vya plastiki, vijiko na mbao ndogo, Mawe mchanga, Karanga makopo madogo yaliyofunikwa vizuri.
materials_en: Plastic bottles, paper bags, plastic cups, small wooden spoons, sand/gravel, groundnuts in small well-covered tins.
steps_sw:
1. Andaa mazingira wezeshi kwa ajili ya shughuli husika.
2. Waweke watoto wasimame katika umbo la "U".
3. Waongoze watoto kuchunguza sauti inatoka wapi kwa kuwauliza "je kitu kinapoguswa kutikiswa, kupigwa ndipo sauti inatoka?"
4. Wape kila mtoto kifaa tofauti waambie, wapige, watikise, wapulize kisha waambie wafumbe macho na kusikiliza tu, waulize umesikia mlio gani wa juu au chini, Ni inasikika vipi kali au laini.
5. Waongoze watoto kulinganisha sauti kwa kuweka mbao, chuma na plastiki. Waambie wagonge kila moja waseme mlio upi ni mkubwa, na upi ni mdogo.
6. Wape mifuko ya karatasi au nguo iliyowekwa kokwa, mchele, mawe na karatasi, kisha watikise mfuko waseme sauti inatoka wapi.
7. Angalia kama watoto wameweza kuchunguza milio ya vitu inatoka wapi.

Tanbihi:
1. Shughuli hii itawezeshwa kwa vipindi 5 kwa kutumia vifaa tofauti na mbinu tofauti.
2. Mtoto mwenye ulemavu wa kuona mshike mkono wake mshikishe kwenye vitu husika na agonge kupata milio.
steps_en:
1. Prepare an enabling environment for this activity.
2. Have the children stand in a "U" shape.
3. Guide the children to explore where sound comes from by asking them "when an object is touched, shaken, or hit, is that when the sound comes?"
4. Give each child a different object and tell them to hit it, shake it, blow it, then tell them to close their eyes and only listen; ask them what kind of sound they heard — high or low, does it sound loud or soft.
5. Guide the children to compare sounds by placing wood, metal and plastic. Tell them to tap each one and say which sound is louder and which is softer.
6. Give them paper bags or cloth filled with pebbles, rice, stones and paper, then shake the bag and say where the sound is coming from.
7. Observe whether the children were able to explore where sounds from objects come from.

Note:
1. This activity will be facilitated over 5 sessions using different materials and different techniques.
2. For a child with visual impairment, hold their hand and let them touch the relevant objects and tap them to get the sounds.

subject: Sanaa na Ubunifu: Miaka 4–5 | Kujenga Stadi Zinazohusisha Ubunifu wa Sauti
title_sw: Shughuli 2: Kuunda midundo rahisi
title_en: Activity 2: Creating Simple Rhythms
about_sw: Kujenga stadi ya umakini, kufuata maelekezo, kusikiliza kuimarisha misuli na kukuza ubunifu na kujiamini.
about_en: Building skills of concentration, following instructions, listening, strengthening muscles and developing creativity and self-confidence.
materials_sw: Makopo yaliyo funikwa, vifaa vya jikoni, chupa zilizo na mbegu ngoma ndogo.
materials_en: Covered tins, kitchen utensils, bottles with seeds, small drums.
steps_sw:
1. Andaa vifaa na eneo watoto watakalo kaa.
2. Waweke watoto katika umbo la Duara.
3. Kila mtoto achague chombo au kifaa anachokipenda.
4. Muongoze mtoto kuunda midundo kwa kuhesabu mara mbili .... pumzika, apige mara tatu. apumzike humsaidia kujenga mpangilio na kufuata mdundo.
5. Waongoze watoto kuimba nyimbo fupi au maneno yanayosaidia kuweka mdundo kwa mfano Bum-bum-bum au Tupa-chukua-tupa-chukua.
6. Muongoze mtoto kutengenza mdundo wake kwa kuwagawa wawili wawili kisha mtoto mmoja anapiga mdundo mfupi mtoto mwingine anajibu kwa mdundo mwingine.
7. Chunguza kama watoto wanaweza kupiga mdundo.

Tanbihi:
1. Shughuli hii itawezeshwa kwa vipindi 5 kwa kutumia mbinu tofauti.
2. Watoto wenye ulemavu wa kusikia tumia ishara za mikono na watoto wasioona washikishe kifaa wanachogusa na watoto wenye ulemavu wa akili mpe shughuli fupi na rudiarudia.
steps_en:
1. Prepare the materials and the area where the children will sit.
2. Place the children in a circle shape.
3. Each child chooses an instrument or object they like.
4. Guide the child to create rhythms by counting twice .... rest, hit three times, rest — this helps them build a pattern and follow a rhythm.
5. Guide the children to sing short songs or words that help keep a rhythm, for example Bum-bum-bum or Tupa-chukua-tupa-chukua (Throw-pick-throw-pick).
6. Guide the child to make their own rhythm by pairing them in twos, then one child plays a short rhythm and the other child responds with another rhythm.
7. Observe whether the children are able to beat a rhythm.

Note:
1. This activity will be facilitated over 5 sessions using different techniques.
2. For children with hearing impairment use hand signs; for children with visual impairment let them hold the object they are touching; for children with intellectual disability give short, repetitive tasks.

subject: Sanaa na Ubunifu: Miaka 4–5 / Kujenga Stadi Zinazohusisha Ubunifu wa Sauti
title_sw: Shughuli 3: Kuigiza sauti na milio ya vitu
title_en: Activity 3: Imitating sounds and noises of objects
about_sw: Kujenga stadi za kushirikiana, kusaidiana, kutii, upendo katika familia, utambuzi wa sauti, ujasili, na ubunifu
about_en: Building skills of cooperation, helping one another, obedience, love within the family, sound recognition, confidence, and creativity
materials_sw: Picha ya saa, kengele, picha za Wanyama, ndege na vitu halisi vinavyotoa sauti.
materials_en: Picture of a clock, a bell, pictures of animals, birds, and real objects that produce sound.
steps_sw:
