1. Andaa vifaa utakavyotumia pamoja na mazingira yanayofaa.
2. Waweke watoto katika duara.
3. Chagua mtoto mmoja mmoja mpe jina la kitu aigize watoto wengine waseme ni kitu gani.
4. Wapongeze watoto kwa kila hatua.
5. Chunguza kama watoto wameigiza milio ya vitu walivyoelekezwa.

Tanbihi:
1. Shughuli hii itawezeshwa kwa vipindi 4 kwa kuwaongoza watoto kuigiza milio na sauti za vitu.
steps_en:
1. Prepare the materials you will use along with a suitable environment.
2. Place the children in a circle.
3. Choose one child at a time, give them the name of an object and have them imitate it while other children say what object it is.
4. Praise the children at every step.
5. Check whether the children have imitated the sounds of the objects they were guided to imitate.

Note:
1. This activity can be extended over 4 sessions to guide children in imitating sounds and noises of objects.

subject: Sanaa na Ubunifu: Miaka 4–5 / Kujenga Stadi Zinazohusisha Ubunifu wa Sauti
title_sw: Shughuli 4: Kuimba kwa ubunifu
title_en: Activity 4: Singing creatively
about_sw: Kujenga stadi ya utambuzi wa sauti, ubunifu, na ushirikiano
about_en: Building skills of sound recognition, creativity, and cooperation
materials_sw: Vikaragosi, vinyago, kadi za picha, picha za wanyama, vitabu vya picha
materials_en: Puppets, toys, picture cards, pictures of animals, picture books
steps_sw:
1. Andaa nyimbo zenye maneno machache.
2. Waweke watoto katika umbo la "U".
3. Waongoze watoto kwa kuwaimbisha kwa kutumia ishara za mwili kwa kutumia mikono juu/chini, haraka/polepole, mfano imba kwa sauti ya chini… sasa imba kwa sauti ya juu.
4. Muongoze mtoto kuimba sauti zisizo na maneno "kama La la laaaa" "Mmmmmmm" "Bum bum bum".
5. Waongoze watoto kucheza mchezo wa wimbo wa majina mfano Joyce, Joyce, leo tunachezaaaaa!.. huku ukitaja jina la kila mtoto. Kila mtoto atapenda kusikia jina lake.
6. Waongoze watoto kufanya tamasha la ubunifu kila mtoto aimbe wimbo mfupi au sauti aliyotunga au mstari mmoja aliobuni.
7. Chunguza kama mtoto ameweza kuimba.

Tanbihi:
1. Shughuli hii itawezeshwa kwa vipindi 5 kwa watoto kuimba sauti ya juu na chini, sauti ya haraka na polepole, kwa kuimba sauti zisizo na maneno.
2. Watoto wenye ulemavu wa kusikia waelekeze kwa vitendo ishara.
steps_en:
1. Prepare songs with few words.
2. Place the children in a "U" shape.
3. Guide the children by having them sing using body gestures — using hands up/down, fast/slow; for example, sing in a low voice… now sing in a high voice.
4. Guide the child to sing sounds without words such as "La la laaaa", "Mmmmmmm", "Bum bum bum".
5. Guide the children to play a name-song game, e.g. Joyce, Joyce, today we are playing!.. while mentioning the name of each child. Every child will enjoy hearing their name.
6. Guide the children to hold a creativity show where each child sings a short song or sound they composed or a line they created.
7. Check whether the child has been able to sing.

Note:
1. This activity can be extended over 5 sessions for children to sing high and low sounds, fast and slow sounds, and to sing wordless sounds.
2. Children with hearing disabilities should be guided through sign/action activities.

subject: Sanaa na Ubunifu: Miaka 4–5 / Kujenga Stadi Zinazohusisha Ubunifu wa Sauti
title_sw: Shughuli 5: Kutumia ala rahisi za muziki
title_en: Activity 5: Using simple musical instruments
about_sw: Kujenga stadi ya utambuzi wa sauti, ubunifu, kuimarissha uwezo wa mikono na vidole, kujiamini, kutenda kwa kufuata maelekezo
about_en: Building skills of sound recognition, creativity, strengthening hand and finger dexterity, self-confidence, and acting by following instructions
materials_sw: Filimbi za bomba za mpapai, kopo la plastiki, vifunikio vya soda, karatasi nzito, vijiti vya mbao
materials_en: Papaya stem flutes, plastic cups, soda bottle caps, thick paper/cardboard, wooden sticks
steps_sw:
1. Andaa vifaa utakavyotumia pamoja na mazingira yanayofaa.
2. Waweke watoto katika umbo la duara.
3. Muongoze kila mtoto kushika sehemu ya karibu na mdomo wa filimbi mkono wa pili ushike sehemu za nyuma au chini. Vidole vifunike mashimo ya filimbi.
4. Muongoze mtoto kuweka sehemu ya kupuliza kwenye mdomo.
5. Muelekeze mtoto apumue taratibu ili kupeleka hewa kwenye tundu la filimbi.
6. Muongoze mtoto apulize filimbi kwa kumwambia puliza kama unazima mshumaa.
7. Muongoze kutambua sauti inabadilika waakti wa kufunga na kufungua shimo za filimbi.
8. Chunguza kama watoto wameweza kutumia ala rahisi.

Tanbihi:
Shughuli hii itawezeshwa kwa vipindi 5 kwa kuwawezesha watoto kutengeneza ala za muziki kwa kutumia vifaa tofauti.
steps_en:
1. Prepare the materials you will use along with a suitable environment.
2. Place the children in a circle.
3. Guide each child to hold the part near the mouthpiece of the flute with one hand, and the other hand holds the back or bottom part. Fingers should cover the holes of the flute.
4. Guide the child to place the blowing part at their mouth.
5. Direct the child to breathe slowly in order to push air into the hole of the flute.
6. Guide the child to blow the flute by telling them to blow as if they are blowing out a candle.
7. Guide them to notice how the sound changes when opening and closing the holes of the flute.
8. Check whether the children have been able to use the simple instrument.

Note:
This activity can be extended over 5 sessions to enable children to make musical instruments using different materials.

subject: Utamaduni, Imani na Tunu za Taifa: Miaka 4–5 – Kutambua Alama na Tunu za Taifa
title_sw: Shughuli 3: Kuchora bendera ya Tanzania
title_en: Activity 3: Drawing the flag of Tanzania
about_sw: Stadi zitakazojengwa: Utaratibu, kujiamini, kuhusianisha, kujenga uzalendo, umakini, utii, heshima
about_en: Skills to be developed: Order/discipline, self-confidence, association, building patriotism, carefulness, obedience, respect
materials_sw: Picha au vitu mbalimbali vyenye rangi za bendera ya Tanzania, vibao fumbo, vibao sogeza, rangi mbalimbali, penseli na karatasi nyeupe
materials_en: Pictures or various objects with the colours of the Tanzanian flag, puzzle boards, sliding boards, various colours/paints, pencils and white paper
steps_sw:
1. Tayarisha vifaa na mazingira yanayofaa kwa shughuli hii.
2. Wapange watoto kwenye mistari kisha tambulisha shughuli kwa kuimba wimbo wa bendera au kufanya matendo mtambuka ya kuhamasisha watoto.
3. Wagawie watoto picha za bendera ya Tanzania, na waongoze waimbe wimbo wa bendera huku wakionesha rangi hizo kwenye bendera.
4. Weka picha kubwa ya bendera ambayo haijapakwa rangi na waongoze watoto kuangalia na kuchora kwenye karatasi zao.
5. Chunguza watoto wanavyoshika kalamu na kuchora hata kama hawajapatia kabisa.
6. Wape watoto nafasi ya kuchezea vifaa mbalimbali mfano vibao fumbo, kibao sogeza, picha au vitu halisi vyenye picha ya bendera.

TANBIHI:
1. Zingatia watoto wenye mahitaji maalum wale wasioona vizuri wasogeze karibu na picha.
2. Shughuli hii itawezeshwa kwa vipindi vitatu kwa wakati tofauti.
steps_en:
1. Prepare materials and an appropriate environment for this activity.
2. Arrange children in rows, then introduce the activity by singing the flag song or doing cross-movement exercises to motivate the children.
3. Give children pictures of the Tanzanian flag, and guide them to sing the flag song while pointing out its colours on the flag.
4. Place a large uncoloured picture of the flag and guide children to look at it and draw it on their papers.
5. Observe how children hold their pencils and draw, even if they have not yet mastered it.
6. Give children the opportunity to play with various materials such as puzzle boards, sliding boards, pictures or real objects featuring the flag.

NOTE:
1. Pay attention to children with special needs — those who cannot see well should be moved closer to the picture.
2. This activity will be facilitated in three sessions at different times.

subject: Utamaduni, Imani na Tunu za Taifa: Miaka 4–5 – Kutambua Alama na Tunu za Taifa
title_sw: Shughuli 4: Kutaja rangi za bendera ya Tanzania
title_en: Activity 4: Naming the colours of the Tanzanian flag
about_sw: Stadi zitakazojengwa: Kutambua rangi, kukuza uzalendo
about_en: Skills to be developed: Recognising colours, building patriotism
materials_sw: Picha au vitu mbalimbali vyenye rangi za bendera ya Tanzania, vibao fumbo.
materials_en: Pictures or various objects with the colours of the Tanzanian flag, puzzle boards.
steps_sw:
1. Andaa watoto, vifaa na mazingira yanayofaa kwa shughuli.
2. Tambulisha shughuli ya siku hiyo kwa kuimba wimbo wa rangi za bendera huku wakionesha kwenye picha ya bendera.
3. Waongoze watoto kutaja rangi za bendera kwa kuonesha vitu vingine vyenye rangi za bendera.
4. Waongoze watoto kucheza mchezo wa kuoanisha rangi/vitu vyenye rangi zinazofanana.
5. Chunguza ushiriki wa watoto katika kutaja na kuoanisha rangi.

TANBIHI:
1. Shughuli hii itawezeshwa kwa vipindi vitatu kwa kuwapa nafasi ya kucheza michezo ya kuoanisha rangi.
steps_en:
1. Prepare children, materials and an appropriate environment for the activity.
2. Introduce the day's activity by singing a song about the flag's colours while pointing to them on a picture of the flag.
3. Guide children to name the flag's colours by showing other objects that have the flag's colours.
4. Guide children to play a colour-matching game / matching objects of the same colour.
5. Observe children's participation in naming and matching colours.

NOTE:
1. This activity will be facilitated in three sessions to give children the opportunity to play colour-matching games.

subject: Utamaduni, Imani na Tunu za Taifa: Miaka 4–5 – Kutambua Alama na Tunu za Taifa
title_sw: Shughuli 5: Kupaka Rangi Bendera Tanzania
title_en: Activity 5: Colouring the Tanzanian Flag
about_sw: Stadi zitakazojengwa: Kukuza uzalendo, Kuimarisha misuli midogo midogo ya mikono
about_en: Skills to be developed: Building patriotism, Strengthening the small muscles of the hands
materials_sw: Picha ya bendera ya Tanzania iliyochorwa na kupakwa rangi, Krayoni au rangi za maji, picha za bendera ambazo hazijapakwa rangi
materials_en: A picture of the Tanzanian flag that has been drawn and coloured, crayons or watercolours, pictures of the flag that have not yet been coloured
steps_sw:
1. Andaa eneo la kujifunzia na tayarisha vifaa vitakavyotumika kisha waandae watoto kulingana na mazingira ya somo.
2. Tambulisha shughuli ya siku hiyo kwa kuimba wimbo wa rangi za bendera huku wakionesha kwenye picha ya bendera.
3. Waongoze watoto kutaja rangi za bendera kwa kuonesha vitu vingine vyenye rangi za bendera.
4. Wagawie watoto karatasi zenye picha ya bendera ambayo haijapakwa rangi.
5. Waonesha jinsi ya kupaka rangi kwa usahihi.
6. Mfuatilie mtoto mmoja mmoja ukichunguza na kumuelekeza jinsi ya kushika krayoni au penseli.
7. Malizia kwa kuimba wimbo wa rangi za bendera.

TANBIHI:
1. Zingatia watoto wenye mahitaji maalum, wenye uoni hafifu, katika kutekeleza shughuli.
2. Shughuli hii itawezeshwa kwa vipindi vitatu kwa wakati tofauti.
steps_en:
1. Prepare the learning area and the materials to be used, then arrange the children according to the learning environment.
2. Introduce the day's activity by singing a song about the flag's colours while pointing to them on a picture of the flag.
3. Guide children to name the flag's colours by showing other objects that have the flag's colours.
4. Give children papers with an uncoloured picture of the flag.
5. Show them how to colour correctly.
6. Follow up with each child individually, observing and guiding them on how to hold the crayon or pencil.
7. Finish by singing the song about the flag's colours.

NOTE:
1. Pay attention to children with special needs, including those with low vision, when carrying out the activity.
2. This activity will be facilitated in three sessions at different times.

subject: Utamaduni, Imani na Tunu za Taifa: Miaka 4–5 – Kutambua Alama na Tunu za Taifa
title_sw: Shughuli 6: Kuchora Mwenge wa Uhuru
title_en: Activity 6: Drawing the Torch of Freedom (Uhuru Torch)
about_sw: Kuimarisha misuli midogo midogo, utaratibu, umakini.
about_en: Strengthening fine motor muscles, orderliness, and attentiveness.
materials_sw: Picha ya mwenge iliyochorwa ambayo haija pakwa rangi, daftari lisilo kuwa na mstari au mkoba kazi, penseli na ufutio
materials_en: A drawn but uncoloured image of the torch, an unlined exercise book or work folder, pencil and eraser
steps_sw:
1. Tayarisha vifaa vitakavyo tumika na andaa mazingira ya kufanyia shughuli.
2. Waongoze watoto kuimba wimbo unao husiana na mwenge wa uhuru (mf. Mwenge eh mwenge, mbio mbio...)
3. Wasimulie watoto hadithi fupi kuhusu mwenge wa uhuru huku ukionesha picha kisha wagawie au bandika picha mahali zinapoonekana.
4. Wagawie watoto daftari au karatasi zisizo kuwa na mstari
5. Waongoze watoto kuchora mwenge kila mtoto kwenye karatasi au daftari lake.
6. Fuatilia jinsi watoto wanavyo chora, chunguza ushikaji wa kalamu na msaidie mtoto anaye hitaji msaada.

TANBIHI:
1. Zingatia watoto wenye mahitaji maalum katika ujifunzaji.
2. Shughuli hii itawezeshwa kwa vipindi vitatu kwa wakati tofauti.
steps_en:
1. Prepare the materials to be used and set up the activity environment.
2. Guide the children to sing a song related to the Uhuru Torch (e.g. 'Mwenge eh mwenge, mbio mbio...').
3. Tell the children a short story about the Uhuru Torch while showing the picture, then distribute or display the pictures where they can be seen.
4. Give children unlined exercise books or plain paper.
5. Guide each child to draw the torch on their own paper or exercise book.
6. Monitor how the children are drawing, observe pencil grip, and assist any child who needs help.

NOTE:
1. Take into account children with special learning needs.
2. This activity will be carried out over three sessions at different times.

subject: Utamaduni, Imani na Tunu za Taifa: Miaka 4–5 – Kutambua Alama na Tunu za Taifa
title_sw: Shughuli 7: Kupaka rangi Mwenge wa Uhuru
title_en: Activity 7: Colouring the Uhuru Torch
about_sw: Utaratibu, kuimarisha misuli midogo midogo ya mikono, uratibu wa macho na mikono
about_en: Orderliness, strengthening fine motor muscles of the hands, hand-eye coordination
materials_sw: Picha ya mwenge iliyochorwa na kupakwa rangi, picha za Mwenge wa Uhuru ambazo hazija pakwa rangi, rangi za krayoni, penseli na rangi za maji
materials_en: A drawn and coloured image of the torch, uncoloured pictures of the Uhuru Torch, crayon colours, pencils, and watercolour paints
steps_sw:
1. Andaa vifaa na watoto kulingana na mazingira ya somo na tambulisha mada husika.
2. Kuimba wimbo/ kufanya matendo mtambuka hamasa.
3. Waoneshe watoto picha ya Mwenge wa Uhuru
4. Waoneshe jinsi ya kupaka rangi.
5. Wagawie karatasi zenye mchoro wa mwenge.
6. Mfuatilie mtoto mmoja mmoja chunguza jinsi anavyoshika kalamu akipaka rangi na toa msaada unapohitajika.

TANBIHI:
1. Zingatia watoto wenye mahitaji maalum katika ujifunzaji
2. Shughuli hii itawezeshwa kwa vipindi vitatu kwa wakati tofauti.
steps_en:
1. Prepare materials and children according to the lesson environment and introduce the relevant topic.
2. Sing a song / perform cross-cutting actions to motivate.
3. Show children a picture of the Uhuru Torch.
4. Demonstrate how to apply colour.
5. Distribute sheets with a drawing of the torch.
6. Follow each child individually, observe how they hold the pencil while colouring, and provide assistance when needed.

NOTE:
1. Take into account children with special learning needs.
2. This activity will be carried out over three sessions at different times.

subject: Utamaduni, Imani na Tunu za Taifa: Miaka 4–5 – Kutambua Alama na Tunu za Taifa
title_sw: Shughuli 8: Kuimba wimbo wa "Tazama Ramani"
title_en: Activity 8: Singing the song "Tazama Ramani" (Look at the Map)
about_sw: Stadi ya kuimba, kukariri, uzalendo, heshima na kujenga umakini.
about_en: Skills of singing, memorisation/repetition, patriotism, respect, and building attentiveness.
materials_sw: Radio, ngoma, na vifaa mbalimbali vya ala za muziki
materials_en: Radio, drum, and various musical instruments
steps_sw:
1. Andaa vifaa mbalimbali vya ala ya muziki na watoto kulingana na shughuli.
2. Tambulisha shughuli kwa kuwaongoza watoto kuimba wimbo wa taifa na kuwaambia leo tunaimba mwimbo mwingine wa Tanzania.
3. Wasikilizishe watoto wimbo wa "Tazama ramani ..."
4. Imba taratibu kwa matamshi fasaha na kutumia lugha za ishara
5. Imba kwa kurudia mstari mmoja mmoja huku ukiwapa nafasi watoto kurudia kuimba.
6. Inapowezekana shirikiana na watoto kupiga muziki kwa kutumia vifaa vya ala.
7. Fuatilia jinsi watoto wanavyoimba, msaidie mtoto ambaye hajaweza kuimba na kufuata ala.
8. Waambie watoto waimbe ubeti mmoja mmoja wa wimbo wa "Tazama ramani ... " hadi watakapo weza ubeti mmoja ndipo waende mwingine.
9. Chunguza ushiriki wa watoto na uwasaidie wale ambao wanasita kushiriki kuimba.

TANBIHI:
1. Zingatia watoto wenye mahitaji maalum katika ujifunzaji: Wajumuishe watoto wote katika ujifunzaji kwa kuzingatia aina ya ulemavu walionao.
2. Shughuli hii iitawezeshwa katika vipindi vitatu tofauti, kwa kutumia hatua hizi na kubadilisha ubeti hadi wajifunze beti zote
steps_en:
1. Prepare various musical instruments and children according to the activity.
2. Introduce the activity by guiding children to sing the national anthem and telling them that today they will sing another Tanzanian song.
3. Let the children listen to the song "Tazama ramani ..."
4. Sing slowly with clear pronunciation and use sign language.
5. Sing by repeating line by line while giving children the opportunity to repeat after you.
6. Where possible, involve children in playing music using musical instruments.
7. Monitor how the children are singing; assist any child who is unable to sing and follow the tune.
8. Tell the children to sing one verse at a time of the song "Tazama ramani ..." until they can master one verse before moving on to the next.
9. Observe children's participation and assist those who are hesitant to join in singing.

NOTE:
1. Take into account children with special learning needs: Include all children in the learning by considering the type of disability they have.
2. This activity will be facilitated in three separate sessions, using these steps and changing the verse until all verses are learned.

subject: Utamaduni, Imani na Tunu za Taifa: Miaka 4–5 – Kutambua Alama na Tunu za Taifa
title_sw: Shughuli 9: Kufuatisha michoro ya nembo ya Taifa
title_en: Activity 9: Tracing drawings of the National Emblem
about_sw: Stadi ya uchoraji, ubunifu, uzalendo, uratibu wa mikono na macho.
about_en: Skills of drawing, creativity, patriotism, hand-eye coordination.
materials_sw: Karatasi zenye alama za kufuatisha za nembo ya Taifa na kalamu, picha ya nembo ya Taifa.
materials_en: Papers with tracing outlines of the National Emblem and pencils, a picture of the National Emblem.
steps_sw:
1. Andaa mazingira na vifaa kwa idadi ya watoto
2. Wakaribishe watoto kwenye kipindi na kuwasilimulia hadithi fupi kuhusu nembo ya taifa
3. Waoneshe picha ya nembo ya taifa ukisimulia hadithi
4. Watafuatisha mchoro wa nembo ya Taifa lao la Tanzania
5. Wagawie watoto karatasi zenye alama ya mchoro wa nembo ya Taifa na kalamu wafuatishe
6. Fuatilia jinsi watoto wanavyo fuatilshia mchoro, chunguza jinsi wanavyoshika kalamu na msaidie mtoto ambaye hajaweza

TANBIHI:
1. Zingatia watoto wenye mahitaji maalum katika ujifunzaji: Ongeza sauti kwa watoto wenye usikivu hafifu na ikiwezekana kwa watoto wasioona au uoni hafifu tumia michoro yenye picha nundu wafuatishe.
2. Shughuli hii itawezeshwa kwa vipindi vitatu kwa wakati tofauti.
steps_en:
1. Prepare the environment and materials for the number of children
2. Welcome the children to the session and narrate a short story about the national emblem
3. Show them a picture of the national emblem while telling the story
4. They will trace the drawing of their National Emblem of Tanzania
5. Distribute papers with tracing outlines of the National Emblem and pencils for them to trace
6. Monitor how the children trace the drawing, observe how they hold the pencil and assist any child who is struggling

NOTE:
1. Consider children with special learning needs: Increase sound/audio for children with hearing impairment and where possible for visually impaired children use raised/tactile drawings to trace.
2. This activity can be done over three sessions at different times.

subject: Utamaduni, Imani na Tunu za Taifa: Miaka 4–5 – Kutambua Alama na Tunu za Taifa
title_sw: Shughuli 10: Kupaka rangi picha ya nembo ya taifa
title_en: Activity 10: Colouring a picture of the national emblem
about_sw: Upakaji rangi, ubunifu, uzalendo, uratibu wa mikono na macho, umakini, utambuzi wa rangi.
about_en: Colouring, creativity, patriotism, hand-eye coordination, carefulness, colour recognition.
materials_sw: Karatasi zenye picha ya nembo ya Taifa isiyo na rangi na kalamu za rangi, penseli, ufutio.
materials_en: Papers with an uncoloured picture of the National Emblem, coloured pencils/crayons, pencils, eraser.
steps_sw:
1. Tayarisha karatasi zenye picha ya nembo ya Taifa ambayo imepakwa rangi na isiyo na rangi na kalamu za rangi kwa idadi ya watoto.
2. Wapange watoto kwenye utaratibu utakao wawezesha kufanya zoezi la kupaka rangi picha ya nembo ya Taifa.
3. Waoneshe watoto picha ya nembo ya Taifa ambayo imepakwa rangi.
4. Uliza watoto kama wanajua rangi zilizopo kwenye nembo ya Taifa na kuwakaribisha kuzitaja.
5. Wagawie watoto karatasi zenye picha ya nembo ya Taifa ambayo haina rangi na kalamu za rangi na wakumbushe kupaka rangi ndani ya mistari ya eneo husika.
6. Fuatilia jinsi watoto wanavyo paka rangi michoro hiyo, chunguza wanavyoshika kalamu na msaidie mtoto ambaye hajaweza.

TANBIHI:
1. Zingatia watoto wenye mahitaji maalum katika ujifunzaji
2. Shughuli hii itawezeshwa kwa vipindi vitatu kwa wakati tofauti
steps_en:
1. Prepare papers with a coloured picture of the National Emblem and an uncoloured version, along with coloured pencils/crayons for the number of children.
2. Arrange the children in a manner that will enable them to do the exercise of colouring the National Emblem.
3. Show the children a coloured picture of the National Emblem.
4. Ask the children if they know the colours found on the National Emblem and invite them to name them.
5. Distribute papers with the uncoloured picture of the National Emblem and coloured pencils/crayons and remind them to colour within the lines of each section.
6. Monitor how the children colour the drawings, observe how they hold the pencil and assist any child who is struggling.

NOTE:
1. Consider children with special learning needs.
2. This activity can be done over three sessions at different times.

subject: Utamaduni, Imani na Tunu za Taifa: Miaka 4–5 – Kutambua Alama na Tunu za Taifa
title_sw: Shughuli 11: Kusimulia hadithi fupi za Historia ya Tanzania
title_en: Activity 11: Narrating short stories about the History of Tanzania
about_sw: Usimulizi wa hadithi na uzalendo, kusikiliza, kuzungumza, kuhusianisha.
about_en: Story narration and patriotism, listening, speaking, making connections.
materials_sw: Karatasi zenye hadithi fupi zinazohusu cha historia ya Tanzania na picha zinazohusiana na hadithi hiyo.
materials_en: Papers with short stories about the history of Tanzania and pictures related to those stories.
steps_sw:
1. Tayarisha karatasi kadhaa zenye hadithi fupi za historia ya Tanzania zenye picha husika.
2. Waoneshe watoto karatasi zenye hadithi yenye picha zinazo husiana na hadithi hiyo na waulize kama washawahi kuziona picha hizo.
3. Wasimulie watoto hadithi hiyo ukioanisha na picha zilizopo. Tumia lugha ya ishara na kuonyesha hisio zinazolandana na hadithi hiyo.
4. Waongoze watoto kusimuliana hadithi hiyo ukichagua wachache kwa zamu.
5. Fuatilia watoto wanaposimuliana kuona jinsi wanavyohadithia na kutoa msaada unaohitajika.

TANBIHI:
Shughuli hii itawezeshwa kwa vipindi viwili kwa wakati tofauti ili kuwawezesha kupata uelewa na kumbukumbu ya baadhi ya mambo ya historia.
steps_en:
1. Prepare several papers with short stories about the history of Tanzania with relevant pictures.
2. Show the children papers with the story that has related pictures and ask them if they have seen those pictures before.
3. Narrate the story to the children, linking it with the pictures. Use sign language and show expressions that match the story.
4. Guide the children to narrate the story to each other, selecting a few at a time.
5. Monitor the children as they narrate to each other to see how they tell the story and provide necessary support.

NOTE:
This activity can be done over two sessions at different times to enable children to gain understanding and memory of some historical matters.

subject: Utamaduni, Imani na Tunu za Taifa: Miaka 4–5 | Kutambua Utamaduni wa Jamii Yake
title_sw: Shughuli 1: Kusalimia (rika lake, wakubwa, wadogo)
title_en: Activity 1: Greeting (peers, elders, younger children)
about_sw: Stadi za kukuza lugha, misamiati, stadi za kujenga mahusiano na utambulisho, Heshima, Adabu, Nidhamu, Utii, Upendo, Urafiki
about_en: Skills for developing language, vocabulary, skills for building relationships and identity, Respect, Courtesy, Discipline, Obedience, Love, Friendship
materials_sw: Vibao, vitabu, picha tabuleti au runinga, wimbo uliorekodiwa.
materials_en: Flashcards, books, picture tablet or television, a recorded song.
steps_sw:
1. Andaa eneo na vifaa mbalimbali kwa ajili ya shughuli.
2. Waambie watoto wasimame/wakae kwenye mduara/umbo la "U" au nusu duara. Simama eneo ambalo watoto wote watakuona vizuri.
3. Wakaribishe watoto na tambulisha shughuli ya siku.
4. Waongoze watoto kuimba wimbo wa salamu taratibu na kwa matamshi fasaha mfano (Niamkapo Asubuhi...).
5. Endelea kuimba na watoto kwa kutaja majina kulingana na aina za familia za watoto wako.
6. Gawia vibao, vitabu, picha zenye maudhui ya salamu kisha wasomee hadithi au habari fupi kuhusu salamu na huku ukionesha picha.
7. Waongoze Watoto waigize igizo fupi la salamu.
8. Chunguza jinsi watoto wanavyosalimiana, msaidie mtoto ambaye hajaweza kusalimia.
9. Washa radio, runinga au tabuleti zenye nyimbo zilizorekodiwa za salamu na waongoze watoto kuimba pamoja.
TANBIHI:
1. Zingatia watoto wenye mahitaji maalum katika ujifunzaji: Wajumuishe watoto wote katika ujifunzaji kwa kuzingatia aina ya mahitaji walionao.
2. Shughuli hii itawezeshwa kwa vipindi vitano.
steps_en:
1. Prepare the area and various materials for the activity.
2. Ask children to stand/sit in a circle or "U" shape or semicircle. Stand in a position where all children can see you well.
3. Welcome the children and introduce the day's activity.
4. Guide children to sing a greeting song slowly and with clear pronunciation (e.g., Niamkapo Asubuhi / Good Morning Song).
5. Continue singing with the children by mentioning names according to the types of families of your children.
6. Distribute flashcards, books, pictures with greetings content then read them a short story or brief information about greetings while showing the pictures.
7. Guide children to perform a short role-play of greetings.
8. Observe how children greet each other; assist any child who has not been able to greet.
9. Turn on the radio, television or tablet with recorded greeting songs and guide children to sing together.
NOTE:
1. Consider children with special needs in learning: Include all children in learning by considering the type of needs they have.
2. This activity will be facilitated in five sessions.

subject: Utamaduni, Imani na Tunu za Taifa: Miaka 4–5 | Kutambua Utamaduni wa Jamii Yake
title_sw: Shughuli 2: Kutaja mavazi ya jamii inayomzunguka
title_en: Activity 2: Naming clothing of the surrounding community
about_sw: Kukuza stadi za Lugha, kujenga Usikivu, umakini, kukuza msamiati, kutambua na kuthamini asili.
about_en: Developing language skills, building listening, attentiveness, developing vocabulary, recognising and appreciating culture/origin.
materials_sw: Vibao, picha zilizochorwa za mavazi ya kitamaduni, Kadi/Karata zilizochorwa mavazi, Daftari ambalo halina mistari, penseli, Runinga, Tabuleti, mavazi.
materials_en: Flashcards, drawn pictures of traditional clothing, cards/cardboard with drawn clothing, unlined notebooks, pencil, television, tablet, clothing (actual garments).
steps_sw:
1. Andaa vifaa na eneo kwa ajili ya shughuli.
2. Wakaribishe watoto na tambulisha shughuli ya siku.
3. Waambie watoto wakae kwenye mduara/umbo la "U" au nusu duara. Simama eneo ambalo watoto wote watakuona vizuri.
4. Imba wimbo wenye kutaja majina ya aina mbalimbali za mavazi.
5. Gawa kadi/picha zenye aina mbalimbali za Mavazi ya kitamaduni.
6. Wasimulie watoto hadithi inayohusu mavazi na unapotaja mavazi fulani unamtaka mtoto mwenye picha hiyo aoneshe.
7. Waambie watoto wataje majina ya mavazi wanayoyafahamu (kwa kuzingatia jinsi).
8. Waambie watoto mmoja mmoja ataje majina ya mavazi ambayo amevaa mfano: sketi, shati, suruari, kaptula na soksi.
9. Chunguza ushiriki wa watoto na wasaidie wanaohitaji msaada.
TANBIHI:
1. Wajumuishe watoto wote katika ujifunzaji kwa kuzingatia aina ya mahitaji walionao.
2. Shughuli hii itawezeshwa kwa vipindi 5 kwa tofauti ili kuwapa nafasi zaidi watoto kutambua mavazi.
steps_en:
1. Prepare materials and the area for the activity.
2. Welcome the children and introduce the day's activity.
3. Ask children to sit in a circle or "U" shape or semicircle. Stand in a position where all children can see you well.
4. Sing a song that names various types of clothing.
5. Distribute cards/pictures showing various types of traditional clothing.
6. Tell children a story about clothing and when you mention a certain garment, ask the child holding that picture to show it.
7. Ask children to name clothing they know (considering gender).
8. Ask children one by one to name the clothing they are wearing, e.g.: skirt, shirt, trousers, shorts and socks.
9. Observe children's participation and assist those who need help.
NOTE:
1. Include all children in learning by considering the type of needs they have.
2. This activity will be facilitated over 5 different sessions to give children more opportunity to identify clothing.

subject: Utamaduni, Imani na Tunu za Taifa: Miaka 4–5 | Kutambua Utamaduni wa Jamii Yake
title_sw: Shughuli 3: Kutaja vyakula vya tamaduni mbalimbali
title_en: Activity 3: Naming foods of various cultures
about_sw: Kukuza stadi za Lugha, kujenga Usikivu, umakini, kuthamini utamaduni.
about_en: Developing language skills, building listening, attentiveness, appreciating culture.
materials_sw: Vibao, picha zilizochorwa vyakula vya kiasili, Kadi/Karata zilizochorwa matunda, Daftari ambalo halina mistari, penseli, Runinga, Tabuleti, chakula halisi (nafaka, matunda, mbogamboga).
materials_en: Flashcards, drawn pictures of traditional foods, cards/cardboard with drawn fruits, unlined notebooks, pencil, television, tablet, real food (grains, fruits, vegetables).
steps_sw:
1. Andaa vifaa na eneo kwa ajili ya shughuli.
2. Wakaribishe watoto na tambulisha shughuli ya siku.
3. Waambie watoto wasimame/wakae kwenye mduara/umbo la "U" au nusu duara. Simama eneo ambalo watoto wote watakuona vizuri.
4. Imba wimbo wenye kutaja majina ya aina mbalimbali za vyakula.
5. Gawa kadi/picha zenye aina mbalimbali za vyakula vya kiasili.
6. Wasimulie watoto hadithi inayohusu chakula na unapotaja chakula fulani unamtaka mtoto mwenye picha hiyo aoneshe.
7. Waambie watoto wataje majina ya vyakula ambavyo wamezoea kula nyumbani, na vingine wanavyovifahamu.
8. Chunguza ushiriki wa watoto na kutambua dhana ya vyakula, wasaidie wale wanaohitaji msaada.
TANBIHI:
1. Wajumuishe watoto wote katika ujifunzaji kwa kuzingatia aina ya mahitaji walionao.
2. Shughuli hii itafanyika mara 8 kwa vipindi tofauti kwa kutambulisha vyakula kwa ujumla, matunda na mbogamboga.
steps_en:
1. Prepare materials and the area for the activity.
2. Welcome the children and introduce the day's activity.
3. Ask children to stand/sit in a circle or "U" shape or semicircle. Stand in a position where all children can see you well.
4. Sing a song that names various types of foods.
5. Distribute cards/pictures showing various types of traditional foods.
6. Tell children a story about food and when you mention a certain food, ask the child holding that picture to show it.
7. Ask children to name foods they are accustomed to eating at home and others they know.
8. Observe children's participation and understanding of food concepts; assist those who need help.
NOTE:
1. Include all children in learning by considering the type of needs they have.
2. This activity will be done 8 times in different sessions to introduce foods in general, fruits and vegetables.

subject: Utamaduni, Imani na Tunu za Taifa: Miaka 4–5 – Kutambua Utamaduni wa Jamii Yake
title_sw: Shughuli 4: Kutaja vitendo vya heshima na adabu (Kushukuru, jinsi ya kutoa na kupokea vitu, kuomba msamaha)
title_en: Activity 4: Naming acts of respect and good manners (Saying thank you, how to give and receive things, asking for forgiveness)
about_sw: Stadi za kukuza lugha na misamiati, kujenga stadi za mahusiano, tabia njema, Heshima, Adabu, Nidhamu, Utii, Upendo, Urafiki
about_en: Skills for developing language and vocabulary, building relationship skills, good behaviour, Respect, Manners, Discipline, Obedience, Love, Friendship
materials_sw: Vibao, vitabu, picha zinazoonesha watoto wakisalimiana, radio, runinga, tabuleti, ngoma, vitu mbalimbali mfano mpira, midoli
materials_en: Flashcards, books, pictures showing children greeting each other, radio, television, tablet, drum, various items such as a ball, dolls
steps_sw:
1. Tayarisha vifaa na eneo kwa ajili ya shughuli.
2. Wakaribishe watoto na tambulisha shughuli ya siku.
3. Waambie watoto wakae kwenye mduara/umbo la "U" au nusu duara. Simama eneo ambalo watoto wote watakuona vizuri.
4. Imba wimbo wa kushukuru baada ya mtoto kupokea kitu/zawadi.
5.1. Waongoze watoto kusikiliza na kuangalia nyimbo na picha za kushukuru (katika runinga au tabuleti).
6. Onesha kwa kugusa picha mjongeo ambayo mtoto anapewa kitu na mwingine anapokea kitu.
7. Waongoze watoto waigize matendo ya kutoa, kupokea na kushukuru.
8. Waulize watoto wakiomba kitu, wakitoa kitu na wakipokea kitu hutamka maneno gani?
9. Chunguza jinsi watoto wanavyoomba, kutoa, kupokea na kushukuru, msaidie mtoto ambaye hajaweza kutenda.
TANBIHI: 1. Shughuli hii itawezeshwa kwa vipindi vitano kwa wakati tofauti kwa kubadilisha vitendo: kutoa na kupokea – kushukuru, kuomba msamaha. 2. Wajumuishe watoto wote katika ujifunzaji kwa kuzingatia aina ya mahitaji waliyonayo.
Ushiriki wa wazazi nyumbani: Mwelekeze mzazi amsaidie mtoto kurudia kufanya vitendo vya kusalimiana, kutoa na kupokea vitu mbalimbali na kuomba msamaha.
steps_en:
1. Prepare materials and the area for the activity.
2. Welcome the children and introduce the day's activity.
3. Tell the children to sit in a circle or 'U' shape or semi-circle. Stand in a position where all children can see you clearly.
4. Sing a thank-you song after a child receives an item/gift.
5.1. Guide children to listen and watch songs and pictures about saying thank you (on television or tablet).
6. Show by touching a picture sequence in which a child is given something and another receives it.
7. Guide children to role-play the actions of giving, receiving, and saying thank you.
8. Ask the children: what words do you say when you ask for something, give something, or receive something?
9. Observe how children ask, give, receive, and say thank you; assist any child who is unable to do so.
NOTE: 1. This activity can be delivered in five sessions at different times, alternating the actions: giving and receiving – saying thank you, asking for forgiveness. 2. Include all children in the learning by considering their different needs.
Parent participation at home: Guide the parent to help the child practise the actions of greeting, giving and receiving various items, and asking for forgiveness.

subject: Utamaduni, Imani na Tunu za Taifa: Miaka 4–5 – Kutambua Utamaduni wa Jamii Yake
title_sw: Shughuli 5: Kuimba nyimbo na kucheza ngoma za tamaduni mbalimbali
title_en: Activity 5: Singing songs and playing drums of various cultures
about_sw: Kujenga misuli midogo na mikubwa, kukuza lugha, kuimba, kucheza, uratibu wa macho na mikono, Heshima, adabu, nidhamu, uzalendo
about_en: Building fine and gross muscles, developing language, singing, dancing, eye-hand coordination, Respect, manners, discipline, patriotism
materials_sw: Ngoma, filimbi, Malimba, vibwebwe/vibwaya, chakacha, vibao, chati, picha, runinga, tabuleti, mikeka, kaniki, mkia wa ng'ombe, shanga, mashairi ya wimbo wa kitamaduni.
materials_en: Drum, flute, Malimba (thumb piano), vibwebwe/vibwaya (rattles), chakacha (hip cloth), flashcards, charts, pictures, television, tablet, mats, kaniki (cotton cloth), cow-tail whisk, beads, lyrics of traditional songs.
steps_sw:
1. Andaa eneo na vifaa.
2. Wakaribishe watoto na tambulisha shughuli ya siku.
3. Waambie watoto wakae kwenye mduara au umbo la "U" au nusu duara. Simama eneo ambalo watoto wote watakuona vizuri.
4. Anzisha wimbo na wakaribishe watoto mmoja mmoja aweze kujitambulisha jina lake mfano (Jieleze jieleze jieleze jieleze nina jieleza mama Mimi hapa ni Sara…).
5. Waambie watoto wataje kabila za Tanzania wanazozifahamu.
6. Gawia watoto vifaa ulivyoandaa kwa watoto mfano filimbi, ngoma.
7. Waongoze watoto kusikiliza na kuangalia radio, runinga au tabuleti zenye nyimbo za kitamaduni zilizorekodiwa mfano nyimbo za kabila la wagogo, wanyakyusa na mengineyo.
8. Waambie watoto wafuatishe kuimba na kucheza.
9. Chunguza ushiriki wa watoto na jinsi wanavyocheza na kuimba msaidie mtoto ambaye anasita kushiriki.
TANBIHI: 1. Zingatia watoto wenye mahitaji maalum katika ujifunzaji: Wajumuishe watoto wote katika ujifunzaji kwa kuzingatia aina ya mahitaji walionao. 2. Shughuli hii itawezeshwa katika vipindi vitano kwa muda tofauti, na kubadilisha kati ya kuimba na kucheza ngoma kwa nyimbo na ngoma tofauti tofauti.
Ushiriki wa wazazi nyumbani: Mwelekeze mzazi kumfundisha mtoto kuimba na kucheza nyimbo za kabila lao na makabila mengine.
steps_en:
1. Prepare the area and materials.
2. Welcome the children and introduce the day's activity.
3. Tell the children to sit in a circle or 'U' shape or semi-circle. Stand in a position where all children can see you clearly.
4. Start a song and welcome children one by one to introduce themselves by name, for example (Introduce yourself, introduce yourself, introduce yourself, introduce yourself, I am introducing myself, I am here, my name is Sara…).
5. Tell the children to name tribes in Tanzania that they know.
6. Distribute the prepared materials to children, such as flute, drum.
7. Guide children to listen and watch a radio, television, or tablet with recorded traditional songs, for example songs of the Wagogo, Wanyakyusa and others.
8. Tell children to follow along singing and dancing.
9. Observe children's participation and how they dance and sing; help any child who hesitates to participate.
NOTE: 1. Consider children with special needs in learning: Include all children in the learning by considering their different types of needs. 2. This activity can be delivered in five sessions at different times, alternating between singing and playing drums with different songs and drums.
Parent participation at home: Guide the parent to teach the child to sing and dance songs of their own tribe and other tribes.

subject: Lugha na Mawasiliano: Miaka 4–5 | Kusikiliza katika Mazingira Tofauti
title_sw: Shughuli 1: Kubaini vitu vinavyotoa milio na sauti
title_en: Activity 1: Identifying objects that produce sounds and noises
about_sw: Kusikiliza, umakini, Kutofautisha sauti na milio, kujiamini, uwezo wa kuigiza sauti/milio, kujieleza.
about_en: Listening, attentiveness, distinguishing sounds and noises, self-confidence, ability to imitate sounds/noises, explaining.
materials_sw: Kiti, meza, chuma, kalamu, kopo, kikombe, ndoo, debe, ngoma, vitambaa, chupa za plastiki, mawe madogo, mbegu, mchanga, redio, simu, kadi za wanyama, kadi za ndege.
materials_en: Chair, table, metal, pen, tin/can, cup, bucket, large tin, drum, cloths, plastic bottles, small stones, seeds, sand, radio, phone, animal cards, bird cards.
steps_sw:
1. Andaa kadi za vitu vinavyotoa sauti na kadi za wanyama mbalimbali
2. Andaa vitu vinavyotoa sauti.
3. Andaa michezo mifupi
4. Gawa watoto katika vikundi vya watoto 5-6
5. Waambie watoto kuwa utapiga kitu bila wao kukiona na watasema ni mlio wa kitu gani.
6. Anza kufanya hivyo kwa kutumia vitu mbalimbali. Katika kila hatua wambie watoto wataje wamesikia mlio wa kitu gani
7. Baada ya hapo wape kila kikundi vitu vinavyotoa milio. Mwambie mtoto mmoja apige/agonge kitu hicho wakati amekificha. Wengine katika kikundi waseme ni mlio wa kitu gani
8. Warudishe watoto katika kundi kubwa. Onesha picha/kadi za vitu vinavyototoa milio na kila ukionesha wataje jina la kitu hicho
9. Waambie watoto kuigiza milio ya vitu hivyo
10. Chunguza kama kila mtoto anashiriki

Tanbihi:
1. Shughuli ya itawezeshwa kwa vipindi vinne. Vipindi viwili vya mwanzo vitumike kufundisha vitu vinavyotoa milio na vingine vitumike kwa vitu vinavyotoa sauti hasa wanyama.
steps_en:
1. Prepare cards of objects that produce sounds and cards of various animals.
2. Prepare objects that produce sounds.
3. Prepare short games.
4. Divide children into groups of 5–6.
5. Tell children you will hit an object without them seeing it and they should say what sound it is.
6. Start doing so using various objects. At each step tell the children to name what sound they heard.
7. Afterwards give each group objects that produce sounds. One child hits/strikes the object while it is hidden. Others in the group say what sound it is.
8. Bring children back to the large group. Show pictures/cards of objects that produce sounds and each time you show one, they name the object.
9. Tell children to imitate the sounds of those objects.
10. Check that every child is participating.

Note:
1. The activity can be done over four sessions. The first two sessions should be used to teach objects that produce sounds and the remaining ones for objects that produce noises especially animals.

subject: Lugha na Mawasiliano: Miaka 4–5 | Kusikiliza katika Mazingira Tofauti
title_sw: Shughuli 2: Kusikiliza hadithi fupi
title_en: Activity 2: Listening to a short story
about_sw: Kusikiliza, Umakini, Kuongeza msamiati, Kuonesha hisia, Kujenga kumbukumbu, Kujiamini, Kuwasiliana.
about_en: Listening, Attentiveness, Vocabulary building, Expressing emotions, Building memory, Self-confidence, Communication.
materials_sw: Vitabu vya hadithi fupi, Picha za wahusika na matukio.
materials_en: Short story books, Pictures of characters and events.
steps_sw:
1. Andaa kitabu cha hadithi au hadithi uliyoitunga mwenyewe.
2. Aanda picha za wahusika katika hadithi.
3. Kaa na watoto mkao ambao wote wanakuona mfano, mduara.
4. Waambie kuwa "Leo tutasikiliza hadithi nzuri sana"
5. Waoneshe kitabu cha hadithi na kuwauliza "Mnadhani hadithi hii itahusu nini?"
6. Baada ya kujibu, anza kusimulia hadithi kwa sauti ya kuvutia na ishara za mwili.
7. Kila ukifika hatua fulani ya hadithi simama na kuuliza swali mfano, "Kwa nini paka alikunywa maziwa yote"?
8. Mwisho, waulize maswali ya ufahamu
9. Chunguza kama watoto wanasikiliza na kujibu maswali

Tanbihi:
Kamilisha shughuli hii itawezeshwa kwa vipindi vitano kwa kutumia hadithi tofauti au kuendelea pale ulipoishia.
steps_en:
1. Prepare a storybook or a story you have written yourself.
2. Prepare pictures of characters in the story.
3. Sit with the children in a seating arrangement where they can all see you, for example a circle.
4. Tell them "Today we are going to listen to a very nice story"
5. Show them the storybook and ask "What do you think this story is about?"
6. After responding, begin narrating the story with an attractive voice and body gestures.
7. Each time you reach a certain point in the story, pause and ask a question, for example, "Why did the cat drink all the milk?"
8. At the end, ask comprehension questions.
9. Check whether children are listening and answering questions.

Note:
This activity can be completed over five sessions using different stories or continuing from where you left off.

subject: Lugha na Mawasiliano: Miaka 4–5 | Kusikiliza katika Mazingira Tofauti
title_sw: Shughuli 3: Kusikiliza na kucheza muziki
title_en: Activity 3: Listening to and playing music
about_sw: Kufuata maelekezo, Utambuzi wa sauti za muziki, kuimarisha misuli mikubwa ya mwili, Kushirikiana, Kusikiliza, Kujiamini, Umakini.
about_en: Following instructions, Recognition of musical sounds, strengthening gross motor muscles, Cooperation, Listening, Self-confidence, Attentiveness.
materials_sw: Redio, simu, runinga, Nyimbo zilizorekodiwa, ngoma, marimba, makasha ya plastiki, filimbi, gitaa, kinanda.
materials_en: Radio, phone, television, Recorded songs, drum, marimba, plastic boxes, flute/whistle, guitar, keyboard/piano.
steps_sw:
1. Mlezi chagua nyimbo/miziki utakayotumia kwa watoto.
2. Andaa eneo la kuchezea, hakikisha liko salama na wezeshi kwa watoto wote
3. Waambie kuwa "Leo tutacheza muziki".
4. Fungulia muziki na ruhusu watoto waanze kucheza.
5. Baada ya kucheza muziki waite watoto wa kujitolea wawili au watatu, wape vifaa vya muziki kama vile ngoma na filimbi. Waambie kuwa watapiga vifaa hivyo na wengine watacheza
6. Waambie waanze kupiga ala hizo za muziki na wengine wacheze.
7. Chunguza kama watoto wanacheza katika kila hatua
8. Wapongeze watoto kwa kufanya vizuri.

Tanbihi:
1. Shughuli hii kwa vipindi vitatu kwa kutumia miziki tofauti
steps_en:
1. The caregiver selects songs/music to use with the children.
2. Prepare the play area, make sure it is safe and accessible for all children.
3. Tell them "Today we will play music".
4. Play the music and allow the children to start dancing/playing.
5. After playing music, invite two or three volunteer children, give them musical instruments such as a drum and flute. Tell them they will play those instruments and others will dance.
6. Tell them to start playing those musical instruments and others dance.
7. Check that children are participating at every step.
8. Praise the children for doing well.

Note:
1. This activity should be done over three sessions using different music.

subject: Lugha na Mawasiliano: Miaka 4–5 / Kusoma katika Hatua za Awali
title_sw: Shughuli 3a: Kubainisha Sauti za Herufi
title_en: Activity 3a: Identifying Letter Sounds
about_sw: Stadi za awali za Kusoma, Kutambua sauti za herufi usikivu, umakini, kujenga msamiati
about_en: Early reading skills, recognising letter sounds through listening, attention, building vocabulary
materials_sw: Kadi za herufi mbalimbali, Picha za vitu vyenye majina yanavyoanza na sauti mbalimbali za herufi
materials_en: Various letter cards, Pictures of objects whose names begin with different letter sounds
steps_sw:
1. Andaa eneo tulivu la watoto kukaa ili waweze kuona kadi/picha vizuri
2. Kaa na watoto mkao ambao wote wanakuona
3. Onesha kadi ya 1 za picha na waongoze watoto kutamka majina ya vitu katika picha hizo.
4. Waongoze watoto kubaini na kutamka sauti za mwanzo katika kadi za picha ulizoandaa.
5. Waongoze watoto kuimba wimbo wa sauti za irabu: Hii ndiyo a, a, a, a, a, ina mkia mfupi a, a, a.
6. Waongoze watoto kubaini maumbo ya herufi ya sauti ulizoandaa kwa kuoanisha kadi za herufi na picha za vitu vyenye majina yanayoanza na sauti za herufi hizo.
7. Chunguza kama watoto wanataja na kubaini herufi na wasaidie wanapokwama.
Tanbihi: Shughuli hii 1 itawezeshwa kwa vipindi vinne ukibadilisha mbinu na kadi. Kadi ziwe za mguso ili watoto waweze kupapasa maumbo ya herufi.
steps_en:
1. Prepare a calm seating area for children so they can see the cards/pictures clearly.
2. Sit with the children in a position where they can all see you.
3. Show card 1 of the pictures and guide children to say the names of the objects in those pictures.
4. Guide children to identify and say the initial sounds from the picture cards you have prepared.
5. Guide children to sing the vowel sound song: 'This is a, a, a, a, a, it has a short tail a, a, a.'
6. Guide children to identify the letter shapes of the sounds you prepared by matching letter cards with pictures of objects whose names begin with those letter sounds.
7. Check whether children are naming and identifying letters and help them when they are stuck.
Note: This activity 1 can be delivered over four sessions by changing the technique and cards. Cards should be tactile so children can feel the shapes of the letters.

subject: Lugha na Mawasiliano: Miaka 4–5 / Kusoma katika Hatua za Awali
title_sw: Shughuli 4: Kuoanisha Herufi na Picha
title_en: Activity 4: Matching Letters with Pictures
about_sw: Stadi za awali za Kusoma, Kutambua herufi na sauti zake, Kulinghanisha herufi na picha, Kuongeza msamiati, Umakini, Kusikiliza, Kufuata maelekezo rahisi, Kuimarisha misuli midogo ya vidole
about_en: Early reading skills, Recognising letters and their sounds, Matching letters with pictures, Building vocabulary, Attention, Listening, Following simple instructions, Strengthening small finger muscles
materials_sw: Kadi za herufi (a–z), Picha za majina ya vitu
materials_en: Letter cards (a–z), Pictures of object names
steps_sw:
1. Weka kadi za herufi na majina ya vitu sehemu inayofikika na watoto wote.
2. Kaa na watoto mkao ambao kila mmoja anakuona vizuri.
3. Waambie watoto wataje majina ya vitu wanavyojua na sauti ya mwanzo ya kila jina.
4. Waambie watoto kuwa leo tutacheza mchezo wa 'Kuoanisha herufi na picha.'
5. Gawa watoto katika vikundi vya watoto 5–6, kisha kila kikundi wapatie picha za vitu na kadi za herufi.
6. Waambie katika kila kikundi wapange na walinganishe picha na kadi yenye herufi ya mwanzo ya jina la picha hiyo.
7. Chunguza katika kila kundi kama wanafanya jinsi ulivyoelekeza.
8. Wapongeze watoto kwa ushiriki wao.
Shughuli hii tawezeshwa kwa vipindi sita. Unaweza kutumia mchezo: watoto wakimbie katika vikundi vyao hadi sehemu yenye picha na herufi na kuoanisha. Pia wachore picha na kuoanisha na kadi za herufi.
steps_en:
1. Place the letter cards and object name pictures in a location accessible to all children.
2. Sit with the children in a position where each one can see you clearly.
3. Ask children to name objects they know and give the initial sound of each name.
4. Tell children that today we will play the game 'Matching letters with pictures.'
5. Divide children into groups of 5–6, then give each group pictures of objects and letter cards.
6. Tell each group to arrange and match the pictures with the card that has the first letter of that picture's name.
7. Check each group to see if they are doing it as you instructed.
8. Praise the children for their participation.
This activity can be delivered over six sessions. You can use a game where children run in their groups to the area with pictures and letters and match them. They can also draw pictures and match them with letter cards.

subject: Lugha na Mawasiliano: Miaka 4–5 / Kuandika katika Hatua za Awali
title_sw: Shughuli 1: Kuunda Maumbo ya Herufi
title_en: Activity 1: Creating Letter Shapes
about_sw: Kuunda herufi, kuimarisha misuli midogo ya mikono, uhusiano wa macho na mikono, ubunifu na fikra huru, kujiamini na kujifunza kwa kujitegemea, kukuza msamiati
about_en: Forming letters, strengthening small hand muscles, hand-eye coordination, creativity and free thinking, self-confidence and independent learning, building vocabulary
materials_sw: Udongo wa kufinyanga / dofu, vijiti, nyasi kavu, kamba, mawe madogo, kadi za herufi na mikeka ya kufanyia kazi
materials_en: Modelling clay / dough, sticks, dry grass, string, small stones, letter cards and work mats
steps_sw:
1. Tayarisha mazingira ya kazi tulivu na yenye vifaa vilivyopangwa vizuri kwenye meza au sakafu.
2. Wapange watoto kufanya kazi mmoja mmoja au katika vikundi vidogo.
3. Weka vifaa mezani ili watoto wajichagulie wanavyotaka (udongo, vijiti, mawe).
4. Onesha kwa ufupi (bila kueleza sana) mfano mmoja wa kuunda herufi kwa udongo au vijiti.
5. Wape watoto uhuru wa kuchagua herufi wanayotaka kuunda.
6. Watoto waanze kuunda herufi kwa kuchezea vifaa walivyochagua.
7. Baada ya kuunda, mtoto apewe nafasi ya kutaja alichoiunda.
8. Chunguza kama mtoto anaweza kuunda umbo la herufi na kulitaja kwa usahihi.
Tanbihi: Shughuli hii itawezeshwa kwa vipindi vitano kwa kutumia picha tofauti za herufi na minu tofauti. Kwa kubadilisha vifaa (udongo, vijiti, kuchora kwenye mchanga na kupaka rangi).
steps_en:
1. Prepare a calm work environment with materials well arranged on a table or floor.
2. Arrange for children to work individually or in small groups.
3. Place materials on the table so children can choose what they want (clay, sticks, stones).
4. Briefly demonstrate (without over-explaining) one example of forming a letter with clay or sticks.
5. Give children the freedom to choose which letter they want to make.
6. Children begin forming letters by playing with the materials they chose.
7. After forming, give the child an opportunity to name what they have made.
8. Check whether the child can form the shape of a letter and name it correctly.
Note: This activity will be delivered over five sessions using different letter pictures and different fonts. Materials can be varied (clay, sticks, drawing in sand, and painting).

subject: Lugha na Mawasiliano: Miaka 4–5 / Kuandika katika Hatua za Awali
title_sw: Shughuli 2: Kutumia vichoreo/viandikio kuchora mistari mbalimbali (wima, mlalo na uliopinda, uliojikunja)
title_en: Activity 2: Using drawing/writing tools to draw various lines (vertical, horizontal, curved, and zigzag)
about_sw: Stadi za awali za kuandika, kuimarisha misuli midogo ya vidole, uratibu wa macho na mikono, kushirikiana.
about_en: Early writing skills, strengthening finger fine muscles, eye-hand coordination, cooperation.
materials_sw: Karatasi, penseli, penseli za rangi, vibao vidogo, chaki, brashi za kupakia rangi.
materials_en: Paper, pencils, coloured pencils, small slates/boards, chalk, paintbrushes.
steps_sw:
1. Andaa karatasi zenye mistari ya nukta mfano, mlalo, wima, iliyopinda
2. Tumia chaki au kalamu waoneshe watoto jinsi ya kuchora mistari
3. Wapatie watoto karatasi, vibao, penseli, chaki
4. Waambie wachore mistari kama ulivyoonesha kwa kufuatisha alama za nukta zilizowekwa.
5. Zunguka kuangalia jinsi wanavyochora 1.toa msaada unapohitajika.
6. Wapongeze watoto wote kwa juhudi zao
7. Waambie watoto wawaonyeshe wenzao mistari waliyoichora

Tanbihi: Shughuli hii itawezeshwa kwa vipindi sita ukibadilisha aina za mistari pia Watoto wachore kwenye sehemu tofauti, mchanga, vibao, wapake rangi mistari.
steps_en:
1. Prepare paper with dotted line examples: horizontal, vertical, curved
2. Use chalk or a pen to show children how to draw lines
3. Give children paper, slates/boards, pencils, chalk
4. Tell them to draw lines as you showed by tracing the dot marks placed on the paper.
5. Walk around to observe how they are drawing and offer help when needed.
6. Praise all children for their efforts
7. Tell children to show their peers the lines they drew

Note: This activity can be done in six sessions by changing the types of lines. Children can also draw on different surfaces: sand, boards, and paint over lines.

subject: Lugha na Mawasiliano: Miaka 4–5 / Kuandika katika Hatua za Awali
title_sw: Shughuli 3: Kufuatisha herufi kwa kuunganisha nukta
title_en: Activity 3: Tracing letters by connecting dots
about_sw: Stadi za awali za kusoma, kuchora, kutofautisha namba, uratibu wa macho na mikono, kuimarisha misuli midogo ya vidole, kujieleza, kujiamini.
about_en: Early reading skills, drawing, distinguishing numbers, eye-hand coordination, strengthening finger fine muscles, self-expression, self-confidence.
materials_sw: Karatasi zenye namba za nukta, penseli, penseli za rangi, Krayoni.
materials_en: Paper with dot numbers/letters, pencils, coloured pencils, crayons.
steps_sw:
1. Andaa sehemu salama kwa ajili ya watoto kuandika
2. Andaa zana za kutosha kukamilisha shughuli hii kulingana na idadi ya watoto
3. Kaa na watoto kwenye umbo ambalo kila mmoja anakuona vizuri.
4. Waoneshe watoto namna ya kuandika kwa kufuatisha kwa kuunganisha nukta.
5. Waambie watoto wachore herufi kwa kuunganisha nukta.
6. Zunguka kuchunguza kama watoto wanashiriki katika kuandika herufi, wasaidie wenye changamoto hasa katika kushika kalamu.

Tanbihi: Shughuli hii itawezeshwa kwa vipindi 8, kwa kubadilisha herufi za kufuatisha.
steps_en:
1. Prepare a safe space for children to write
2. Prepare enough materials to complete this activity according to the number of children
3. Sit with children in a formation where each one can see you well.
4. Show children how to write by tracing by connecting dots.
5. Tell children to trace letters by connecting the dots.
6. Walk around to check whether children are participating in tracing letters; help those with difficulties especially in holding the pencil.

Note: This activity can be done in 8 sessions, by changing the letters to trace.

subject: Lugha na Mawasiliano: Miaka 4–5 / Kuandika katika Hatua za Awali
title_sw: Shughuli 4: Kufuatisha herufi za jina lake
title_en: Activity 4: Tracing the letters of one's own name
about_sw: Stadi za awali za kuandika, kuchora, kufikiri, kujiamini, kujieleza, uratibu wa macho na mikono.
about_en: Early writing skills, drawing, thinking, self-confidence, self-expression, eye-hand coordination.
materials_sw: Karatasi zenye herufi za majina ya watoto kwa njia ya nukta, penseli.
materials_en: Paper with children's name letters in dot form, pencils.
steps_sw:
1. Andaa sehemu salama kwa ajili ya watoto kufanya zoezi la kufuatisha herufi za jina lake
2. Kaa na watoto mkao ambao kila mtoto anakuona
3. Mpatie kila mtoto penseli na karatasi zenye herufi za nukta za jina lake
4. Wambie kila mtoto taratibu aanze kufuatisha herufi za jina lake kwa kutumia penseli
5. Zunguka kuona kama kila mtoto anafuatisha herufi za jina lake
6. Msaidie mtoto ambaye anapata changamoto ya kufuatisha
7. Kama kuna mtoto mwenye changamoto ya kutoona mpatie kaaratasi yenye jina lenye nundu mpapaso
8. Mwambie afuatishe kwa kutumia vidole vyake
9. Wape watoto fursa waoneshe majina yao waliyoyaandika na kuyatamka.

Tanbihi: Shughuli hii itawezeshwa kwa vipindi vitatu. Kipindi cha tatu wanaweza kupaka rangi.
steps_en:
1. Prepare a safe space for children to do the exercise of tracing the letters of their name
2. Sit with children in a position where every child can see you
3. Give each child a pencil and paper with the dot letters of their name
4. Tell each child to slowly begin tracing the letters of their name using a pencil
5. Walk around to see if each child is tracing the letters of their name
6. Help a child who is having difficulty tracing
7. If there is a child with a visual impairment, give them paper with their name in raised/embossed letters
8. Tell them to trace using their fingers
9. Give children the opportunity to show the names they wrote and to pronounce them.

Note: This activity can be done in three sessions. In the third session they can colour.

subject: Lugha na Mawasiliano: Miaka 4–5 – Kuandika katika Hatua za Awali
title_sw: Shughuli 6: Kufuatisha herufi za jina lake
title_en: Activity 6: Tracing the letters of one's name
about_sw: Stadi za awali za Kunadika, Kuchora, Kufikiri, Kujiamini, Kujieleza, Uratibu wa macho na mikono
about_en: Early skills in writing, drawing, thinking, self-confidence, self-expression, eye-hand coordination
materials_sw: Karatasi zenye herufi za majina ya Watoto, herufi zikiwa zimekatwa au zimeandikwa kwenye kadi ndogo, chaki, penseli
materials_en: Paper with children's name letters, letters cut out or written on small cards, chalk, pencil
steps_sw:
1. Andaa sehemu salama kwa ajili ya watoto kufanya zoezi la kufuatisha herufi za jina lake (A-m-a-n-i)
2. Kaa na watoto mkao ambao kila mtoto anakuona
3. Mtaje mtoto jina lake kwa sauti tulivu: "Hili ni jina lako."
4. Onesha mfano mfupi wa kufuatisha herufi ya kwanza ya jina kwa kuchukua kadi sahihi na kuiweka.
5. Mwalike mtoto achague herufi anayoifahamu na kuiweka kulingana na mfano.
6. Mtoto aendelee kupanga herufi kwa mpangilio wa jina lake kadri anavyoweza.
7. Usiongeze herufi mpya, tumia tu zile mtoto anazozifahamu tayari.
8. Mlezi abaki msimamizi, akisaidia tu kwa kuonyesha tena pale inapohitajika.
9. Baada ya kupanga, mtoto aseme: "Hili ni jina langu."
10. Rudia shughuli mara kadhaa kwa siku tofauti hadi mtoto ajiamini.
11. Chunguza kama mtoto anaweza kufuatisha mpangilio wa herufi bila msaada mwingi.
Tanbihi: Bainisha watoto wenye mahitaji maalum na uwape msaada wa kuona (mfano rangi au herufi kubwa). Shughuli hii ifanyike kwa vipindi vinne pale ambapo mtoto ameweza kufuatisha herufi za jina lake kwa kupanga, anaweza kuandika kwenye mchanga, ubao
steps_en:
1. Prepare a safe area for children to do the exercise of tracing the letters of their name (e.g. A-m-a-n-i)
2. Sit with the children in a position where each child can see you
3. Call the child's name in a calm voice: "This is your name."
4. Show a brief demonstration of tracing the first letter of the name by picking up the correct card and placing it.
5. Invite the child to choose a letter they recognise and place it according to the example.
6. The child continues to arrange the letters in the order of their name as best they can.
7. Do not introduce new letters; use only those the child already knows.
8. The caregiver remains a supervisor, assisting only by demonstrating again when necessary.
9. After arranging, the child says: "This is my name."
10. Repeat the activity several times on different days until the child is confident.
11. Check whether the child can follow the order of letters without much assistance.
Note: Identify children with special needs and give them visual support (e.g. colours or large letters). This activity should be done in four sessions; once the child can arrange the letters of their name, they can write in sand or on a board.

subject: Lugha na Mawasiliano: Miaka 4–5 – Kuandika katika Hatua za Awali
title_sw: Shughuli 7: Kuandika maneno mafupi
title_en: Activity 7: Writing short words
about_sw: Kuandika, kuunganisha herufi kuunda neno, maandalizi ya kuandika, uratibu wa macho na mikono, kujiamini na kujifunza kwa kujitegemea
about_en: Writing, combining letters to form a word, writing readiness, eye-hand coordination, self-confidence and independent learning
materials_sw: Kadi za picha za maneno mafupi (mf. paka, mama, baba, mpira, kuku), kadi za herufi anazozifahamu mtoto, kadi iliyoandikwa neno kamili (kwa rejea), karatasi na penseli / kalamu za kuandikia
materials_en: Picture cards of short words (e.g. cat, mum, dad, ball, chicken), letter cards the child knows, a card with the complete word written on it (for reference), paper and pencil/writing pens
steps_sw:
1. Tayarisha mazingira tulivu, meza au sakafu ikiwa na vifaa vilivyopangwa vizuri.
2. Weka kadi ya picha mbele ya mtoto na mtaje pamoja: "Hii ni paka."
3. Weka kadi ya neno kamili chini ya picha ili mtoto aone mpangilio wa herufi.
4. Onesha mfano mfupi wa kuchagua herufi za neno (bila maelezo mengi): "p – a – k – a"
5. Mwalike mtoto achague herufi anazozifahamu na kuzipanga kuunda neno.
6. Mtoto apange herufi kwa mpangilio sahihi kadri anavyoweza.
7. Baada ya kupanga, mpe mtoto karatasi na penseli.
8. Mtoto ajaribu kuandika neno kwa kuangalia herufi alizopanga.
9. Mlezi akichunguza watoto wanachokifanya.
10. Wasifu watoto kwa juhudi, si ukamilifu.
11. Chunguza kama mtoto anaweza kuunganisha herufi na kuandika neno fupi.
Tanbihi:
1. Anza na maneno ya herufi 2–4 yanayofahamika kwa mtoto.
2. Shughuli hii ifanyike kwa vipindi 5 ukibadilisha kadi za maneno na unaweza tumia mbinu tofauti.
steps_en:
1. Prepare a calm environment, with a table or floor with materials neatly arranged.
2. Place a picture card in front of the child and name it together: "This is a cat."
3. Place the complete word card below the picture so the child can see the letter order.
4. Show a brief example of selecting the letters for the word (without too much explanation): "p – a – k – a"
5. Invite the child to choose the letters they know and arrange them to form the word.
6. The child arranges the letters in the correct order as best they can.
7. After arranging, give the child paper and a pencil.
8. The child tries to write the word by looking at the letters they arranged.
9. The caregiver observes what the children are doing.
10. Praise children for effort, not perfection.
11. Check whether the child can connect letters and write a short word.
Note:
1. Start with words of 2–4 letters that are familiar to the child.
2. This activity should be done in 5 sessions, changing the word cards, and you can use different methods.

subject: Lugha na Mawasiliano: Miaka 4–5 – Kuwasiliana katika Mazingira Tofauti
title_sw: Shughuli 1: Kujieleza katika mazingira tofauti
title_en: Activity 1: Expressing oneself in different settings
about_sw: Uwezo wa kujieleza, kutambua na kueleza mazingira tofauti, kujiamini kuzungumza, kusikiliza
about_en: Ability to express oneself, recognise and describe different settings, confidence in speaking, listening
materials_sw: Kadi za picha za mazingira tofauti (nyumbani, darasani, sokoni, uwanjani), vifaa vya kuigiza kulingana na mazingira (kikombe, mkoba, mpira, mdoli)
materials_en: Picture cards of different settings (home, classroom, market, playground), props for role-play according to the setting (cup, bag, ball, doll)
steps_sw:
1. Tayarisha mazingira kwa kupanga kona ndogo ndogo zinazowakilisha mazingira tofauti (mfano. kona ya nyumbani, kona ya shule).
2. Waweke watoto wakae katika mduara.
3. Onesha kadi za picha za mazingira na zitaje kwa maneno rahisi: "Hapa ni nyumbani." "Hapa ni shule."
4. Eleza mchezo kwa sentensi fupi: "Tutacheza kuigiza tukiwa sehemu tofauti."
5. Muongoze mtoto mmoja mmoja achague kadi ya mazingira, aende kwenye kona husika na aanze kuigiza kile shughuli inayoendana na kona hiyo.
6. Muongoze mtoto kwa maswali ya kuanzisha mazungumzo, mfano: "Unafanya nini ukiwa nyumbani?" "Unazungumza vipi ukiwa shuleni?"
7. Mpe fursa ajieleze akijibu maswali kwa sentensi fupi huku ukimuongoza kueleza zaidi, kwa mfano: Mtoto: "Nakula" Mlezi: "Unakula chakula nyumbani."
8. Badilisha mazingira na urudie mchezo.
9. Wape watoto nafasi ya kushiriki kwa zamu kama ni kikundi.
10. Hitimisha kwa kuzungumza kuhusu tofauti za mazingira: "Nyumbani tunazungumza hivi, shuleni tunazungumza hivi."
11. Chunguza kama mtoto anaweza kujieleza kulingana na mazingira.
Tanbihi: Shughuli hii itawezeshwa kwa vipindi vinne tofauti kwa kubadilisha mazingira ili kukuza msamiati zaidi. Pia unaweza tumia hadithi ambayo inaeleza mazingira tofauti.
steps_en:
1. Prepare the environment by arranging small corners representing different settings (e.g. a home corner, a school corner).
2. Have the children sit in a circle.
3. Show picture cards of settings and name them in simple words: "This is home." "This is school."
4. Explain the game in a short sentence: "We will play pretend in different places."
5. Guide each child one by one to choose a setting card, go to the relevant corner and begin role-playing an activity appropriate to that corner.
6. Guide the child with questions to start a conversation, for example: "What do you do when you are at home?" "How do you speak when you are at school?"
7. Give them the opportunity to express themselves by answering in short sentences, while guiding them to explain more, for example: Child: "I'm eating." Caregiver: "You are eating food at home."
8. Change the setting and repeat the game.
9. Give children the opportunity to participate in turns if in a group.
10. Conclude by discussing the differences between settings: "At home we speak like this, at school we speak like this."
11. Check whether the child can express themselves according to the setting.
Note: This activity can be done in four different sessions by changing settings to build more vocabulary. You can also use a story that describes different settings.

subject: Kuhusiana: Miaka 4–5 | Kujenga Uhusiano wa Msingi na Watu Wengine
title_sw: Shughuli 1: Kutambulisha wenzake darasani.
title_en: Activity 1: Introducing classmates.
about_sw: Kujitambulisha, Ushirikiano, kujiamini, stadi za kijamii, stadi za lugha, umakini, mahusiano
about_en: Self-introduction, cooperation, self-confidence, social skills, language skills, attentiveness, relationships
materials_sw: Ngoma, kadi za majina, video zilizorekodiwa za kutambulishana, picha za Watoto
materials_en: Drum, name cards, recorded videos of introductions, children's photos
steps_sw:
1. Andaa mazingira wezeshi, salama na jumuishi kwa ajili ya watoto kujifunza.
2. Weka ngoma eneo ambalo watoto wataweza kuona na kusikiliza.
3. Waweke watoto wasimame katika umbo la nusu duara ili uweze kuwaona wote. Unaweza kutumia mazingira ya nje.
4. Piga ngoma na filimbi huku ukiimba wimbo wa uchangamfu na kucheza.
5. Waruhusu watoto kuimba pamoja huku wakimchagua mtoto mmoja mmoja aingie kati ya duara huku wenzake wakitaja jina lake. "Bilinge bayoyo, bilinge bayoyo (mara mbili) x2 Tunamtaka kaka Jaffari aingie kati tuyaone maringo yake Bingili bingili mpaka chiniii".
6. Wape nafasi watoto wote kufanya zoezi hili mara nyingi kadri muda unavyoruhusu.
7. Chunguza kama kila mtoto anaweza kutaja majina ya wenzake.
TANBIHI: Shughuli hii iitatekelezwa kwa vipindi vitatu kwa siku tofauti. Unaweza kutumia mchezo wa majina unasema sifa za mtoto na wenzake watambue ni mtoto gani anayezungumziwa kwa kutaja jina lake. Pia tumia ubunifu wako katika kufanya shughuli zinazofuata.
steps_en:
1. Prepare a supportive, safe and inclusive environment for children to learn.
2. Place the drum in an area where children can see and hear.
3. Have the children stand in a semicircle so you can see them all. You may use an outdoor setting.
4. Beat the drum and whistle while singing an energetic and entertaining song.
5. Allow children to sing together while selecting one child at a time to enter the circle as classmates call out their name. "Bilinge bayoyo, bilinge bayoyo (twice) x2 We want brother Jaffari to come in so we can see his swagger Bingili bingili all the way down".
6. Give all children the opportunity to do this activity as many times as time allows.
7. Check whether each child can name their classmates.
NOTE: This activity should be carried out over three sessions on different days. You can use a name game that mentions a child's attributes and classmates identify which child is being described by saying their name. Also use your creativity in carrying out subsequent activities.

subject: Kuhusiana: Miaka 4–5 | Kujenga Uhusiano wa Msingi na Watu Wengine
title_sw: Shughuli 2: Kutambulisha jinsi za wenzake.
title_en: Activity 2: Identifying the gender of classmates.
about_sw: Kujitambulisha, Ushirikiano, kujiamini, stadi za kijamii, stadi za lugha, umakini, mahusiano
about_en: Self-introduction, cooperation, self-confidence, social skills, language skills, attentiveness, relationships
materials_sw: Chati, picha na video zilizorekodiwa zinazoonesha Watoto wakitambulisha jinsi za wenzake
materials_en: Chart, photos and recorded videos showing children identifying the gender of their classmates
steps_sw:
1. Andaa mazingira wezeshi salama na jumuishi kwa ajili ya watoto kujifunza.
2. Waweke watoto katika umbo la U/nusu duara/ duara au mkao mwingine kulingana na mazingira.
3. Waoneshe picha ya mtoto aliyevaa kaptula kisha mpatie mtoto mwenye jinsi ya kiume halafu waambie huyu ni juma ni mvulana anavaa kaptula. Rudia hivyo na kwa mtoto wa kike.
4. Wape fursa watoto wote kufanya zoezi hili mara nyingi kadri muda unavyoruhusu.
5. Chunguza kama kila mtoto anaweza kutaja jinsi za wenzake.
TANBIHI: Shughuli hii itawezeshwa kwa vipindi viwili kwa siku tofauti. Tumia video iliyorekodiwa zinazoonesha jinsi au mchezo wa kuchukua picha na kumpelekea mtoto mwenzake na kutaja jinsi yake.
steps_en:
1. Prepare a supportive, safe and inclusive environment for children to learn.
2. Seat the children in a U-shape/semicircle/circle or another arrangement depending on the setting.
3. Show a picture of a child wearing shorts, then give it to a male child and say 'this is Juma, he is a boy who wears shorts.' Repeat the same for a female child.
4. Give all children the opportunity to do this activity as many times as time allows.
5. Check whether each child can identify the gender of their classmates.
NOTE: This activity will be carried out over two sessions on different days. Use recorded videos showing gender or a game of taking a photo and passing it to a classmate and stating their gender.

subject: Kuhusiana: Miaka 4–5 | Kujenga Uhusiano wa Msingi na Watu Wengine
title_sw: Shughuli 3: Kutambulisha watu wengine na kueleza uhusiano wao.
title_en: Activity 3: Introducing other people and explaining their relationships.
about_sw: Kujitambulisha, ushirikiano, kujiamini, stadi za kijamii, stadi za lugha, mahusiano
about_en: Self-introduction, cooperation, self-confidence, social skills, language skills, relationships
materials_sw: Kadi za picha zikionesha wazazi, babu na bibi, dada, kaka, shangazi, mjomba, binamu, mpwa, baba mdogo, mama mdogo, mama, baba, mwalimu, Jirani
materials_en: Picture cards showing parents, grandparents, sister, brother, aunt, uncle, cousin, nephew/niece, younger uncle, younger aunt, mother, father, teacher, neighbour
steps_sw:
1. Andaa eneo salama, wezeshi na jumuishi kwa watoto kukaa katika umbo la U, nusu duara au duara. Zingatia watoto wenye mahitaji maalum.
2. Bandika kadi/picha mbalimbali (wazazi, ndugu, jamaa na watu mbalimbali) ukutani au sehemu tofauti ili watoto waweze kuziona na kufuata.
3. Wawezeshe watoto kuchunguza picha mbalimbali na kutaja. Uliza maswali wazi, Mfano; huyu ni nani.
4. Endelea na wimbo kuchagiza shughuli hiyo. "Mama, baba, kaka na dada, Hawa ni watu wa familia yangu. Bibi na babu, shangazi mjomba, Mjomba shangazi, mpwa na binamu, Mama mdogo, baba mdogo, Wananipenda siku zote".
5. Akati wa kuimba watoto wazunguke darasani na wimbo ukiisha wanasimama mbele ya picha na wanasema ni nani huyo. Anza kwa kutoa mfano.
6. Chunguza kama mtoto anaweza kutambua uhusiano kwa picha baada ya kuimba.
TANBIHI: Shughuli hii ifanyike kwa vipindi vitatu. Shughuli inayofuata unaweza wasimulia hadithi inayoelezea mahusiano. Picha ziwe za mguso kwa mtoto mwenye changamoto ya uoni.
steps_en:
1. Prepare a safe, supportive and inclusive area for children to sit in a U-shape, semicircle or circle. Consider children with special needs.
2. Stick various cards/pictures (parents, siblings, relatives and various people) on the wall or different areas so children can see and follow them.
3. Enable children to examine and name the various pictures. Ask open-ended questions, for example: who is this?
4. Continue with a song to animate the activity. "Mama, baba, kaka na dada, These are my family. Bibi na babu, shangazi mjomba, Mjomba shangazi, mpwa na binamu, Mama mdogo, baba mdogo, They love me every day".
5. While singing, children walk around the classroom and when the song ends they stand in front of a picture and say who that person is. Start by giving an example.
6. Check whether the child can identify relationships from pictures after singing.
NOTE: This activity should be done over three sessions. The next activity can involve telling a story that explains relationships. Pictures should be tactile for a child with a visual impairment.

subject: Kuhusiana: Miaka 4–5 / Kujenga Uhusiano wa Msingi na Watu Wengine
title_sw: Shughuli 6b: Kuonesha matendo ya tabia njema (kusalimia, kuomba msamaha, kumsaidia mtoto mwingine)
title_en: Activity 6b: Demonstrating good behaviour (greeting, asking for forgiveness, helping another child)
about_sw: Tabia njema, ushirikiano, kujiamini, stadi za kijamii, stadi za lugha, mahusiano, kusikiliza
about_en: Good behaviour, cooperation, self-confidence, social skills, language skills, relationships, listening
materials_sw: Picha mbalimbali zinazoonesha matendo ya tabia njema, video iliyorekodiwa ya matendo ya tabia njema
materials_en: Various pictures showing good behaviour actions, a recorded video of good behaviour actions
steps_sw:
1. Andaa mazingira salama, wezeshi na jumusihi kwa Watoto kuigiza matendo ya tabia njema
2. Weka picha mbalimbali kwenye kikapu au boksi.
3. Ita mtoto mmoja achague picha moja. Kisha aoneshe kwa kuigiza tendo hilo. Mfano: Kuomba msamaha
4. Uliza watoto "Amefanya tendo lipi" Toa maelezo zaidi kuhusu hilo tendo
5. Endelea na watoto wengine kadri muda unavyoruhusu

TANBIHI: Shughuli hii itawezeshwa kwa vipindi viwili kwa siku tofauti. Shughuli inayofuata watoto waendelee kuigiza matendo ya tabia njema
steps_en:
1. Prepare a safe, enabling and welcoming environment for children to role-play good behaviour actions.
2. Place various pictures in a basket or box.
3. Call one child to pick one picture. Then have them demonstrate that action. Example: Asking for forgiveness.
4. Ask the children 'What action did they do?' Provide more explanation about that action.
5. Continue with other children as time allows.

NOTE: This activity will be conducted in two sessions on different days. In the following session, children continue to role-play good behaviour actions.

subject: Kuhusiana: Miaka 4–5 / Kujenga Uhusiano wa Msingi na Watu Wengine
title_sw: Shughuli 7: Kutaja shughuli za kutendwa na mtoto binafsi
title_en: Activity 7: Naming self-care activities performed by the child
about_sw: kujitegemea, ushirikiano, kujiamini, stadi za kijamii, stadi za lugha, mahusiano, kusikiliza, uratibu wa macho na mikono
about_en: Self-reliance, cooperation, self-confidence, social skills, language skills, relationships, listening, eye-hand coordination
materials_sw: Picha za matendo mbalimbali kama kunawa mikono, kupiga mswaki au video iliyorekodiwa ya matendo binafsi
materials_en: Pictures of various actions such as washing hands, brushing teeth, or a recorded video of self-care actions
steps_sw:
1. Andaa mazingira salama, wezeshi na jumuishi ya watoto kukaa umbo la U/nusu duara/ duara au mkao mwingine kulingana na mazingira. Zingatia watoto wenye mahitaji maalum
2. Anza kwa kuimba wimbo huku ukionesha vitendo mbalimbali:
"Hii ndio namna ninanawaa uso, Ninanawa uso, ninanawa uso, Hii ndio namna ninanawa uso, Asubuhi na mapema. Hivi ndio namna ninapiga mswaki, piga mswaki, piga mswaki, Hvi ndio namna ninapiga mswaki, Asubuhi na mapema".
3. Endelea kufanya vitendo vinavyoimbwa kwenye wimbo kuonesha shughuli wanazofanya watoto wenyewe.
4. Uliza maswali juu ya matendo waliyoimba/tenda wakati wanaimba wimbo
5. Chunguza kama mtoto anaweza kutenda matendo kwenye wimbo

TANBIHI:
1. Kama kuna mtoto asiyeona, msaidie kujua matendo ya kufanya wakati wa kuimba
2. Kwa mtoto kiziwi mpatie kadi zenye matendo mbalimbali kadri yanavyotajwa kwenye wimbo.
3. Shughuli hii itawezeshwa kwa vipindi viwili kwa siku tofauti. Kipindi kinachofuata wasimulie hadithi au waoneshe video ya matendo ya tabia njema
steps_en:
1. Prepare a safe, enabling and inclusive environment for children to sit in a U-shape/semicircle/circle or another arrangement suitable to the environment. Pay attention to children with special needs.
2. Begin by singing a song while demonstrating various actions:
"This is the way I wash my face, I wash my face, I wash my face, This is the way I wash my face, in the morning. This is the way I brush my teeth, brush my teeth, brush my teeth, This is the way I brush my teeth, in the morning."
3. Continue performing the actions sung in the song to demonstrate the activities that children do themselves.
