4. Ask questions about the actions they sang/performed while singing the song.
5. Check whether the child can perform the actions in the song.

NOTE:
1. If there is a child who cannot see, help them understand the actions to perform while singing.
2. For a deaf child, give them cards with various actions as they are mentioned in the song.
3. This activity will be conducted in two sessions on different days. In the following session, tell a story or show a video of good behaviour actions.

subject: Kuhusiana: Miaka 4–5 / Kujenga Uhusiano wa Msingi na Watu Wengine
title_sw: Shughuli 8a: Kubainisha shughuli zinazotendwa na wanajamii
title_en: Activity 8a: Identifying activities performed by community members
about_sw: stadi ya kutofautisha shughuli, ushirikiano, kujiamini, kukuza lugha, mahusiano, kusikiliza, uratibu wa macho na mikono
about_en: Skill of distinguishing activities, cooperation, self-confidence, language development, relationships, listening, eye-hand coordination
materials_sw: Picha mbalimbali za watu wakiwa kwenye kazi zao
materials_en: Various pictures of people at their work/jobs
steps_sw:
1. Andaa mazingira salama, wezeshi na jumuishi kwa watoto kukaa kwenye umbo la U/nusu duara/ duara au mkao mwingine kulingana na mazingira. Zingatia watoto wenye mahitaji maalum.
2. Waambie watoto leo utawasimulia hadithi ya Mtoto Amani:
"Siku moja katika kijiji kidogo, mtoto mdogo aliitwa Amani aliamua kwenda kuzunguka na kuona ni nani anafanya kazi gani. Kwanza alikutana na daktari akitoka kwenye kliniki. Daktari alimwambia: 'Ninafanya kazi yangu kusaidia wagonjwa kuwa na afya nzuri.' Amani akasema: 'Huyu ni daktari. Anasaidia wagonjwa.' Baada ya hapo, aliona mpishi akipika chakula kwenye jikoni ya shule. Mpishi alimwambia: 'Napika chakula ili watoto wawe na nguvu za kucheza na kujifunza.' Amani akasema: 'Huyu ni mpishi. Anapika chakula.' Kisha, Amani aliona mwalimu akifundisha watoto darasani. Mwalimu alisema: 'Ninafundisha watoto kusoma, kuandika na kuwa marafiki wazuri.' Amani akasema: 'Huyu ni mwalimu. Anafundisha watoto.' Halafu, aliona polisi akitembea njiani. Polisi alisema: 'Ninalinda watu na kuhakikisha wanakuwa salama.' Amani akasema: 'Huyu ni polisi. Analinda watu.' Amani pia alikutana na fundi akitengeneza nyumba, na mkulima akilima shamba. Amani akasema: 'Huyu ni fundi. Anatengeneza nyumba.' 'Huyu ni mkulima. Analima shamba.' Mwisho wa siku, Amani alielewa kitu muhimu sana: Kila mtu katika jamii anafanya kazi muhimu. Kila kazi inasaidia watu kuishi vizuri na kwa furaha. Amani akatabasamu, akasema: 'Leo nimejifunza kuwa kila kazi ni muhimu.'"
3. Waulize watoto maswali kuhusu kazi walizosikia kwenye hadithi.
4. Chunguza kama kila mtoto anaweza kutaja kazi zinazofanywa na wanajamii

TANBIHI: Shughuli hii itawezeshwa kwa vipindi viwili kwa siku tofauti. Kipindi kinachofuata waulize kazi za wanafamilia wanaoishi nao.
steps_en:
1. Prepare a safe, enabling and inclusive environment for children to sit in a U-shape/semicircle/circle or another arrangement suitable to the environment. Pay attention to children with special needs.
2. Tell the children that today you will tell them the story of Child Amani:
"One day in a small village, a young child named Amani decided to go around and see who does what work. First, he met a doctor coming out of a clinic. The doctor said: 'I do my work to help sick people get healthy.' Amani said: 'This is a doctor. He helps sick people.' After that, he saw a cook preparing food in the school kitchen. The cook told him: 'I cook food so that children have the strength to play and learn.' Amani said: 'This is a cook. He cooks food.' Then, Amani saw a teacher teaching children in a classroom. The teacher said: 'I teach children to read, write, and become good friends.' Amani said: 'This is a teacher. He teaches children.' Later, he saw a police officer walking on the road. The police officer said: 'I protect people and make sure they are safe.' Amani said: 'This is a police officer. He protects people.' Amani also met a builder constructing a house and a farmer tilling a field. Amani said: 'This is a builder. He constructs a house.' 'This is a farmer. He tills a field.' At the end of the day, Amani understood something very important: Every person in the community does an important job. Every job helps people live well and happily. Amani smiled and said: 'Today I have learned that every job is important.'"
3. Ask the children questions about the jobs they heard about in the story.
4. Check whether each child can name the jobs performed by community members.

NOTE: This activity will be conducted in two sessions on different days. In the following session, ask about the jobs of the family members they live with.

subject: Kujenga Uhusiano wa Msingi na Watu Wengine
title_sw: Shughuli 8b: Kubainisha shughuli zinazotendwa na wanafamilia
title_en: Activity 8b: Identifying activities performed by family members
about_sw: Kutofautisha shughuli, ushirikiano, kujiamini, stadi za lugha, mahusiano
about_en: Distinguishing activities, cooperation, self-confidence, language skills, relationships
materials_sw: Kadi ya mtu – picha ya watu wa taaluma mbalimbali (daktari, mwalimu, polisi, mpishi, fundi, dereva, mkulima). Kadi ya kazi – picha inayohusiana na kazi hiyo (kupika chakula, kufundisha watoto, kulinda watu, kujenga nyumba, kuendesha gari, kulima shamba).
materials_en: Person cards – pictures of people in various professions (doctor, teacher, police officer, cook, technician, driver, farmer). Job cards – pictures related to each job (cooking food, teaching children, guarding people, building a house, driving a vehicle, farming).
steps_sw:
1. Andaa mazingira salama, wezeshi na jumuishi kwa watoto kukaa kwenye umbo la U/nusu duara/duara au mkao mwingine kulingana na mazingira. Zingatia watoto wenye mahitaji maalum.
2. Anza kwa wimbo wa uchangamshi unaotaja kazi mbalimbali. Mfano: "Askari Askari Askari" mimi mimi hapa"
3. Panga picha ukutani/meza na waruhusu watoto kuchunguza na kutaja majina ya picha wanaziona.
4. Waulize maswali kuhusu picha. Mfano: Ukiwa mkubwa unataka kufanya kazi gani? Mruhusu achague picha ya kazi aliyoichagua. Mwuulize Kwanini unataka kufanya kazi hii?
5. Chunguza kama kila mtoto anaweza kutaja shughuli zinazotendwa na watu.

TANBIHI: Shughuli hii itawezeshwa katika vipindi viwili kwa siku tofauti. Kipindi kinachofuata wachore kazi wa wanafamilia.
steps_en:
1. Prepare a safe, enabling and inclusive environment for children to sit in a U-shape/semicircle/circle or another arrangement depending on the setting. Consider children with special needs.
2. Start with an energising song that mentions various jobs. Example: "Askari Askari Askari, mimi mimi hapa."
3. Arrange pictures on the wall/table and allow children to explore and name the pictures they see.
4. Ask questions about the pictures. Example: When you grow up, what job do you want to do? Let the child choose the picture of the job they selected. Ask them: Why do you want to do this job?
5. Check whether each child can name activities performed by people.

NOTE: This activity will be conducted in two sessions on different days. The following session, children draw jobs of family members.

subject: Kujenga Uhusiano wa Msingi na Watu Wengine
title_sw: Shughuli 9: Kutatua Migogoro
title_en: Activity 9: Resolving Conflicts
about_sw: Kutatua migogoro, ushirikiano, kujiamini, stadi za lugha, mahusiano, kusikiliza
about_en: Conflict resolution, cooperation, self-confidence, language skills, relationships, listening
materials_sw: Jiwe, kijiti, ua, kadi za hisia mbalimbali kama furaha, huzuni, kulia, tabasamu, mshangao
materials_en: A stone, a stick, a flower, emotion cards showing various feelings such as happiness, sadness, crying, smiling, surprise
steps_sw:
1. Andaa eneo salama, wezeshi na jumuishi kwa watoto kukaa kwenye umbo la U/nusu duara/duara au mkao mwingine kulingana na mazingira. Zingatia watoto wenye mahitaji maalum.
2. Wasimulie watoto kisa mafunzo cha watoto wanaopigana.
3. Waulize maswali. Mfano: Nani ni mkorofi kati ya Juma na Luka? Kwanini? Juma alitakiwa kufanya nini alipochaniwa picha yake na Luka? Ungekuwa wewe ungefanyaje? Kwanini Mwalimu aliwaambia wapeane mkono Luka na Juma?
4. Chunguza kama mtoto anaweza kujibu maswali ya kutatua migogoro.

TANBIHI: Shughuli hii Itawezeshwa kwa vipindi vitatu kwa siku tofauti. Kipindi kinachofuata andaa mchezo wa kushindana au igizo.
steps_en:
1. Prepare a safe, enabling and inclusive environment for children to sit in a U-shape/semicircle/circle or another arrangement depending on the setting. Consider children with special needs.
2. Tell children an instructional story about children who are fighting.
3. Ask questions. Example: Who is misbehaving between Juma and Luka? Why? What was Juma supposed to do when Luka tore his picture? What would you do? Why did the teacher tell Luka and Juma to shake hands?
4. Check whether each child can answer questions about resolving conflicts.

NOTE: This activity will be conducted in three sessions on different days. The following session, prepare a competitive game or role-play.

subject: Kuelezea Hisia kwa Maneno na Ishara
title_sw: Shughuli 1: Kubaini picha zinazoonesha hisia tofauti
title_en: Activity 1: Identifying pictures showing different emotions
about_sw: Utambuzi wa hisia, uwezo wa kuelezea, kujieleza, kujenga misuli midogo ya vidole
about_en: Recognition of emotions, ability to express, self-expression, developing fine motor muscles of the fingers
materials_sw: Kadi/picha za hisia tofauti (furaha, huzuni, hasira)
materials_en: Cards/pictures of different emotions (happiness, sadness, anger)
steps_sw:
1. Andaa eneo salama, wezeshi na jumuishi kwa watoto kukaa katika vikundi kulinga na idadi ya watoto.
2. Anza na wimbo wenye maneno ya hisia huku ukiwaonesha picha za hisia.
3. Gawa kadi/picha zinazoonesha hisia kwa kila kundi.
4. Waelekeze watoto wafunike kadi za picha ili picha ya hisia isionekane.
5. Mtoto mmoja baada ya mwingine katika kila kundi aokote kadi moja, aoneshe wenzake nao waeleze wameona hisia gani mfano, furaha au hasira.
6. Chunguza kama kila mtoto anaweza kueleza hisia kwa maneno ya ishara.

TANBIHI: Shughuli hii itawezeshwa kwa vipindi viwili kwa siku tofauti. Shughuli inayofuata endelea na mchezo kwa kuwaonesha picha za hisia nyingine.
steps_en:
1. Prepare a safe, enabling and inclusive environment for children to sit in groups according to the number of children.
2. Start with a song containing words about emotions while showing pictures of emotions.
3. Distribute cards/pictures showing emotions to each group.
4. Direct children to turn the picture cards face down so the emotion picture is not visible.
5. One child at a time in each group picks up one card, shows it to peers, and they describe what emotion they see, for example, happiness or anger.
6. Check whether each child can express emotions using words and gestures.

NOTE: This activity will be conducted in two sessions on different days. The following activity continues with a game by showing other emotion pictures.

subject: Kuelezea Hisia kwa Maneno na Ishara
title_sw: Shughuli 2: Kuchora picha zinazoonesha hisia tofauti
title_en: Activity 2: Drawing pictures that show different emotions
about_sw: Utambuzi wa hisia, uwezo wa kuelezea, kujieleza, kujenga misuli midogo ya vidole
about_en: Emotion recognition, ability to express, self-expression, building fine motor muscles of the fingers
materials_sw: Kitabu cha hadithi, karatasi, penseli, rangi, picha za hisia, penseli za rangi, krayoni
materials_en: Storybook, paper, pencil, colours, emotion pictures, coloured pencils, crayons
steps_sw:
1. Andaa eneo salama, wezeshi na jumuishi kwa watoto kukaa U/nusu duara, Zingatia watoto wenye mahitaji maalum
2. Soma hadithi fupi taratibu, unapofika sehemu ya kutaja hisia tulia kidogo, na kuwauliza swali "mhusika (au taja jina) alifanyaje"? Watoto watajibu hisia mfano, "alifurahi"
3. Waoneshe picha ya hisia ya furaha. Waulize hii ni picha ya hisia ipi?
4. Mpe kila mtoto karatasi, penseli na rangi achore na kupaka rangi picha ya hisia ya furaha
5. Waambie kila mtoto ataje hisia aliyochora
6. Chunguza kama kila mtoto anaweza kuchora picha ya hisia ya furaha

Tanbihi:
1. Bainisha Watoto wenye mahitaji maalum ili uweze kuwashirikisha kadiri ya uhitaji wao
2. Shughuli itawezeshwa kwa vipindi vitatu kwa siku tofauti. Kipindi kinachofuata endelea na hisia zingine
steps_en:
1. Prepare a safe, enabling and inclusive environment for children to sit in a U/semi-circle, paying attention to children with special needs
2. Read a short story slowly; when you reach the part that mentions emotions, pause and ask the question "what did the character (or name the character) do"? Children will respond with an emotion, e.g., "they were happy"
3. Show a picture of the emotion of happiness. Ask what emotion this picture shows
4. Give each child paper, a pencil and colours to draw and colour a picture of the emotion of happiness
5. Ask each child to name the emotion they drew
6. Check whether each child can draw a picture of the emotion of happiness

Note:
1. Identify children with special needs so you can include them according to their level of need
2. The activity will be done in three sessions on different days. The following session continues with other emotions

subject: Kuelezea Hisia kwa Maneno na Ishara
title_sw: Shughuli 3a: Kutaja matukio mbalimbali yanayohusu hisia
title_en: Activity 3a: Naming various events related to emotions
about_sw: Kutambua hisia, kujieleza kwa maneno, kusikiliza, umakini, kujiamini
about_en: Recognising emotions, expressing oneself in words, listening, attentiveness, self-confidence
materials_sw: Kitabu cha hadithi/karatasi yenye hadithi, kadi za picha zinazoonesha hisia tofauti (mfano, hasira, furaha, huzuni)
materials_en: Storybook/paper with a story, picture cards showing different emotions (e.g., anger, happiness, sadness)
steps_sw:
1. Andaa eneo salama, wezeshi na jumuishi kwa watoto kukaa U/nusu duara, zingatia watoto wenye mahitaji maalum.
2. Waambie watoto kuwa leo utawasomea hadithi inayohusu "Hisia zetu".
3. Anza kusoma hadithi kwa utulivu, vionjo na sauti inayosikika kwa kila mtoto.
4. Uliza, "Tukio gani lilimfanya mtoto awe na furaha"? kisha onesha kadi yenye hisia ya furaha
5. Endelea na hadithi huku ukiuliza kuhusu matukio mengine ya hisia.
6. Waulize Watoto kama wamewahi kukutana na matukio yenye hisia hizo.
7. Chunguza kama kila mtoto anashiriki na kutaja hisia. Hamasisha kila mtoto kushiriki kikamilifu.

TANBIHI:
1. Bainisha Watoto wenye mahitaji maalum ili uweze kuwashirikisha kadiri ya uhitaji wao.
2. Shughuli itawezeshwa kwa vipindi vitatu kwa siku tofauti. Kipindi kinachofuata endelea na igizo.
steps_en:
1. Prepare a safe, enabling and inclusive environment for children to sit in a U/semi-circle, paying attention to children with special needs.
2. Tell the children that today you will read them a story about "Our Emotions".
3. Begin reading the story calmly, with expression and a voice audible to each child.
4. Ask, "What event made the child feel happy"? then show the card with the emotion of happiness
5. Continue with the story while asking about other emotional events.
6. Ask the children if they have ever experienced events with those emotions.
7. Check whether each child is participating and naming emotions. Encourage every child to participate fully.

Note:
1. Identify children with special needs so you can include them according to their level of need.
2. The activity will be done in three sessions on different days. The following session continues with role-play.

subject: Kuelezea Hisia kwa Maneno na Ishara
title_sw: Shughuli 3b: Kutaja matukio mbalimbali yanayohusu hisia
title_en: Activity 3b: Naming various events related to emotions
about_sw: Kutambua hisia, Kujieleza kwa maneno, Kusikiliza, Umakini, Kujiamini, kujenga misuli mikubwa ya mwili, na kukuza lugha
about_en: Recognising emotions, expressing oneself in words, listening, attentiveness, self-confidence, building gross motor muscles of the body, and developing language
materials_sw: Kadi/picha zinazoonesha matukio ya hisia mbalimbali (mfano, hasira, furaha, huzuni), filimbi.
materials_en: Cards/pictures showing events of various emotions (e.g., anger, happiness, sadness), a whistle.
steps_sw:
1. Andaa eneo salama, wezeshi na jumuishi kwa watoto kuigiza
2. Wapange watoto katika vikundi kulinga na idadi ya watoto
3. Kila kundi lipatie kadi/picha yenye tukio la hisia tofauti
4. Wambie kila kundi waangalie kadi zenye matukio tofauti na kujadili namna gani wataigiza
5. Wakaribishe kundi moja baada ya lingine kuja mbele kuigiza
6. Wakishaigiza, watoto wa vikundi mengine wataje hisia hiyo
7. Chunguza kama kila mtoto anashiriki kutaja matukio mbalimbali yanayohusu hisia.

Tanbihi:
Shughuli hii itawezeshwa kwa vipindi vitatu kwa siku tofauti kwa kwa kutumia zana pendekezwa au vifaa vingine vinavyopatikana kwenye mazingira.
steps_en:
1. Prepare a safe, enabling and inclusive environment for children to role-play
2. Arrange the children into groups according to the number of children
3. Give each group a card/picture with a different emotional event
4. Tell each group to look at the cards with different events and discuss how they will role-play it
5. Invite one group after another to come forward to role-play
6. After they role-play, children from other groups should name the emotion
7. Check whether each child is participating in naming various events related to emotions.

Note:
This activity will be done in three sessions on different days using the recommended materials or other materials available in the environment.

subject: Kuelezea Hisia kwa Maneno na Ishara
title_sw: Shughuli 4a: Kucheza michezo inayoonesha hisia tofauti
title_en: Activity 4a: Playing games that show different emotions
about_sw: Kutambua hisia zao na za wengine, kushirikiana, kusikiliza, kuwasiliana, kujenga misuli mikubwa ya mwili
about_en: Recognising their own and others' emotions, cooperating, listening, communicating, building gross motor muscles
materials_sw: Kadi/picha zinazoonesha matukio ya hisia (mfano, hasira, furaha, huzuni), redio
materials_en: Cards/pictures showing emotional situations (e.g. anger, happiness, sadness), radio
steps_sw:
1. Andaa eneo la kuchezea wezeshi na jumuishi kulingana na mazingira
2. Wambie watoto kuwa leo watacheza mchezo unaitwa "Cheza na simama kwenye hisia"
3. Waoneshe vituo ulivyoweka kadi za matukio tofauti
4. Wambie kuwa utaanzisha muziki, watakuwa wanacheza kwa mtindo wowote mfano, kurukaruka, kutembea
5. Utakapozima muziki, watasimama na kuangalia ulipo. Utaonesha kadi ya hisia moja, kila mtoto atakwenda na kusimama katika kituo chenye kadi hiyo
6. Kama kuna watoto wamesimama sehemu ambayo siyo ya hiyo kadi waulize "Kwa nini wamesimama hapo"? Wale waliosimama kwenye kituo sahihi waambie wataje jina la hisia hiyo
7. Endelea na mchezo huo kadri muda unavyoruhusu
8. Chunguza kama kila mtoto 1.ameshiriki kuonesha hisia tofauti.

Tanbihi:
1. Bainisha watoto wenye mahitaji maalum ili uweze kuwashirikisha kadiri ya uhitaji wao
2. Shughuli hii itawezeshwa kwa vipindi vitatu kwa siku tofauti kwa kutumia michezo na zana pendekezwa pamoja na zingine zinazopatikana kwenye mazingira.
steps_en:
1. Prepare the play area as facilitator and inclusive host according to the environment
2. Tell the children that today they will play a game called "Play and stand on the emotion"
3. Show them the stations where you have placed cards of different situations
4. Tell them that when you start the music, they will move in any way they like, e.g. jumping, walking
5. When you stop the music, they will stop and look around. You will show one emotion card; each child will go and stand at the station with that card
6. If there are children who have stopped in the wrong station, ask them "Why are you standing there?" Those who stood at the correct station should name the emotion
7. Continue the game for as long as time allows
8. Check that each child has participated in showing different emotions.

Note:
1. Identify children with special needs so you can include them according to their needs
2. This activity will be done in three sessions on different days using the recommended games and materials plus others available in the environment.

subject: Kuelezea Hisia kwa Maneno na Ishara
title_sw: Shughuli 4b: Kucheza michezo inayoonesha hisia tofauti - nyoka na ngazi
title_en: Activity 4b: Playing games that show different emotions – snakes and ladders
about_sw: Kuonesha hisia, kusikiliza, kuwasiliana, kujenga misuli midogo ya vidole, umakini, uvumilivu, kupeana zamu, kufuata utaratibu
about_en: Expressing emotions, listening, communicating, building fine motor muscles of the fingers, attentiveness, patience, taking turns, following rules
materials_sw: Vichezeo, dadu, mchezo wa nyoka na ngazi
materials_en: Playing pieces, dice, snakes and ladders game
steps_sw:
1. Andaa mchezo wa nyoka na ngazi, vichezeo na dadu
2. Andaa eneo salama la kuchezea, wezeshi na jumuishi
3. Waambie watoto kuwa leo watacheza mchezo unaitwa "Nyoka na Ngazi"
4. Wawezeshe namna ya kucheza mchezo huo. Kisha wagawe watoto katika vikundi
5. Kila kikundi wapatie nakala ya mchezo wa "Nyoka na Ngazi", dadu moja na vichezeo 4
6. Kila kikundi waanze kucheza mchezo
7. Baada ya mchezo uliza maswali yafuatayo:
• Ulijisikiaje baada ya kumezwa na nyoka? Hiyo ni hisia gani?
• Ulijisikiaje baada ya kupandishwa na ngazi? Hiyo ni hisia gani?
• Ulijisikiaje kuwa wa kwanza kumaliza mchezo? Hiyo ni hisia gani?
• Ulijisikiaje baada ya kuwa wa mwisho kumaliza? Hiyo ni hisia gani?
8. Chunguza kama mtoto anaonesha hisia tofauti wakati anacheza.

Tanbihi:
1. Bainisha watoto wenye mahitaji maalum ili uweze kuwashirikisha kadiri ya uhitaji wao.
2. Shughuli hii itawezeshwa kwa vipindi vitatu kwa siku tofauti kwa kutumia michezo mbalimbali.
steps_en:
1. Prepare the snakes and ladders game, playing pieces and dice
2. Prepare a safe play area as facilitator and inclusive host
3. Tell the children that today they will play a game called "Snakes and Ladders"
4. Teach them how to play the game, then divide the children into groups
5. Give each group a copy of the "Snakes and Ladders" game, one die and 4 playing pieces
6. Each group begins to play the game
7. After the game, ask the following questions:
• How did you feel after being swallowed by a snake? What emotion is that?
• How did you feel after climbing a ladder? What emotion is that?
• How did you feel being the first to finish the game? What emotion is that?
• How did you feel after being the last to finish? What emotion is that?
8. Check whether the child is showing different emotions while playing.

Note:
1. Identify children with special needs so you can include them according to their needs.
2. This activity will be done in three sessions on different days using various games.

subject: Kuelezea Hisia kwa Maneno na Ishara
title_sw: Shughuli 4c: Kucheza michezo inayoonesha hisia tofauti
title_en: Activity 4c: Playing games that show different emotions
about_sw: Kutambua hisia zao tofauti, kushirikiana, kusikiliza, kuwasiliana, kujenga misuli mikubwa ya mwili
about_en: Recognising their own different emotions, cooperating, listening, communicating, building gross motor muscles
materials_sw: Picha za watoto wakiwa wanacheza pamoja
materials_en: Pictures of children playing together
steps_sw:
1. Andaa eneo salama, wezeshi na jumuishi kwa ajili ya watoto kujifunza.
2. Wambie watoto kuwa leo tutaimba wimbo wa "Namtafuta rafiki"
3. Onesha jinsi ya kuimba wimbo ufuatao na kuonesha vitendo: "Namtafuta Rafiki x2, Wengine: Hapa hayupo x2, Mtoto: Kaenda wapi x2, Wengine: Kaenda shule x 2, Mtoto: Kitabu kampa nani x2, Wengine: Kampa mwalimu x 2"
4. Wambie watoto wawili wajitolee. Mmoja asimame katikati ya mduara na mwingine nje ya mduara.
5. Mwambie aliye nje ya mduara azunguke duara akiimba huo wimbo. Atajitahidi kupenya kwenye mduara akamguse aliyeko katikati ya duara. Watoto wengine kwenye duara watajitahidi kumzuia asipite.
6. Akifanikwa kupita na kumgusa chagua watoto wengine wacheze kama hao.
7. Waulize "Ulijihisi vipi ulivyompata rafiki"? "Uliposhindwa kumpata rafiki"? Wambie wataje hisia hiyo ya walivyojihisi.
8. Chunguza kama kila mtoto anaonesha hisia tofauti wakati anacheza.

Tanbihi:
1. Bainisha watoto wenye mahitaji maalum ili uweze kuwashirikisha kadiri ya uhitaji wao
2. Shughuli hii itawezeshwa kwa vipindi vitatu kwa siku tofauti kwa kutumia zana pendekezwa na zingine zinazopatikana kwenye mazingira na kwa kutumia michezo mbalimbali
steps_en:
1. Prepare a safe, facilitative and inclusive environment for children to learn.
2. Tell the children that today we will sing the song "I am looking for a friend"
3. Show how to sing the following song and demonstrate the actions: "I am looking for a friend x2, Others: They are not here x2, Child: Where did they go x2, Others: They went to school x2, Child: Who did they give the book to x2, Others: They gave it to the teacher x2"
4. Ask two children to volunteer. One stands in the middle of a circle and the other outside the circle.
5. Tell the one outside the circle to go around the circle singing the song. They will try to get through the circle and touch the one in the middle. The other children in the circle will try to stop them from getting through.
6. If they succeed in getting through and touching the person, choose other children to play the same way.
7. Ask "How did you feel when you found your friend?" "When you failed to find your friend?" Ask them to name the emotion they felt.
8. Check whether each child is showing different emotions while playing.

Note:
1. Identify children with special needs so you can include them according to their needs
2. This activity will be done in three sessions on different days using recommended materials and others available in the environment, and using various games

subject: Kuelezea Hisia kwa Maneno na Ishara
title_sw: Shughuli 5: Kutaja vitu wanavyovipenda na wasivyovipenda
title_en: Activity 5: Naming things they like and dislike
about_sw: Kueleza hisa zake, kujiamini, kujitambua
about_en: Expressing one's feelings, self-confidence, self-awareness
materials_sw: Kadi/picha za michezo mbalimbali, vyakula, mavazi, vifaa vya kuchezea, filimbi
materials_en: Cards/pictures of various games, foods, clothing, toys, a whistle
steps_sw:
1. Andaa eneo salama, wezeshi na jumuishi kwa ajili ya watoto kucheza mchezo wa "Napenda Sipendi"
2. Weka vifaa mbalimbali kwenye mkeka au meza
3. Wambie watoto kuwa leo tutaimba wimbo wa "Napenda na sipendi"
4. Watoto watakuwa wanatembea kwenye duara wakiimba wimbo
5. Ukipuliza filimbi, watasimama na kukuangalia
6. Utawaonesha kitu halisi. Kama mtoto anapenda hicho kitu atakifata
7. Kama hapendi atasimama kwenye kituo. Kila wanaposimama, waulize maswali "Kwa nini wamesimama pale" kwanini umefata hiki kitu?
8. Chunguza kama kila mtoto anataja vitu anavyovipenda na asivyovipenda

TANBIHI:
1. Bainisha watoto wenye mahitaji maalum ili uweze kuwashirikisha kadiri ya uhitaji wao
2. Shughuli hii itawezeshwa kwa vipindi vitatu kwa siku tofauti kwa kutumia zana pendekezwa na zingine zinazopatikana kwenye mazingira na kwa kutumia michezo mbalimbali
steps_en:
1. Prepare a safe, accessible and inclusive environment for children to play the game "I Like I Don't Like"
2. Place various materials on a mat or table
3. Tell children that today we will sing the song "I like and I don't like"
4. Children will walk in a circle singing the song
5. When you blow the whistle, they will stop and look at you
6. You will show a real object. If a child likes that object they will pick it up
7. If they don't like it they will stand at the station. Each time they stop, ask the question "Why did you stop there" / why did you pick up this object?
8. Observe whether each child names things they like and dislike

NOTE:
1. Identify children with special needs so you can include them according to their needs
2. This activity will be done in three sessions on different days using the recommended tools and others available in the environment and using various games

subject: Kujenga Stadi za Kujitegemea
title_sw: Shughuli 1: Kupanga vitu katika mpangilio sahihi
title_en: Activity 1: Arranging objects in the correct order
about_sw: Kuweka vitu katika mpangilio unaofaa, kutofautisha ukubwa (urefu, rangi, umbo, idadi), kushirikiana, uratibu wa macho na mikono.
about_en: Placing objects in the appropriate order, distinguishing size (length, colour, shape, number), cooperation, hand-eye coordination.
materials_sw: Vitu vya ukubwa tofauti (vibao, vikombe, vizibo, magunzi na vinginevyo), kadi za maneno (kubwa, ndogo, ndefu, fupi)
materials_en: Objects of different sizes (boards, cups, corks, cylinders and others), word cards (big, small, tall, short)
steps_sw:
1. Andaa mazingira salama, wezeshi na jumuishi kwa ajili ya watoto kukaa katika vikundi kulingana na idadi ya watoto.
2. Weka kikapu chenye mchanganyiko wa vitu mbalimbali kwenye kila kikundi
3. Waambie kuwa watacheza mchezo wa kuchukua vitu na kuvipanga kulingana na sifa.
4. Ukipiga filimbi, kila kikundi kitabeba vitu na kuvipanga katika eneo husika katika mpangilio sahihi – (kidogo, kikubwa au kikubwa, kidogo, kirefu, kifupi)
5. Ruhusu waanze kucheza. Uliza maswali ya kutaja vitu walivyopanga.
6. Chunguza kama kila mtoto anapanga vitu kulingana na sifa.

Tanbihi:
Shughuli hii itawezeshwa kwa vipindi vitatu kwa siku tofauti kwa kutumia zana pendekezwa na zingine zinazopatikana kwenye mazingira na kwa kutumia michezo mbalimbali.
steps_en:
1. Prepare a safe, accessible and inclusive environment for children to sit in groups according to the number of children.
2. Place a basket with a mixture of various objects in each group
3. Tell them they will play a game of picking up objects and arranging them according to their characteristics.
4. When you blow the whistle, each group will pick up objects and arrange them in the relevant area in the correct order – (small to big or big to small, tall, short)
5. Allow them to start playing. Ask questions about naming the objects they arranged.
6. Observe whether each child arranges objects according to their characteristics.

Note:
This activity will be done in three sessions on different days using the recommended tools and others available in the environment and using various games.

subject: Kujenga Stadi za Kujitegemea
title_sw: Shughuli 2: Kubeba vitu mbalimbali
title_en: Activity 2: Carrying various objects
about_sw: Kujitegemea, ujasiri, kujenga misuli mikubwa na midogo ya mwili, uratibu wa macho na mikono, kufuata maelekezo rahisi, kujiamini, kutatua tatizo, kushirikiana
about_en: Independence, courage, building large and small muscles of the body, hand-eye coordination, following simple instructions, self-confidence, problem-solving, cooperation
materials_sw: Mipira midogo, vitabu, mabegi, vijiti, vibao, midoli, makasha madogo, vikapu, ngoma/kitu chochote kinachotoa sauti
materials_en: Small balls, books, bags, sticks, boards, dolls, small boxes, baskets, drum/any object that makes a sound
steps_sw:
1. Andaa eneo salama, wezeshi na jumuishi kwa watoto kucheza mchezo wa kubeba vitu
2. Wagawe watoto katika katika timu mbili, kila timu wasimame katika mstari, mtoto mmoja mbele na wengine nyuma
3. Waambie watoto kuwa leo tutacheza mchezo wa "Mbio za kubeba vitu"?
4. Onesha jinsi ya kubeba vitu na kuviweka katika kikapu husika
5. Waambie kuwa utapiga ngoma mara tatu, mtoto wa kwanza katika kila timu atakimbia hadi katika eneo lenye vitu mbalimbali, atabeba kitu kimoja na kukipeleka katika kikapu husika chenye alama ya kitu hicho
6. Mchezo uendelee kadri muda unavyoruhusu. Waulize maswali kuhusu mchezo.
7. Chunguza kama mtoto anaweza kubeba vitu mbalimbali

TANBIHI:
Shughuli hii itawezeshwa kwa vipindi vitatu kwa siku tofauti kwa kutumia zana pendekezwa na zingine zinazopatikana kwenye mazingira na kwa kutumia michezo mbalimbali
steps_en:
1. Prepare a safe, accessible and inclusive environment for children to play the game of carrying objects
2. Divide children into two teams, each team stands in a line, one child in front and others behind
3. Tell children that today we will play the game "Object Carrying Race"
4. Show how to carry objects and place them in the relevant basket
5. Tell them you will beat the drum three times, the first child in each team will run to the area with various objects, carry one object and take it to the relevant basket marked with the image of that object
6. The game continues for as long as time allows. Ask questions about the game.
7. Observe whether the child can carry various objects

NOTE:
This activity will be done in three sessions on different days using the recommended tools and others available in the environment and using various games

subject: Kuhusiana: Miaka 4–5 | Kujenga Stadi za Kujitegemea
title_sw: Shughuli 3a: Kutenda matendo ya kujitegemea
title_en: Activity 3a: Performing self-reliance actions
about_sw: Kujitegemea, kujiamini, uratibu wa macho na mikono, kusikiliza, kufuata maelekezo rahisi
about_en: Self-reliance, self-confidence, eye-hand coordination, listening, following simple instructions
materials_sw: Vitu vyenye zipu, zipu, mlango, viatu vya kamba au mikanda, chupa za plastiki zenye mifuniko, Kamba zilizofungwa vifundo, kabati
materials_en: Items with zips, zips, a door, lace-up shoes or sandals, plastic bottles with lids, ropes tied with knots, a cabinet
steps_sw:
1. Andaa mazingira salama, wezeshi na jumuishi kwa watoto kucheza mchezo wa "Kufunga na kufungua vitu"
2. Chukua kitu kimojawapo kati ya vilivyopo na onesha jinsi ya kufunga na kufungua.
3. Muite mtoto mmoja aje mbele na kufanya kama wewe huku wengine wakiangalia.
4. Unda vikundi kulingana na idadi ya watoto, kila kikundi kipatie vitu vya kufuga na kufungua. Unaweza kutumia mabegi yao
5. Zungukia kila kikundi na kuangalia namna wanavyofunga na kufungua.
6. Chunguza kama kila mtoto anashiriki kufungua na kufunga vitu mbalimbali.

Tanbihi:
1. Bainisha Watoto wenye mahitaji maalum ili uweze kuwashirikisha kadiri ya uhitaji wao.
2. Shughuli hii itawezeshwa kwa vipindi vitatu kwa siku tofauti kwa kutumia zana pendekezwa na zingine zinazopatikana kwenye mazingira na kwa kutumia michezo mbalimbali
steps_en:
1. Prepare a safe, enabling and inclusive environment for children to play the game "Fastening and unfastening things"
2. Pick one of the available items and demonstrate how to fasten and unfasten it.
3. Invite one child to come forward and do the same as you while others watch.
4. Form groups according to the number of children; give each group items to fasten and unfasten. You can use their own bags.
5. Go around each group and observe how they fasten and unfasten.
6. Check whether each child is participating in unfastening and fastening various items.

Note:
1. Identify children with special needs so that you can include them according to their needs.
2. This activity will be facilitated in three sessions on different days using the recommended tools and others available in the environment and using various games.

subject: Kuhusiana: Miaka 4–5 | Kujenga Stadi za Kujitegemea
title_sw: Shughuli 3b: Kutenda matendo ya kujitegemea
title_en: Activity 3b: Performing self-reliance actions
about_sw: Kujitegemea, kujiamini, uratibu wa macho na mikono, kusikiliza, kufuata maelekezo rahisi
about_en: Self-reliance, self-confidence, eye-hand coordination, listening, following simple instructions
materials_sw: Viatu, kofia, masweta, soksi na vitu vingine vya kuvaa wenyewe
materials_en: Shoes, hats, sweaters, socks and other items of clothing to dress oneself
steps_sw:
1. Andaa eneo salama, wezeshi na jumuishi kwa ajili ya watoto kukaa katika vikundi. Zingatia watoto wenye mahitaji maalum
2. Waeleze watoto kuwa leo tutafanya mchezo wa "kuvaa na kurekebisha mavazi yetu"
3. Chukua vazi moja mfano, kofia ivae, na kurekebisha huku watoto wanakuangalia. Igiza kama mtu/mhusika fulani anayevaa kofia.
4. Waweke watoto katika vikundi na mpatie kila mtoto vazi.
5. Waambie kila mtoto avae na kurekebisha vazi lake kisha waigize kutembea kama mtu fulani.
6. Chunguza kama k mtoto anavaa na kurekebisha vazi, wasaidie wanapokwama.

Tanbihi:
Shughuli hii itawezeshwa kwa vipindi viwili kwa siku tofauti kwa kutumia zana pendekezwa na zingine zinazopatikana kwenye mazingira na kwa kutumia michezo mbalimbali.
steps_en:
1. Prepare a safe, enabling and inclusive environment for children to sit in groups. Consider children with special needs.
2. Explain to children that today we will play the game "dressing and adjusting our clothes"
3. Pick one garment, for example a hat, put it on and adjust it while children watch. Roleplay as a person/character who is putting on a hat.
4. Place children in groups and give each child a garment.
5. Tell each child to put on and adjust their garment and then act out walking like a certain person.
6. Check whether each child is putting on and adjusting their garment; help those who get stuck.

Note:
This activity will be facilitated in two sessions on different days using the recommended tools and others available in the environment and using various games.

subject: Kuhusiana: Miaka 4–5 | Kujenga Stadi za Kujitegemea
title_sw: Shughuli 4a: Kutenda matendo ya kujali mazingira
title_en: Activity 4a: Performing environmental care actions
about_sw: Kujitegemea, kujali mazingira, uwajibikaji, utunzaji wa mazingira, ujenzi wa misuli mikubwa na midogo, kufuata maelekezo rahisi, ushirikiano, umakini, tabia njema
about_en: Self-reliance, environmental care, responsibility, environmental conservation, development of large and small muscles, following simple instructions, cooperation, carefulness, good behaviour
materials_sw: Vikapu/mifuko, chupa za plastiki, karatasi, ngoma
materials_en: Baskets/bags, plastic bottles, paper, a drum
steps_sw:
1. Andaa eneo salama, wezeshi na jumuishi kwa ajili ya watoto kufanya mchezo wa "Timu za usafi".
2. Tawanya chupa na karatasi katika eneo la kuchezea.
3. Wagawe watoto katika timu mbili au tatu kulingana na idadi ya watoto darasani.
4. Weka kikapu/mfuko mmoja mbele ya kila timu umbali wa mita 10–15.
5. Onesha na eleza kuwa timu zitasimama katika mstari, mtoto mmoja mbele na wengine nyuma.
6. Kapu moja litatumika kuwekea chupa na lingine tutaweka karatasi. Timu A wataokota chupa na timu B wataokota karatasi.
7. Utapiga ngoma mara tatu, kisha mtoto wa kwanza kila timu atakimbia na kuokota kitu kimoja na kurudi ili mtoto mwingine akimbie.
8. Chunguza kama kila mtoto anatenda matendo ya kujali mzingira.

Tanbihi:
Shughuli hii itawezeshwa kwa vipindi vitatu kwa siku tofauti kwa kutumia zana pendekezwa na zingine zinazopatikana kwenye mazingira na kwa kutumia michezo mbalimbali
steps_en:
1. Prepare a safe, enabling and inclusive environment for children to play the "Cleanliness Teams" game.
2. Scatter bottles and paper around the play area.
3. Divide children into two or three teams according to the number of children in the class.
4. Place one basket/bag in front of each team at a distance of 10–15 metres.
5. Show and explain that the teams will stand in a line, one child at the front and others behind.
6. One basket will be used for placing bottles and another for paper. Team A will collect bottles and Team B will collect paper.
7. Beat the drum three times, then the first child of each team will run, pick up one item and return so that the next child can run.
8. Check whether each child is performing environmental care actions.

Note:
This activity will be facilitated in three sessions on different days using the recommended tools and others available in the environment and using various games.

subject: Kujenga Stadi za Kujitegemea
title_sw: Shughuli 4b: Kutenda matendo ya kujali mazingira
title_en: Activity 4b: Performing actions that care for the environment
about_sw: Kujitegemea, kujali mazingira, uwajibikaji, utunzaji wa mazingira, ujenzi wa misuli mikubwa na midogo, kufuata maelekezo rahisi, ushirikiano, umakini, tabia njema
about_en: Self-reliance, caring for the environment, responsibility, environmental stewardship, development of gross and fine motor muscles, following simple instructions, cooperation, carefulness, good habits
materials_sw: Mifagio, dekio, ndoo, maji
materials_en: Brooms, dustpan, bucket, water
steps_sw:
1. Andaa eneo salama, wezeshi na jumuishi kwa watoto kucheza mchezo wa "Kusafisha mazingira".
2. Wagawe watoto katika vikundi kulingana na idadi.
3. Kipatie kila kikundi vifaa vya kufanyia usafi. Kundi la kwanza litafagia nje, kundi la pili watadeki darasa na kundi la tatu watasafisha meza na vitu.
4. Wawezeshe watoto namna ya kusafisha mazingira.
5. Ruhusu waanze kufanya usafi. Tumia wimbo kuchagiza shughuli hiyo.
6. Chunguza kama mtoto anafanya usafi hatua kwa hatua.

Tanbihi: Shughuli hii itawezeshwa kwa vipindi vitatu kwa siku tofauti kwa kutumia zana pendekezwa na zingine zinazopatikana kwenye mazingira na kwa kutumia michezo na igizo dhima
steps_en:
1. Prepare a safe, facilitative and inclusive environment for children to play the game "Cleaning the environment".
2. Divide the children into groups according to number.
3. Give each group cleaning materials. The first group will sweep outside, the second group will mop the classroom, and the third group will clean the tables and objects.
4. Show the children how to clean the environment.
5. Allow them to begin cleaning. Use a song to motivate the activity.
6. Check whether the child is cleaning step by step.

Note: This activity can be facilitated in three sessions on different days using the recommended tools and others available in the environment and by using games and role play.

subject: Kujenga Stadi za Kujitegemea
title_sw: Shughuli 4c: Kutenda matendo ya kujali mazingira
title_en: Activity 4c: Performing actions that care for the environment
about_sw: Kujitegemea, kujali mazingira, uwajibikaji, utunzaji wa mazingira, ujenzi wa misuli mikubwa na midogo, kufuata maelekezo rahisi, ushirikiano, umakini, tabia njema
about_en: Self-reliance, caring for the environment, responsibility, environmental stewardship, development of gross and fine motor muscles, following simple instructions, cooperation, carefulness, good habits
materials_sw: Vitu mbalimbali vilivyoko katika mazingira, filimbi
materials_en: Various objects found in the environment, whistle
steps_sw:
1. Andaa eneo salama, jumuishi na wezeshi kwa ajili ya watoto kucheza mchezo wa "Kuokota takataka"
2. Rundika takataka katikati ya eneo la kuchezea. Weka sehemu tatu tofauti.
3. Weka ndoo za kukusanyia taka mbele ya kila rundo la takataka.
4. Wagawe watoto katika timu tatu zenye idadi sawa ya watoto.
5. Elekeza na onesha kuwa ukipuliza filimbi, mtoto wa kwanza kutoka kila timu atakimbia, atazoa takataka na kwenda kuziweka katika ndoo ya taka iliyoko mbele yake.
6. Mtoto huyo atarudi na kugonganisha mikono na anayefuata ili amruhusu naye kwenda kuzoa taka. Kisha ataenda na kusimama nyuma ya mtoto wa mwisho.
7. Chunguza kama kila mtoto ni makini kuangalia vitu katika mazingira.

Tanbihi:
• Bainisha watoto wenye mahitaji maalum ili uweze kuwashirikisha kadiri ya uhitaji wao
Shughuli hii itawezeshwa kwa vipindi vitatu kwa siku tofauti kwa kutumia zana pendekezwa na zingine zinazopatikana kwenye mazingira na kwa kutumia michezo mbalimbali.
steps_en:
1. Prepare a safe, inclusive and facilitative environment for children to play the game "Picking up litter".
2. Pile up rubbish in the middle of the play area. Place three different sections.
3. Place buckets for collecting rubbish in front of each pile of rubbish.
4. Divide the children into three teams with equal numbers of children.
5. Direct and show that when you blow the whistle, the first child from each team will run, pick up the rubbish, and go place it in the rubbish bucket in front of them.
6. That child will return and high-five the next child to allow them to go pick up rubbish. Then they will go and stand behind the last child.
7. Check whether each child is careful in observing objects in the environment.

Note:
• Identify children with special needs so that you can include them according to their needs.
This activity can be facilitated in three sessions on different days using the recommended tools and others available in the environment and by using various games.

subject: Kujenga Stadi za Kushirikiana
title_sw: Shughuli 1a: Kufanya kazi katika vikundi
title_en: Activity 1a: Working in groups
about_sw: Ushirikiano, kusikiliza, utambuzi, kufuata maelekezo, umakini, kujenga misuri mikubwa na midogo
about_en: Cooperation, listening, recognition/identification, following instructions, carefulness, development of gross and fine motor skills
materials_sw: Kadi zenye maumbo ya mraba, pembe tatu duara na Filimbi
materials_en: Cards with shapes of square, triangle, circle and a whistle
steps_sw:
1. Andaa eneo salama, wezeshi na jumuishi kwa watoto kucheza mchezo wa "maumbo"
2. Chora maumbo mbali mbali kwenye sakafu
3. Wapange watoto katika umbo la nusu duara ili waweze kukuona vizuri
4. Wawezeshe watoto namna ya kucheza mchezo, waambie "nitakapo puliza filimbi mtaangalia mkononi mwangu nimeshika umbo lipi, na kujipanga kwenye mchoro ulichorwa kwenye sakafu kulingana na maumbo niliyoshika mkononi
5. Waulize watoto maswali mbali mbali yanayohusu stadi za kushirikiana. Mfano: nani alikusaidia kutambua umbo?
6. Chunguza kama kila mtoto anaweza kutambua maumbo mbali mbali.

TANBIHI:
1. Bainisha Watoto wenye mahitaji maalum ili uweze kuwashirikisha kadiri ya uhitaji wao
2. Shughuli hii itawezeshwa kwa vipindi vitatu kwa siku tofauti kwa kutumia zana pendekezwa na zingine zinazopatikana kwenye mazingira na kwa kutumia michezo mbalimbali
steps_en:
1. Prepare a safe, facilitative and inclusive environment for children to play the game "shapes".
2. Draw various shapes on the floor.
3. Arrange the children in a semicircle so they can see you clearly.
4. Show the children how to play the game, telling them: "When I blow the whistle, look at what shape I am holding in my hand, and arrange yourselves on the drawing on the floor that matches the shape I am holding".
5. Ask the children various questions related to cooperation skills. For example: who helped you identify the shape?
6. Check whether each child can identify various shapes.

NOTE:
1. Identify children with special needs so that you can include them according to their needs.
2. This activity can be facilitated in three sessions on different days using the recommended tools and others available in the environment and by using various games.

subject: Kuhusiana: Miaka 4–5 / Kujenga Stadi za Kushirikiana
title_sw: Shughuli 3b: Kubaini kazi wanazozifanya kwa kushirikiana
title_en: Activity 3b: Identifying tasks they do cooperatively
about_sw: Stadi zitakazojengwa: Kushirikiana, kuwajibika, kuwasiliana, kufanya maamuzi
about_en: Skills to be developed: Cooperation, responsibility, communication, decision-making
materials_sw: Mifagio, ndoo, kizoleo, kifaa cha kuhifadhia takataka
materials_en: Brooms, buckets, dustpan, waste bin/rubbish container
steps_sw:
1. Andaa eneo salama, wezeshi na jumuishi la kufanya kazi kwa pamoja
2. Wapange watoto katika vikundi kulingana na idadi
3. Kila kikundi kipatie kazi ya kufanya, mfano:
   Kundi A: Kusafisha na kupanga viti katika mpangilio mzuri
   Kundi B: Kukusanya na kupanga vifaa vya michezo
   Kundi C: Kufagia eneo dogo
   Kundi D: Kupanga vitabu kwenye shubaka
4. Waambie watoto waende eneo lao la kazi. Wambie waanze kufanya kazi kwa kushirikiana
5. Zunguka kuangalia namna kazi inavyofanyika. Huku ukiwauliza maswali kuhusu hiyo kazi. Mfano: mnafanya kazi gani?
6. Chunguza kama kila mtoto anaweza kufanya kazi kwa kushirikiana.

Tanbihi:
1. Bainisha watoto wenye mahitaji maalum ili uweze kuwashirikisha kadiri ya uhitaji wao
2. Shughuli hii itawezeshwa kwa vipindi vitatu kwa siku tofauti. Kipindi kingine wanaweza kwenda shamba la kituo kufanya usafi
steps_en:
1. Prepare a safe, enabling and inclusive environment for working together
2. Arrange children in groups according to number
3. Give each group a task to do, for example:
   Group A: Clean and arrange chairs in a good order
   Group B: Collect and arrange play equipment
   Group C: Sweep a small area
   Group D: Arrange books on the shelf
4. Tell the children to go to their work area. Tell them to begin working cooperatively
5. Walk around to observe how the work is being done. Ask questions about the work, e.g. what work are you doing?
6. Check whether each child can work cooperatively.

Note:
1. Identify children with special needs so you can include them according to their needs
2. This activity will be carried out in three sessions on different days. In another session they can go to the centre's garden to do cleaning

subject: Afya na Mazingira: Miaka 4–5 / Kutunza Afya ya Mwili
title_sw: Shughuli 1: Kucheza mchezo wa kubainisha sehemu za mwili
title_en: Activity 1: Playing a game to identify body parts
about_sw: Stadi zitakazojengwa: Utambuzi na kutunza Afya ya Mwili.
about_en: Skills to be developed: Recognition and care of body health.
materials_sw: Chati, kadi, picha mnato, picha mjongeo, picha za sehemu za mwili kama sikio, macho, mikono, miguu, kichwa, pua, mdomo
materials_en: Charts, cards, still pictures, moving pictures, pictures of body parts such as ears, eyes, hands, legs, head, nose, mouth
steps_sw:
1. Andaa mazingira wezeshi ikiwa ni pamoja na maandalizi ya eneo na zana husika (chati, kadi, picha mnato na picha mjengeo) na vifanani vya sehemu ya mwili.
2. Elekeza watoto kuimba wimbo unaotambulisha sehemu za mwili na kazi zake
3. Onesha picha mnato, kadi / chati za picha, picha mjongeo ili mtoto aweze kutaja sehemu mbalimbali za mwili na, kubainisha sifa na matumizi ya sehemu za mwili.
4. Alika mtoto mmoja baada ya mwingine na umuonyeshe picha zenye sehemu za mwili ataje na kufafanua sifa na matumizi kwa lugha rahisi.
5. Tumia mchezo wa kusalimia sehemu za mwili ili kufanikisha utambuzi wa afya ya mwili kwa usahihi kwa mtoto.
6. Chunguza kama kila mtoto ameweza kutaja sehemu mbalimbali za mwili pamoja na kuainisha sifa na matumizi yake kwa usahihi.

Tanbihi:
1. Shughuli hii itawezeshwa kwa vipindi 6. Hakikisha katika vipindi vyote vinafanyika kwa kurudiarudia kwa njia tofauti kama kutaja, kucheza, kutofautisha kwanja ya nyimbo hadithi, maigizo na kuchora na kupaka rangi sehemu za mwili ili kufanikisha utambuzi wenye fanisi kwa mtoto
2. Kumbuka kubainisha watoto wenye mahitaji maalum ili uweze kuwashiriki kulingana na mahitaji yao
steps_en:
1. Prepare an enabling environment including preparation of the area and relevant tools (charts, cards, still pictures and moving pictures) and replicas of body parts.
2. Direct children to sing a song that introduces body parts and their functions
3. Show still pictures, picture cards/charts, moving pictures so the child can name various body parts and identify the characteristics and uses of body parts.
4. Invite one child after another and show them pictures of body parts to name and explain their characteristics and uses in simple language.
5. Use a body-parts greeting game to achieve accurate recognition of body health by the child.
6. Check whether each child has been able to name various body parts and identify their characteristics and uses correctly.

Note:
1. This activity will be carried out in 6 sessions. Ensure all sessions are done with repetition in different ways such as naming, playing, distinguishing through songs, stories, role-play and drawing and colouring body parts to achieve effective recognition by the child
2. Remember to identify children with special needs so you can involve them according to their needs

subject: Afya na Mazingira: Kutunza Afya ya Mwili
title_sw: Shughuli 2: Kubainisha kazi za sehemu za mwili
title_en: Activity 2: Identifying the functions of body parts
about_sw: Utambuzi wa sehemu za mwili na kazi zake.
about_en: Recognition of body parts and their functions.
materials_sw: Chati, kadi, picha mnato, picha mjongeo, picha za sehemu za mwili kama sikio, macho, mikono, miguu, kichwa, pua, mdomo pamoja vifanani vya sehemu za mwili.
materials_en: Charts, cards, printed pictures, moving pictures, pictures of body parts such as ears, eyes, hands, feet, head, nose, mouth, and replicas/models of body parts.
steps_sw:
1. Andaa mazingira wezeshi ikiwa ni pamoja na maandalizi ya eneo na zana husika (chati, kadi, picha mnato na picha mjengeo) na vifani vya sehemu ya mwili.
2. Waulize watoto wataje sehemu za mwili wanazozijua na kazi zake. Sikiliza majibu yao na wasaidie ikihitajika.
3. Watoto wachunguze kadi/chati, picha mnato, picha mjongeo zinazoonesha sehemu za mwili kisha mpe nafasi mtoto mmoja baada ya mwingine ataje sehemu mbalimbali za mwili na kubainisha kazi zake. Wasaidie wanapopata changamoto.
4. Watoto waimbe wimbo unaohusu sehemu za mwili, (hakikisha mtoto anaimba kwa kutaja na kuonyesha vitendo kugusa sehemu za mwili).
Habari gani kichwa,
tumbo na mgogo,
magoti na kifua moyo
una dundaaa, x5
5. Endelea na mchezo hadi watoto waweze kutaja na kueleza kazi za sehemu za mwili kwa usahihi
6. Chunguza kama kila mtoto ameweza kutaja sehemu mbalimbali za mwili pamoja na kuainisha kazi na matumizi yake.
Tanbihi
1. Kumbuka kubainisha watoto wenye mahitaji maalum ili uweze kuwasaidia kulingana na mahitaji yao
2. Shughuli hii itawezeshwa kwa vipindi 10
steps_en:
1. Prepare an enabling environment including area setup and relevant tools (charts, cards, printed pictures and moving pictures) and body part models.
2. Ask children to name body parts they know and their functions. Listen to their answers and assist where needed.
3. Children examine cards/charts, printed pictures, and moving pictures showing body parts, then give each child a turn after another to name different body parts and identify their functions. Help them when they face challenges.
4. Children sing a song about body parts (ensure the child sings by naming and showing actions of touching body parts).
How are you head,
stomach and back,
knees and chest heart
you are strong, x5
5. Continue with the game until children can name and explain the functions of body parts correctly.
6. Check whether each child has been able to name different body parts and identify their functions and uses.
Note:
1. Remember to identify children with special needs so you can assist them according to their needs.
2. This activity will be conducted in 10 sessions.

subject: Afya na Mazingira: Kutunza Afya ya Mwili
title_sw: Shughuli 3: Kusafisha kinywa
title_en: Activity 3: Cleaning the mouth
about_sw: Kudumisha usafi na afya, utambuzi, kujenga tabia na nidhamu ya usafi.
about_en: Maintaining cleanliness and health, recognition, building habits and discipline of hygiene.
materials_sw: Mswaki, dawa ya meno, maji safi na salama, picha mnato, picha mjongeo na kadi/chati za picha zinazoonesha tendo la kusafisha kinywa.
materials_en: Toothbrush, toothpaste, clean and safe water, printed pictures, moving pictures, and cards/charts with pictures showing the act of cleaning the mouth.
steps_sw:
1. Andaa vifaa tajwa hapo juu, wapange watoto kwenye mpangilio mzuri na kuweka mazingira yanye utulivu ili watoto waweze kukusikiliza vizuri na kwa umakini
2. Wapatie watoto vifaa vya kusafisha kinywa kama vile mswaki, dawa ya meno, maji
3. Wahusianishe vifaa halisi na vile vilivyopo kwenye chati, kadi, picha mnato/picha mjongeo zinazoonesha vifaa kusafisha kinywa.
4. Mpe nafasi mtoto mmoja baada ya mwingine kushirikisha uzoefu wake wa nyumbani katika tendo la usafi wa kinywa. (Je, huwa unasafisha kinywa? Muda gani? Nani huwa anakusaidia?
5. Onesha kwa vitendo huku watoto wakifuatisha namna ya kusafisha kinywa kwa kusugua meno (nje, ndani, juu na chini, sugua ulimi na fizi.)
6. Wape fursa watoto wa kufanya usafi wa kinywa wenyewe. Fuatilia kuona kila mtoto anafanya usafi wa kinywa na kutoa msaada unaohitajika.
Tanbihi
Kumbuka kubainisha watoto wenye mahitaji maalum ili uweze kuwashirikisha kulingana na mahitaji yao Shughuli hii itawezeshwa kwa vipindi 3
steps_en:
1. Prepare the materials mentioned above, arrange children in a good order and create a calm environment so children can listen carefully and attentively.
2. Give children mouth cleaning materials such as a toothbrush, toothpaste, and water.
3. Connect real materials with those shown on charts, cards, printed pictures/moving pictures showing mouth cleaning materials.
4. Give each child a turn after another to share their home experience in the act of mouth hygiene. (Do you brush your teeth? When? Who helps you?)
5. Demonstrate practically while children follow along how to clean the mouth by brushing teeth (outside, inside, up and down, brush the tongue and gums.)
6. Give children the opportunity to do their own mouth hygiene. Follow up to see each child doing mouth hygiene and provide needed assistance.
Note:
Remember to identify children with special needs so you can include them according to their needs. This activity will be conducted in 3 sessions.

subject: Afya na Mazingira: Kutunza Afya ya Mwili
title_sw: Shughuli 4: Usafi wa pua
title_en: Activity 4: Nose hygiene
about_sw: Utambuzi wa Afya ya mwili, kujenga tabia na nidhamu ya usafi.
about_en: Recognition of body health, building habits and discipline of hygiene.
materials_sw: Maji safi na salama, kitambaa (lesso), picha mnato, picha mjongeo na kadi/chati za picha zinazoonesha tendo la kusafisha pua.
materials_en: Clean and safe water, cloth (lesso/handkerchief), printed pictures, moving pictures, and cards/charts with pictures showing the act of cleaning the nose.
steps_sw:
1. Andaa vifaa tajwa hapo juu, wapange watoto kwenye mpangilio mzuri na kuweka mazingira rafiki ya ujifunzaji. Wapatie watoto vifaa vya kusafisha kinywa kama vile mswaki, dawa ya meno, maji
2. Wahusianishe vifaa halisi na vile vilivyopo kwenye chati, kadi, picha mnato/picha mjongeo zinazoonesha vifaa kusafisha pua.
3. Waulize watoto wataje wanachokiona ili kujua uelewa na uzoefu wao katika vifaa na tendo la kusafisha pua
4. Mpe nafasi mtoto mmoja baada ya mwingine kushirikisha uzoefu wake wa nyumbani katika tendo la usafi wa pua. (Je, huwa unasafisha pua? Muda gani? Nani huwa anakusaidia?
5. Onesha kwa vitendo huku watoto wakifuatisha namna ya kusafisha pua kwa kusafisha pua nje, ndani.
6. Wape fursa watoto wa kufanya usafi wa pua wenyewe. Fuatilia kuona kila mtoto anafanya usafi wa pua na kutoa msaada unaohitajika
Tanbihi
1. Kumbuka kubainisha watoto wenye mahitaji maalum ili uweze kuwashirikisha ipasavyo kulingana na mahitaji yao
2. Shughuli hii itawezeshwa kwa vipindi 4
steps_en:
1. Prepare the materials mentioned above, arrange children in a good order and create a friendly learning environment. Give children mouth cleaning materials such as a toothbrush, toothpaste, and water.
2. Connect real materials with those shown on charts, cards, printed pictures/moving pictures showing nose cleaning materials.
3. Ask children to name what they see in order to understand their knowledge and experience with the materials and act of cleaning the nose.
4. Give each child a turn after another to share their home experience in the act of nose hygiene. (Do you clean your nose? When? Who helps you?)
5. Demonstrate practically while children follow along how to clean the nose by cleaning the nose outside and inside.
6. Give children the opportunity to do their own nose hygiene. Follow up to see each child doing nose hygiene and provide needed assistance.
Note:
1. Remember to identify children with special needs so you can include them appropriately according to their needs.
2. This activity will be conducted in 4 sessions.

subject: Afya na Mazingira: Miaka 4–5 / Kutunza Afya ya Mwili
title_sw: Shughuli 5: Kuvaa nguo
title_en: Activity 5: Dressing / Putting on clothes
about_sw: Kudumisha usafi na afya ya mwili, utambuzi, kujenga tabia na nidhamu ya usafi, unadhifu na utanashati, pamoja na kuongeza msamiati
about_en: Maintaining bodily cleanliness and health, identification, building habits and discipline of cleanliness, neatness and good appearance, as well as expanding vocabulary
materials_sw: Aina mbalimbali za nguo kama shati, kaptula, blauzi, sketi, gauni, suruali
materials_en: Various types of clothing such as shirts, shorts, blouses, skirts, dresses, trousers
steps_sw:
1. Andaa vifaa tajwa hapo juu, wapange watoto kwenye mpangilio mzuri na kuweka mazingira rafiki ya ujifunzaji.
2. Watoto waimbe wimbo unaotaja nguo mbalimbali.
3. Wagawie Watoto nguo mbalimbali ulizoandaa kisha watoto wachambue kulingana na jinsi zao.
4. Katika vikundi wagawie mwanasesere na watoto wafanye zoezi la kumvalisha.
5. Pitia kila kikundi na kutoa msaada unaohitajika.
6. Mpe nafasi mtoto mmoja baada ya mwingine kwa ajili ya kuonesha namna ya kumvisha nguo mwanasesere hatua kwa hatua.
7. Fanya hivyo hadi watoto wote waweze kumvisha nguo mwanasesere.
8. Chunguza kama kila mtoto ameweza kuvisha nguo na wale ambao hawajaweza waelekeze.
Tanbihi:
1. Kumbuka kubainisha watoto wenye mahitaji maalum ili uweze kuwashirikisha ipasavyo kulingana na mahitaji yao.
2. Shughuli hii itawezeshwa kwa vipindi 6.
steps_en:
1. Prepare the materials listed above, arrange the children in a good order and create a friendly learning environment.
2. Children sing a song that names various types of clothing.
3. Distribute various types of clothing you have prepared to the children, then have them sort them according to gender.
4. In groups, give each group a doll and have the children practise dressing it.
5. Go around each group and provide any needed assistance.
6. Give each child a turn after the other to demonstrate how to dress the doll step by step.
7. Do this until all children are able to dress the doll.
8. Check whether each child has managed to dress the doll and guide those who have not.
Note:
1. Remember to identify children with special needs so you can include them appropriately according to their needs.
2. This activity will be delivered over 6 sessions.

subject: Afya na Mazingira: Miaka 4–5 / Kutambua Vyakula vya Aina Mbalimbali
title_sw: Shughuli 1: Kuimba nyimbo mbalimbali kuhusu vyakula
title_en: Activity 1: Singing various songs about food
about_sw: Utambuzi wa vyakula mbalimbali
about_en: Identification of various foods
materials_sw: Chati, kadi, picha mnato, picha mjongeo za vyakula mbalimbali na vifanani vya vyakula
materials_en: Charts, cards, printed pictures, animated/moving pictures of various foods, and food models/replicas
steps_sw:
1. Andaa mazingira wezeshi na zana husika (chati, kadi, picha mnato na picha za vyakula mbalimbali, vyakula na vifani vya vyakula mbalimbali).
2. Walize watoto wataje majina vyakula mbalimbali wanavyovijua. Sikiliza majibu yao na waoneshe vyakula mbalimbali kutumia picha, mnato, mjongeo chati kama (ugali, wali, makande, pilau).
3. Ongoza watoto kuimba wimbo unaohusu vyakula:
Afyaaa eeeh eeeh, afya ni kitu bora x2
Kula ugali nyama, afya ni kitu bora
Kula pilau kuku, afya ni kitu bora
Kula ndizi na embe, afya ni kitu bora
4. Alika mtoto mmoja baada ya mwingine kwa kuzingatia usawa wa kijinsia na ujumuishi aongoze wimbo unaohusu vyakula.
5. Endelea na wimbo hadi watoto waweze kuimba wimbo unaotaja vyakula.
6. Chunguza kama kila mtoto ameshiriki kutaja vyakula vya aina mbalimbali.
Tanbihi:
1. Shughuli hii itawezeshwa kwa vipindi 8. Tumia nyimbo mbalimbali zinazohusu vyakula ili kuwezesha ujifunza.
2. Kumbuka kuainisha watoto wenye mahitaji maalum ili uweze kuwashirikisha kulingana na mahitaji yao.
steps_en:
1. Prepare a supportive environment and relevant tools (charts, cards, printed pictures and pictures of various foods, actual foods and food models/replicas of various foods).
2. Ask children to name various foods they know. Listen to their answers and show them various foods using pictures, models, animated charts such as (ugali, rice, makande, pilau).
3. Lead the children to sing a song about food:
Afyaaa eeeh eeeh, health is the best thing x2
Eat ugali with meat, health is the best thing
Eat pilau with chicken, health is the best thing
Eat bananas and mangoes, health is the best thing
4. Invite one child after another, considering gender balance and inclusion, to lead the song about food.
5. Continue with the song until all children can sing the song naming foods.
6. Check whether each child has participated in naming various types of food.
Note:
1. This activity will be delivered over 8 sessions. Use various songs about food to facilitate learning.
2. Remember to identify children with special needs so you can include them according to their needs.

subject: Afya na Mazingira: Miaka 4–5 / Kutambua Vyakula vya Aina Mbalimbali
title_sw: Shughuli 2: Kubainisha vyakula vya aina mbalimbali
title_en: Activity 2: Identifying various types of food
about_sw: Utambuzi wa vyakula mbalimbali, umakini, kufuata maelekezo
about_en: Identification of various foods, attentiveness, following instructions
materials_sw: Chati, kadi, picha mnato, picha mjongeo wa vyakula mbalimbali na vifanani vya vyakula
materials_en: Charts, cards, printed pictures, animated/moving pictures of various foods, and food models/replicas
steps_sw:
1. Andaa mazingira wezeshi ikiwa ni pamoja na maandalizi ya eneo na vifaa husika (chati, kadi, picha mnato na picha mjongeo za vyakula mbalimbali, vyakula halisi na vifani vya vyakula mbalimbali).
2. Onesha vyakula mbalimbali kutumia picha mnato, picha mjongeo, chati au kadi za picha kama (ugali, wali, makande, pilau) na wape nafasi watoto wataje wanachokiona. Sikiliza majibu yao na wasaidie wanapopata changamoto.
3. Onesha jinsi ya kuchambua na kupanga picha za vyakula kwa kuhusianisha na vyakula halisi mbalimbali kwa kuchukua kadi yenye picha ya chakula kimojawapo na kuiweka kwenye picha ya chakula kinachofanana kwenye chati.
4. Wagawe watoto kwenye makundi ya watoto na wapatie chati (yenye aina za vyakula) na kadi zenye picha za vyakula kulingana na picha zilizoko kwenye chati.
5. Mpe nafasi mtoto mmoja baada ya mwingine kwenye makundi kuchukua kadi zenye picha na kupanga kwenye picha fanani zilizoko kwenye chati.
6. Mpe nafasi mtoto mmoja baada ya mwingine kuhusianisha picha za vyakula na vitu halisi.
7. Endelea na mchezo hadi watoto wote waweze kuchambua na kupanga picha kwa usahihi.
8. Chunguza kama kila mtoto ameweza kuchambua na kupanga picha mbalimbali za vyakula kwa usahihi.
Tanbihi:
1. Kumbuka kuainisha watoto wenye mahitaji maalum ili uweze kuwashirikisha kulingana na mahitaji yao.
2. Shughuli hii itawezeshwa kwa vipindi vitatu.
steps_en:
1. Prepare a supportive environment including area setup and relevant materials (charts, cards, printed pictures and animated/moving pictures of various foods, real foods and food models/replicas of various foods).
2. Show various foods using printed pictures, animated pictures, charts or picture cards such as (ugali, rice, makande, pilau) and give children the opportunity to name what they see. Listen to their answers and assist them when they face challenges.
3. Demonstrate how to sort and arrange pictures of foods by matching them to various real foods by taking a card with a picture of one food and placing it on the picture of the matching food on the chart.
4. Divide the children into groups and give them charts (showing types of food) and cards with pictures of foods matching the pictures on the chart.
5. Give each child a turn within groups to pick up cards with pictures and arrange them on the matching pictures on the chart.
6. Give each child a turn to match pictures of foods with real items.
7. Continue the activity until all children are able to sort and arrange pictures correctly.
8. Check whether each child has been able to sort and arrange various food pictures correctly.
Note:
1. Remember to identify children with special needs so you can include them according to their needs.
2. This activity will be delivered over three sessions.

subject: Afya na Mazingira: Miaka 4–5 | Kutambua Vyakula vya Aina Mbalimbali
title_sw: Shughuli 3: Kuchora picha za vyakula mbalimbali
title_en: Activity 3: Drawing pictures of various foods
about_sw: Ubunifu, utambuzi wa vyakula mbalimbali, umakini
about_en: Creativity, recognition of various foods, attentiveness
materials_sw: Chati, kadi, picha mnato, picha mjongeo za vyakula mbalimbali na vifanani vya vyakula, karatasi, penseli, rangi, vichongeo, vifutio
materials_en: Charts, cards, printed pictures, sequential/illustrated pictures of various foods and food models, paper, pencils, colours, sharpeners, erasers
steps_sw:
1. Andaa mazingira wezeshi ikiwa ni pamoja na maandalizi ya eneo na zana husika (chati, kadi, picha mnato na picha za vyakula mbalimbali, vyakula na vifani vya vyakula mbalimbali)
2. Waoneshe watoto picha za vyakula mbalimbali au vifanani vya vyakula au vyakula halisi kisha waulize watoto kutaja majina ya vyakula hivyo. Sikiliza majibu yao na wasaidie inapohitajika.
3. Wagawe watoto kwenye makundi, wapatie karatasi, penseli, rangi, vifutio na vichongeo, kila mtoto achore picha ya chakula anachopenda. Chunguza kila kundi kubaini kama kila mtoto anashiriki na toa msaada unaohitajika.
4. Mpe nafasi mtoto mmoja baada ya mwingine aoneshe na ataje jina la chakula alichokichora.
5. Hitimisha kwa kuwapongeza watoto na hifadhi kazi zao kwa ajili ya ujifunzaji zaidi.
6. Chunguza kama kila mtoto anachora na umsaidie anapopata changamoto
Tanbihi:
1. Shughuli hii itawezeshwa kwa vipindi 7. Watoto wachore picha za vyakula tofauti kwa kila kipindi.
2. Kumbuka kuwabainisha watoto wenye mahitaji maalum ili uweze kuwashirikisha kulingana na mahitaji yao
steps_en:
1. Prepare a supportive environment including area setup and relevant tools (charts, cards, printed pictures and pictures of various foods, foods and food models of various kinds).
2. Show children pictures of various foods, food models, or real foods, then ask children to name those foods. Listen to their answers and assist when needed.
3. Divide children into groups, give them paper, pencils, colours, erasers and sharpeners; each child draws a picture of a food they like. Check each group to confirm every child is participating and provide needed support.
4. Give each child a turn to show and name the food they drew.
5. Conclude by praising children and keeping their work for further learning.
6. Check that each child is drawing and assist when they encounter difficulty.
Notes:
1. This activity will be conducted over 7 sessions. Children draw pictures of different foods each session.
2. Remember to identify children with special needs so you can include them according to their needs.

subject: Afya na Mazingira: Miaka 4–5 | Kutambua Vyakula vya Aina Mbalimbali
title_sw: Shughuli 4: Kubainisha aina mbalimbali za matunda
title_en: Activity 4: Identifying various types of fruits
about_sw: Utambuzi wa aina mbalimabali za matunda, kufananisha na kutofautisha matunda kukuza ufahamu na utambuzi.
about_en: Recognition of various types of fruits, comparing and differentiating fruits to develop understanding and identification skills.
materials_sw: Chati, kadi, picha mnato, picha mjongeo matunda halisi na vifanani vya matunda
materials_en: Charts, cards, printed pictures, sequential/illustrated pictures, real fruits and fruit models
steps_sw:
1. Andaa mazingira wezeshi ikiwa ni pamoja na maandalizi ya eneo na vifaa tajwa hapo juu.
2. Waulize watoto wataje matunda wanayoyafahamu ili kubaini uelewa wao. Sikiliza majibu yao na uwasaidie wanapopata changamoto.
3. Elekeza watoto waoneshe picha za matunda kwa kutumia chati, kadi, matunda halisi, picha mnato mjongeo kama chungwa, embe, ndizi, pera, na nanasi.
4. Onesha kwa vitendo; changanya kadi za picha za matunda (aina 5 za matunda na kila aina kadi 2) kisha zichambue kwa kuweka pamoja kadi za matunda yanayofanana.
5. Wagawe watoto kwenye makundi, wapatie kadi za picha za matunda mbalimbali zilizochanganywa ili wachambue na kupanga picha za matunda yanayofanana.
6. Endelea na mchezo hadi watoto wote waweze kuchambua na kupanga matunda.
7. Chunguza kama kila mtoto ameweza kuchambua matunda.
Tanbihi:
1. Kumbuka kuainisha watoto wenye mahitaji maalum ili uweze kuwashirikisha kulingana na mahitaji yao.
2. Shughuli hii itawezeshwa kwa vipindi 8.
steps_en:
1. Prepare a supportive environment including area setup and the materials listed above.
2. Ask children to name fruits they know to assess their understanding. Listen to their answers and assist when they encounter difficulty.
3. Guide children to show pictures of fruits using charts, cards, real fruits, printed sequential pictures such as orange, mango, banana, pear, and pineapple.
4. Demonstrate practically: mix picture cards of fruits (5 types of fruits, 2 cards each) then sort them by grouping cards of similar fruits together.
5. Divide children into groups, give them mixed picture cards of various fruits so they can sort and arrange pictures of similar fruits together.
6. Continue the game until all children can sort and arrange fruits.
7. Check whether each child has been able to sort fruits.
Notes:
1. Remember to identify children with special needs so you can include them according to their needs.
2. This activity will be conducted over 8 sessions.

subject: Afya na Mazingira: Miaka 4–5 | Kutambua Vyakula vya Aina Mbalimbali
title_sw: Shughuli 5: Kubainisha ndege wanaoliwa na wasioliwa
title_en: Activity 5: Identifying birds that are eaten and those that are not eaten
about_sw: Ubunifu wa kuchora na utambuzi wa aina mbalimbali za ndege.
about_en: Drawing creativity and recognition of various types of birds.
materials_sw: Chati, kadi, picha mnato, picha mjongeo wa ndege mbalimbali, vifanani vya ndege, penseli, rangi, vifutio, vichongeo, karatasi
materials_en: Charts, cards, printed pictures, sequential/illustrated pictures of various birds, bird models, pencils, colours, erasers, sharpeners, paper
steps_sw:
1. Andaa mazingira wezeshi na zana husika (chati, kadi, picha mnato na picha kwaajili yakuwawezesha watoto kuchora aina za ndege mbalimbali wanaoliwa na wasioliwa, ndege halisi na vifani vya ndege mbalimbali)
2. Waulize watoto wataje ndege wanaowajua. Sikiliza majibu yao
3. Onesha picha mbalimbali za ndege wanaoliwa na wasioliwa kwa kutumia picha mnato, picha mjongeo mfano njiwa, kuku, bata, kunguru, bundi na mwewe
4. Wagawe watoto kwenye makundi, wapatie watoto picha mbalimbali za ndege kisha wagawe katika makundi mawili; yaani majina ya ndege wanaoliwa na wale wasioliwa.
5. Mpe nafasi mtoto mmoja baada ya mwingine kuonesha kundi la ndege wanaoliwa na wasioliwa.
6. Chunguza kubaini kama kila mtoto ameweza kuchora.
Tanbihi:
1. Kumbuka kuwabainisha watoto wenye mahitaji maalum ili uweze kuwashirikisha kulingana na mahitaji yao
2. Shughuli hii itawezeshwa kwa vipindi 7
steps_en:
1. Prepare a supportive environment and relevant tools (charts, cards, printed pictures and pictures to enable children to draw various types of edible and inedible birds, real birds and various bird models).
2. Ask children to name birds they know. Listen to their answers.
3. Show various pictures of edible and inedible birds using printed pictures, sequential pictures for example dove, chicken, duck, crow, owl and hawk.
4. Divide children into groups, give children various bird pictures then divide them into two groups: names of birds that are eaten and those that are not eaten.
5. Give each child a turn to show the group of edible birds and inedible birds.
6. Check to determine whether each child has been able to draw.
Notes:
1. Remember to identify children with special needs so you can include them according to their needs.
2. This activity will be conducted over 7 sessions.

subject: Afya na Mazingira: Miaka 4 – 5 | Kutambua Vyakula vya Aina Mbalimbali
title_sw: Shughuli 6: Kutaja vyakula mbalimbali na vyakula vinavyoharibu meno
title_en: Activity 6: Naming different foods and foods that harm teeth
about_sw: Utambuzi wa vyakula mbalimbali na vinavyoharibu meno, kukuza lugha.
about_en: Recognition of various foods and those that harm teeth, language development.
materials_sw: Vyakula halisi, chati, kadi, picha mnato, picha mjongeo za vyakula vinavyotakiwa kuliwa kwa wingi (wali, ugali, mboga za majani, matunda) na vyakula visivyotakiwa kuliwa kwa wingi kama (chipsi, tambi, juisi za viwandani, peremende, chokleti, biskuti)
materials_en: Real foods, charts, cards, printed pictures, animated pictures of foods recommended to eat in large quantities (rice, ugali, leafy vegetables, fruits) and foods not recommended to eat in large quantities such as (chips, noodles, packaged juices, sweets, chocolate, biscuits)
steps_sw:
1. Andaa mazingira wezeshi ikiwa ni pamoja na maandalizi ya eneo na vifaa husika (vyakula halisi, chati, kadi, picha mnato na picha za vyakula mbalimbali).
2. Waulize watoto wataje vyakula ambavyo huwa wanakula.
3. Changanya vyakula vya aina mbalimbali kisha waelekeze watoto kuonesha vyakula vinavyoharibu meno (wali, ugali, mboga za majani, matunda) na visivyoharibu meno (juisi za viwandani, peremende, chokleti, biskuti) kwa kutumia chati, kadi, picha mnato, picha mjongeo.
4. Waalike watoto kutaja majina ya vyakula hivyo kisha wafafanulie kwa kueleza faida ya vyakula mbalimbali na madhara ya vyakula ya baadhi ya vyakula hivyo.
5. Wape nafasi watoto kucheza mchezo wa vyakula vinavyotakiwa kuliwa kwa wingi na visivyotakiwa kuliwa kwa wingi. Eleza kuwa nikitaja jina la chakula kinachotakiwa kuliwa kwa wingi utaruka juu na kusema 'ninakula' na nikitaja jina la chakula kisichatakiwa kuliwa kwa wingi utakaa kimya na hutakiwi kuruka.
6. Chunguza kila mtoto kama ameweza kutofautisha vyakula vinavyotakiwa kuliwa kwa wingi na visivyotakiwa kuliwa kwa wingi.

Tanbihi:
1. Kumbuka kuwabainisha watoto wenye mahitaji maalum ili uweze kuwashirikisha kulingana na mahitaji yao
2. Shughuli hii itawezeshwa kwa vipindi
steps_en:
1. Prepare an enabling environment including arrangement of the area and relevant materials (real foods, charts, cards, printed pictures and pictures of various foods).
2. Ask children to name the foods they usually eat.
3. Mix various types of foods then guide children to identify foods that harm teeth (rice, ugali, leafy vegetables, fruits) and those that do not harm teeth (packaged juices, sweets, chocolate, biscuits) using charts, cards, printed pictures, animated pictures.
4. Invite children to name those foods then explain the benefits of various foods and the harms of some of those foods.
5. Give children an opportunity to play a game of foods recommended to eat in large quantities and those not recommended. Explain that when I name a food recommended to eat in large quantities you jump up and say 'I am eating' and when I name a food not recommended to eat in large quantities you stay quiet and must not jump.
6. Check each child to see if they can distinguish foods recommended to eat in large quantities from those not recommended.

Note:
1. Remember to identify children with special needs so you can include them according to their needs
2. This activity will be delivered in sessions

subject: Afya na Mazingira: Miaka 4 – 5 | Kutambua Mazingira Katika Jamii Yake
title_sw: Shughuli 1: Kuchunguza vitu mbalimbali vinavyopatikana kwenye mazingira
title_en: Activity 1: Exploring various things found in the environment
about_sw: Utambuzi wa vitu mbalimbali vinavyopatikana kwenye mazingira.
about_en: Recognition of various things found in the environment.
materials_sw: Chati, kadi, picha mnato, picha mjongeo ya vitu mbalimbali na vifani vya vitu mbalimbali (rangi, penseli, karatasi, vichongeo, vifutio)
materials_en: Charts, cards, printed pictures, animated pictures of various things and replicas/models of various things (colours, pencils, paper, sharpeners, erasers)
steps_sw:
