1. Andaa mazingira wezeshi ya eneo na zana husika (chati, kadi, picha mnato na picha za vitu mbalimbali, krayon, penseli, penseli za rangi, rangi za maji, karatasi)
2. Waulize watoto wataje vitu wanavyoijua vinavyopatikana kwenye mazingira yao. Sikiliza majibu yao na fafanua kwa kuwaonesha picha mbalimbali za vitu mbalimbali vinavyopatikana kwenye mazingira yao kwa kutumia kadi, chati, picha mnato, picha mjongeo mfano miti, wanyama, ndege, nyumba, vyombo vya usafiri
3. Wagawe watoto kwenye makundi kisha, wapatie watoto vifaa (penseli, rangi, vifutio, vichongeo na karatasi) wachore picha za vitu wanavyovifahamu kulingana na vionjo vyako.
4. Mpe nafasi mtoto mmoja baada ya mwingine aoneshe na ataje jina la kitu alichokiona na kukichora.
5. Hitimisha kwa kuwapongeza watoto na kuzibandika ukutani/kuzihifadhi kazi zao kwa ajili ya ujifunzaji.
6. Chunguza kubaini kama kila mtoto ameweza kuchora na kupaka rangi vitu mbalimbali.

Tanbihi:
1. Kumbuka kuainisha watoto wenye mahitaji maalum ili uweze kuwashirikisha kulingana na mahitaji yao
2. Shughuli hii itawezeshwa kwa vipindi 6
steps_en:
1. Prepare an enabling environment of the area and relevant tools (charts, cards, printed pictures and pictures of various things, crayons, pencils, coloured pencils, watercolours, paper)
2. Ask children to name things they know that are found in their environment. Listen to their answers and clarify by showing them various pictures of different things found in their environment using cards, charts, printed pictures, animated pictures for example trees, animals, birds, houses, means of transport
3. Divide children into groups then give children materials (pencils, colours, erasers, sharpeners and paper) to draw pictures of things they know according to their experiences.
4. Give each child an opportunity one after another to show and name the thing they saw and drew.
5. Conclude by praising children and posting/saving their work on the wall for learning purposes.
6. Check to establish if each child was able to draw and colour various things.

Note:
1. Remember to identify children with special needs so you can include them according to their needs
2. This activity will be delivered in 6 sessions

subject: Afya na Mazingira: Miaka 4 – 5 | Kutambua Mazingira Katika Jamii Yake
title_sw: Shughuli 2: Kutambua vitendo hatarishi katika mazingira
title_en: Activity 2: Identifying dangerous actions in the environment
about_sw: Utambuzi wa kutunza na kujali mazingira.
about_en: Recognition of caring for and looking after the environment.
materials_sw: Chati, kadi, picha mnato, picha mjongeo zinazoonesha uharibifu wa mazingira (miti iliyokatwa, taka zilizotupwa ovyo, kujisaidia sehemu isiyotakiwa), kifanani cha jukwaa na maiki
materials_en: Charts, cards, printed pictures, animated pictures showing environmental damage (cut trees, carelessly disposed rubbish, relieving oneself in an inappropriate place), a model/replica of a stage and a microphone
steps_sw:
1. Andaa mazingira wezeshi ikiwa ni pamoja na maandalizi ya eneo na vifaa tajwa hapo juu
2. Waoneshe watoto picha za mazingira yaliyoharibiwa kisha waulize waseme walichokiona. Sikiliza majibu yao na wasaidie wanaopata changamoto.
3. Alika mtoto mmoja baada ya mwingine aigize kama kiongozi akiwaasa wananchi (watoto wenzie) juu ya kutunza mazingira. Kiongozi asimame kwenye jukwaa, ashike maiki na kuzungumza na wananchi 'msikate miti, kuzoa mchanga barabarani, kujisaidia kwenye vyanzao vya maji na kutupa taka ovyo kwani vina madhara kwa afya zetu'.
4. Hitimisha kwa kuwapongeza watoto na kuwaambia wakawaambie watoto wenzo nyumbani ili wasiwe wanaharibu mazingira
5. Chunguza ili kubaini kama kila mtoto ameweza kutambua vitendo vinavyoharibu mazingira

Tanbihi:
1. Kumbuka kuainisha watoto wenye mahitaji maalum ili uweze kuwashirikisha kulingana na mahitaji yao
2. Shughuli hii itawezeshwa katika vipindi 8
steps_en:
1. Prepare an enabling environment including arrangement of the area and materials mentioned above
2. Show children pictures of damaged environments then ask them to say what they saw. Listen to their answers and help those who are struggling.
3. Invite one child after another to role-play as a leader advising citizens (fellow children) about caring for the environment. The leader stands on the stage, holds the microphone and speaks to citizens 'do not cut trees, sweep sand off the road, relieve yourselves near water sources and throw rubbish carelessly as these are harmful to our health'.
4. Conclude by praising children and telling them to go and tell fellow children at home so they do not destroy the environment
5. Check to establish if each child was able to identify actions that harm the environment

Note:
1. Remember to identify children with special needs so you can include them according to their needs
2. This activity will be delivered in 8 sessions

subject: Afya na Mazingira: Miaka 4–5 | Kutambua Mazingira Katika Jamii Yake
title_sw: Shughuli 3: Kuzingatia usalama katika mazingira
title_en: Activity 3: Observing safety in the environment
about_sw: Utambuzi wa kuzingatia usalama, kufuata maelekezo.
about_en: Recognition of safety awareness, following instructions.
materials_sw: Chati, kadi, picha mnato, picha mjongeo za alama za barabarani, vitu hatari (kisu, chupa zilizovunjika, misumari), mazingira hatarishi (mvua, ndimbwi la maji, baa.)
materials_en: Charts, cards, printed pictures, animated pictures of road signs, dangerous objects (knife, broken bottles, nails), dangerous environments (rain, puddles of water, mud.)
steps_sw:
1. Andaa mazingira wezeshi ya eneo na vifaa tajwa hapo juu
2. Waoneshe watoto picha za alama za barabarani, vitu hatari (kisu, chupa zilizovunjika, misumari), mazingira hatarishi (mvua, ndimbwi la maji, baa, danguro). Sikiliza majibu yao na wafafanulie kwa kutaja majina na madhara yake (moto – unaunguza, mvua – baridi, usipopita kwenye alama zebra utagongwa na gari)
3. Weka chini kadi zenye picha za vitu hatari, mazingira hatarishi na alama za barabarani kwa umbali hatua nne/tano.
4. Wagawe watoto kwenye makundi kisha, kila kundi lipite kwa uelekeo wa kadi, wafikapo kwenye kadi yenye picha mfano 'moto/alama ya barabarani' watataja jina la kitu hicho na kusema madhara/kazi yake yake (moto unaunguza, alama ya zebra tuvuke barabara) na kukwepa/kuvuka ili wasidhurike/wasigongwe na gari.
5. Endelea na mchezo hadi watoto wote waweze kutambua vitu hatari na namna ya kuchukua tahadhari.
6. Chunguza kama kila mtoto anaweza kueleza mambo ya kuzingatia kuhusu usalama katika mazingira

Tanbihi
1. Kumbuka kuainisha watoto wenye mahitaji maalum ili uweze kuwashirikisha kulingana na mahitaji yao
2. Shughuli hii itawezeshwa katika vipindi 5
steps_en:
1. Prepare a facilitative environment with the materials listed above.
2. Show children pictures of road signs, dangerous objects (knife, broken bottles, nails), dangerous environments (rain, puddles, mud, danger). Listen to their responses and explain by naming items and their effects (fire – burns you, rain – cold, do not cross where there is no zebra crossing or you will be hit by a car).
3. Place cards with pictures of dangerous objects, dangerous environments and road signs at a distance of four/five steps away.
4. Divide children into groups, then each group moves in the direction of the cards; when they reach a card with a picture such as 'fire/road sign' they will name the object and say its danger/function (fire burns, zebra crossing means we cross the road) and dodge/cross so they are not hurt/hit by a car.
5. Continue the game until all children can identify dangerous objects and how to take precautions.
6. Check whether each child can explain things to observe regarding safety in the environment.

Note
1. Remember to identify children with special needs so you can include them according to their needs.
2. This activity will be facilitated in 5 sessions.

subject: Afya na Mazingira: Miaka 4–5 | Kutambua Mazingira Katika Jamii Yake
title_sw: Shughuli 4: Utambuzi wa maeneo muhimu ya kijamii.
title_en: Activity 4: Identification of important community places.
about_sw: Kubainisha maeneo muhimu ya kijamii yanayopatikana kwenye mazingira kueleza shughuli, vitu na watu wanaopatikana maeneo hayo.
about_en: Identifying important community places found in the environment by describing the activities, objects and people found in those places.
materials_sw: Chati, kadi, picha mnato, picha mjongeo za vitu mbalimbali kama msikiti, kanisa, soko, makumbusho ya kihistoria, kiwanja cha ndege na mpira, shule, hospitali, kituo cha polisi, kambi ya jeshi, ofisi ya serikali, stendi ya mabasi, treni, na maeneo mengine muhimu ya kijamii
materials_en: Charts, cards, printed pictures, animated pictures of various things such as a mosque, church, market, historical museum, airport and stadium, school, hospital, police station, military camp, government office, bus stand, train, and other important community places.
steps_sw:
1. Andaa mazingira wezeshi ikiwa ni pamoja na maandalizi ya eneo na vifaa tajwa hapo juu.
2. Waulize watoto kama wamewahi kutembelea maeneo kama vile soko, kanisa, msikiti, shule, uwanja wa mpira, hospitali, kiwanja cha ndege na waseme waliona vitu na watu gani huko.
3. Wagawie watoto picha ya soko, kanisa, msikiti, shule, uwanja wa mpira, hospitali, kiwanja cha ndege wataje vitu/watu wanaopatikana kwenye maeneo hayo.
4. Watoto waimbe wimbo wa kutaja vitu, watu na shughuli zinazofanyika kwenye maeneo hayo.
5. Tengeneza mfano wa soko darasani kwa kuweka bidhaa na waalike watoto waigize kama wauzaji na wengine wateje.
6. Endelea na mchezo hadi watoto wote wajue watu na vitu vinavypatkana kwenye maeneo mbalimbali kwenye mazingira yao.
7. Chunguza kubaini kama kila mtoto ameweza kutaja vitu, watu na shughuli zinazofanyika kwenye maeneo muhimu ya kijami yanayopatikaka kwenye mazingira yake

Tanbihi
1. Shughuli hii itawezeshwa kwa vipindi vitano, tumia maeneo tofauti kila kipindi.
2. Kumbuka kubainisha watoto wenye mahitaji maalum ili uweze kuwashirikisha kulingana na mahitaji yao
steps_en:
1. Prepare a facilitative environment including arrangement of the space and the materials listed above.
2. Ask children whether they have ever visited places such as the market, church, mosque, school, stadium, hospital, airport and let them say what things and people they saw there.
3. Give children pictures of the market, church, mosque, school, stadium, hospital, airport and ask them to name things/people found in those places.
4. Children sing a song naming objects, people and activities that take place in those places.
5. Create a model market in the classroom by placing goods and invite children to role-play as sellers while others act as buyers.
6. Continue the game until all children know the people and objects found in various places in their environment.
7. Assess whether each child has been able to name objects, people and activities that take place in important community places found in their environment.

Note
1. This activity will be facilitated in five sessions, use different places each session.
2. Remember to identify children with special needs so you can include them according to their needs.

subject: Afya na Mazingira: Miaka 4–5 | Kutambua Mazingira Katika Jamii Yake
title_sw: Shughuli 5: Kutambua viumbe hai na visisvyo hai.
title_en: Activity 5: Identifying living and non-living things.
about_sw: Utambuzi wa viumbe hai na visivyo hai
about_en: Recognition of living and non-living things.
materials_sw: Chati, kadi, picha mnato, picha mjongeo za viumbe hai (miti, maua, wanyama) na visivyo hai (mawe, meza, kiti)
materials_en: Charts, cards, printed pictures, animated pictures of living things (trees, flowers, animals) and non-living things (stones, table, chair).
steps_sw:
1. Andaa mazingira wezeshi ikiwa ni pamoja na maandalizi ya eneo na zana husika (chati, kadi, picha mnato na picha mjongeo)
2. Waelekeze watoto kuchunguza vitu vinavyopatikana ndani na nje ya chumba cha kujifunza.
3. Alika mtoto mmoja baada ya mwingine ataje vitu alivyoviona. Wasaidie watoto wanaopata changamoto.
4. Wagawie picha au vitu halisi ulivyoandaa na kisha uliza maswali yanayotofautisha kuwa kitu kilichotajwa ni hai au si hai (mfano jiwe linaweza kutembea au mbwa anaweza kutembea).
5. Baada ya maswali hayo watoto wacheze mchezo wa kutaja viumbe hai na visivyo hai; mfano watoto kutingisha milli yao kama mlezi/mwalimu ametaja kiumbe kilicho hai au kutulia bila kutingishika kama kiumbe kilichotajwa si hai.
6. Hakikisha kwamba unatumia lugha nyepesi ili watoto waweze kuelewa mchezo kulingana na uelewa wao.
7. Endelea na mchezo hadi watoto wote waweze kutambua viumbe hai na visivyo hai.
8. Chunguza kama kila mtoto ameweza kutambua viumbe hai na vitu visivyo na uhai.

Tanbihi
1. Kumbuka kubainisha watoto wenye mahitaji maalum ili uweze kuwashirikisha kulingana na mahitaji yao
2. Shughuli hii itawezeshwa katika vipindi 8
steps_en:
1. Prepare a facilitative environment including arrangement of the space and relevant tools (charts, cards, printed pictures and animated pictures).
2. Direct children to explore objects found inside and outside the learning room.
3. Invite one child after another to name things they have seen. Help children who face challenges.
4. Give them pictures or real objects you have prepared and then ask questions that differentiate whether the named object is living or non-living (for example, can a stone walk or can a dog walk?).
5. After those questions, children play a game of naming living and non-living things; for example children shake their bodies when the caregiver/teacher names a living thing or stay still without moving when the named thing is non-living.
6. Make sure you use simple language so that children can understand the game according to their level of understanding.
7. Continue the game until all children can identify living things and non-living things.
8. Check whether each child has been able to identify living things and non-living objects.

Note
1. Remember to identify children with special needs so you can include them according to their needs.
2. This activity will be facilitated in 8 sessions.

subject: Stadi za Kihisabati, Sayansi na Tehama: Miaka 4–5 / Kutumia Mazingira Kujenga Dhana za Kihisabati
title_sw: Shughuli 8: Kuhesabu Namba (1-10)
title_en: Activity 8: Counting Numbers (1–10)
about_sw: Kuhesabu namba kwa mfuatano (1-10), kuongeza msamiati ya kihisabati, kuimarisha kumbukumbu
about_en: Counting numbers in sequence (1–10), expanding mathematical vocabulary, strengthening memory
materials_sw: Picha/kadi/chati za namba (1-10) na video iliyorekodiwa ya namba (1-10)
materials_en: Pictures/cards/charts of numbers (1–10) and a pre-recorded video of numbers (1–10)
steps_sw:
1. Andaa eneo salama, wezeshi na jumuishi kwa watoto kukaa/kusimama (mduara, nusu duara, au umbo la U) kulingana na mazingira. Zingatia watoto wenye mahitaji maalum
2. Anza kwa kuimba wimbo wa kutaja namba 1-10. Tumia wimbo wa kuhesabu namba wanaoufahamu
3. Onesha kadi/picha za namba (1-10) wakati wanaimba wimbo wa kuhesabu namba
4. Hitimisha kwa kuwaruhusu watoto kuhesabu namba 1-10 kwa kutumia vidole vyao
5. Chunguza kama mtoto anaweza kutaja namba (1-10)

TANBIHI: Shughuli hii itawezeshwa kwa vipindi vitatu kwa siku tofauti kwa kutumia zana na vifaa pendekezwa pamoja na vile vinavyopatikana kwenye mazingira. Shughuli zinazofuata wanaweza kutumia chupa za plastiki, magunzi, vijiti. Pia mbinu ya michezo na nyimbo ni muhimu Za
steps_en:
1. Prepare a safe, facilitative and inclusive space for children to sit/stand (circle, semi-circle, or U-shape) according to the environment. Consider children with special needs.
2. Begin by singing a song naming numbers 1–10. Use a counting song they are familiar with.
3. Show number cards/pictures (1–10) while singing the counting song.
4. Conclude by allowing children to count numbers 1–10 using their fingers.
5. Check whether each child can name the numbers (1–10).

NOTE: This activity will be facilitated in three sessions on different days using the recommended tools and materials together with those available in the environment. Subsequent activities can use plastic bottles, cones, sticks. Play and song methods are also very important.

subject: Stadi za Kihisabati, Sayansi na Tehama: Miaka 4–5 / Kutumia Mazingira Kujenga Dhana za Kihisabati
title_sw: Shughuli 9: Kupanga Namba (1-10)
title_en: Activity 9: Arranging Numbers (1–10)
about_sw: Kujua mpangilio wa namba kwa mfuatano, kuongeza umakini, kuimarisha kumbukumbu, na kukuza msamiati ya kihisabati.
about_en: Knowing the order of numbers in sequence, increasing attentiveness, strengthening memory, and developing mathematical vocabulary.
materials_sw: Picha/kadi/chati/vibao/ kipande cha boksi za namba (1-10) na video iliyorekodiwa ya namba (1-10)
materials_en: Pictures/cards/charts/boards/cardboard pieces of numbers (1–10) and a pre-recorded video of numbers (1–10)
steps_sw:
1. Andaa eneo salama, wezeshi na jumuishi kwa watoto kukaa/kusimama katika vikundi vidogo vidogo. Zingatia watoto wenye mahitaji maalum
2. Wapatie kadi/picha za namba 1-10 zilizochanganywa
3. Wape muda wa kuchunguza na kupanga namba kwa mfuatano. Tumia wimbo kuchagiza shughuli hiyo
4. Chagua mtoto mmoja mmoja, kisha mruhusu kupanga namba kwa mfuatano.
5. Motisha watoto wakati wa kufanya shughuli hiyo.
6. Chunguza kama kila mtoto kupanga namba (1-10)

TANBIHI: Shughuli hii itawezeshwa kwa vipindi vinne kwa siku tofauti kwa kutumia zana na vifaa pendekezwa pamoja na vile vinavyopatikana kwenye mazingira. Mbinu ya michezo na nyimbo ni muhimu Zaidi kutumika
steps_en:
1. Prepare a safe, facilitative and inclusive space for children to sit/stand in small groups. Consider children with special needs.
2. Give them shuffled number cards/pictures of numbers 1–10.
3. Give them time to examine and arrange the numbers in sequence. Use a song to energise the activity.
4. Select children one by one and allow each to arrange the numbers in sequence.
5. Encourage children while they carry out the activity.
6. Check whether each child can arrange the numbers (1–10).

NOTE: This activity will be facilitated in four sessions on different days using the recommended tools and materials together with those available in the environment. Play and song methods are most important to use.

subject: Stadi za Kihisabati, Sayansi na Tehama: Miaka 4–5 / Kutumia Mazingira Kujenga Dhana za Kihisabati
title_sw: Shughuli 10: Kufuatisha Namba (1-10)
title_en: Activity 10: Tracing Numbers (1–10)
about_sw: Kutamua umbo na muonekano wa namba, kufuatisha na kuandika namba kwa mkono, kukuza msamiati ya kihisabati, kuimairisha umakini na kumbukumbu
about_en: Identifying the shape and appearance of numbers, tracing and writing numbers by hand, developing mathematical vocabulary, strengthening attention and memory
materials_sw: Karatasi za manila, kalamu za rangi / Krayoni / penseli za unene unaofaa watoto, rangi za maji, penseli, kadi/picha za namba 1-10
materials_en: Manila paper, coloured pencils / Crayons / thick pencils suitable for children, watercolours, pencils, number cards/pictures 1–10
steps_sw:
1. Andaa eneo salama, wezeshi na jumuishi kwa watoto kukaa kwenye mkeka au dawati au kiti na meza sahihi kwa umri wa wao. Zingatia watoto wenye mahitaji maalum
2. Anza na wimbo wa uchangamshi kuwaweka watoto tayari kujifunza
3. Wawezeshe namna ya kufuatisha namba kwenye karatasi, huku ukiongea kwa sauti ya upole na watoto kukusikiliza
4. Gawa karatasi za kufuatisha pamoja na zana yeyote (Picha ya namba), wape uhuru wa kufuatisha michoro ya namba zilizopo kwenye karatasi
5. Kagua kuona kama kila mtoto anashiriki kushika kalamu vizuri, na kufuatisha nukta ya umbo la namba husika
6. Chunguza kama mtoto anashiriki kufuatisha michoro ya namba hatua kwa hatua

TANBIHI: Shughuli hii itawezeshwa kwa vipindi vitano tofauti kwa kutumia zana/vifaa pendekezwa pamoja na vile vinavyopatikana kwenye mazingira. Tumia ubunifi wako katika kuwezesha watoto kufuatisha namba
steps_en:
1. Prepare a safe, facilitative and inclusive space for children to sit on a mat or at a desk or chair and table appropriate for their age. Consider children with special needs.
2. Start with an energising song to prepare children for learning.
3. Demonstrate how to trace numbers on paper, speaking gently while children listen.
4. Distribute tracing papers along with any tool (number picture), and allow them the freedom to trace the number outlines on the paper.
5. Check that each child is holding the pencil correctly and tracing the dotted shape of the relevant number.
6. Observe whether each child is participating in tracing the number outlines step by step.

NOTE: This activity will be facilitated in five different sessions using the recommended tools/materials together with those available in the environment. Use your creativity in helping children trace numbers.

subject: Kutumia Mazingira Kujenga Dhana za Kihisabati
title_sw: Shughuli 11: Kupaka Rangi Namba 1–10
title_en: Activity 11: Colouring Numbers 1–10
about_sw: Kutambua umbo na muonekano wa namba, kupaka rangi, kukuza msamiati ya kihisabati, kuimairisha umakini
about_en: Recognising the shape and appearance of numbers, colouring, developing mathematical vocabulary, strengthening concentration
materials_sw: Karatasi krayoni, penseli za rangi, rangi ya maji, brashi ndogo, vikombe vya maji, karatasi za rangi, aproni ya mtoto, kadi za picha au picha kubwa za maumbo mbalimbali ya namba yaliyo pakwa rangi na yasiyo pakwa rangi
materials_en: Crayon paper, coloured pencils, watercolour paints, small brushes, water cups, coloured paper, child's apron, picture cards or large pictures of various number shapes that are coloured and uncoloured
steps_sw:
1. Andaa eneo salama, wezeshi na jumuishi kwa watoto kukaa kwenye mkeka au dawati au viti na meza sahihi kwa umri wa wao. Zingatia watoto wenye mahitaji maalum
2. Anza kwa wimbo wa uchangamshi kuwaweka watoto tayari kwa ujifunzaji
3. Wagawie picha na vifaa vya kupaka rangi
4. Waelekeze watoto namna ya kupaka rangi hatua kwa hatua
5. Wape watoto fursa kupaka rangi kwenye karatasi yenye mchoro wa namba
6. Chunguza kama kila mtoto ameweza kupaka rangi

TANBIHI: Shughuli hii itawezeshwa kwa vipindi vinne tofauti kwa kutumia zana na vifaa pendekezwa. Mbinu ya michezo na nyimbo ni muhimu katika kufanya shughuli ya kuapaka rangi.
steps_en:
1. Prepare a safe, enabling and inclusive space for children to sit on a mat or at desks or chairs and a table appropriate for their age. Pay attention to children with special needs.
2. Start with an energiser song to prepare children for learning.
3. Give out pictures and colouring materials.
4. Guide children on how to colour step by step.
5. Give children the opportunity to colour on paper with a number outline.
6. Check whether every child has been able to colour.

NOTE: This activity can be facilitated in four different sessions using the recommended tools and materials. Play and song strategies are important in carrying out the colouring activity.

subject: Kutumia Mazingira Kujenga Dhana za Kihisabati
title_sw: Shughuli 13: Kuhusianisha Idadi ya Vitu na Namba
title_en: Activity 13: Matching the Quantity of Objects with Numbers
about_sw: Kuhusianisha idadi ya vitu, kuhesabu namba, kukuza msamiati ya kihisabati, kuimarisha umakini na kumbukumbu
about_en: Matching quantities of objects, counting numbers, developing mathematical vocabulary, strengthening concentration and memory
materials_sw: Picha/kadi/chati za namba, vizibo, visoda, vibao, vitofari, vikombe, bakuli, sahani, kokoto, magunzi, chumba za plastiki, vifani vya matunda au matunda halisi mbalimbali
materials_en: Number pictures/cards/charts, bottle tops, soda caps, blocks, buttons, cups, bowls, plates, pebbles, corn cobs, plastic containers, fruit models or various real fruits
steps_sw:
1. Andaa eneo salama, wezeshi na jumuishi kwa watoto kukaa/kusimama katika umbo la U, nusu duara au duara. Zingatia watoto wenye mahitaji maalumu.
2. Panga vifaa mbalimbali kwenye meza, mkeka au turubai ili iwe rahisi kwa watoto kuona na kufuata.
3. Toa mfano rahisi wa kuhusianisha idadi ya vitu na namba, mfano: chupa ya plastiki 1 na namba 1 au kadi yenye picha ya idadi ya kitu kimoja na namba 1.
4. Tumia wimbo wa namba katika shughuli hii kwa kuwaruhusu watoto kuhusianisha idadi ya vitu na namba.
5. Rudia zoezi hili kuhakikisha watoto wameweza kuhusianisha namba na idadi ya vitu.
6. Chunguza kama kila mtoto ameshiriki kuhusianisha idadi ya vitu na namba.

TANBIHI: Shughuli hii itawezeshwa kwa vipindi vitano kwa siku tofauti. Tumia zana/vifaa pendekezwa na vingine vinavyopatikana kwenye mazingira. Shughuli zinazofuata tumia vitu halisi zaidi kuhusianisha idadi ya vitu na namba husika.
steps_en:
1. Prepare a safe, enabling and inclusive space for children to sit/stand in a U-shape, semicircle or circle. Pay attention to children with special needs.
2. Arrange various materials on the table, mat or canvas so it is easy for children to see and follow.
3. Give a simple example of matching the quantity of objects with numbers, e.g. 1 plastic bottle and number 1, or a card with a picture of one object and the number 1.
4. Use a number song in this activity to allow children to match quantities of objects with numbers.
5. Repeat this exercise to ensure children have been able to match numbers with quantities of objects.
6. Check that every child has participated in matching quantities of objects with numbers.

NOTE: This activity will be facilitated in five sessions on different days. Use the recommended tools/materials and others available in the environment. Subsequent activities use more real objects to match the quantity of objects with the relevant number.

subject: Kutumia Mazingira Kujenga Dhana za Kihisabati
title_sw: Shughuli 14: Kutambua Fedha (Sarafu) za Kitanzania Kuanzia 50 Hadi 500
title_en: Activity 14: Identifying Tanzanian Coins from 50 to 500
about_sw: Kubaini fedha za Kitanzania (50–500), kutofautisha thamani ya fedha
about_en: Identifying Tanzanian currency (50–500), distinguishing the value of money
materials_sw: Fedha halisi za Kitanzania (50, 100, 200, 500)
materials_en: Real Tanzanian coins (50, 100, 200, 500)
steps_sw:
1. Andaa eneo salama, wezeshi na jumuishi kwa watoto kukaa/kusimama katika umbo la U, nusu duara au duara. Zingatia watoto wenye mahitaji maalum
2. Panga fedha katika eneo husika ili watoto waone na kufuata.
3. Tumia wimbo rahisi kuwezesha watoto kutambua shilingi 50, 100, 200, 500. Kisha waulize hii ni shilingi ngapi?
4. Wape watoto fursa ya kuchunguza na kutaja fedha za kitanzania.
5. Chunguza kama mtoto anaweza kutambua shilingi 50, 1, 100, 200 na 500.

TANBIHI: Shughuli hii itawezeshwa kwa vipindi vinne kwa siku tofauti. Endelea kutumia fedha halisi katika shughuli zinazofuata. Umakini ni muhimu zaidi ili watoto wasiweke fedha mdomoni na kuleta madhara.
steps_en:
1. Prepare a safe, enabling and inclusive space for children to sit/stand in a U-shape, semicircle or circle. Pay attention to children with special needs.
2. Arrange money in the relevant area so that children can see and follow.
3. Use a simple song to help children identify 50, 100, 200, 500 shillings. Then ask them: how many shillings is this?
4. Give children the opportunity to explore and name Tanzanian coins.
5. Check whether the child can identify 50, 1, 100, 200 and 500 shillings.

NOTE: This activity will be facilitated in four sessions on different days. Continue using real money in subsequent activities. Extra caution is important so that children do not put coins in their mouths and cause harm.

subject: Stadi za Kihisabati, Sayansi na Tehama: Miaka 4–5 / Kufanya Majaribio Rahisi ya Kisayansi
title_sw: Shughuli 1: Kuchunguza vitu katika Mazingira
title_en: Activity 1: Exploring Objects in the Environment
about_sw: Kujenga stadi kuona, kugusa, kunusa na kusikia, kutambua tabia za vitu vinavyomzunguka, kuongeza udadisi, stadi ya kulinganisha, ulewa wa sifa na tabia za vitu mbalimbali, kukuza misamiati
about_en: Building skills of seeing, touching, smelling and hearing, recognising characteristics of surrounding objects, increasing curiosity, comparison skills, understanding the properties and behaviours of various objects, developing vocabulary
materials_sw: Majani, maua, udongo, mchanga, midoli, wanyama, karatasi tofauti tofauti, vipande vya mbao, konokono, sisimizi, viwavi
materials_en: Leaves, flowers, soil, sand, dolls, animals, various types of paper, pieces of wood, snails, ants, caterpillars
steps_sw:
1. Andaa eneo la ndani au nje lenye vitu vya kuangalia/kuchunguza
2. Anza kwa kuwaeleza "Leo tutachunguza vitu mbalimbali kwenye mazingira yetu, tutaangalia, tutagusa, na kuhusisha na mazingira yetu."
3. Waongoze watoto kujibu swali lifuatalo. Mfano: Nani anaweza kutuambia vitu gani vinapatikana katika mazingira yetu?
4. Waambie kuwa, "leo tutatoka nje kwenda kuchunguza vitu vilivyopo katika mazingira yetu. Kila mtoto atachunguza vitu 2–3 kwa undani na tukirudi tutajadili tumeona nini."
5. Wape muda wa dakika 15–20 za kufanya udadisi.
6. Waongoze watoto kwa maswali. Mfano: Mmeona vitu gani mlipokuwa mkifanya uchunguzi? (Pikipiki, Udongo, Nyumba). Mahali gani pengine umewahi kuona hivi vitu? (Barabarani, nyumbani)
7. Mpe kila mtoto fursa ya kueleza vitu walivyogundua na namna wanavyoweza kuvihusianisha vitu hivyo na maisha ya kila siku.
Tanbihi: Shughuli hii itawezeshwa kwa vipindi vinne kwa siku tofauti ili kuwapa nafasi watoto wote kushiriki.
steps_en:
1. Prepare an indoor or outdoor area with objects to observe/explore.
2. Begin by explaining: "Today we will explore various objects in our environment; we will look, touch, and connect with our environment."
3. Guide the children to answer the following question. Example: Who can tell us what objects are found in our environment?
4. Tell them: "Today we will go outside to explore objects found in our environment. Each child will examine 2–3 objects carefully, and when we return we will discuss what we saw."
5. Give them 15–20 minutes to explore.
6. Guide the children with questions. Example: What objects did you see when you were exploring? (Motorbike, Soil, House). Where else have you ever seen these objects? (On the road, at home)
7. Give each child the opportunity to describe the objects they discovered and how they can relate those objects to everyday life.
Note: This activity will be conducted in four sessions on different days to give all children a chance to participate.

subject: Stadi za Kihisabati, Sayansi na Tehama: Miaka 4–5 / Kufanya Majaribio Rahisi ya Kisayansi
title_sw: Shughuli 2: Kupanga vitu kwa sifa katika Mazingira
title_en: Activity 2: Sorting Objects by Attributes in the Environment
about_sw: Ujuzi wa kupanga vitu kwa sifa, kujenga misamiati, kuhusisha na kuoanisha vitu, kukuza fikra dunduizi.
about_en: Skills of sorting objects by attributes, building vocabulary, associating and matching objects, developing critical thinking.
materials_sw: Kadi zenye picha za vitu mbalimbali pamoja na majina yao.
materials_en: Cards with pictures of various objects together with their names.
steps_sw:
1. Waeleze watoto "Leo tutapanga vitu kutokana na sifa vinavyopatikana katika mazingira yetu, tutaangalia, na kupanga kutokana na sifa zao."
2. Waongoze watoto kwa kutumia maswali. Nani anaweza kutaja vitu vinavyopatikana katika mazingira yetu kama nyumbani, kituoni, barabarani.
3. Gawa kadi zenye picha mbalimbali za vifaa na kuwapa fursa ya kuvitaja kwa majina.
4. Waongoze watoto kupanga picha na majina yale kwa makundi ya sifa zao. Mfano: Kadi zote zenye picha za vyombo vya usafiri, mimea, wanyama, vyombo, n.k. kuwekwa pamoja.
5. Elekeza watoto kutaja vitu venye sifa ya mimea, wanyama, vyombo.
6. Waongoze watoto kurudisha picha zote katika makasha yake.
7. Waelekeze watoto kwa mifano namna ya kuweka vitu katika jozi.
8. Toa fursa ya watoto kuhusianisha vitu na mazingira yao halisi ya kila siku.
9. Wape watoto fursa ya kuendelea na shughuli ili kuendeleza ufanisi wa upangaji kulingana na sifa za vitu.
Tanbihi: Shughuli hii itawezeshwa kwa vipindi 4 kwa siku tofauti.
steps_en:
1. Explain to the children: "Today we will sort objects according to the attributes of things found in our environment; we will observe and sort according to their attributes."
2. Guide children using questions. Who can name objects found in our environment such as at home, at school, on the road?
3. Distribute cards with various pictures of objects and give them the opportunity to name them.
4. Guide children to sort the pictures and names into groups by their attributes. Example: All cards with pictures of means of transport, plants, animals, utensils, etc. placed together.
5. Direct children to name things with the characteristics of plants, animals, and utensils.
6. Guide children to return all pictures to their box.
7. Direct children with examples of how to place objects in pairs.
8. Give children the opportunity to relate objects to their real everyday environment.
9. Give children the opportunity to continue the activity to develop efficiency in sorting according to the attributes of objects.
Note: This activity will be conducted in 4 sessions on different days.

subject: Stadi za Kihisabati, Sayansi na Tehama: Miaka 4–5 / Kufanya Majaribio Rahisi ya Kisayansi
title_sw: Shughuli 3: Kutambua rangi mbalimbali
title_en: Activity 3: Identifying Different Colours
about_sw: Ujuzi wa kutambua rangi mbalimbali, Uratibu wa macho na mikono, kuimarisha misuli mikubwa na midogo, kuonyesha hisia, Kujenga misamiati
about_en: Skills of identifying different colours, eye-hand coordination, strengthening large and small muscles, expressing feelings, building vocabulary
materials_sw: Rangi za maji, rangi za chakula, vikombe, maji, kijiti kwa ajili ya kuchanganya rangi, kasha za kadi za rangi na majina. Karatasi.
materials_en: Water paints, food colouring, cups, water, a stick for mixing colours, boxes of colour name cards. Paper.
steps_sw:
1. Andaa rangi za chakula au rangi za maji, na eneo lenye mwanga mzuri ndani au nje.
2. Waeleze watoto "leo tutatambua rangi mbalimbali"
3. Waelekeze watoto kuchukua kadi katika kasha na kuoanisha na kadi za rangi na majina husika kwa kila kadi, kisha wavirudishe sehemu husika.
4. Wape fursa watoto 3 kutoka katika kila kundi kuja kuchukua vikombe vitatu vyenye maji pamoja na rangi na kurudi katika makundi yao.
5. Waeleze watoto kuwa utaonyesha kwa kitendo namna ya kuchanganya rangi (Bluu + Njano) na nitawaonyesha rangi tuliopata.
6. Ongoza watoto kutaja rangi iliopatikana baada ya kuchanganya (Bluu + Njano).
7. Kila kundi litafute kadi na kulinganisha na matokeo ya rangi baada ya kuchanganya.
8. Waelekeze watoto kuchanganya rangi na kutaja rangi iliopatikana baada ya kuchanganya. Mfano: Njano + Nyekundu = Chungwa, Nyekundu + Bluu = Zambarau. Waongoze kwa maswali, kila kundi litafute jina la rangi zilizopatikana baada ya kuchanganya kisha waruhusu watoto kuendelea kuchanganya rangi, kutaja na kutafuta majina ya rangi hizo.
Tanbihi:
1. Kuwa makini wakati wa kuchanganya rangi kuepusha watoto kuchafuka mavazi.
2. Shughuli hii itawezeshwa kwa vipindi 6 kwa siku tofauti.
steps_en:
1. Prepare food colouring or water paints and a well-lit indoor or outdoor area.
2. Explain to the children: "Today we will identify different colours."
3. Direct the children to pick a card from the box and match it with the colour cards and corresponding name cards for each card, then return them to the correct place.
4. Give 3 children from each group the opportunity to come and pick three cups of water with colours and return to their groups.
5. Explain to the children that you will demonstrate how to mix colours (Blue + Yellow) and show them the colour obtained.
6. Guide children to name the colour obtained after mixing (Blue + Yellow).
7. Each group should find the card and compare it with the colour result after mixing.
8. Direct children to mix colours and name the colour obtained after mixing. Example: Yellow + Red = Orange, Red + Blue = Purple. Guide with questions; each group should find the name of the colours obtained after mixing, then allow children to continue mixing colours, naming and finding the names of those colours.
Note:
1. Be careful when mixing colours to prevent children from dirtying their clothes.
2. This activity will be conducted in 6 sessions on different days.

subject: Kusoma katika hatua za awali
title_sw: Shughuli za ziada kwa watoto waliofikisha miaka 5 wakiwa kituoni – Kusoma katika hatua za awali
title_en: Additional activities for children who have turned 5 at the centre – Early reading steps
about_sw: Shughuli za kusoma katika hatua za awali kwa watoto waliofikisha miaka 5 wanaohitaji changamoto zaidi.
about_en: Early reading activities for children who have turned 5 and need additional challenge.
materials_sw: Kadi za herufi, chati ya herufi, kadi za silabi, kadi za maneno, kadi za picha, kadi za picha zenye maneno, vitabu vya picha, vibaofumbo vya herufi, sauti za herufi za irabu na konsonanti zilizorekodiwa
materials_en: Letter cards, letter chart, syllable cards, word cards, picture cards, picture cards with words, picture books, letter puzzles, recorded sounds of vowel and consonant letters
steps_sw:
1. kusikiliza nyimbo, mazungumzo na hadithi fupi
2. kucheza mchezo wa kupashana Habari
3. kufanya majadiliano/mazungumzo
4. kutega na kutegua vitendawili
5. kusimulia hadithi mbalimbali
6. kuelezea shughuli za kila siku
7. kusoma picha
8. kubainisha majina ya vitu mbalimbali katika mazingira
9. kutamka sauti za irabu
10. kuhusianisha herufi za irabu na sauti zake
11. kutamka sauti za konsonanti (b, m, k, d, n)
12. kuhusianisha maumbo ya herufi za konsonanti (b, m, k, d, n) na sauti zake
13. kubaini picha zenye maneno/majina yanayoanza na irabu au konsonanti
steps_en:
1. Listen to songs, conversations and short stories
2. Play the passing-news game
3. Hold discussions/conversations
4. Pose and solve riddles
5. Narrate various stories
6. Explain daily activities
7. Read pictures
8. Identify names of various objects in the environment
9. Pronounce vowel sounds
10. Match vowel letters with their sounds
11. Pronounce consonant sounds (b, m, k, d, n)
12. Match shapes of consonant letters (b, m, k, d, n) with their sounds
13. Identify pictures with words/names that begin with a vowel or consonant

subject: Kuandika katika hatua za awali
title_sw: Shughuli za ziada kwa watoto waliofikisha miaka 5 wakiwa kituoni – Kuandika katika hatua za awali
title_en: Additional activities for children who have turned 5 at the centre – Early writing steps
about_sw: Shughuli za kuandika katika hatua za awali kwa watoto waliofikisha miaka 5 wanaohitaji changamoto zaidi.
about_en: Early writing activities for children who have turned 5 and need additional challenge.
materials_sw: Chaki, vibao, vijiti, udongo wa mfinyanzi, penseli, kalamu rashasha, karatasi, mkasi, vibaofumbo, shanga, mabua, mifuniko ya chupa za plastiki
materials_en: Chalk, slates, sticks, clay, pencils, crayons, paper, scissors, puzzles, beads, straws, plastic bottle caps
steps_sw:
1. Kuumba/kuunda maumbo ya irabu
2. Kufuatisha maumbo ya irabu
3. Kuandika herufi za irabu (a, e, i, o, u) kwa kufuata hatua
4. Kuumba/kuunda maumbo ya konsonanti (b, m, k, d, n)
5. Kufuatisha maumbo ya konsonanti (b, m, k, d, n)
6. Kuandika herufi za konsonanti (b, m, k, d, n) kwa kufuata hatua
steps_en:
1. Create/form shapes of vowels
2. Trace shapes of vowels
3. Write vowel letters (a, e, i, o, u) by following steps
4. Create/form shapes of consonants (b, m, k, d, n)
5. Trace shapes of consonants (b, m, k, d, n)
6. Write consonant letters (b, m, k, d, n) by following steps

subject: Kutumia mazingira, kujenga dhana za kihisabati na kufikiri kimantiki
title_sw: Shughuli za ziada kwa watoto waliofikisha miaka 5 wakiwa kituoni – Kutumia mazingira, kujenga dhana za kihisabati na kufikiri kimantiki
title_en: Additional activities for children who have turned 5 at the centre – Using the environment, building mathematical concepts and logical thinking
about_sw: Shughuli za kutumia mazingira, kujenga dhana za kihisabati na kufikiri kimantiki kwa watoto waliofikisha miaka 5 wanaohitaji changamoto zaidi.
about_en: Activities using the environment, building mathematical concepts and logical thinking for children who have turned 5 and need additional challenge.
materials_sw: Kadi za herufi, chati ya herufi, kadi za silabi, kadi za maneno, kadi za picha, kadi za picha zenye maneno, vitabu vya picha, vibaofumbo vya herufi, sauti za herufi za irabu na konsonanti zilizorekodiwa
materials_en: Letter cards, letter chart, syllable cards, word cards, picture cards, picture cards with words, picture books, letter puzzles, recorded sounds of vowel and consonant letters
steps_sw:
1. kubaini maumbo mbalimbali
2. kubainisha vitu kulingana na sifa zake
3. kupanga vitu kwa mfuatano unaofanana
4. kucheza michezo ya kufananisha na kutofautisha
5. kubainisha nyakati tofauti za siku
6. kubainisha matendo yanayofanywa kulingana
7. kutofautisha siku katika juma
8. kulinganisha vitu kutokana na sifa zake
9. kupima vitu mbalimbali
10. kubainisha vitu vinavyosaidia kujenga dhana ya namba
11. kutamka namba 1 – 20
12. kuhesabu namba 1-20 kwa kutumia vitu
13. kuoanisha idadi ya vitu na namba
14. kutenda vitendo vya kuongeza na kupunguza vitu
15. kubainisha maumbo ya namba kwa kutumia vitu mbalimbali
16. kuumba/kuunda maumbo ya namba
17. kufuatisha maumbo ya namba 1-20
18. kuandika namba 1– 9 hewani, mchangani, kwenye kibao na daftari
19. kutenda vitendo vinavyojenga dhana ya sifuri
steps_en:
1. Identify various shapes
2. Identify objects according to their attributes
3. Arrange objects in a similar sequence
4. Play matching and differentiating games
5. Identify different times of day
6. Identify actions performed correspondingly
7. Differentiate days of the week
8. Compare objects based on their attributes
9. Measure various objects
10. Identify objects that help build the concept of numbers
11. Recite numbers 1–20
12. Count numbers 1–20 using objects
13. Match quantities of objects with numbers
14. Perform actions of adding and subtracting objects
15. Identify shapes of numbers using various objects
16. Create/form shapes of numbers
17. Trace shapes of numbers 1–20
18. Write numbers 1–9 in the air, in sand, on a slate and in a notebook
19. Perform activities that build the concept of zero
